translation_verse: Kiliɛ gi Ɔka yɛ izɛɛyɔni bekpo ʋa a xe izɛɛki ʋa ligbã́ nɛ ɛ, nite ke Obi ye fɛ izɛɛki banama gi apɛ ɛ ligbã́ nɛ.

english_verse: The Father doesn't judge anyone, but he has made his Son the judge of everyone.
translation_verse: Kɔpɔnɔ ɛ Ɔka yɛ ɔ́ʋixwa litsi nì ɔnɔnɔ ɔ. Akɔ kigaglaɛ akí Yebi ye tɔ ɔxwa litsi nì banima.

english_verse: The Father wants all people to honor the Son as much as they honor him. When anyone refuses to honor the Son, this is the same as refusing to honor the Father who sent him.
translation_verse: Atɔ ɔnɔ kakaa ɔkpɛ kubùbù ní Obi ye su ŋwisi kiliɛ gi bizɛɛkpɛ kubùbù ní Ɔka yɛ su kinɛ ɛ. Ɔniliɛ gi ɔ́ʋikpɛ kubùbù ní Obi ye su i, ɔ́ʋikpɛ kubùbù ní Ɔka yɛ gi yɛ akpɛ Obi ye su u.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who hears my message and has faith in the one who sent me has eternal life and will never be condemned. They have already gone from death to life.
translation_verse: “Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ; ɔniliɛ gi enu mɛ eboe la a, xe azɛ ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ mɛ aʋa ŋa ɛ, aamɔ ligbã́ moblo le, lɛ batrábu ye lipɔ; pɔ̀ yɛ kɔɔ edo kutse me aba ligbã́ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain the time will come, and it is already here, when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of God. And those who listen to it will live!
translation_verse: Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ: lipoe le litrába lɛ liba koko gi bekpo ʋa bianu Aya Yebinyime ole lo o, lɛ ba klɔ gi benu lo e, biadzi ligbã́.

english_verse: The Father has the power to give life, and he has given that same power to the Son.
translation_verse: Kiliɛ ɖii gi Ɔka yɛ ɔtutɔ onu ligbã́ nɛ linitɔ lɛ ɛ, nite ke abitɛ Yebinyime si oze ligbã́ nɛ linitɔ lɛ.

english_verse: And he has given his Son the right to judge everyone, because he is the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Lɛ aki Yebinyime kigaglaɛ tɔ ɔxwa litsi lɛ ese linu si yɛ onu Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye.

english_verse: Don't be surprised! The time will come when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of Man,
translation_verse: “Lɛ ya likítu mlo kugyɔ ɔ; lɛ ese linu si lipoe le litraba gi bekpo ʋa petee e, gi bali ni ba idrɔ lɛ mɛ ɛ, bianu yɛ ole lo

english_verse: and they will come out of their graves. Everyone who has done good things will rise to life, but everyone who has done evil things will rise and be condemned.
translation_verse: lɛ biado o, ba klɔ gi bɛbitɛ eboe Gbã ɛ, biayɔ lɛ biadzi ligbã́ a, lɛ ba klɔ gi bɛbitɛ eboe zimizi i, biayɔ lɛ biabu ba lipɔ ɔ.

english_verse: I cannot do anything on my own. The Father sent me, and he is the one who told me how to judge. I judge with fairness, because I obey him, and I don't just try to please myself. Witnesses to Jesus
translation_verse: “Mátratani kididɔ kubitɛ ní mɛ ɔtutɔ isu wla mɛ; Mizɛɛxwa litsi kiliɛ gi Aya asi mɛ ɛ, lɛ mɛ litsixwaxwa lɛ ligyɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si mátrakeni idi si mibitɛ mɛ kupɛpɛɔ aʋa a, pɔ̀ ní ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ mɛ yɛ kupɛpɛɔ aʋa a. Eboe gi ɛdra Yesu su

english_verse: If I speak for myself, there is no way to prove I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: “Xe mapani ní mɛ ɔtutɔ isu ya su i, liboe lɛ gi mapani i, lítraŋa kutu u.

english_verse: But there is someone else who speaks for me, and I know what he says is true.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔnutɔ ɔlɛ gi izɛɛpani ní mɛ su i, lɛ mete si liboe lɛ gi izɛɛpani ní mɛsu i, lilɛ lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: You sent messengers to John, and he told them the truth.
translation_verse: “Yohanes yɛ onu ɔniliɛ gi yɛ kɔ́ mlɛkpɛ mlɔ baxwɛdzɛ ba a, lɛ apani ní anukwarɛ su u.

english_verse: I don't depend on what people say about me, but I tell you these things so that you may be saved.
translation_verse: Aní si mizɛ ɔnɔ gbagbe yɛ katsalia kuŋaŋa a; boŋu i, mapani liboe lɛ tɔ mlamɔ kubúbú.

english_verse: John was a lamp that gave a lot of light, and you were glad to enjoy his light for a while.
translation_verse: Yohanes eze ŋwisi kani kinɛ ɛ, gi asɔ̀ ɔ, xe aki kuklekle e, lɛ lize mlɔ kupɛpɛ ki lipoetɔ si mlanu yɛ eboe la gi eze ŋwisi kuklekle e, gi kwikpɛ mlɔ isami kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But something more important than John speaks for me. I mean the things that the Father has given me to do! All of these speak for me and prove that the Father sent me.
translation_verse: “Pɔ́ katsalia kalɛ mɛ awla gi kalɛ zegbezegbe sani eboa la gi Yohanes apani ní mɛ su i. Ka kenu kidiliɛ gi mizɛɛbitɛ ɛ, gi kinu axwɛ ana gi Mɔka aki mɛ si miblono o, la ɛtrɔ likla lɛ aʋa si Kaka yɛ akpɛ mɛ.

english_verse: The Father who sent me also speaks for me, but you have never heard his voice or seen him face to face.
translation_verse: Lɛ Kakaa gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ, yɛ ɔtutɔ aŋa katsalia aki mɛ. Mlaʋínu yɛ ole loo mɔ yɛ ʋídi i.

english_verse: You search the Scriptures, because you think you will find eternal life in them. The Scriptures tell about me,
translation_verse: Mlɛkpasi kuŋwlimi dradraa, lɛ ese linu si mlegyo edi si gani kɔ mɛ ɛ, mlaamɔ ligbã́ moblo le. Lɛ kuŋwlimi dradraa kɔ tututu kwipani ní mɛ su u!

english_verse: but you refuse to come to me for eternal life.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ kyɛ ɛ, mlápɛ si mlɛba mɔkɔ tɔ mlamɔ ligbã́ nɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I don't care about human praise,
translation_verse: “Mápɛ kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ dɔni banima kɔ ɔ,

english_verse: but I do know that none of you love God.
translation_verse: pɔ̀ mete banɔaklɔ elu gi mlenu i, lɛ mete si mládimɛ ni Aya ní mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I have come with my Father's authority, and you have not welcomed me. But you will welcome people who come on their own.
translation_verse: Maba ní Mɔka yɛ kigaglaɛ mɛ, pɔ̀ mlázi mɛ ɛ; pɔ̀ xe ɔnutɔ aba ní yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kigaglaɛ mɛ ɛ, mlaazi yɛ.

english_verse: How could you possibly believe? You like to have your friends praise you, and you don't care about praise that the only God can give!
translation_verse: Kitɛ mlatani mɛ aʋa kuziŋa gi mlɛdimɛ ni kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ dɔni mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba kɔ ɔ? Pɔ̀ mlékeni idi si mlɛzi kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ gi kwidɔ ní ɔniliɛ gi yɛ tete onu Aya kɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Don't think that I will be the one to accuse you to the Father. You have put your hope in Moses, yet he is the very one who will accuse you.
translation_verse: “Mlakígyo edi si, mɛ matratsà mlɔ onu ki Mɔka a. Mose gi yɛ mɛ mlɔ kudeonu didi yo kulɛ ɛ, yɛ ɖii onu ɔniliɛ gi atrátsà mlɔ onu u.

english_verse: Moses wrote about me, and if you had believed Moses, you would have believed me.
translation_verse: Xe nya mlɛzi Mose aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ; mlazi mɛ aʋa ŋa, lɛ ese linu si yɛ aŋwlimi bidɔ ní mɛ su u.

english_verse: But if you don't believe what Moses wrote, how can you believe what I say?
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ gi mlázi kidiliɛ ɛ gi aŋwlimi aʋa aŋa ɛ, kitɛ mlatani liboe lɛ gi mapani aʋa kuzi ŋa a?”

english_verse: The disciples gathered them up and filled twelve large baskets with what was left over from the five barley loaves.
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛkpɛ kugɔgɔɔ likpɔ ɛ, niteme si dɔni anasi aklã tetsu la gi banima bɛta mɛ ɛ, kupɛ gɔgɔɔ kwiyi kusɔʋi liɔfɔ ni tuʋa.

english_verse: The disciples wanted to take him into the boat, but suddenly the boat reached the shore where they were headed. The Bread That Gives Life
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛdimɛ xe bɛzi yɛ ɛkpɛ ní katapokpaa mɛ ɛ, kyɔŋ ko ɛ, katapokpaa ke ku niklɔ gi bɛzɛtrɛ ɛ. Linɔkpi le lizepe Yesu

english_verse: They replied, “What miracle will you work, so that we can have faith in you? What will you do?
translation_verse: Lɛ beʋi ye si, “Linugutseboe woli wɔabitɛ si kumɔ tɔ kwiazi wɔ aʋa ŋa na a? Ege wɔtrabitɛ ɛ?

english_verse: No one can come to me, unless the Father who sent me makes them want to come. But if they do come, I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: “Ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani mɔkɔ kuba a, xe aní Mɔka gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ, yɛ etini ye apɔni mɛ; lɛ maayɔni yɛ dɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ ní liwe gɔgɔ lɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: “There is a boy here who has five small loaves of barley bread and two fish. But what good is that with all these people?”
translation_verse: “Ɔyasɔʋi ɔtɔ ɔlɛ ní ya gi evu anasi aklã tetsu ni akpa taʋa, pɔ̀ atrána banɔ kisrɛsrɛ liɛ ya onu u.”

english_verse: The ground was covered with grass, and Jesus told his disciples to tell everyone to sit down. About
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu asi ba si, “Mlaki tɔ banima beze kesea.” Siwa sɛ sisrɛ ní niklɔ. Lɛ banima beze kesea ɛ; benyime ba kisrɛsrɛ mɛ kize ŋwisi akpe tietsu kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: They got into a boat and started across for Capernaum. Later that evening Jesus had still not come to them,
translation_verse: lɛ bemu iku ní katapokpa atɔ mɛ ɛ, xe bɛtsa limu ne e, gi bɛɛtrɛ ní Kapernaum i. Kɔna ni lipoe lɛ ya ɛ, kelea keblo pɔ̀ Yesu ɔ́ba oku ba kusi i.

english_verse: Jesus crossed Lake Galilee, which was also known as Lake Tiberias.
translation_verse: Lɛ kede e, Yesu atsa Galilea limu ne atrɛ ní oge lɔ kɔlɔ; bizɛɛxwa lɛ kyɛ si Tiberia limu ne.

english_verse: A large crowd had seen him work miracles to heal the sick, and those people went with him.
translation_verse: Lɛ linɔkpi ʋidi itɔ likuni yɛ kude e, lɛ ese linu si bɛmɔ enugutseboe ala gi akɔ ayɔni banyanya ba ɛ.

english_verse: Philip answered, “Don't you know that it would take almost a year's wages just to buy only a little bread for each of these people?”
translation_verse: Filipo ebu le onu si, “Tɔ ɔnɔ kakaa ɔmɔ sisami ɔkpɛ onugu me e, biazia kibɔ ŋwisi ɔxwɛwa tole yɛ badzidzi ɔgɔtiaʋa liʋɛ kinɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ fɛ kítrana a.”

english_verse: Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter, was one of the disciples. He spoke up and said,
translation_verse: Yɛ badɔkpasi ba mɛ ɔtɔ gi yɛ linyi linu si Andrea a, gi onu Simon Petro yeneminyime e, apani si,

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave thanks to God. Then he passed the bread to the people, and he did the same with the fish, until everyone had plenty to eat.
translation_verse: Yesu akɔ aklã na, lɛ edo Aya ɖase e, xe akɔ la akɔ si balɛ akí banama gi beze ní niklɔ ɛ. Nite ke abitɛ nì akpa la fɛ, lɛ ɔnɔ kakaa amɔ kiliɛ onu gi apɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The people ate all they wanted, and Jesus told his disciples to gather up the leftovers, so that nothing would be wasted.
translation_verse: Gi ba pɔ́ beke e, asi yɛ badɔkpasi ba si, “Mlakpɛ kupɛ gɔgɔɔ likpɔ, mlakíki tɔ kutɔtɔ kudɔ ofu u.”

english_verse: Jesus realized that they would try to force him to be their king. So he went up on a mountain, where he could be alone. Jesus Walks on the Water (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu ete si bɛɛpɛ si beevu ye du kukusi ni kigagla; lɛ loso e, alila ba kusi lɛ edzi atrɛ ní eto la mɛ dzɛ yɛ tete e. Yesu aga Kuni yo aʋa

english_verse: The people who had stayed on the east side of the lake knew that only one boat had been there. They also knew that Jesus had not left in it with his disciples. But the next day
translation_verse: Agi kelea kɛti i, linɔkpi lɛ gi liwɔ limu ne kedea ɛ, livu aŋu lɛ limɔ si katapokpa tiele ko keze níklɔ ɔ. Bete si Yesu ɔ́sɛ ni yɛ badɔkpasi ba a, ba tete ko bɛsɛ.

english_verse: Don't work for food that spoils. Work for food that gives eternal life. The Son of Man will give you this food, because God the Father has given him the right to do so.”
translation_verse: Mlakíwa axwɛ akí kiŋaŋaɛ klɔ gi kiazizi i; boŋu i, mlawa axwɛ akí kiŋaŋaɛ klɔ gi kiaze kí ligbã moblo le e. Bɛ binu kiŋaŋaɛ klɔ gi Ɔnɔ Yebi ye aaki mlɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si Kaka Aya, akɔ yɛ liklatrɔtrɔ lɛ gyesi ye atrɔ ní yɛ aʋa.”

english_verse: One of the prophets wrote, “God will teach all of them.” And so everyone who listens to the Father and learns from him will come to me.
translation_verse: Aya beboedoplɛ ba bɛŋwlimi si, ‘Aya aabasɛ ɔnɔ kakaa bidɔ.’ Ɔniliɛ gi ata Kakaa Aya kutu u, xe akpasi bidɔ dɔni yɛ kɔ ɛ, izɛɛba mɔklɔ.

english_verse: They started arguing with each other and asked, “How can he give us his flesh to eat?”
translation_verse: Lɛ ya limani kusuyeʋi ni kuŋwlɛŋwlɛ ní ba kusi i. Lɛ beʋi si, “Kitɛ onyime liɛ ya aakɔ̀ yɛ kisugyaɛ kí blɔ si kuta na a?”

english_verse: That evening, Jesus' disciples went down to the lake.
translation_verse: Gi kulagɔ kwina ɛ, Yesu yɛ badɔkpasi ba bɛtrɛ ní limù ne kutu,

english_verse: and a strong wind was making the water rough.
translation_verse: Ní lipoe lɛ klɔ mɛ ɛ, liwɔ gagla ɛtɔ likpese kufu gi kuni yo kwizɛɛpisa a.

english_verse: When the disciples had rowed for five or six kilometers, they saw Jesus walking on the water. He kept coming closer to the boat, and they were terrified.
translation_verse: Badɔkpasi ba beku katapokpaa ŋwisi itiplɛkɔ titsu loo tiglo kinɛ ɛ, lɛ gi bɛmɔ Yesu u gi ɛɛga kuni yo aʋa a, xe atrába ní katapokpaa su i, belulu.

english_verse: But he said, “I am Jesus! Don't be afraid!”
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu asi ba si, “Mlakíse lifu u, mɛ mlɛmɔ!”

english_verse: some boats from Tiberias sailed near the place where the crowd had eaten the bread for which the Lord had given thanks.
translation_verse: Kutapokpa dzedze gi kwidɔ Tiberia ɛ, kwiba eku oge no gi eti ipɔni niklɔ gi linɔkpi le lita aklã na gi Ɔkaɛ edo ɖase e ní la litukpo pɔ́ ɛ.

english_verse: They saw that Jesus and his disciples had left. Then they got into the boats and went to Capernaum to look for Jesus.
translation_verse: Gi linɔkpi le limɔ si Yesu ni yɛ badɔkpasi ba báma niklɔ ɛ, beku kutapokpaa klɔ lɛ bɛtrɛ ní Kapernaum gi bɛzɛɛpɛ yɛ ɛ. Yesu Yɛ onu ligbã́ nɛ liklã̀ nɛ

english_verse: They found him on the west side of the lake and asked, “Rabbi, when did you get here?”
translation_verse: Gi bɛmɔ Yesu ní limu ne kapɛ ʋla ɛ, beʋi ye si, “Ɔdɔbasɛ yɛ, lipoe woli wɔba eku ni ya a?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that you are not looking for me because you saw the miracles, but because you ate all the food you wanted.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ, mlɛɛpɛ mɛ lɛ ese linu si mlɛtà aklã na lɛ mleke e, aní si mlenu mɛ enugutseboe la ese e.

english_verse: “What exactly does God want us to do?” the people asked.
translation_verse: Lɛ beʋi ye si, “Ege lilɛ si kubitɛ ɛ, xe kwiawa axwɛ ana gi Aya apɛ si kuwa na a?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “God wants you to have faith in the one he sent.”
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Kidiliɛ gi Aya apɛ si mlabitɛ ɛ, kɛ kinu si mlazi mɛ ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ aʋa aŋa a.”

english_verse: For example, when our ancestors were in the desert, they were given manna to eat. It happened just as the Scriptures say, ‘God gave them bread from heaven to eat.’ ”
translation_verse: Blɔ bakatsitsi ba bɛŋa kiŋaŋaɛ gi bizɛxwa si mana yɛ ní ɔyaya klɔ ɔ, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi bɛŋwlimi kpɛ ní Aya yɛ liboe le me e si, ‘Aki ba aklã na dɔni lifunu ne tɔ batà.’ ”

english_verse: Jesus then told them, “I tell you for certain that Moses wasn't the one who gave you bread from heaven. My Father is the one who gives you the true bread from heaven.
translation_verse: Yesu apani si, “Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ. Aní Mose yɛ aki mlɔ, aklã na gi ɛdɔ lifunu ne e; pɔ̀ Mɔka Aya yɛ izɛki mlɔ aklã na ɔtutɔ lɔ gi ɛdɔ ní lifunu ne e.

english_verse: And the bread that God gives is the one who came down from heaven to give life to the world.”
translation_verse: Lɛ aklã na gi Aya izɛkɔ ɛ, la enu mɛ ɔniliɛ gi eple adɔ ni lifunu ne e, xe izɛki kelea ligbã́ nɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: The people said, “Sir, give us this bread and don't ever stop!”
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛsi Yesu si, “Ɔka, dɔni abla kɔtsinɔ ɛ, ki blɔ liklã̀ nɛ ya lipoe kakaa.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am the bread that gives life! No one who comes to me will ever be hungry. No one who has faith in me will ever be thirsty.
translation_verse: Niklɔ Yesu asi ba si, “Malɛ ŋwisi kiŋaŋa gi kizɛki ligbã́ kinɛ ɛ, Ɔniliɛ gi aba mɔklɔ ɛ, kuʋɛ kútraku ye e; ɔniliɛ gi azɛ mɛ aʋa aŋa ɛ, olile ɔ́traku ye e.

english_verse: I have told you already that you have seen me and still do not have faith in me.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi masi mlɔ kinɛ ɛ, mlɛmɔ mɛ pɔ̀ mlázi mɛ aʋa aŋa a.

english_verse: Everything and everyone that the Father has given me will come to me, and I won't turn any of them away.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa gi Mɔka Aya aki mɛ ɛ, aaba mɔ klɔ. Mátrakpikpini ɔniliɛ gi aaba mɔklɔ liwewe e.

english_verse: I didn't come from heaven to do what I want! I came to do what the Father wants me to do. He sent me,
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si madɔ lifunu ne aba kesea aʋa, aní si tɔ mibitɛ mɛ kupɛpɛɔ aʋa a, pɔ̀ tɔ mibitɛ ní Aya gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ, yɛ kupɛpɛɔ aʋa.

english_verse: and he wants to make certain that none of the ones he has given me will be lost. Instead, he wants me to raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Lɛ linu ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ mɛ ɛ, yɛ kupɛ́pɛ si; mikílila ɔ́tɔtɔ ní banɔaklɔ pɔ́ gi aki mɛ kusi i, pɔ̀ tɔ miyɔni ba pɔ́ dɔni bekpo ʋa me ní liwe gɔgɔ lɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: My Father wants everyone who sees the Son to have faith in him and to have eternal life. Then I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Lɛ kidiliɛ gi Mɔka apɛ́ ɛ, kɛ kinu si; banama pɔ́ gi bɛmɔ Obi ye xe bɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ, bamɔ ligbã́ moblo le. Lɛ maayɔni ba pɔ́ dɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ ní liwe gɔgɔ lɛ aʋa a.”

english_verse: The people started grumbling because Jesus had said he was the bread that had come down from heaven.
translation_verse: Yudanɛ ma bekpese kutɛ̀ gi Yesu apani si, “Mɛ menu liklã̀ nɛ gi lidɔ ní lifunu ne eba a.”

english_verse: They were asking each other, “Isn't he Jesus, the son of Joseph? Don't we know his father and mother? How can he say that he has come down from heaven?”
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛpani si, “Aní onyime liɛ onu Yesu u, Yosef yebinyime na a? Kwite yɛka ni yene. Lɛ kitɛmɛ ɛɛpani abla si ‘madɔ ní lifunu ne aba kesea aʋa na a’?”

english_verse: The only one who has seen the Father is the one who has come from him. No one else has ever seen the Father.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya líbasɛ si ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́mɔ Kaka Aya oʋídi i; mɛ gi madɔ Aya klɔ aba ɛ, mɛ ko mamɔ Kaka a.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who has faith in me has eternal life.
translation_verse: Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ: ɔniliɛ gi azɛ mɛ aʋa aŋa ɛ, ligbã́ moblo le lilɛ yɛ awla.

english_verse: I am the bread that gives life!
translation_verse: Mɛ menu liklã̀ nɛ gi lizɛki ligbã́ nɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Your ancestors ate manna in the desert, and later they died.
translation_verse: Mlɔ bakatsitsi ba bɛŋa mana yɛ ní ɔyaya klɔ pɔ̀ fɛ betse e.

english_verse: But the bread from heaven has come down, so that no one who eats it will ever die.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ liklã̀ ɛnɛ klɔ gi liba kesea aʋa dɔni lifunu ne e, lilɛ nite me si, xe ɔnɔ atà nɛ ɛ, ɔ́tratse e.

english_verse: I am that bread from heaven! Everyone who eats it will live forever. My flesh is the life-giving bread I give to the people of this world.
translation_verse: Mɛ menu liklã̀ nɛ gi lizɛɛki ligbã́ a, gi lidɔ ní lifunu ne eba a. Xe ɔnutɔ atà likla lɛ ya ɛ, aaze ligbã́ moblo le. Liklã̀ ɛnɛ gi maaki yɛ ɛ, lɛ linu mɛ kisugyaɛ gi maakɔ tɔ kelea mɛ banima biadzi ligbã́ a.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that you won't live unless you eat the flesh and drink the blood of the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Yesu asi ba si, “Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ: xe mláta Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye yɛ kisugyaɛ ɛ, xe mlaŋwɛ yɛ ika lɛ ɛ, ligbã́ litraze ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But if you do eat my flesh and drink my blood, you will have eternal life, and I will raise you to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa gi aata mɛ kisugyaɛ ɛ, xe aaŋwɛ mɛ ika lɛ ɛ, aamɔ ligbã́ moblo le, lɛ maayɔni yɛ dɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ ní liwe gɔgɔ lɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: My flesh is the true food, and my blood is the true drink.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si mɛ kisugyaɛ kinu kiŋaŋa ɔtutɔ, lɛ ika lɛ inu biŋwɛŋwɛ ɔtutɔ ɔ.

english_verse: If you eat my flesh and drink my blood, you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa gi aata mɛ kisugyaɛ ɛ xe aaŋwɛ mɛ ika lɛ ɛ, ɔlɛ likpɔ ni mɛ, lɛ mɛ fɛ malɛ likpɔ ni yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The living Father sent me, and I have life because of him. Now everyone who eats my flesh will live because of me.
translation_verse: Kiliɛ gi mɔka Aya gi yɛ awla ligbã́ nɛ lilɛ ɛ, akpɛ mɛ xe malɛ ligbã́ nɛ ɔkpɛ yɛ loso e, nite ke ɔniliɛ gi aata mɛ kisugyaɛ ɛ, aaze ligbã́ kɔkpɛ mɛ loso.

english_verse: The bread that comes down from heaven isn't like what your ancestors ate. They died, but whoever eats this bread will live forever.
translation_verse: Mɛ menu liklã̀ ɛ nɛ gi liba kesea aʋa dɔni lifunu ne e; mlɔ bakatsitsi ba bɛŋa mana yɛ pɔ̀ kyɛ ɛ betse. Banɔaklɔ gi biatà likla ɛ nɛ ya ɛ, biaze ligbã́ moblo le.”

english_verse: Jesus was teaching in a synagogue in Capernaum when he said these things. The Words of Eternal Life
translation_verse: Yesu apani eboa la ya gi azaabasɛ bidɔ ɔ ní Yudanɛ ma ɔtsaklɔ ni Kapernaum. Yesu yɛ eboe la izɛɛki ligba moblo le

english_verse: Many of Jesus' disciples heard him and said, “This is too hard for anyone to understand.”
translation_verse: Gi banɔ glegle e, gi bezeni yɛ kude e, benu eboa la gi apani i, bedo si “Kudɔbasɛ uliɔ ya kwisa ɛgagla. Nyaŋwɛ aatani kɔ ese kunu u?”

english_verse: Jesus knew that his disciples were grumbling. So he asked, “Does this bother you?
translation_verse: Yesu ete si yɛ badɔkpasi ba bɛzɛtɛ ní liboe lɛ ya su, lɛ eʋi ba si, “Eboa la ɛkpɛ mlɔ kunugu gi mlɛɛpɛ si mlɛɛki litukpo na a?

english_verse: What if you should see the Son of Man go up to heaven where he came from?
translation_verse: Kɔ xegi mlɛmɔ mɛ Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye e gi medzi emu niklɔ gi meze xwɛ ɛ?

english_verse: The Spirit is the one who gives life! Human strength can do nothing. The words that I have spoken to you are from that life-giving Spirit.
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ gi kizɛɛki ligbã́ nɛ ɛ, kɛ kinu Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ; ɔnɔ gbagbe kisugyaɛ kínu liboeboe. Eboa la gi mapani akí mlɔ ɛ, enu Ɔfuɛfuɛ gi izɛki ligbã́ a.

english_verse: But some of you refuse to have faith in me.” Jesus said this, because from the beginning he knew who would have faith in him. He also knew which one would betray him.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlɔ mɛ banɔatɔ bázɛ aŋa a.” Yesu ete adɔ ni okpese kɔ banama gi batráziŋa a ni ɔniliɛ gi aakpɛ yɛ awla ɛ.

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “You cannot come to me, unless the Father makes you want to come. That is why I have told these things to all of you.”
translation_verse: Lɛ atrɛ lɛ aʋa si, “Kɔkpɛ eboa la ya loso e, Masi mlɔ si ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani mɔkɔ kuba sani si Mɔka aki yɛ kudeo onu.”

english_verse: Because of what Jesus said, many of his disciples turned their backs on him and stopped following him.
translation_verse: Dɔni lipoe lɛ ya aʋa ɛ, banɔ glegle gi bezeni Yesu kude e, bɛdɔ edzini yɛ kude.

english_verse: Jesus then asked his twelve disciples if they also were going to leave him.
translation_verse: Lɛ eʋi yɛ badɔkpasi liɔfɔ ni tiʋa ba si, “Mlɔ fɛ mlɛpɛ si mlasɛ na a?”

english_verse: Simon Peter answered, “Lord, there is no one else that we can go to! Your words give eternal life.
translation_verse: Simon Petro ebu le onu akí yɛ si, “Ɔkaɛ, nyaŋwɛ kɔ kwiatrɛ ɛ? Eboa la gi izɛɛki Ligbã́ moblo le e, wɔ kɔ́ alɛ.

english_verse: We have faith in you, and we are sure that you are God's Holy One.”
translation_verse: Lɛ abla ɛ, kwizi lɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa lɛ kwite si wɔ́ wonu Ɔdradra yɛ gi ádɔ Aya klɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “I chose all twelve of you, but one of you is a demon!”
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Mɛ makya mlɔ liɔfɔ ni tiaʋa ba, putɔ aní mɛ na a? Pɔ̀ mlɔ mɛ tole onu ozimizi ye ɔnɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot. He would later betray Jesus, even though he was one of the twelve disciples.
translation_verse: Azɛɛpani ní Yuda, gi onu Simon Iskariot yebinyime su u. Lɛ gi Yuda anya eze badɔkpasi liɔfɔ ni tiaʋa ba mɛ tole kyɛ, yɛ atra kpɛ Yesu awla lɛ kede e.

english_verse: Jesus decided to leave Judea and to start going through Galilee because the leaders of the people wanted to kill him.
translation_verse: Ní lɛ ya kede e, Yesu aga aklani Galilea kesea mɛ; ɔ́pɛ si yitrɛ ní Yudea, lɛ ese linu si Yudanɛ baka ba bɛzɛpɛ si beeye ye e.

english_verse: It was almost time for the Festival of Shelters,
translation_verse: Gi lipoe le litiipɔnɔ kí Yudanɛ ma Akpandɔ ʋa Liweŋaŋa nɛ ɛ,

english_verse: and Jesus' brothers said to him, “Why don't you go to Judea? Then your disciples can see what you are doing.
translation_verse: Yesu yɛ beneminyime ba bɛsi yɛ si, “Sɛ niya tɔ trɛ ní Yudea, tɔ wɔ́ badɔkpasi ba, bamɔ enugutseboe a la gi wɔɛbitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: No one does anything in secret, if they want others to know about them. So let the world know what you are doing!”
translation_verse: Ɔnɔnɔ óʋikpo kidiliɛ gi ɛɛbitɛ ɛ, xe apɛ́ si bete ye mɔmɔmɔ ɛ. Agi wɔɛbitɛ eboa la ya ɛ, kí tɔ kelea petee kéte wo!”

english_verse: Even Jesus' own brothers had not yet become his followers.
translation_verse: Bɛpani nite lɛ ese linu si yɛ beneminyime ba ɔtutɔ fɛ bázɛ yɛ aʋa ŋa a.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My time hasn't yet come, but your time is always here.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso Yesu asi ba si, “Lipoe gbã nɛ liʋína ɛki mɛ. Lipoe kakaa linu lipoe gbã ɛki mlɔ kɔ.

english_verse: The people of this world cannot hate you. They hate me, because I tell them that they do evil things.
translation_verse: Kelea mɛ banima bátratani mlɔ kuvu kpɛ lipo me e, pɔ̀ bevu mɛkɔ ɛkpɛ lipo me e, lɛ ese linu si mɛɛsi ba si ba kiboebitɛɛ kiinyani.

english_verse: Go on to the festival. My time hasn't yet come, and I am not going.”
translation_verse: Mlɔ kɔ mlatrɛ ní liwe le ɔŋa klɔ. Máʋitrɛ ní liwe lɛ ya ɔŋakɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si lipoe gbã nɛ liʋína ɛki mɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this and stayed on in Galilee. Jesus at the Festival of Shelters
translation_verse: Asi ba nite lɛ awɔ Galilea ɛ.

english_verse: After Jesus' brothers had gone to the festival, he went secretly, without telling anyone.
translation_verse: Agi yɛ beneminyime ba bɛsɛ ɛtrɛ ní liwe le me e, Yesu fɛ atrɛ, pɔ̀ ɔ́basi isu u.

english_verse: During the festival the leaders of the people looked for Jesus and asked, “Where is he?”
translation_verse: Yudanɛ ma baka ba bɛzɛɛpɛ́ yɛ ní liwe le me, lɛ beʋi si, “Nífɔ onyime liɛ klɔ ɔlɛ ɛ?”

english_verse: The crowds even got into an argument about him. Some were saying, “Jesus is a good man,” while others were saying, “He is lying to everyone.”
translation_verse: Ní linɔkpi le kusi i, bɛzɛɛpani ní yɛ su ní kikpokpo me, banɔatɔ bɛ pani si, “Onu ɔnɔ gbã,” batɔ fɛ si, “owo eemeni banɔ.”

english_verse: But the people were afraid of their leaders, and none of them talked in public about him.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔnɔnɔ óbu le odo ni yɛ su u, lɛ ese linu si bezeese Yudanɛ ma baka ba. Yesu abasɛ bidɔ ní liwe le me

english_verse: When the festival was about half over, Jesus went into the temple and started teaching.
translation_verse: Akpandɔ ʋa Liweŋaŋa nɛ lilɛ lɛ mɛ xe ableke Yesu azeekpese bidɔ mɛ kubasɛ ní Lisɔligba lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The leaders were surprised and said, “How does this man know so much? He has never been taught!”
translation_verse: Yudanɛ baka ba inugu itse, lɛ beʋi si, “Nifɔ onyime liɛ ya yɛ kuboeteo kwidɔ gi bábasɛ yɛ kididɔ ɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am not teaching something I thought up. What I teach comes from the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Kidiliɛ gi mɛɛbasɛ ɛ, ani mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ kinɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ kidɔ ní Aya gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ klɔ.

english_verse: If you really want to obey God, you will know if what I teach comes from God or from me.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa gi apɛ si yibitɛ Aya yɛ kupɛpɛɔ aʋa ɛ, aatè xe kidiliɛ gi mɛɛbasɛ ɛ, kidɔ ní Aya kɔ loo mɛɛpani ní mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ kigagla mɛ.

english_verse: If I wanted to bring honor to myself, I would speak for myself. But I want to honor the one who sent me. This is why I tell the truth and not a lie.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi izɛpani ní yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kigagla mɛ ɛ, ɛɛpɛ kukɔkɔ ɛki isu, Pɔ̀ ɔniliɛ ɛ gi ɛɛpɛ kukɔkɔ ɛki ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ yɛ ɛ, onu anukwarɛ onete lɛ asia atɔtɔ áma ní yɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Didn't Moses give you the Law? Yet none of you obey it! So why do you want to kill me?
translation_verse: Mose aki mlɔ Ɔsã nɔ, putɔ aní te na a? Pɔ̀ mlɔmɛ ɔtɔtɔ ɔʋíbitɛ Ɔsã nɔ aʋa a, Ege lɛ loso mlekeni idi si mleye me e?”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “You're crazy! What makes you think someone wants to kill you?”
translation_verse: Lɛ linɔkpi le libu le onu si, “Ɔfuɛfuɛ zimizi ɔkpasi ní wɔ mɛ ɛ! Nyaŋwɛ eekeni idi si yiye wo o?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I worked one miracle, and it amazed you.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Liboe tile ko mabitɛ, lɛ litu mlɔ petee kugyɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Moses commanded you to circumcise your sons. But it wasn't really Moses who gave you this command. It was your ancestors, and even on the Sabbath you circumcise your sons
translation_verse: Mose akí mlɔ ɔsã si mlatsà ɔyaʋi aki mlɔ bebinyime ba, aní Mose ekpese le pɔ̀ mlɔ baka ba a. Lɛ mlɛzɛɛtsa ɔyaʋi kí bebinyime ba ní Lizemɔniwe le aʋa a.

english_verse: in order to obey the Law of Moses. Why are you angry with me for making someone completely well on the Sabbath?
translation_verse: Xe biatsa ɔyaʋi kí obinyime ní Lizemɔniwe le aʋa a, tɔ bakíta Mose Ɔsã nɔ ese e, ege lɛ loso mlɛmɔ kusuyeʋi ni mɛ si mayɔni ɔnyime ní Lizemɔniwe le aʋa na a?”

english_verse: Some of the people from Jerusalem were saying, “Isn't this the man they want to kill?
translation_verse: Niklɔ banɔatɔ ní Yerusalem bɛpani si, “Aní onyime liɛ ya baka ba bekeni edi si beeye na a?

english_verse: Yet here he is, speaking for everyone to hear. And no one is arguing with him. Do you suppose the authorities know he is the Messiah?
translation_verse: Dike! imɔ yɛ gi ɛɛpani ní ɔha lɔ kusi i, xe baʋíkɔ liboeboe tuni ye e! Kɔ kitsa baka ba bɛtsa lɛ si yɛ onu Kristo ye na a?

english_verse: But how could that be? No one knows where the Messiah will come from, but we know where this man comes from.”
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe Kristo ye aba ɛ, ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́trate niklɔ gi ádɔ ɔ. Lɛ blɔ pɔ̀ kwite niklɔ gi onyime liɛ ya ádɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching in the temple, he shouted, “Do you really think you know me and where I came from? I didn't come on my own! The one who sent me is truthful, and you don't know him.
translation_verse: Agi Yesu azɛɛbasɛ bidɔ mɛ ní Lisɔligba lɛ mɛ ɛ, apani ni ole gagla si, “Ee Mlɛnya ete niklɔ gi madɔ ɔ? Aní mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ kigagla onu ma ba ni ya a. Ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ mɛ ɛ, onu anukwarɛ onete. Mléte ye e,

english_verse: But I know the one who sent me, because I came from him.”
translation_verse: pɔ̀ mete ye, lɛ ese linu si yɛ kɔ madɔ lɛ yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Some of the people wanted to arrest Jesus right then. But no one even laid a hand on him, because his time had not yet come.
translation_verse: Liboe lɛ ya loso e, bekeni edi si beevu ye, pɔ̀ ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́gbɔni yɛ lɛ ese linu si yɛ lipoe le liʋína a.

english_verse: A lot of people in the crowd put their faith in him and said, “When the Messiah comes, he surely won't perform more miracles than this man has done!” Officers Sent To Arrest Jesus
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ banɔ glegle ní linɔkpi le me bɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa a, lɛ bɛpani si, “Xe Kristo ye aba ɛ, aabitɛ enugutseboe sani la ya gi onyime liɛ ya abitɛ na a?”

english_verse: When the Pharisees heard the crowd arguing about Jesus, they got together with the chief priests and sent some temple police to arrest him.
translation_verse: Gi Farisianɛ ma benu linɔkpi le gi liipani eboa la ni ole kpokpo ní Yesu su i, ba ni Kusumu yo baka ba bɛkpɛ kasɔlipea bepepe ba tɔ bevu ye.

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I will be with you a little while longer, and then I will return to the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Yesu apani si, “Malɛ ni mlɔ su lipoe kpekpemi itɔ ko, kɔ medzi atrɛ ní ɔniliɛ gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ klɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You will look for me, but you won't find me. You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: Mlapɛ́ mɛ pɔ̀ mlatrámɔ mɛ ɛ, lɛ mlatrátani niklɔ gi maaze e kuba.”

english_verse: The people asked each other, “Where can he go to keep us from finding him? Is he going to some foreign country where our people live? Is he going there to teach the Greeks?
translation_verse: Lɛ Yudanɛ ma baka ba bɛpani ki bahanuglɔ ba si, “Nifɔ atrátrɛ xe kútramɔ yɛ ɛ? Aatrɛ ní Helanɛ ma ima ʋidi ne me niklɔ gi blɔ akɔanɛ ma ba lɛ ɛ, tɔ yibasɛ Helanɛ ma bidɔ mɛ na a?

english_verse: What did he mean by saying that we will look for him, but won't find him? Why can't we go where he is going?” Streams of Life-Giving Water
translation_verse: Apani si kwitrapɛ́ yɛ pɔ̀ kútramɔ yɛ ɛ, lɛ kútratani niklɔ gi yɛ aze kudzɛ ɛ. Kitɛ liboe lɛ ya ese e?”

english_verse: On the last and most important day of the festival, Jesus stood up and shouted, “If you are thirsty, come to me and drink!
translation_verse: Ní liwe gɔgɔ lɛ aʋa a, gi lɛ lize liweŋaŋa nɛ kumu yɔ mɛ ɛ, Yesu ayɔ alɛɛ, lɛ apani ni ole gagla si, “Ɔniliɛ gi olile eeku i, ɔba mɔklɔ tɔ aaŋwɛ kuni.

english_verse: Have faith in me, and you will have life-giving water flowing from deep inside you, just as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Nite gi kuŋwlimi dradraa kwipani i, Ɔniliɛ gi azɛ mɛ aʋa aŋa ɛ, aaze ŋwisi ligbã́ enitɔ gi eʋiti i, lɛ la kuni yo kwiakpɛza dɔni yɛ mɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the Holy Spirit, who would be given to everyone that had faith in him. The Spirit had not yet been given to anyone, since Jesus had not yet been given his full glory. The People Take Sides
translation_verse: Yesu apani te ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ gi banama a, gi bɛzi yɛ aʋa ŋa ɛ, biazɛ lɛ kede su u. Ní lipoe lɛ klɔ mɛ ɛ, baʋíki Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ fukɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si Yesu ɔ́ʋiyɔ ní yɛ sikusi se kuklekleo me e.

english_verse: When the crowd heard Jesus say this, some of them said, “He must be the Prophet!”
translation_verse: Banɔatɔ ní linɔkpi le me benu yɛ eboe la, lɛ bɛpani si, “Onyime liɛ ya yɛ ɔnyanu Oboedoplɛɛ!”

english_verse: Others said, “He is the Messiah!” Others even said, “Can the Messiah come from Galilee?
translation_verse: Batɔ bedo si, “Ye onu Kristo ye!” Pɔ̀ batɔ fɛ bedo si, “Kristo ye aadɔ Galilea na a?

english_verse: The Scriptures say that the Messiah will come from the family of King David. Doesn't this mean that he will be born in David's hometown of Bethlehem?”
translation_verse: Kuŋwlimi dradra kwipani si, Kristo ye aaze Okusi ye Dawid yɛ lipo me obi lɛ biapɔ yɛ ní Betlehem ɔma lɔ klɔ mɛ gi Dawid eze e.”

english_verse: The people started taking sides against each other because of Jesus.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso kulɛlɛ kwiku linɔkpi le kusi i kɔkpɛ Yesu u.

english_verse: Some of them wanted to arrest him, but no one laid a hand on him. The Leaders Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus
translation_verse: Banɔatɔ bɛpɛ si beevu ye pɔ̀ ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́gbɔni yɛ ɛ. Yudanɛ baka ba ba kumɔziŋaa

english_verse: When the temple police returned to the chief priests and Pharisees, they were asked, “Why didn't you bring Jesus here?”
translation_verse: Agi Kasɔlipea bepepe ba bedzitrɛ ɛ, kusumu yo baka ʋidi ba ni Farisianɛ ma beʋi ba si, “Ege lɛ loso mlámani yɛ ɛ?”

english_verse: They answered, “No one has ever spoken like this man!”
translation_verse: Kasɔlipea bepepe ba bebu le onu si, “Ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́pani nite oʋídi i ŋwisi onyime liɛ ya kinɛ ɛ!”

english_verse: The Pharisees said to them, “Have you also been fooled?
translation_verse: Lɛ Farisianɛ ma beʋi ba si, “Kikyi ekyi mlɔ fɛ axla na a?”

english_verse: Not one of the chief priests or the Pharisees has faith in him.
translation_verse: “Mlenu idi si baka ba mɛ ɔtɔ loo Farisiɔnɛɔtɔ azɛ yɛ aʋa aŋa edi na a?

english_verse: And these people who don't know the Law are under God's curse anyway.”
translation_verse: Linɔkpi lɛ ya líte Mose Ɔsã nɔ loso e, lilɛ ní Aya yɛ ifi xoxo ese!”

english_verse: Nicodemus was there at the time. He was a member of the council, and was the same one who had earlier come to see Jesus. He said,
translation_verse: Baka ba mɛ tole gi onu Farisiɔnɛ eze Nikodemo, onyime liɛ gi yɛ adzɛ Yesu klɔ edi i. Yɛ eʋi bagɔgɔ ba si,

english_verse: “Our Law doesn't let us condemn people before we hear what they have to say. We cannot judge them before we know what they have done.”
translation_verse: “Ni blɔ Ɔsã nɔ onu i, kwiatani ɔnutɔ lipɔ kubu, xe ableke kwianu yɛ liboe le ni kidiliɛ gi abitɛ na a?”

english_verse: Then they said, “Nicodemus, you must be from Galilee! Read the Scriptures, and you will find that no prophet is to come from Galilee.” A Woman Caught in Sin
translation_verse: Bebu le onu si, “Lipɛ, kɔ wɔfɛ Galilea wɔdɔ na a? Mlapami kuŋwlimi yɔ mɛ edi tɔ mlaate si, Aya yɛ Oboedoplɛ ɔtɔtɔ ɔ́dɔ ní Galilea ʋídi i.”

english_verse: but Jesus walked out to the Mount of Olives.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Yesu kɔɔ atrɛ ni Kumu yɔ ise le Ketokpaa aʋa a.

english_verse: Then early the next morning he went to the temple. The people came to him, and he sat down and started teaching them.
translation_verse: Keletitia livlɛ lɛ fififi i, Yesu edzi atrɛ ní Kasɔlipea mɛ. Banima pɔ́ bexogo ní yɛ su u, lɛ eple eze xe ekpese ba bidɔ kubasɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The Pharisees and the teachers of the Law of Moses brought in a woman who had been caught in bed with a man who wasn't her husband. They made her stand in the middle of the crowd.
translation_verse: Ɔsã nɔ badɔbasɛ ba ni Farisianɛ ma bɛmani ɔdzɛ ɔtɔ gi bevu gi ɔfini onyime gi ónu yenye su u, lɛ bɛki si alɛɛ ní ɔnɔha lɔ petee aŋu mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Then they said, “Teacher, this woman was caught sleeping with a man who isn't her husband.
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛsi Yesu si, “Ɔdɔbasɛ yɛ, bevu ɔdzɛ liɛ ya gi ɔfini onyime gi ónu yenye su u.

english_verse: The Law of Moses teaches that a woman like this should be stoned to death! What do you say?”
translation_verse: Ni blɔ ɔsã nɔ onu i, Mose aki blɔ kigagla si lilɛ si basa ɔdzɛ liɛ ya elu akla tɔ otse. Abla ɛ, liboe woli wɔedo o?”

english_verse: They asked Jesus this question, because they wanted to test him and bring some charge against him. But Jesus simply bent over and started writing on the ground with his finger.
translation_verse: Bɛpani nite tɔ bɛkɔ ɛpunu Yesu tɔ biamɔ liboe lɛ gi biakɔtsà yɛ onu i. Pɔ̀ Yesu akpɛ aŋu na mɛ ní kesea lɛ azɛɛŋwlimi bidɔ ní kesea ni yɛ kiwlaʋi yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: They kept on asking Jesus about the woman. Finally, he stood up and said, “If any of you have never sinned, then go ahead and throw the first stone at her!”
translation_verse: Agi balɛ niklɔ xe bɛzeeʋi ye beʋiʋi ʋa ɛ, ayɔ emu lɛ asi ba si, “Mlɔmɛ iliɛ gi ɔ́bitɛ liboe zimizi ʋídi i, otu likla nɛ kuŋwia sa yɛ.”

english_verse: Once again he bent over and began writing on the ground.
translation_verse: Lɛ akpɛ aŋu na mɛ kesea dzɛ xe azaaŋwlimi bidɔ mɛ ni kesea ɛ.

english_verse: The people left one by one, beginning with the oldest. Finally, Jesus and the woman were there alone.
translation_verse: Agi benu liboe le e, bekpese kusɛ tole tole dɔni betsitsi ba aʋa. Yesu tete ko agɔ, nì ɔdzɛɛ gi edzi alɛɛ ni klɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Jesus stood up and asked her, “Where is everyone? Isn't there anyone left to accuse you?”
translation_verse: Yesu ayɔ emu lɛ eʋi ɔdzɛɛ si, “Nifɔ balɛ ɛ? Ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́gɔ gi eebu wɔ lipɔ na a?”

english_verse: “No sir,” the woman answered. Then Jesus told her, “I am not going to accuse you either. You may go now, but don't sin anymore.” Jesus Is the Light for the World
translation_verse: Ebu le onu si, “Ɔka, ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́gɔ ɔ.” Lɛ Yesu apani si, “Lipɛ, kɔlɔ mɛ fɛ mébu wo lipɔ ɔ. Trɛ, pɔ̀ tɔ dɔni abla ɛ, wukíbitɛ eboe zimizi tɔ ɔ.” Yesu Yɛ katsalia kuŋaŋa ní isu ya su i kuli kɔ oze kɔ

english_verse: Once again Jesus spoke to the people. This time he said, “I am the light for the world! Follow me, and you won't be walking in the dark. You will have the light that gives life.”
translation_verse: Yesu apani aki Farisianɛ ma dzɛ si, “Mɛ menu kuklekleo ki kelea mɛ ɛ, ɔniliɛ gi ekuni mɛ kude e, aamɔ kuklekle ki ligbã́ nɛ lɛ ɔ́traga ní litumu me liwewe e.”

english_verse: The Pharisees objected, “You are the only one speaking for yourself, and what you say isn't true!”
translation_verse: Lɛ Farisianɛ ma bɛsi Yesu si, “Abla ɛ wɔɛpani wɔ isu ya su, lɛ eboa la gi wɔɛpani i, áŋa kutu u.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Even if I do speak for myself, what I say is true! I know where I came from and where I am going. But you don't know where I am from or where I am going.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Owo, liaze lɛ mɛ si mɛ isu ya su ko mɛpani, pɔ̀ xe mɛpani ní isu ya su kyɛ ɛ, eboa la gi mapani i, enu anukwarɛɛ lɛ ese linu si mete niklɔ gi madɔ ɛ, ni niklɔ gi mɛɛtrɛ ɛ. Pɔ̀ mléte niklɔ gi madɔ ɔ, loo niklɔ gi mɛɛtrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You judge in the same way that everyone else does, but I don't judge anyone.
translation_verse: Mlɛɛzɛxwa litsi ní kelea mɛ bede ʋa onu; pɔ̀ mɛ kɔ máʋixwa litsi ni ɔnɔnɔ ɔ.

english_verse: If I did judge, I would judge fairly, because I would not be doing it alone. The Father who sent me is here with me.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe mɛ maxwa litsi i, mɛ litsi xwaxwa lɛ liaze anukwarɛɛ lɛ ese linu si aní mɛ tole malɛ ɛ; Kakaa gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ, ɔlɛ ni mɛ.

english_verse: Your Law requires two witnesses to prove that something is true.
translation_verse: Bɛŋwlimi ní mlɔ ɔsã nɔ mɛ si, xe banɔ tiaʋa bɛŋa katsalia ní liboe tile su i, kɔlɔ lilɛ lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: I am one of my witnesses, and the Father who sent me is the other one.
translation_verse: Mɛɛpani mɛ isu ya su, lɛ Kaka gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ fɛ ɛɛpani ní mɛ su u.”

english_verse: “Where is your Father?” they asked. “You don't know me or my Father!” Jesus answered. “If you knew me, you would know my Father.”
translation_verse: Beʋi ye si, “Nifɔ wɔka ɔlɛ ɛ?” Yesu ebu le onu si, “Mléte me loo Mɔka a.” “Xe mlete me e, mlate Mɔka fɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this while he was still teaching in the place where the temple treasures were stored. But no one arrested him, because his time had not yet come. You Cannot Go Where I Am Going
translation_verse: Yesu apani eboa la ya petee gi azaabasɛ bidɔ ni Lisɔligba lɛ kapɛ alia gi ketipɔni bidɔ gyɔgyɔ ʋɛ adaka ʋa ɛ. Pɔ̀ ɔnɔnɔ óvu ye e, lɛ ese linu si yɛ lipoe le liʋína a.

english_verse: Jesus also told them, “I am going away, and you will look for me. But you cannot go where I am going, and you will die with your sins unforgiven.”
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu asi ba dzɛ si, “Matrasɛ̀; lɛ mlɛtrapɛ mɛ, lɛ mlɛtratse ni mlɔ eboe zimizi na mɛ ɛ. Mláma niklɔ gi mɛɛtrɛ ɛ, kudzɛ mɛ.”

english_verse: The people asked, “Does he intend to kill himself? Is that what he means by saying we cannot go where he is going?”
translation_verse: Lɛ Yudanɛ ma beʋi si, “Apani si kutrátani niklɔ gi yɛtrɛ ɛ, kudzɛ. Kibasɛ libasɛ si atra ye isu ya na a?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You are from below, but I am from above. You belong to this world, but I don't.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Mlɔ kɔ ɛ, mlɛdɔ kelea mɛ ní kesea ya, pɔ̀ mɛ kɔ madɔ ní lifunu ne. Mlɛdɔ kelea lia ya mɛ, pɔ̀ mádɔ kelea lia ya mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: This is why I said you will die with your sins unforgiven. If you don't have faith in me for who I am, you will die, and your sins will not be forgiven.”
translation_verse: Lɛ loso masi mlɔ si, mlɛtratse ni mlɔ eboe zimizi na mɛ. Lɛ mlɛtratse ni eboe zimizi na mɛ ɛ, xe mlázi lɛ aʋa aŋa si, ‘Menu ɔniliɛ gi mapani si Menu i.’ ”

english_verse: “Who are you?” they asked Jesus. Jesus answered, “I am exactly who I told you at the beginning.
translation_verse: Beʋi ye si, “wɔ wonu Nyaŋwɛ?” Yesu ebu le onu si, “Ɔniliɛ gi masi mlɔ adɔ ni okpese klɔ si Menu i.

english_verse: There is a lot more I could say to condemn you. But the one who sent me is truthful, and I tell the people of this world only what I have heard from him.”
translation_verse: Eboe glegle alɛ gi maapani ní mlɔ su i, eboe glegle gi aabu mlo lipɔ ɛ. Pɔ̀ ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ mɛ ɛ, yɛ onu anukwarɛ onetee, lɛ mizɛɛsi kelea mɛ banima eboa la klɔ gi menu adɔ ni yɛ klɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: No one understood that Jesus was talking to them about the Father.
translation_verse: Bénu le ese si Yesu azɛɛpani ní Yɛka Aya su u.

english_verse: Jesus went on to say, “When you have lifted up the Son of Man, you will know who I am. You will also know that I don't do anything on my own. I say only what my Father taught me.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e asi ba si, “Xegi mlemuni Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye e, mlaate si, ‘Menu Ɔniliɛ gi Menu i’; kɔlɔ mlatè si máʋibitɛ kididɔ ni mɛ ɔtutɔ isu wla mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ mizɛɛpani kidiliɛ ɖii gi Mɔka abasi mɛ si mipani i.

english_verse: The one who sent me is with me. I always do what pleases him, and he will never leave me.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ɔniliɛ klɔ gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ, ɔlɛ ni mɛ; ɔ́yurɔ mɛ nite ko o, lɛ ese linu si mizɛɛbitɛ kidiliɛ gi kiku yɛ liŋu lipoe kakaa a.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, many of the people put their faith in him. The Truth Will Set You Free
translation_verse: Banɔ glegle gi benu eboa la ya a, gi Yesu azaapani i, bɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa. Abraham yɛ lipo me bebi ba ɔtutɔ ba

english_verse: Jesus told the people who had faith in him, “If you keep on obeying what I have said, you truly are my disciples.
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu asi Yudanɛ ama gi bɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ si, “Xe mlexo mɛ bidɔ basɛbasɛ ʋɛ oto e, kɔlɔ mlanya enu mɛ badɔkpasi;

english_verse: You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.”
translation_verse: mlaate anukwarɛɛ, lɛ anukwarɛɛ aabu mlo o.”

english_verse: They answered, “We are Abraham's children! We have never been anyone's slaves. How can you say we will be set free?”
translation_verse: Bebu le onu ɛki yɛ si, “Abraham yɛ besoebi kunu lɛ kúze ɔnɔnɔ yɛ banɔdzidzi ʋídi. Kitɛ wɔado si biabu blo bibɔ mɛ ɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I tell you for certain that anyone who sins is a slave of sin!
translation_verse: Yesu asi ba si, “Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ: ɔnɔ kakaa gi izɛbitɛ eboe zimizi i, onu ɔnɔ dzidzi kí kuzimizi.

english_verse: And slaves don't stay in the family forever, though the Son will always remain in the family.
translation_verse: Kezese káma ní ɔnɔdzidzi ye awla ní kepea mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ obinyime kɔ kalɛ yɛ awla kɔ tsinɔ ɔ.

english_verse: If the Son gives you freedom, you are free!
translation_verse: Xe Aya Yebi ye ebu mlo bibɔ ʋɛ mɛ ɛ, mlaamɔ ɔwla koŋ.

english_verse: I know that you are from Abraham's family. Yet you want to kill me, because my message isn't really in your hearts.
translation_verse: Mete si Abraham yɛ besoebi mlenu, pɔ̀ mleekeni idi si mleeye me e, lɛ ese linu si mɛ eboe la ámɔ ozekɔ ní mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am telling you what my Father has shown me, just as you are doing what your father has taught you. Your Father Is the Devil
translation_verse: Mizɛɛpani ní kidiliɛ gi mamɔ ní Mɔka klɔ su u, pɔ̀ mlɛzɛɛbitɛ kidiliɛ gi mlɔ ɔkaɛ asi mlɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: The people said to Jesus, “Abraham is our father!” Jesus replied, “If you were Abraham's children, you would do what Abraham did.
translation_verse: Bebu le onu ki Yesu si, “Blɔ ɔkaɛ yɛ onu Abraham.” Yesu ebu le onu si, “Xe lilɛ lɛ mɛ si Abraham yɛ bebi mlenu i, mlaabitɛ kidiliɛ ɖii gi Abraham abitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Instead, you want to kill me for telling you the truth that God gave me. Abraham never did anything like that.
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ gi mabitɛ ko kinu si, misi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ liɛ gi menu adɔ ni Aya klɔ ɛ, pɔ̀ mlɛtrɔ lɛ si mlaaye me e, Abraham ɔ́bitɛ lɛ ya elu u!

english_verse: But you are doing exactly what your father does.” “Don't accuse us of having someone else as our father!” they said. “We just have one father, and he is God.”
translation_verse: Mlɛɛbitɛ kidiliɛ gi mlɔ ɔkaɛ abitɛ ɛ.” bebu le onu si, “Kúnu bahasi bi Aya ɔtutɔ ko onu Ɔka ní blɔ awla.” Yesu apani ozimizi ye bebi ba su

english_verse: Jesus answered: If God were your Father, you would love me, because I came from God and now I am here. He sent me. I did not come on my own.
translation_verse: Yesu asi ba si, “Xe Aya ɔnyanu mlɔ Ɔka ɛ, mlalɔ mɛ, lɛ ese linu si madɔ Aya klɔ lɛ abla ɛ, malɛ ní ya. Mába ní mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ isu wla mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ Aya yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Why can't you understand what I am talking about? Can't you stand to hear what I am saying?
translation_verse: Ege lɛ loso mlaʋínu mɛ eboe la ese e? Lɛ ese linu si mlátratani kulɛ ɛ, xe mlaata mɛ liboe le kutu u, xe mlaanu lɛ ese e.

english_verse: Your father is the devil, and you do exactly what he wants. He has always been a murderer and a liar. There is nothing truthful about him. He speaks on his own, and everything he says is a lie. Not only is he a liar himself, but he is also the father of all lies.
translation_verse: Mlenu mlɔ ɔkaɛ Ozimizi ye yɛ bebi, lɛ mlɛpɛ si mlɛɛbitɛ ní mlɔ ɔkaɛ yɛ bapɛ́pɛ ʋa aʋa a. Dɔni okpese kɔ ɛ, eze ɔnɔye, lɛ óʋize anukwarɛɛ aʋa oʋídi i, lɛ ese linu si anukwarɛɛ ɔ́ma ní yɛ mɛ ɛ. Xe asɛ asia ɛ, ɔ́mɔ kididɔ gi kizizi ní lɛ su u, lɛ ese linu si onu ɔsia nɛ lɛ yɛ onu asia na petee ɔkaɛ.

english_verse: Everything I have told you is true, and you still refuse to have faith in me.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ gi mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ ɛ, lɛ loso mlázi mɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa a.

english_verse: Can any of you accuse me of sin? If you cannot, why won't you have faith in me? After all, I am telling you the truth.
translation_verse: Mlɔ mɛ owoli aatani mɛ lipɔ kubu si mabitɛ liboe zimizi i? Lɛ xe mɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ ɛ, ege lɛ loso mlátrazi mɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa a?

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to God will listen to his message. But you refuse to listen, because you don't belong to God. Jesus and Abraham
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi ádɔ Aya kɔ ɛ, izeenu Aya yɛ eboe la. Mlɔ kɔ ɛ, mládɔ ní Aya kɔ ɔ, lɛ loso mlápɛ si mlɛta yɛ eboe la kutu u.” Yesu ebu isu onu aki Yudanɛ ma

english_verse: The people told Jesus, “We were right to say that you are a Samaritan and that you have a demon in you!”
translation_verse: Yudanɛ ma bebu le onu ɛki Yesu si, “Dani blɔ lini nɛ ligyɔ gi kwipani si Samaria ɔnɛ wonu u, lɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ zimizi ɔkpasi ní wɔ mɛ ɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I don't have a demon in me. I honor my Father, and you refuse to honor me.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Ɔfuɛfuɛ zimizi ɔma ní mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ, mizɛɛkpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ ní Mɔka su, pɔ̀ mlɔ kɔ mlaʋíkpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ mɛ su u.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you obey my words, you will never die.”
translation_verse: Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ: ɔniliɛ gi aaxo mɛ eboe la oto e, ɔ́tratse liwewe e.”

english_verse: Then the people said, “Now we are sure that you have a demon. Abraham is dead, and so are the prophets. How can you say that no one who obeys your words will ever die?
translation_verse: Yudanɛ ma bɛsi Yesu si, “Ableke kwite si ozimizi ye ɔkpasi ní wɔ mɛ! Abraham etse, lɛ Aya yɛ beboedoplɛ ba betse e, pɔ̀ wɔsi ɔniliɛ gi aaxo wɔ eboe la oto e, ɔ́tratse liwewe e.

english_verse: Are you greater than our father Abraham? He died, and so did the prophets. Who do you think you are?”
translation_verse: Blɔ ɔkaɛ Abraham etse; kido woedo si wokeme ɔsani Abraham na a? Lɛ Aya yɛ beboedoplɛ ba fɛ betse e. Nyaŋwɛ koŋ wogyodi si wo nu u?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If I honored myself, it would mean nothing. My Father is the one who honors me. You claim that he is your God,
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Xe nya mɛsi mikpɔ̀ isu i, kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ liɔ klɔ ʋa, kútrayi kididɔ ɔ. Ɔniliɛ gi aakpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ ní mɛ su i, yɛ onu Mɔka ɔniliɛ klɔ ɖii gi mleedo si onu mlɔ Aya a.

english_verse: even though you don't really know him. If I said I didn't know him, I would be a liar, just like all of you. But I know him, and I do what he says.
translation_verse: Mléte ye liwewe e, pɔ̀ mete ye e. Xe nya medo si méte ye e, maadzi ɔsia nɛ ŋwisi mlɔ kiniɛ ɛ. Pɔ̀ mete ye, lɛ mizeexo yɛ liboe le oto o.

english_verse: Your father Abraham was really glad to see me.”
translation_verse: Mlɔ ɔka Abraham amɔ isami si yɛ amɔ mɛ libapoe le; amɔ lɛ, lɛ isami ikuye e.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that even before Abraham was, I was, and I am.”
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ si, xe ableke biapɔ Abraham i, ‘Malɛ’.”

english_verse: The people picked up stones to kill Jesus, but he hid and left the temple.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya loso e, bɛtá akla tɔ bɛɛsa yɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ Yesu ekpo isu ya lɛ asɛ ní Lisɔligba lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: As Jesus walked along, he saw a man who had been blind since birth.
translation_verse: Agi Yesu azɛɛga aza ɛ, amɔ onyime ɔtɔ gi bɛpɔ kaŋupo e.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples asked, “Teacher, why was this man born blind? Was it because he or his parents sinned?”
translation_verse: Yɛ badɔkpasi ba beʋi Yesu si, “Ɔdɔbasɛ yɛ, nyaŋwɛ eboe zimizi ɛki si bapɔ yɛ kaŋupo o? Yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ eboe zimizi na loo yɛ bapɔnɛ ba anɛ na a?”

english_verse: “No, it wasn't!” Jesus answered. “But because of his blindness, you will see God work a miracle for him.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Yɛ kaŋupo kuzeze e, kúdɔ yɛ loo yɛ bapɔnɛ ba eboe zimizi kubitɛ mɛ ɛ. Boŋu i, onu kaŋupo tɔ Aya yɛ kigaglaɛ kɛ axwɛwawa la aŋwi gani yɛ ligbã́ nɛ mɛ.

english_verse: As long as it is day, we must do what the one who sent me wants me to do. When night comes, no one can work.
translation_verse: Gi kelea kaʋíblo e, lilɛ si kuze ní axwɛwawa aʋa kí ɔniliɛ gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ; elesi la ɛtrába gi ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani axwɛ kuwa a.

english_verse: While I am in the world, I am the light for the world.”
translation_verse: Gi malɛ ní kelea mɛ ɛ, mɛ menu kuklekle aki kelea mɛ banima.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, he spit on the ground. He made some mud and smeared it on the man's eyes.
translation_verse: Gi apani nite pɔ́ ɛ, Yesu ebu sita sɛ aplɛ kesea lɛ apita livɔ lɛ ni sɛ ɛ; lɛ akɔ livɔ lɛ asra ní onyimee yɛ bimbi ʋe aʋa ɛ.

english_verse: Then he said, “Go wash off the mud in Siloam Pool.” The man went and washed in Siloam, which means “One Who Is Sent.” When he had washed off the mud, he could see.
translation_verse: Lɛ apani si, “Trɛ tɔ zeplo wɔ aŋu na mɛ ní Siloa limu ne me.” Siloa yɛ ese linu si, “Ɔnɔ gi bɛ kpɛ ɛ.” Lɛ onyimee atrɛ ɛ, xe azeeplo yɛ aŋu na mɛ ɛ, lɛ yɛ bimbi ʋe bidra a, xe edzi aba kepea mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The man's neighbors and the people who had seen him begging wondered if he really could be the same man.
translation_verse: Yɛ axolika ba, ni banama gi bɛmɔ yɛ edi si eze ɔdɔʋi i, beʋi si, “Aní onyime liɛ ya azeeze xe azeeʋi bidɔ mɛ ɛ?”

english_verse: Some of them said he was the same beggar, while others said he only looked like him. But he told them, “I am that man.”
translation_verse: Banɔatɔ bɛpani si, “Yɛ iliɛ klɔ,” pɔ̀ batɔ fɛ si, “Owo aní yɛ; ɔniliɛ ya ɛ, kiyi eyi ye.” Lɛ onyimee ɔtutɔ lɔ edu ɔkli kese si, “Mɛ menu onyimee.”

english_verse: “Then how can you see?” they asked.
translation_verse: Beʋi ye si “Kitɛ lize xe wɔɛtani kumɔ ablɔ kɔ ɔ?”

english_verse: He answered, “Someone named Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. He told me to go and wash it off in Siloam Pool. When I did, I could see.”
translation_verse: Ebu le onu si, “Onyime liɛ gi bɛɛxwa si Yesu i, yɛ apita livɔ lɛ, xe akɔ asra mɛ bimbi ʋe aʋa, lɛ asi mɛ si mitrɛ ní Siloa tɔ mizeeplo mɛ aŋu na mɛ ɛ. Nite si matrɛ, lɛ kiliɛ gi meplo la mɛ ko e, mekpese kumɔ.”

english_verse: “Where is he now?” they asked. “I don't know,” he answered. The Pharisees Try To Find Out What Happened
translation_verse: Beʋi si, “Yɛ xwɛ?” Ebu le onu si, “Méte e.” Farisianɛ ma bɛpami kaŋupoa kumɔmɔ mɛ

english_verse: The day when Jesus made the mud and healed the man was a Sabbath. So the people took the man to the Pharisees.
translation_verse: Liwe lɛ aʋa gi Yesu apita livɔ lɛ ɛ, xe akɔ adra kaŋupoa bimbi ʋe e, lize Lizemɔniwe.

english_verse: They asked him how he was able to see, and he answered, “Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. Then after I washed it off, I could see.”
translation_verse: Lɛ Farisianɛ ma kyɛ beʋi onyimee dzɛ kiliɛ gi lize e, xe ekpese kumɔ ɛ. Asi ba si, “Asra livɔ ní mɛ bimbi ʋe aʋa; Me plo mɛ aŋu na mɛ, lɛ abla ɛ mɛɛmɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: Some of the Pharisees said, “This man Jesus doesn't come from God. If he did, he would not break the law of the Sabbath.” Others asked, “How could someone who is a sinner work such a miracle?” Since the Pharisees could not agree among themselves,
translation_verse: Farisianɛatɔ bɛpani si, “Ɔniliɛ gi abitɛ liboe lɛ ya ɛ, ɔ́tratani Aya kɔ kudɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si óbu Lizemɔniwe le lɛ ɔsã nɔ ɔ.” Batɔ pɔ̀ bɛpani si, “Kitɛ ɔnɔ zimizi aabitɛ enugutseboe a la ya elu u?” Lɛ kulɛlɛ kwiku ba kusi i.

english_verse: they asked the man, “What do you say about this one who healed your eyes?” “He is a prophet!” the man told them.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso Farisianɛ ma beʋi onyimee dzɛ si, “Wɔsi yɛ adra wɔ bimbi ʋe, liboe woli wɔapani ní yɛ su u?” Onyimee ebu le onu si, “Onu Aya yɛ Oboedoplɛ.”

english_verse: But the Jewish leaders would not believe that the man had once been blind. They sent for his parents
translation_verse: Yudanɛ ma, bázɛpɛ si bɛɛzi lɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa si eze kaŋupo edi pɔ̀ abla ɛ, ɛɛtani kumɔ, kɔkpɛni lipoe lɛ gi bɛxwa yɛ bapɔnɛ ba a.

english_verse: and asked them, “Is this the son that you said was born blind? How can he now see?”
translation_verse: lɛ beʋi ba si, “Mlɔ obinyime liɛ ya na a? Mlɔ si bɛpɔ yɛ kaŋupo; kitɛ lilɛ xe abla kɔ ɛɛmɔ ɔ?”

english_verse: The man's parents answered, “We are certain that he is our son, and we know that he was born blind.
translation_verse: Yɛ bapɔnɛ ba bebu le onu si, “Kwite si onu blɔ obinyime, lɛ kwite si bɛpɔ yɛ kaŋupo o.

english_verse: But we don't know how he got his sight or who gave it to him. Ask him! He is old enough to speak for himself.”
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ kúte kiliɛ gi lize e, xe ɛɛmɔ ablɔ kɔ ɔ, lɛ kúte ɔniliɛ gi yɛ adra yɛ bimbi ʋe e. Mleʋi ye; etsi gi aatani isu unu kubu u!”

english_verse: The leaders called the man back and said, “Swear by God to tell the truth! We know that Jesus is a sinner.”
translation_verse: Kuʋla dzɛ, bɛxwa onyimee gi eze kaŋupoa a, lɛ bɛsi yɛ si, “Ka plɛ ni Aya aŋu mɛ si wɔado anukwarɛɛ! Kwite si onyimee liɛ klɔ gi adra wɔ bimbi ʋe e, onu ɔnɔ zimizi.”

english_verse: The man replied, “I don't know if he is a sinner or not. All I know is that I used to be blind, but now I can see!”
translation_verse: Onyimee ebu le onu si, “Méte xe ɔnɔ zimizi onu loo ónu u, kidɔ tile ko mete: Meze kaŋupo pɔ̀ abla ɛ, mɛɛmɔ.”

english_verse: “What did he do to you?” they asked. “How did he heal your eyes?”
translation_verse: Beʋi ye si, “Ege abitɛ aki wɔ, kitɛ lize xe adra wɔ bimbi ʋe e?”

english_verse: The man answered, “I have already told you once, and you refused to listen. Why do you want me to tell you again? Do you also want to become his disciples?”
translation_verse: Ebu le onu si, “Masi mlɔ koko, pɔ̀ mlazi mɛ liboe le e. Ege lɛ loso mlɛpɛ si mleenu le dzɛ ɛ? Putɔ mlɔ fɛ mlaapɛ si mlaaze yɛ badɔkpasi na a?”

english_verse: The leaders insulted the man and said, “You are his follower! We are followers of Moses.
translation_verse: Bekpini ye lɛ bɛpani si, “Wonu ɔka liɛ klɔ yɛ ɔdɔkpasi, pɔ̀ blɔ kɔ ɛ, Mose badɔkpasi kunu.

english_verse: We are sure God spoke to Moses, but we don't even know where Jesus comes from.”
translation_verse: Kwite si Aya egu kunugu aki Mose; ɔniliɛ klɔ kɔ ɛ, blɔ kúte niklɔ gi ádɔ kyɛ ɛ!”

english_verse: “How strange!” the man replied. “He healed my eyes, and yet you don't know where he comes from.
translation_verse: Onyimee ebu le onu aki ba si, “Liboe gi litu mɛ kugyɔ lɛ ya a. Mléte niklɔ gi ádɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ yɛ adra mɛ bimbi ʋe e!

english_verse: We know that God listens only to people who love and obey him. God doesn't listen to sinners.
translation_verse: Kwite si Aya óʋinu banɔ zimizi ba kuxwaxwa a; pɔ̀ izeenu banama gi bizeebù ye e, xe bizɛɛbitɛ ni yɛ kupɛpɛɔ aʋa ɛ ba kuxwaxwa.

english_verse: And this is the first time in history anyone has ever given sight to someone born blind.
translation_verse: Dɔni Kelea okpese klɔ ɛ, kúnu si ɔnɔnɔ adra ɔnɔ gi bɛpɔ kaŋupo e, yɛ bimbi ʋídi.

english_verse: Jesus could not do anything unless he came from God.”
translation_verse: Xe ani Aya kɔ onyime liɛ ya ádɔ ɛ, ɔ́tratani kididɔ kubitɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: The leaders told the man, “You have been a sinner since the day you were born! Do you think you can teach us anything?” Then they said, “You can never come back into any of our synagogues!”
translation_verse: Bebu le onu si, “Bɛpɔ wɔ, bɛgani wɔ lɛ wotsi ní kuzimizi me e, lɛ wɔɛpɛ si wubasɛ blɔ bidɔ ɔ?” Lɛ bɛkpikpini yɛ ní ba ɔtsaklɔ ɛ. Farisianɛ ma kuŋupo ni Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ

english_verse: When Jesus heard what had happened, he went and found the man. Then Jesus asked, “Do you have faith in the Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Agi Yesu enu si bɛkpikpini yɛ ní ba ɔtsaklɔ ɛ, apɛ onyimee amɔ lɛ eʋi ye si, “Wɔzi Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye aʋa ɛɛŋa na a?”

english_verse: He replied, “Sir, if you will tell me who he is, I will put my faith in him.”
translation_verse: Onyimee ebu le onu si, “Ɔka, si mɛ ɔniliɛ gi onu u, tɔ maazi yɛ aʋa ŋa!”

english_verse: “You have already seen him,” Jesus answered, “and right now he is talking with you.”
translation_verse: Yesu asi yɛ si, “Wɔmɔ ɔniɛ koko, yɛ onu ɔniliɛ gi eegu kunugu yo ni wɔ abla a.”

english_verse: The man said, “Lord, I put my faith in you!” Then he worshiped Jesus.
translation_verse: Onyimee apani si, “Ɔka mazi yɛ aʋa aŋa,” lɛ ekutu ye e.

english_verse: Jesus told him, “I came to judge the people of this world. I am here to give sight to the blind and to make blind everyone who can see.”
translation_verse: Yesu apani si, “Maba kelea mɛ si mixwa litsi ni banima, tɔ kuŋupo kumɔ lɛ banama gi bɛɛmɔ ɛ, tɔ biadzi kuŋupo.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “If you were blind, you would not be guilty. But now that you claim to see, you will keep on being guilty.”
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Atɛsi kuŋupo mlenu i, kɔlɔ mlatráŋa lipɔ ɔ; pɔ̀ gi mlɛzi lɛ si mlɛmɔ ɛ, libasɛ si mlɛŋa lipɔ kokoko.”

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain only thieves and robbers climb over the fence instead of going in through the gate to the sheep pen.
translation_verse: Yesu apani si, “Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ: ɔniliɛ gi ɔ́ʋiga kevunu ya tiku iʋesi le kukaa mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ xe izeemuiga ɔkɔ dzedze e tiku i, onu oze ni odètsa.

english_verse: But the gatekeeper opens the gate for the shepherd, and he goes in through it. The sheep know their shepherd's voice. He calls each of them by name and leads them out.
translation_verse: Kevunu ya opepe ye aadra kevunu ya ɔki yɛ: iʋesi le izeenu yɛ ole lo xe axwa yɛ iʋesi le linyi ne e, lɛ aatu ɔtɔ ni lɛ kudono o.

english_verse: When he has led out all of his sheep, he walks in front of them, and they follow, because they know his voice.
translation_verse: Xe ebu le edono e, aaze lɛ ɔtɔ nɔ, lɛ iʋesi le iakuni yɛ kude, lɛ ese linu si íte yɛ ole lo.

english_verse: The sheep will not follow strangers. They don't recognize a stranger's voice, and they run away.
translation_verse: Itrákuni banɔ dzedze kude liwewe e: boŋu i, íase ní banɔ baklɔ ba su lɛ ese linu si íte ba ile le e.”

english_verse: Jesus told the people this story. But they did not understand what he was talking about. Jesus Is the Good Shepherd
translation_verse: Yesu ebu abee liɛ ya aki bà, pɔ̀ bénu yɛ ese e.

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain that I am the gate for the sheep.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso Yesu apani dzɛ si, “Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ si, Mɛ menu kevunu ya aki iʋesi le.

english_verse: Everyone who came before me was a thief or a robber, and the sheep did not listen to any of them.
translation_verse: Banama pɔ́ gi bɛba kpɛ ɔtɔ ɛki mɛ ɛ, bezè bedetsa, lɛ iʋesi le ínu kutu iiki ba a.

english_verse: I am the gate. All who come in through me will be saved. Through me they will come and go and find pasture.
translation_verse: Mɛ menu kevunu ya, ɔniliɛ gi aaga mɛ aʋa xe aatiku kuka mɛ ɛ, aamɔ kubúbú; aatiku lɛ aado lɛ aamɔ ɔdɔŋakɔ gbã a.

english_verse: A thief comes only to rob, kill, and destroy. I came so everyone would have life, and have it fully.
translation_verse: Oze ye kɔ ɛ, izɛɛba tɔ yizuru, yiye ni tɔ yizizi bidɔ. Maba tɔ mlaamɔ ligbã́, ligbã́ ní lɛ kisrɛsrɛ mɛ.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd, and the good shepherd gives up his life for his sheep.
translation_verse: “Mɛ menu oʋesigbanɔ gbã ɛ. Oʋesigbanɔ gbã ɛ, izɛɛkɔ yɛ ligbã́ nɛ ɛkɔ ní yɛ iʋesi le litukpo o.

english_verse: Hired workers are not like the shepherd. They don't own the sheep, and when they see a wolf coming, they run off and leave the sheep. Then the wolf attacks and scatters the flock.
translation_verse: Xe apaa onete ɔtɔ gi ónu oʋesigbanɔ ɔ, xe ónu lɛ onete fɛ ɛ, xe amɔ agbodogli ye e, gi atrába ɛ, aase iʋesi le su kɔ agbodogli ye evu iʋesi le kɔ ìgɔgɔ lɛ ìhle e.

english_verse: Hired workers run away because they don't care about the sheep.
translation_verse: Apaa onetee aase lɛ ese linu si apaa onete ko onu u, lɛ ɔ́kɔ lɛ mɛ ɔki iʋesi le e.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd. I know my sheep, and they know me.
translation_verse: “Mɛ menu oʋesigbanɔ gbã ɛ; lɛ mete mɛ iʋesi le e, lɛ mɛ iʋesi le fɛ ite me e:

english_verse: Just as the Father knows me, I know the Father, and I give up my life for my sheep.
translation_verse: ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Ɔka yɛ ete me e, xe mɛ fɛ mete Ɔka yɛ ɛ, xe makɔ mɛ ligbã́ nɛ akyɛ ní iʋesi le litukpo e.

english_verse: I have other sheep that are not in this sheep pen. I must also bring them together, when they hear my voice. Then there will be one flock of sheep and one shepherd.
translation_verse: Iʋesi dzedze ilɛ gi inu mɛ inɛ ɛ, gi imá ní iʋesi lɛ ya kusi i. Lilɛ si migbani lɛ kyɛ manɔ; ianu mɛ ole lo, lɛ iadzi oʋesiha tole ki oʋesigbanɔ tole e.

english_verse: The Father loves me, because I give up my life, so I may receive it back again.
translation_verse: Mɔka Aya alɔ mɛ lɛ ese linu si madimɛ si maakɔ mɛ ligbã nɛ kɔ, tɔ maadzini le kuzɛ.

english_verse: No one takes my life from me. I give it up willingly! I have the power to give it up and the power to receive it back again, just as my Father commanded me to do.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́trazi mɛ ligbã nɛ ní mɛ awla a. Makɔ lɛ akyɛ ní mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ kupɛ́pɛɔ onu. Kigagla kiliɛ ní mɛ awla si mikɔ lɛ kyɛ, lɛ kigagla kiliɛ ní mɛ awla si midzini le kuzɛ ɛ. Lɛ ya ɔsã Mɔka aki mɛ si mibitɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: The people took sides because of what Jesus had told them.
translation_verse: Kɔkpɛ eboa la ya gi Yesu apani loso e, kulɛlɛ kwiku ní Yudanɛ ma kusi dzɛ.

english_verse: Many of them said, “He has a demon in him! He is crazy! Why listen to him?”
translation_verse: Bamɛ beglegle bɛzɛɛpani si, “Ozimizi ye yɛ ɔkpasi ní yɛ mɛ! Eewle! Ege loso mlɛta yɛ kutu u?”

english_verse: But others said, “How could anyone with a demon in him say these things? No one like this could give sight to a blind person!” Jesus Is Rejected
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ batɔ bɛpani si, “Ɔniliɛ mɛ gi ozimizi ye ɔkpasi i, ɔ́tratani kunugu yo kugu nite me e! Kitɛ ozimizi ye aaki si kuŋupoo kwiamɔ ɔ?” Yudanɛ ma bázɛ Yesu aʋa ɛɛŋa a

english_verse: That winter, Jesus was in Jerusalem for the Temple Festival.
translation_verse: Gi Lisɔligba lɛ onu kudradra Liweŋaŋa nɛ lina ní Yerusalem i, lize kásasi le.

english_verse: One day he was walking in the part of the temple known as Solomon's Porch,
translation_verse: Yesu azɛɛga aza ní Lisɔligba lɛ kapɛa lia gi bizɛxwa si Salomo Ɔviva nɔ mɛ ɛ,

english_verse: and the people gathered all around him. They said, “How long are you going to keep us guessing? If you are the Messiah, tell us plainly!”
translation_verse: lɛ Yudanɛ ma gi bɛklani yɛ ɛ, beʋi ye si, “Kɔzɛna ni lipoe woli onu wɔavu blo odu liboe me modramodra na a? Xe wɔ wonu Kristo ye e, dra lɛ mɛ ki blɔ faã.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I have told you, and you refused to believe me. The things I do by my Father's authority show who I am.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Masi mlɔ kóko, pɔ̀ mlázi mɛ aʋa aŋa a. Axwɛ ana gi mawa gani Mɔka Aya yɛ kigaglaɛ mɛ ɛ, ɛɛpani ní mɛ onu kooko;

english_verse: But since you are not my sheep, you don't believe me.
translation_verse: pɔ̀ mlázi mɛ aʋa aŋa a, gi aní mɛ iʋesi mlenu loso o.

english_verse: My sheep know my voice, and I know them. They follow me,
translation_verse: Mɛ iʋesi le izeenu liboe lɛ gi mizɛɛsi lɛ ɛ; Mete le, lɛ izeeku ni mɛ kude e.

english_verse: and I give them eternal life, so that they will never be lost. No one can snatch them out of my hand.
translation_verse: Maki lɛ ligbã́ moblo le, lɛ ítratse liwewe e. Ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani lɛ kuʋa kuzɛ ní mɛ awla a.

english_verse: My Father gave them to me, and he is greater than all others. No one can snatch them from his hands,
translation_verse: Mɔka gi yɛ akɔ lɛ aki mɛ ɛ, ekeme asani ba petee, lɛ ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani lɛ kuʋa kuzɛ ní Mɔka awla a.

english_verse: and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Mɛ ni Mɔka Aya kunu kidɔ tile.”

english_verse: Once again the people picked up stones in order to kill Jesus.
translation_verse: Lɛ Yudanɛ ma bɛtá akla dzɛ si bɛɛsa yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But he said, “I have shown you many good things my Father sent me to do. Which one are you going to stone me for?”
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Yesu asi ba si, “Mabitɛ bidɔ gbã glegle ní mlɔ kusi gi Kaka Aya aki mɛ si mibitɛ ɛ, bɛ mɛ biwoli su mlɛpɛ si mlɛɛsa mɛ akla na ɛ?”

english_verse: They answered, “We are not stoning you because of any good thing you did. We are stoning you because you did a terrible thing. You are just a man, and here you are claiming to be God!”
translation_verse: Yudanɛ ma bebu le onu si, “Kúpɛ si kusa wɔ akla kɔkpɛ wɔ eboe gbã na, pɔ̀ kɔkpɛ wɔ ebusioboe la loso o! Ɔnɔ ko wo nu, pɔ̀ wɔpɛ si wubitɛ isu ya si wo nu Aya a!”

english_verse: You can't argue with the Scriptures, and God spoke to those people and called them gods.
translation_verse: Kwite si kuŋwlimi yɔ kuli kɔ mɛ kɔ tsini kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ; lɛ Aya axwa banɔaklɔ si balɛ ŋwisi Aya ba, gi benu banɔaklɔ gi ba Aya aki yɛ liboe le e.

english_verse: So why do you accuse me of a terrible sin for saying that I am the Son of God? After all, it is the Father who prepared me for this work. He is also the one who sent me into the world.
translation_verse: Mɛ kɔ ɛ, kikyá Aya akya mɛ xe atsisi mɛ ní kelea mɛ ɛ. Kitɛ mɛ mlaatani kudo si medo libusioboe gi mapani si menu Aya Yebi i?

english_verse: If I don't do as my Father does, you should not believe me.
translation_verse: Kɔlɔ mlakízi mɛ aʋa aŋa a, xe máʋibitɛ ní Mɔka Aya yɛ kupɛpɛɔ aʋa a.

english_verse: But if I do what my Father does, you should believe because of that, even if you don't have faith in me. Then you will know for certain that the Father is one with me, and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe mabitɛ ní kɔ aʋa ɛ, xe mlázi mɛ aʋa aŋa fɛ ɛ, mlazi mɛ axwɛwawa la tete xunyɔ aʋa aŋa, tɔ mlaate le dɔni abla kɔtsinɔ si Kakaa Aya ɔlɛ ní mɛ mɛ̀ lɛ malɛ ní Kakaa Aya mɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Again they wanted to arrest Jesus. But he escaped
translation_verse: Dzɛ ɛ, bɛpɛ si beevu Yesu, pɔ̀ edo ní ba awla a.

english_verse: and crossed the Jordan to the place where John had earlier been baptizing. While Jesus was there,
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu edzi atsa Yordan Onipe lo o, xe atrɛ niklɔ gi Yohanes azaakpɛ kuni yo aki banima kutɔpu yɔ ɛ, lɛ eze ní niklɔ ɛ.

english_verse: many people came to him. They were saying, “John didn't work any miracles, but everything he said about Jesus is true.”
translation_verse: Banɔ glegle bɛba yɛ klɔ. lɛ bɛpani si, “Yohanes ɔ́bitɛ linugutseboe tɔtɔ, pɔ̀ liboe kakaa gi apani ní onyime liɛ ya su i, lilɛ lɛ mɛ.”

english_verse: A lot of those people also put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Lɛ banɔ glegle níklɔ, bɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ.

english_verse: The sisters sent a message to the Lord and told him that his good friend Lazarus was sick.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e benemidzɛ ba bɛtsisi Yesu ole si, “Ɔkaɛ, wɔʋiɛ gi wɔlɔ́ ɛ eetse.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he said, “His sickness won't end in death. It will bring glory to God and his Son.”
translation_verse: Agi Yesu enu liboe le e, apani si, “Kunya liɔ gi Lazaro ɛɛnya ɛ, aní kutsenya a, pɔ̀ liba lɛ mɛ tɔ Aya yɛ kigaglaɛ kiaŋwi lɛ gani Aya aʋa ɛ, Aya Yebi ye aazɛ kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ ɔ.”

english_verse: Then he said to his disciples, “Now we will go back to Judea.”
translation_verse: Lɛ kede e, asi yɛ badɔkpasi ba si, “Mlaki tɔ kudzi trɛ ní Yudea.”

english_verse: “Teacher,” they said, “the people there want to stone you to death! Why do you want to go back?”
translation_verse: Badɔkpasi ba bebu le onu si, “Ɔdɔbasɛ yɛ, Lipoe kpekpemi itɔ ko lɛ ya gi Yudanɛ ma bɛpɛ si bɛɛsa wɔ akla a; pɔ̀ lɛ wɔɛtrɔ si wudzitrɛ niklɔ na a?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Aren't there twelve hours in each day? If you walk during the day, you will have light from the sun, and you won't stumble.
translation_verse: Yesu apani si, “Inyɔ sasa liɔfɔ ni tiʋa ili ní liwe tile me putɔ aníte na a? Loso e, ɔniliɛ gi izɛɛga kemize e, ɔ́tramlima, lɛ ese linu si ɛɛmɔ kelea lia mɛ kuklekleo.”

english_verse: But if you walk during the night, you will stumble, because you don't have any light.”
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe ɛɛga elesi me e, izɛɛmlima lɛ ese linu si ɔʋí mɔ kuklekle e.

english_verse: Then he told them, “Our friend Lazarus is asleep, and I am going there to wake him up.”
translation_verse: Gi Yesu apani eboa la ya ɛ, apɔnɔ si, “Blɔ ɔʋia ɛ Lazaro ɛɛdɔ sra, pɔ̀ mɛɛtrɛ tɔ mizeenyime ye e.”

english_verse: They replied, “Lord, if he is asleep, he will get better.”
translation_verse: Yɛ badɔkpasi ba bebu le onu si, “Ɔkaɛ xegi sra ɛɛdɔ ɛ, kɔlɔ aayɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus really meant that Lazarus was dead, but they thought he was talking only about sleep.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu kɔ azaapani si kitse Lazaro etse, pɔ̀ yɛ badɔkpasi ba kɔ begyodi si sra ko azaadɔ ɔ.

english_verse: I am glad I wasn't there, because now you will have a chance to put your faith in me. Let's go to him.”
translation_verse: pɔ̀ kɔkpɛ mlɔ loso e, lize mɛ ole si, méze ni klɔ xe etse e, tɔ mlaazi ŋa. Mlaki tɔ kutrɛ ní yɛ klɔ.”

english_verse: Thomas, whose nickname was “Twin,” said to the other disciples, “Come on. Let's go, so we can die with him.” Jesus Brings Lazarus to Life
translation_verse: Lɛ Toma gi bizɛxwa si tiaʋa ba obi ye e, asi yɛ ɔha lɔ badɔkpasi ba si, “Mlaki tɔ blɔ kyɛ kutrɛ nì Ɔdɔbasɛ yɛ tɔ blɔ pɔ́ kwiatse ni ye!” Yesu ayɔ ɔna aki Lazaro yɛ benemidzɛ ba

english_verse: When Jesus got to Bethany, he found that Lazarus had already been in the tomb four days.
translation_verse: Agi Yesu azeeku i, amɔ si Lazaro eze ni ɔdrɔ lɔ mɛ ewe tene koko.

english_verse: Bethany was less than three kilometers from Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Betania ɔlɛ ŋwisi itiplɛkɔ tita kinɛ ɛ dɔnɔ ní Yerusalem,

english_verse: and many people had come from the city to comfort Martha and Mary because their brother had died.
translation_verse: lɛ Yudanɛ glegle bɛba Marta ni Maria klɔ si bɛɛyɔ ba ina ní ba oneminyimee kutseo su u.

english_verse: When Martha heard that Jesus had arrived, she went out to meet him, but Mary stayed in the house.
translation_verse: Agi Marta enu si Yesu atrába ɛ, edo azɛɛtsani yɛ pɔ̀ Maria awɔ kepea mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Martha said to Jesus, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.
translation_verse: Marta asi Yesu si, “Ɔkaɛ, atɛsi woze ní ya ɛ, nya monemi ye ótse e!

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Your brother will live again!”
translation_verse: Yesu asi yɛ si, “Wɔ oneminyimee aadzi ligbã́.”

english_verse: Martha answered, “I know he will be raised to life on the last day, when all the dead are raised.”
translation_verse: Marta ebu le onu si, “Mete si aadzi ligbã́ ní liwe gɔgɔ lɛ aʋa.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “I am the one who raises the dead to life! Everyone who has faith in me will live, even if they die.
translation_verse: Yesu asi yɛ si, “Mɛ mizɛɛyɔ ni banɔ ɛdɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ xe mizɛɛki ba ligbã́ a. Ɔnɔ kakaa gi azɛ mɛ aʋa aŋa ɛ, xe etse fɛ ɛ, aaze ligbã́;

english_verse: “Yes, Lord!” she replied. “I believe you are the Christ, the Son of God. You are the one we hoped would come into the world.”
translation_verse: Ebu le onu si, “Ee, Ɔkaɛ! Mazi lɛ aʋa aŋa si wɔ wonu Kristo ye, Aya Yebi ye gi aaba kelea mɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: After Martha said this, she went and privately said to her sister Mary, “The Teacher is here, and he wants to see you.”
translation_verse: Agi Marta apani nite pɔ́ ɛ, edzi atrɛ lɛ azeebu yenemie Maria kuka le asi yɛ si, “Ɔdɔbasɛ yɛ aba lɛ eeʋi wɔ litukpo o.”

english_verse: As soon as Mary heard this, she got up and went out to Jesus.
translation_verse: Gi Maria enu liboe le e, ayɔ lɛ akɔsi azɛɛtsani yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: He was still outside the village where Martha had gone to meet him.
translation_verse: Yesu oʋíku kamamia mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ edzi alɛɛ niklɔ gi Marta atsani yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Many people had come to comfort Mary, and when they saw her quickly leave the house, they thought she was going out to the tomb to cry. So they followed her.
translation_verse: Yudanɛ ama gi beze ní kepea mɛ ɛ, xe bɛzɛyɔ Maria ɔna nɔ ɛ, bekuni yɛ kude gi bɛmɔ si ayɔ zia a, xe akɔsi edo e. Begyo edi si ɛɛtrɛ ní ɔdrɔ lɔ su si yizebemi.

english_verse: Mary went to where Jesus was. Then as soon as she saw him, she knelt at his feet and said, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.”
translation_verse: Gi Maria azeeku niklɔ gi Yesu ɔlɛ ɛ, xe amɔ yɛ ko e, adɔ yɛ ikli lɛ onu lɛ apani si, “Ɔkaɛ, atɛsi woze niya ɛ, nya moneminyimee ótse e!”

english_verse: When Jesus saw that Mary and the people with her were crying, he was terribly upset
translation_verse: Gi Yesu amɔ yɛ gi eebemi i, xe amɔ kiliɛ gi banima ní yɛ su fɛ bezeebemi i; limi yɛ aʋa lɛ atani i.

english_verse: and asked, “Where have you put his body?” They replied, “Lord, come and you will see.”
translation_verse: Lɛ eʋi si, “Nifɔ mlevive ye e?” Bebu le onu si, “Ɔkaɛ ga ba tɔ ga di.”

english_verse: and the people said, “See how much he loved Lazarus.”
translation_verse: Lɛ Yudanɛ ma bɛsi ba ahanuglɔ ba si, “Mledi kiliɛ gi alɔ yɛ ɛ!”

english_verse: Some of them said, “He gives sight to the blind. Why couldn't he have kept Lazarus from dying?”
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ba mɛ batɔ beʋi ba hanuglɔ ba si, “Aki si kaŋupoa kɛ mɔ, aníte e? Kitani ɔ́tratani kuki si onyime liɛ ɔ́tratse na a?” Yesu ayɔ ni Lazaro adɔ ni bekpo ʋa mɛ

english_verse: Jesus was still terribly upset. So he went to the tomb, which was a cave with a stone rolled against the entrance.
translation_verse: Limi Yesu aʋa lɛ atani kuʋla dzɛ ɛ, lɛ atrɛ ni ɔdrɔ lɔ su i. Ɔdrɔ lɔ onu kuke gi bebu ikpɛ ní liklakpɔ mɛ ɛ, xe bɛkɔ likla ʋidi itɔ ɛda ní lɔ onu i.

english_verse: Then he told the people to roll the stone away. But Martha said, “Lord, you know that Lazarus has been dead four days, and there will be a bad smell.”
translation_verse: Yesu apani si, “Mlemli likla nɛ azanɔ!” Marta, gi onu okpo ye yenemidzɛ, ebu le onu si, “Ɔkaɛ, ɔfũ nyaninyani ɔtɔ aaze. Bevive ye ewe tene la ya a!”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Didn't I tell you that if you had faith, you would see the glory of God?”
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu asi yɛ si, “Mási wɔ si wɔamɔ Aya yɛ kigaglaɛ xegi wɔzi ŋa na a?”

english_verse: After the stone had been rolled aside, Jesus looked up toward heaven and prayed, “Father, I thank you for answering my prayer.
translation_verse: Bemli likla nɛ ɛzanɔ. Lɛ Yesu edi lifunu ne lɛ apani si, “Kakaa Aya, medo wɔ ɖase si wuzɛɛta mɛ kutu xe maxwa wɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I know that you always answer my prayers. But I said this, so the people here would believe you sent me.”
translation_verse: Mete si wuzeenu mɛ eboe la, pɔ̀ mapani nite kɔkpɛ banama gi bali ní ya loso o, tɔ biazɛ lɛ aʋa ŋa si wɔ́ wɔkpɛ mɛ.”

english_verse: When Jesus had finished praying, he shouted, “Lazarus, come out!”
translation_verse: Gi axwa Aya pɔ́ ɛ, axwa nì ole gagla si, “Lazaro do ba!”
