english_verse: The man who had been dead came out. His hands and feet were wrapped with strips of burial cloth, and a cloth covered his face. Jesus then told the people, “Untie him and let him go.” The Plot To Kill Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Okpo ye edo aba, bɛxla yɛ iwla lɛ ni ikli lɛ ni yɛ aŋu na mɛ ni basa ba gi bɛkɔ evive ye e. Yesu asi ba si, “Mleble ye tɔ ɔsɛ.” Yudanɛ ma bɛbitɛ kunyanya si biaye Yesu

english_verse: Many of the people who had come to visit Mary saw the things Jesus did, and they put their faith in him.
translation_verse: Yudanɛ glegle gi bɛba si bedi Maria a, xe bɛmɔ kidiliɛ gi Yesu abitɛ ɛ, bɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa.

english_verse: Others went to the Pharisees and told what Jesus had done.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ batɔ bedzitrɛ ní Farisianɛ ma klɔ lɛ bɛsi ba kidiliɛ gi Yesu abitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Then the chief priests and the Pharisees called the council together and said, “What should we do? This man is working a lot of miracles.
translation_verse: Lɛ Farisianɛ ma ni kusumu yo baka ʋidi ba bɛtsa nì Yudanɛ ma baka ba lihakpɔ lɛ, lɛ bɛpani si, “Ege kwibitɛ ɛ? Mledi enugutseboe ala gi onyime liɛ ɛɛbitɛ ɛ!

english_verse: If we don't stop him now, everyone will put their faith in him. Then the Romans will come and destroy our temple and our nation.”
translation_verse: Xe kwiki yɛ kudeo onu si ɔtrɛ lɛ aʋa te e, ɔnɔ kakaa aazi yɛ aʋa ŋa, lɛ Roma banɛ baka ba biayɔ ní blɔ su u, lɛ biayaʋi blɔ Lisɔligba lɛ kɔ bɛzi blɔ kesea ɛ!”

english_verse: One of the council members was Caiaphas, who was also high priest that year. He spoke up and said, “You people don't have any sense at all!
translation_verse: Ba mɛ tole gi yɛ linyi si Kayafa a, gi eze Kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ye ni ligɔɛ lɛ klɔ mɛ ɛ, apani si, “Mléte liboe lɛ gi liiba koŋ u!

english_verse: Don't you know it is better for one person to die for the people than for the whole nation to be destroyed?”
translation_verse: Futɔ mléte si lipɛ sanɔ si mlaki tɔ ɔnɔ tole otse ní banima petee litukpo, si tɔ kesea petee kakyrɔ na a?”

english_verse: Caiaphas did not say this on his own. As high priest that year, he was prophesying that Jesus would die for the nation.
translation_verse: Sugba ɛ, ɔ́pani liboe lɛ ya ní yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ isu wla mɛ ɛ; pɔ̀ gi eze Kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ye ni ligɔɛ lɛ klɔ mɛ ɛ, azeedo liboe aplɛ si Yesu atrátse ní Yuda kesea petee litukpo.

english_verse: Yet Jesus would not die just for the Jewish nation. He would die to bring together all of God's scattered people.
translation_verse: Lɛ aní kí ba tete e, pɔ̀ tɔ ɔkpɛ Aya yɛ banama petee gi behle eku kelea mɛ likpɔ ɔ.

english_verse: From that day on, the council started making plans to put Jesus to death.
translation_verse: Dɔni liwe lɛ klɔ aʋa kɔtsinɔ ɛ, Yudanɛ baka ba bɛ́nya nɛ lɛ bɛzɛpɛ́ kudeo liɔ onu gi biaga a, xe biaye Yesu i.

english_verse: Because of this plot against him, Jesus stopped going around in public. He went to the town of Ephraim, which was near the desert, and he stayed there with his disciples.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso Yesu ɔ́zeedo ní Yudanɛ ma kusi tɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ asɛ lɛ atrɛ níklɔ gi eti ipɔni ɔyaya kɔ ní Efrayim kamamia mɛ ɛ, niklɔ eze ni yɛ badɔkpasi ba.

english_verse: It was almost time for Passover. Many of the Jewish people who lived out in the country had come to Jerusalem to get themselves ready for the festival.
translation_verse: Lipoe le lina pɔ́ ki Kutselidɔzawe le kuŋaŋaa, lɛ banɔ glegle bɛdɔ ní ba izeklɔ lɛ bemu itrɛ ní Yerusalem tɔ bezeexo kusuplo ligoʋi le kpɛ ɔtɔ ɛki liwe le e.

english_verse: They looked around for Jesus. Then when they were in the temple, they asked each other, “You don't think he will come here for Passover, do you?”
translation_verse: Bɛzɛɛpɛ́ Yesu, lɛ gi bɛkpɛ likpɔ ní Lisɔligba lɛ mɛ ɛ, beʋi ba ahanuglɔ ba si, “Kitɛ wogyodi i? Atrába liwe le me, futɔ ɔ́traba na a?”

english_verse: The chief priests and the Pharisees told the people to let them know if any of them saw Jesus. This is how they hoped to arrest him.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Kusumu yo baka ba ni Farisianɛ ma bɛki ɔsã ɛplɛ si, xe ɔnutɔ ete niklɔ gi Yesu ɔlɛ ɛ, lilɛ si ɔga ki kutète, tɔ biavu ye.

english_verse: If you serve me, you must go with me. My servants will be with me wherever I am. If you serve me, my Father will honor you.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa gi apɛ si yiwa mɛ lixwɛ nɛ ɛ, lilɛ si okuni mɛ kude tɔ mɛ ɔnɔsumu ye aaze ni mɛ su níklɔ gi malɛ ɛ. Lɛ Mɔka Aya aakpɛ kubùbù ní ɔnɔ kakaa gi aawa mɛ axwɛ na su. Yesu apani ní Yɛ kutseo su

english_verse: Judas did not really care about the poor. He asked this because he carried the moneybag and sometimes would steal from it.
translation_verse: Apani nite, aní si akɔ lɛ mɛ aki bazianete ba pɔ̀ lɛ ese linu si onu oze. Yɛ klɔ kibɔɛ kepimia kalɛ lɛ izɛɛkpɛ awla kɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: they took palm branches and went out to greet him. They shouted, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord! God bless the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛkɔ siwlawla sɛ ɛ, xe bɛzɛtsani yɛ nì ozi si, “Hosana! Aya ɔkrira ɔniliɛ gi atrába ní Ɔkaɛ linyi ne me e! Aya ɔkrira Israel Okusi ye!”

english_verse: Jesus found a donkey and rode on it, just as the Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Yesu amɔ tedzi obi lɛ emu atrɔ yɛ aʋa ŋwisi kiliɛ gi kuŋwlimi dradra kwipani kinɛ ɛ si,

english_verse: Mary took a very expensive bottle of perfume and poured it on Jesus' feet. She wiped them with her hair, and the sweet smell of the perfume filled the house.
translation_verse: Lɛ Maria akɔ nad kumu flafla gi kwizi kedzi i, tukpa likpe akɔ abali ní Yesu kuklikpɔɔ xe akɔ yɛ siya sɛ etsoli i. Kumu yɔ ɔfũ nɔ ɛzi kepea petee me.

english_verse: A lot of people came when they heard that Jesus was there. They also wanted to see Lazarus, because Jesus had raised him from death.
translation_verse: Gi Yudanɛ glegle benu si Yesu ɔlɛ ní Betania ɛ, bɛtrɛ níklɔ aní Yesu tete loso pɔ̀ tɔ bɛɛmɔ Lazaro gi Yesu ayɔnɔ dɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: A meal had been prepared for Jesus. Martha was doing the serving, and Lazarus himself was there.
translation_verse: Bɛtɔ bilagɔdɔ ɛki yɛ níklɔ, Marta esumu ní ɔkplɔ nɔ su; Lazaro fɛ eze ní banama gi beze ɔkplɔ nɔ su ni Yesu kusi i.

english_verse: A disciple named Judas Iscariot was there. He was the one who was going to betray Jesus, and he asked,
translation_verse: Yesu yɛ badɔkpasi ba mɛ tole, Yuda Iskariot, ɔniliɛ gi yɛ atrábu ye kɔ ɛ, apani si,

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Leave her alone! She has kept this perfume for the day of my burial.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Yesu apani si, “Mla yurɔ yɛ! kidiliɛ gi abitɛ ɛ, abitɛ kɛ aki mɛ livive we le.

english_verse: You will always have the poor with you, but you won't always have me.” A Plot To Kill Lazarus
translation_verse: Bazianete ba kɔ bali ní mlɔ su lipoe kakaa, pɔ̀ mátraze mlɔ su i tsinɔ ɔ.” Yudanɛ ma bɛnya ni Lazaro su

english_verse: So the chief priests made plans to kill Lazarus.
translation_verse: Lɛ Kusumu yo baka ʋidi ba bɛbitɛ batrɔtrɔ tɔ beye Lazaro fɛ ɛ,

english_verse: Philip from Bethsaida in Galilee was there too. So they went to him and said, “Sir, we would like to meet Jesus.”
translation_verse: Bɛtrɛ ní Filipo gi ádɔ Betsaida ní Galilea ɛ, klɔ lɛ bɛpani si, “Ɔka, kwipɛ si kumɔ Yesu.”

english_verse: But the Pharisees said to each other, “There is nothing we can do! Everyone in the world is following Jesus.” Some Greeks Want To Meet Jesus
translation_verse: Lɛ Farisianɛ ma bɛpani ki ba ahanuglɔ ba si, “Mlɛ mɔ, kuʋíbu kakli koŋu! Mledi, kelea petee kalɛ ni yɛ kude!” Hela banɛ batɔ bɛpɛ si bɛɛmɔ Yesu

english_verse: So Father, bring glory to yourself. A voice from heaven then said, “I have already brought glory to myself, and I will do it again!”
translation_verse: Kaka Aya, Kpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ ní wɔ linyi ne su! Lɛ ole ɔtɔ eyi idɔni lifunu ne si, “Makpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ ní lɛ su, lɛ maakpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ lɛ su dzɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: “The Lord has blinded the eyes of the people, and he has made the people stubborn. He did this so that they could not see or understand, and so that they would not turn to the Lord and be healed.”
translation_verse: “Aya eni ba bimbi ʋe lɛ aki si ba begyodi ba mɛ bá dra, tɔ ba bimbi ʋe biki mɔ lɛ bátranu eboe ese ni ba begyodi ʋa kyɛ ɛ, lɛ batrá kyi ba mɔkɔ ɔ xe maayɔni ba a.”

english_verse: The next day a large crowd was in Jerusalem for Passover. When they heard that Jesus was coming for the festival,
translation_verse: Keletitia mɛ ɛ, linɔkpi ʋidi itɔ gi liba Kutseolidɔzawe le me e, linu si Yesu ɔlɛ kudeo me gi atrába Yerusalem.

english_verse: “People of Jerusalem, don't be afraid! Your King is now coming, and he is riding on a donkey.”
translation_verse: “Mlakíse lifu u, mlɔ Zion bebi ʋa a! Mledi ke! mlɔ okusi ye atrába, ɔtini ní tedzi obi ye aʋa a.”

english_verse: At first, Jesus' disciples did not understand. But after he had been given his glory, they remembered all this. Everything had happened exactly as the Scriptures said it would.
translation_verse: Yɛ badɔkpasi ba bénu le ese ní lipoe lɛ klɔ mɛ ɛ; pɔ̀ gi bɛyɔni Yesu ní yɛ kuklekleo me e, bɛplɛ aŋu si kuŋwlimi dradraa kwipani nite ní yɛ su lɛ eboa la ya bɛbitɛ ɛyurɔ yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: A crowd had come to meet Jesus because they had seen him call Lazarus out of the tomb. They kept talking about him and this miracle.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso linɔkpi le lizɛɛtsani yɛ, lɛ ese linu si benu si abitɛ linugutseboe lɛ ya.

english_verse: Some Greeks had gone to Jerusalem to worship during Passover.
translation_verse: Hela banɛ batɔ beze ní banama gi bɛtrɛ ní Yerusalem si beezesumu Aya ní liwe le me kusi i.

english_verse: Jesus said: The time has come for the Son of Man to be given his glory.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu aki ba si, “Lipoe le lina gi Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye aazi kuklekle ʋidi i.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that a grain of wheat that falls on the ground will never be more than one grain unless it dies. But if it dies, it will produce lots of wheat.
translation_verse: Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ si; limlɔbi tile e, nite ko liaze xe béglu le e, xe lítse e. Pɔ̀ xe litsé e, lɛ kɔ liayo ebi ní kisrɛsrɛ mɛ.

english_verse: If you love your life, you will lose it. If you give it up in this world, you will be given eternal life.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi adimɛ ni yɛ ligbã nɛ ɛ, aalila lɛ; ɔniliɛ gi ɔ́dimɛ ni yɛ ligbã nɛ ni kelea lia mɛ ɛ, abla lɛ ɔki ligbã́ moblo le.

english_verse: Now I am deeply troubled, and I don't know what to say. But I must not ask my Father to keep me from this time of suffering. In fact, I came into the world to suffer.
translation_verse: “Yesu apani si, “Abla ɛ, mɛ ɔna nɔ ɛxixa lɛ liboe woli pani i? Mipani si, ‘Kaka Aya kitɔ ɔnyɔsasaa lɔ ya ɔdɔ mɛ ɔza na a?’ Pɔ̀ lɛ loso maba atɔ miga ɔnyɔsasa lɔ ya kini mɔmɔɛ mɛ.”

english_verse: When the crowd heard the voice, some of them thought it was thunder. Others thought an angel had spoken to Jesus.
translation_verse: Linɔkpii lɛ gi lize níklɔ ɛ, linu ole lo, lɛ batɔ bɛpani si dzeni eegu u, batɔ fɛ si Aya ɔxwɛdzɛ yɛ egu kunugu aki yɛ ɛ!

english_verse: Then Jesus told the crowd, “That voice spoke to help you, not me.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Yesu asi linɔkpi le si, “Aní mɛ loso ole lo egu kunugu yo, pɔ̀ mlɔ loso o.

english_verse: This world's people are now being judged, and the ruler of this world is already being thrown out!
translation_verse: Abla kɔ ɛ, lipoe le lina gi Aya axwa litsi ni kelea mɛ banima a, lɛ aabu ba lipɔ ɔ; able lipoe le lina gi Aya aatí kelea lia ka ɔʋaŋa ɛ.

english_verse: If I am lifted up above the earth, I will make everyone want to come to me.”
translation_verse: Xegi bemuni me ní lifune e, maahe ɔnɔ kakaa pɔni isu ya.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the way he would be put to death.
translation_verse: Gi apani nite e, abasi kutse uliɔ elu gi atrátsé e.

english_verse: The crowd said to Jesus, “The Scriptures teach that the Messiah will live forever. How can you say that the Son of Man must be lifted up? Who is this Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Linɔkpi le libu le onu si, “Blɔ Ɔsã nɔ ɛsi blɔ si, Kristo ye aaze ligbã́ moblo. Kitɛ wɔasi blɔ si, ‘lilɛ si bemuni Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye e’? ‘Nyaŋwɛ onu Ɔnɔɛ Yebi liɛ ya a’?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The light will be with you for only a little longer. Walk in the light while you can. Then you won't be caught walking blindly in the dark.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Kuklekleo kwiaze ní mlɔ kusi kɔna ni lipoe kpekpemi itɔ. Mlatrɛ ní mlɔ kudeo aʋa gi kuklekleo kulɛ ɛ, tɔ kele kakíblo ni mlo o. Ɔnɔ gi ɛɛga litumu ne me e, óʋite niklɔ gi ɛɛtrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Have faith in the light while it is with you, and you will be children of the light.” The People Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus After Jesus had said these things, he left and went into hiding.
translation_verse: Mlazi kuklekleo aʋa aŋa, ni lipoe lɛ mɛ gi mlɛmɔ kɔ ɛ, tɔ mlaaze kuklekle me banɔ.” Gi Yesu apani nite pɔ ɛ, asɛ lɛ azeekpo isu ya ní ba su i. Yudanɛ ma kumɔziŋaa

english_verse: He had worked a lot of miracles among the people, but they were still not willing to have faith in him.
translation_verse: Lilɛ lɛ mɛ si Yesu anya abitɛ enugutseboe la ní ba aŋu mɛ, pɔ̀ bázɛ yɛ aʋa aŋa a,

english_verse: This happened so that what the prophet Isaiah had said would come true, “Lord, who has believed our message? And who has seen your mighty strength?”
translation_verse: tɔ liboe le gi Aya yɛ oboedoplɛɛ Yesaya apani aplɛ liba lɛ mɛ si, “Ɔkaɛ, nyaŋwɛ azɛ wɔ liboe le gi kwipani aʋa aŋa a? Nyaŋwɛ Ɔkaɛ ebu yɛ kigaglaɛ abasɛ ɛ?”

english_verse: The people could not have faith in Jesus, because Isaiah had also said,
translation_verse: Lɛ loso bátani kuzi ŋa a, lɛ ese linu si Yesaya apani ní ɔkutɔ kyɛ si,

english_verse: Isaiah said this, because he saw the glory of Jesus and spoke about him.
translation_verse: Yesaya apani te lɛ ese linu si amɔ Yesu yɛ kuklekleo lɛ apani ní yɛ su i.

english_verse: Even then, many of the leaders put their faith in Jesus, but they did not tell anyone about it. The Pharisees had already given orders for the people not to have anything to do with anyone who had faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Pɔ kyɛ ɛ, Yudanɛ baka glegle bɛzi Yesu aʋa ɛɛŋa; pɔ̀ kɔkpɛ Farisianɛ ma loso e, bápani lɛ su ní banɔ kusi i, ni lifu si biabu bá ya ní Yudanɛ ma itsa klɔ.

english_verse: And besides, the leaders liked praise from others more than they liked praise from God. Jesus Came To Save the World
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si bɛdimɛ ni kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ dɔni banima kɔ sani dɔni Aya kɔ ɔ.

english_verse: In a loud voice Jesus said: Everyone who has faith in me also has faith in the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Yesu apani ni ole gagla si, “Ɔniliɛ gi azɛ mɛ aʋa aŋa ɛ, aní mɛ tete aʋa azɛ aŋa a, pɔ̀ azɛ ɔniliɛ gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ kyɛ aʋa aŋa a.

english_verse: And everyone who has seen me has seen the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi amɔ mɛ ɛ, amɔ ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ mɛ kyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am the light that has come into the world. No one who has faith in me will stay in the dark.
translation_verse: Maba kelea mɛ ŋwisi kani kinɛ ɛ, tɔ ɔnɔ kakaa gi azɛ mɛ aʋa ŋa ɛ, ɔki wɔ litumu ne me e.

english_verse: I am not the one who will judge those who refuse to obey my teachings. I came to save the people of this world, not to be their judge.
translation_verse: “Xe ɔnutɔ enu mɛ eboe la pɔ̀ ɔ́bitɛ ní la aʋa ɛ, Mátraxwa litsi ni yɛ ɛ, Mába kelea mɛ si míbu banima lipɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ tɔ míbu ba a.

english_verse: But everyone who rejects me and my teachings will be judged on the last day by what I have said.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi egbe me xe ɔ́zɛ mɛ liboe le e, ɔnutɔ ɔlɛ gi axwa litsi ni yɛ ɛ. Eboa la gi mapani i, la ɛtrabu yɛ lipɔ ní liwe gɔgɔ lɛ aʋa!

english_verse: I don't speak on my own. I say only what the Father who sent me has told me to say.
translation_verse: Lilɛ lɛ mɛ, lɛ ese linu si mápani eboe la ní mɛ kigagla mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ Kaka gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ, yɛ aki mɛ eboa la gi maapani i, ni kiliɛ gi maado la a.

english_verse: I know that his commands will bring eternal life. This is why I tell you exactly what the Father has told me.
translation_verse: Lɛ mete si yɛ ɔsã nɔ izɛɛmani ligbã́ moblo le e. Liboe lɛ gi mapani i, lɛ linu lɛ klɔ gi Kakaa Aya asi mɛ si mipani i.”

english_verse: It was before Passover, and Jesus knew that the time had come for him to leave this world and to return to the Father. He had always loved his followers in this world, and he loved them to the very end.
translation_verse: Gi ligɔ liwe tile tɔ baŋa Kutseolidɔzawe le e. Yesu ete si lipoe le lina ki yɛ si yisɛ̀ ní kelea mɛ tɔ yidzì itrɛ ní Kaka Aya kɔ. Alɔ banama gi bali kelea mɛ ɛ, gi benu yɛ banɛ ɛ, kɔtsini yɛ kutseo me ke, lɛ ebu yɛ kulɔlɔɔ petee abasi ba a.

english_verse: Even before the evening meal started, the devil had made Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot, decide to betray Jesus.
translation_verse: Yesu ni yɛ badɔkpasi ba bɛzɛŋa bilagɔdɔ mɛ. Lɛ ozimizi ye akpɛ kugyodi ní Yuda gi onu Simon Iskariot yebinyime yɛ litukpo le me kókò si ɔkpɛ Yesu awla a.

english_verse: Jesus knew he had come from God and would go back to God. He also knew that the Father had given him complete power.
translation_verse: Yesu etè si Kakaa Aya akɔ kidɔ kaka akpɛ ní yɛ kigaglaɛ ese; etè si yɛ adɔ Aya kɔ lɛ yedzitrɛ ní Aya kɔ ɔ.

english_verse: So during the meal Jesus got up, removed his outer garment, and wrapped a towel around his waist.
translation_verse: Nite si ayɔ ní ɔdɔŋakplɔ nɔ su, ebu yɛ awu la aʋa liwu le, lɛ akɔ kavlɔa sama yɛ kasaa ɛ.

english_verse: He put some water into a large bowl. Then he began washing his disciples' feet and drying them with the towel he was wearing.
translation_verse: Lɛ enye kuni akpɛ ni kezi katɔ mɛ ɛ, xe ekpese yɛ badɔkpasi ba kuklikpɔɔ kuplo e, lɛ etsoli ko ni kavlɔa gi asama ní kasaa ɛ.

english_verse: But when he came to Simon Peter, this disciple asked, “Lord, are you going to wash my feet?”
translation_verse: Gi lina Simon Petro aʋa ɛ, eʋi Yesu si, “Ɔkaɛ, kiplo wɔ si wúplo mɛ kuklikpɔ na a?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You don't really know what I am doing, but later you will understand.”
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Wɔtranu kidiliɛ gi mɛɛbitɛ ese abla a, pɔ̀ wɔanu lɛ ese ní lɛ kede e.”

english_verse: “You will never wash my feet!” Peter replied. “If I don't wash you,” Jesus told him, “you don't really belong to me.”
translation_verse: Petro apani si, “Mátradimɛ liwewe si wɔaplo mɛ kuklikpɔ ɔ!” Lɛ Yesu ebu le onu si, “Xe wɔ́ki méplo wɔ kuklikpɔ ɛ, wɔtraze mɛ ɔdɔkpasi tɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: Peter said, “Lord, don't wash just my feet. Wash my hands and my head.”
translation_verse: Simon Petro ebu le onu si, “Ɔkaɛ, wukíplo mɛ kuklikpɔɔ tètè e, boŋu i, plo mɛ kuwlakpɔɔ ni litukpo le fɛ!”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “People who have bathed and are clean all over need to wash just their feet. And you, my disciples, are clean, except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Yesu asi yɛ si, “Ɔnɔ kaka gi ewlo koko e, yɛ isu ya idra lɛ ɔ́ziã si owlo tɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ kɔ kuklikpɔ ko aaplo o. Mlɔ pɔ́ mlɔ isu ya idra ɔnɔ tole ko ɔ́dra a.”

english_verse: Jesus knew who would betray him. That is why he said, “except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Yesu kɔ ete ɔniliɛ gi yɛ atrákpɛ yɛ awla ɛ; lɛ loso apani si, “Mlɔ pɔ́, mlɔ isu ya idra a ɔnɔ tole ko ɔ́dra a.”

english_verse: After Jesus had washed his disciples' feet and had put his outer garment back on, he sat down again. Then he said: Do you understand what I have done?
translation_verse: Agi Yesu eplo ba kuklikpɔɔ pɔ́ ɛ, edzini yɛ liwu le aʋa liwu le akpɛ lɛ edzi atrɛ ní yɛ ozeklɔ ní ɔkplɔ nɔ su i. Lɛ Yesu eʋi ba si, “Dani mlenu kidiliɛ gi mabitɛ aki mlɔ ese e?”

english_verse: You call me your teacher and Lord, and you should, because that is who I am.
translation_verse: “Mlɛzɛxwa mɛ si, ‘Ɔdɔbasɛ’ ni ‘Ɔkaɛ’, nite ɖii lilɛ si mlabitɛ, lɛ ese linu si niteme ɔnɔ menu u.

english_verse: I have set the example, and you should do for each other exactly what I have done for you.
translation_verse: Maplɛ liŋwitsɛ aki mlɔ, tɔ mlɔ kyɛ mlabitɛ nite ɖii gi mabitɛ aki mlɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that servants are not greater than their master, and messengers are not greater than the one who sent them.
translation_verse: Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ: ɔnɔdzidzi ɔ́tɔtɔ óʋikeme sani yɛ ɔkaɛ ɛ, lɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ ɔ́tɔtɔ fɛ ɛ, óʋikeme sani ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am not talking about all of you. I know the ones I have chosen. But what the Scriptures say must come true. And they say, “The man who ate with me has turned against me!”
translation_verse: “Aní mlɔ petee mɛɛsɛ ɛ; Mete banɔaklɔ gi makya ɛ. Pɔ̀ lilɛ si kuŋwlimi yɔ kuba kɔ mɛ gi kwipani si i, ‘Ɔniliɛ gi ɛɛkpɛ awla kezi me ni mɛ ɛ, ayɔ kedu ní mɛ su.’

english_verse: I am telling you this before it all happens. Then when it does happen, you will believe who I am.
translation_verse: “Mɛɛsi mlɔ abla xe ableke liaba lɛ mɛ ɛ, tɔ xe liba lɛ mɛ ɛ, mlaazi ŋa si ‘Mɛ menu Ɔniliɛ gi ɔlɛ dɔni kelea okpese klɔ ɔ.’

english_verse: So the disciple leaned toward Jesus and asked, “Lord, which one of us are you talking about?”
translation_verse: Lɛ ɔdɔkpasi liɛ klɔ ɛ eti apɔni Yesu lɛ eʋi si, “Ɔkaɛ, nyaŋwɛ onu ɔniliɛ klɔ ɔ?”

english_verse: After Jesus had said these things, he was deeply troubled and told his disciples, “I tell you for certain that one of you will betray me.”
translation_verse: Gi Yesu apani eboa la ya pɔ́ ɛ, axixa ní yɛ ɔna nɔ mɛ lɛ apani si, “Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ; mlɔ mɛ tole atrákpɛ mɛ awla a.”

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple was sitting next to him at the meal,
translation_verse: Badɔkpasi ba mɛ tole, iliɛ klɔ gi Yesu alɔ ɛ, eze ní yɛ su.

english_verse: and Simon motioned for this disciple to find out which one Jesus meant.
translation_verse: Simon Petro abasi yɛ awla lɛ edo yɛ ɔdali si, “Ʋi ye ɔniliɛ su gi ɛɛpani i.”

english_verse: But because Judas was in charge of the money, some of them thought that Jesus had told him to buy something they needed for the festival. Others thought that Jesus had told him to give some money to the poor.
translation_verse: Agi Yuda klɔ kibɔɛ kize e, badɔkpasi batɔ bɛkɔ lɛ si kisí Yesu asi yɛ si ɔzeedzi kudɔkpa liɔ gi biazia ki Liweŋaŋa nɛ ɛ, loo tɔ ɔzɛɛki bepiplinete ba kiditɔ.

english_verse: Judas took the piece of bread and went out. It was already night. The New Command
translation_verse: Lɛ gi Yuda azɛ lìklã nɛ ko e, edo kyɔŋ. Lize elesi. Yesu aki ɔsã vuvu

english_verse: Then, after God is given glory because of him, God will bring glory to him, and God will do it very soon.
translation_verse: Lɛ xe Aya yɛ kukɔkɔɔ kwiŋwi gani Obi ye me e, kɔlɔ Aya aabu Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye kukɔkɔɔ basɛ gani yɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ, lɛ aabitɛ lɛ kyɔŋ ɔ.

english_verse: My children, I will be with you for only a little while longer. Then you will look for me, but you won't find me. I tell you just as I told the people, “You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: Mɛ bebi ba, mátraze ní mlɔ su lipoe gblamadza tɔ ɔ. Mlɛtrapɛ́ mɛ; pɔ̀ liboe lɛ klɔ gi masi Yudanɛ baka ba ɛ, lɛ mɛɛsi mlɔ abla si, ‘Mlátratani niklɔ gi mɛɛtrɛ ɛ, kutrɛ.’

english_verse: Simon Peter asked, “Lord, where are you going?” Jesus answered, “You can't go with me now, but later on you will.”
translation_verse: Lɛ Simon Petro eʋi Yesu si, “Nifɔ wɔɛtrɛ, Ɔkaɛ ɛ?” Yesu ebu le onu si, “Niklɔ gi mɛɛtrɛ ɛ, mlátratani mɛ kude kukuno abla pɔ̀ mlakuni mɛ kude lɛ kede e.”

english_verse: Peter asked, “Lord, why can't I go with you now? I would die for you!”
translation_verse: Petro eʋi si, “Ɔkaɛ, ege lɛ loso mátratani wɔ kude kukuno abla a?” “Malɛ kublabla mɛ si maatse ní wɔ litukpo!”

english_verse: “Would you really die for me?” Jesus asked. “I tell you for certain before a rooster crows, you will say three times that you don't even know me.”
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu ebu le onu si, “Wɔnya li ní kublabla mɛ si wɔatse ní mɛ litukpo o? Mɛɛsi wɔ anukwarɛɛ si xe ableke ologlo lo aamè e, wɔanada tata si wote me.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Don't be worried! Have faith in God and have faith in me.
translation_verse: Yesu asi yɛ badɔkpasi ba si, “Mlamɔ ɔna lɛ mlakípisa a, mlazi Aya aʋa aŋa, lɛ mlazi mɛ fɛ aʋa aŋa.

english_verse: There are many rooms in my Father's house. I wouldn't tell you this, unless it was true. I am going there to prepare a place for each of you.
translation_verse: Bagbáke ʋa besrɛ ní Mɔka kepea mɛ, lɛ mɛɛtrɛ tɔ mizɛɛlulɔ ozekɔ ɛki mlɔ. Mátrado le ɛsi mlɔ ɔ, xe gi líma lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: After I have done this, I will come back and take you with me. Then we will be together.
translation_verse: Lɛ xe malulɔ oze klɔ aki mlɔ pɔ́ ɛ, maadziba ɛgbani mlɔ tsinɔ ní mɛ isu ya su, tɔ mlɔ fɛ mlaaze niklɔ gi malɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You know the way to where I am going.”
translation_verse: Mlete kudeo liɔ gi kwitrɛ ní niklɔ gi mɛɛtrɛ ɛ.” Yesu Yɛ onu Aya klɔ kudeo

english_verse: Thomas said, “Lord, we don't even know where you are going! How can we know the way?”
translation_verse: Toma asi Yesu si, “Ɔkaɛ, kúte niklɔ gi wɔɛtrɛ ɛ; lɛ kitɛ kwiate kudeo gi kwitrɛ ní klɔ na a?”

english_verse: “I am the way, the truth, and the life!” Jesus answered. “Without me, no one can go to the Father.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Mɛ menu kudeo, anukwarɛɛ, ani ligbã́ nɛ: ɔnɔnɔ ɔʋítrɛ ní Kaka Aya kɔ ɔ, xe ɔ́ga mɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: If you had really known me, you would have known the Father. But from now on, you do know him, and you have seen him.”
translation_verse: Lɛ asi ba si, Abla gi mlete me e, mlate Mɔka fɛ, lɛ dɔni abla kɔtsinɔ ɛ mlete ye lɛ mlɛ mɔ yɛ.”

english_verse: Philip said, “Lord, show us the Father. That is all we need.”
translation_verse: Filipo asi Yesu si, “Ɔkaɛ liboe lɛ gi liziã blɔ ko linu si basɛ blɔ Kakaa”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Philip, I have been with you for a long time. Don't you know who I am? If you have seen me, you have seen the Father. How can you ask me to show you the Father?
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Lipoe gblamadzaɛtɔ lɛ ya gi malɛ ní mlɔ kusi i; lɛ mléte me a Filipo o? Ɔniliɛ gi amɔ mɛ ɛ, amɔ Kakaa Aya. Ege lɛ loso, wɔɛpani si, ‘Basɛ blɔ Kakaa Aya a’?

english_verse: Don't you believe that I am one with the Father and that the Father is one with me? What I say isn't said on my own. The Father who lives in me does these things.
translation_verse: Kɔ wɔ́ziŋa si malɛ ní Kakaa Aya mɛ ɛ, xe Kakaa kyɛ ɔlɛ ní mɛ mɛ̀ na a? Yesu asi yɛ badɔkpasi ba si, Eboa la gi mapani aki mlɔ ɛ ádɔ mɔ kɔ ɔ.” Kakaa, gi yɛ ɔlɛ ní mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ, yɛ ɛɛwa yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ axwɛ na.

english_verse: Have faith in me when I say that the Father is one with me and that I am one with the Father. Or else have faith in me simply because of the things I do.
translation_verse: Zi mɛ aʋa ŋa xe mapani si malɛ ní Kakaa mɛ ɛ, lɛ Kakaa fɛ ɔlɛ ní mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ, xe líma te fɛ ɛ, zi lɛ aʋa ŋa kɔkpɛ axwɛ ana gi mɛɛwa loso o.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you have faith in me, you will do the same things I am doing. You will do even greater things, now that I am going back to the Father.
translation_verse: Mɛɛsi mlɔ ní anukwarɛɛ mɛ si; ɔniliɛ gi azɛ mɛ aʋa aŋa ɛ, aabitɛ kidiliɛ gi mabitɛ ɛ, Ee, aabitɛ glegle sanɔ, lɛ ese linu si mɛɛtrɛ ní Kaka Aya klɔ.

english_verse: Ask me, and I will do whatever you ask. This way the Son will bring honor to the Father.
translation_verse: Lɛ maabitɛ kidɔ kakaa gi mlaʋi ní mɛ linyi ne me e, tɔ Obi ye aakpɛ kukɔkɔ ní Kaka Aya su.

english_verse: I will do whatever you ask me to do. The Holy Spirit Is Promised
translation_verse: Xe mleʋi me kidɔ kakaa ni mɛ linyi ne me e, Maabitɛ kɛ. Kakaplɛ ki Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ kukɔkɔ

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: If you love me, you will do as I command.
translation_verse: Xe mlɛlɔ mɛ ɛ, mlaabitɛ ni mɛ isã nɛ aʋa.

english_verse: Then I will ask the Father to send you the Holy Spirit who will help you and always be with you.
translation_verse: Lɛ maaʋi Kaka, lɛ aaki mlɔ Ɔpɔnɔpɔnɔ dzedze e, gi aaze ní mlɔ su kɔtsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The Spirit will show you what is true. The people of this world cannot accept the Spirit, because they don't see or know him. But you know the Spirit, who is with you and will keep on living in you.
translation_verse: Yɛ onu Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ gi izeebu anukwarɛɛ basɛ ní Aya su u. Kelea mɛ katrátani yɛ kuzɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si katrátani yɛ kumɔ loo yɛ kute e. Pɔ̀ mlete ye, lɛ ese linu si ɔlɛ nì mlɔ lɛ ɔkpasi ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I won't leave you like orphans. I will come back to you.
translation_verse: Xegi masɛ ɛ, mátrayurɔ mlɔ ɖekyavi i; Maadziba mlɔ klɔ.

english_verse: In a little while the people of this world won't be able to see me, but you will see me. And because I live, you will live.
translation_verse: Ligɔ taʋɛ kelea mɛ kátramɔ mɛ tɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ mlɔ kɔ mlamɔ mɛ; lɛ xegi medzi ligbã́ ɛ, mlɔ fɛ mlaaze ligbã́.

english_verse: Then you will know I am one with the Father. You will know you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Xe liwe lɛ klɔ lina ɛ, mlaate si malɛ ligbã́ ní Mɔka mɛ, lɛ mlalɛ ligbã́ ní mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ, kiliɛ ɖii gi malɛ ligbã́ ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If you love me, you will do what I have said, and my Father will love you. I will also love you and show you what I am like.
translation_verse: “Banama gi bɛzi mɛ isã nɛ ɛ, xe bɛbitɛ ní lɛ aʋa ɛ, ba benu banama gi bɛlɔ mɛ ɛ. Mɔka aalɔ banama gi bɛlɔ mɛ ɛ. Mɛ fɛ maalɔ ba, lɛ maabu isu basɛ ba a.”

english_verse: The other Judas, not Judas Iscariot, then spoke up and asked, “Lord, what do you mean by saying that you will show us what you are like, but you will not show the people of this world?”
translation_verse: Lɛ Yuda, pɔ̀ aní Yuda Iskariot, apani si, “Ɔkaɛ, kitɛ liaze si wɔabu isu basɛ blɔ pɔ̀ aní kelea banima na a?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: If anyone loves me, they will obey me. Then my Father will love them, and we will come to them and live in them.
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu aki yɛ si, “Ɔniliɛ gi alɔ mɛ ɛ, aazi mɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ. Mɔka Aya aalɔ yɛ, lɛ Mɛ ni Mɔka kwiaba yɛ klɔ ɔ, lɛ kwiaze nì yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But anyone who doesn't love me, won't obey me. What they have heard me say doesn't really come from me, but from the Father who sent me.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔniliɛ gi ɔ́lɔ mɛ ɛ, ɔ́trazi mɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ ɛ. Lɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ bɛ klɔ ɔ gi mlenu i, aní mɛ ɔtutɔ binɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ bidɔ ní Kakaa Aya gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ ɛ kɔ.

english_verse: I have told you these things while I am still with you.
translation_verse: “Masi mlɔ la ya gi malɛ ni mlɔ su i.

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come and help you, because the Father will send the Spirit to take my place. The Spirit will teach you everything and will remind you of what I said while I was with you.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Ɔpɔnɔpɔnɔɛ, Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ, gi Kakaa Aya aatsisi ní mɛ linyi ne me e, aabasɛ mlɔ kidɔ kakaa, lɛ aaki mlaaplɛ aŋu ní eboa la pɔ́ gi masi mlɔ ɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: I give you peace, the kind of peace only I can give. It isn't like the peace this world can give. So don't be worried or afraid.
translation_verse: Kusuyɔ mɛ yurɔ ɛki mlɔ; linu mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ kusuyɔ gi maki mlɔ ɛ. Máki mlɔ kɔ kiliɛ gi kelea mɛ kizɛɛki mlɔ ɔ. Mlamɔ ɔna tɔ mlakípisa; mlakíse lifu u.

english_verse: You have already heard me say I am going and I will also come back to you. If you really love me, you should be glad I am going back to the Father, because he is greater than I am.
translation_verse: Mlenu gi masi mlɔ si, ‘Mɛɛsɛ ní mlɔsu u, pɔ̀ maadziba mlɔ klɔ ɔ.’ Xe mlɛlɔ mɛ ɛ, isami iaku mlo si mɛɛtrɛ ní Kakaa Aya klɔ; lɛ ese linu si yɛ ekeme a sani mɛ.

english_verse: I am telling you this before I leave, so when it does happen, you will have faith in me.
translation_verse: Masi mlɔ lɛ ya abla, xe ableke liaba lɛ mɛ ɛ, tɔ xe liba lɛ mɛ ɛ, mlaazi lɛ aʋa ŋa.

english_verse: I cannot speak with you much longer, because the ruler of this world is coming. But he has no power over me.
translation_verse: Mátratani kupani kimlɔ lipoe gblamadza tɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si kelea ya mɛ ɔʋaŋaɛ atrába. Ɔ́mɔ kigagla ní mɛ aʋa a,

english_verse: I obey my Father, so everyone in the world might know that I love him. It is time for us to go now.
translation_verse: pɔ̀ lilɛ si kelea banima betè si malɔ Mɔka Aya; lɛ loso mizɛɛbitɛ liboe kakaa gi asi mɛ ɛ. “Mlayɔ tɔ kusɛ niya.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.
translation_verse: “Mɛ menu wain yɛ lihuʋi le ɔtutɔ lɔ, lɛ Mɔka Aya yɛ onu wain ɔnyrɔ nɔ onetee e.

english_verse: He cuts away every branch of mine that doesn't produce fruit. But he trims clean every branch that does produce fruit, so that it will produce even more fruit.
translation_verse: Izɛɛkple liya kakaa ní mɛ mɛ̀ gi liʋíyo e, lɛ izeebu aya la gi izeeyo e su, tɔ aya la mɛ adra tɔ eyo asanɔ.

english_verse: You are already clean because of what I have said to you.
translation_verse: Kɔkpɛ eboa la gi masi mlɔ loso e, mlɔ isu idra kooko.

english_verse: Stay joined to me, and I will stay joined to you. Just as a branch cannot produce fruit unless it stays joined to the vine, you cannot produce fruit unless you stay joined to me.
translation_verse: Mlakɔ isu amìnì nì mɛ tɔ mɛ fɛ mímìnì nì mlɔ. Liseya ɛtɔtɔ lítratani kuyo ní lɛ tutɔ isu wla mɛ ɛ; liatani kuyo xe limìnì nì ose lo o. Nite ke mlatrátani esebi kuyo xe mlámìnì nì mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am the vine, and you are the branches. If you stay joined to me, and I stay joined to you, then you will produce lots of fruit. But you cannot do anything without me.
translation_verse: “Mɛ menu wain yɛ lihuʋi le, lɛ mlɔ mlenu aya la a. Ɔniliɛ gi amìnì nì mɛ ɛ, xe Mɛ kyɛ mamìnì nì yɛ ɛ, aayo esebi glegle; lɛ ese linu si mláma kididɔ kubitɛ mɛ ɛ, xe máma ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If you don't stay joined to me, you will be thrown away. You will be like dry branches that are gathered up and burned in a fire.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi ɔ́mìnì nì mɛ ɛ, ɔlɛ ŋwisi liya gi bɛtsa a, xe bekɔ ɛŋwia eʋe e, xe liyurɔ kinɛ ɛ. Biakpɛ aya la klɔ likpɔ kɔ bɛŋwia la ɛkpɛ ní kifu mɛ kɔ ɛkani i.

english_verse: Stay joined to me and let my teachings become part of you. Then you can pray for whatever you want, and your prayer will be answered.
translation_verse: Xe mlakpasi ní mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ, gi mɛ eboe la alɛ ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ mlaaʋi kidɔ kakaa gi mlɛpɛ́ ɛ, lɛ biaki mlɔ kɛ ɛ.

english_verse: When you become fruitful disciples of mine, my Father will be honored.
translation_verse: Xegi mleyo esebi glegle e, liaki si banima biaki Mɔka Aya kubùbù lɛ liabasɛ kyɛ si mlenu mɛ badɔkpasi i.

english_verse: I have loved you, just as my Father has loved me. So remain faithful to my love for you.
translation_verse: “Malɔ mlɔ kiliɛ gi Kaka Aya alɔ mɛ ɛ; lɛ loso mleze mɛ kulɔlɔɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If you obey me, I will keep loving you, just as my Father keeps loving me, because I have obeyed him.
translation_verse: Xe mlɛga mɛ isã nɛ aʋa ɛ, mlaaze ní mɛ kulɔlɔɔ mɛ, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi maga ní Mɔka Aya yɛ isã nɛ aʋa a, xe malɛ ní yɛ kulɔlɔɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I have told you this to make you as completely happy as I am.
translation_verse: “Masi mlɔ liboe lɛ ya tɔ isami nɛ elu gi ilɛ ní mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ, iaze ní mlɔ mɛ̀, atɔ isami nɛ iayi mlo.

english_verse: Now I tell you to love each other, as I have loved you.
translation_verse: Mɛ ɔsã nɔ lɔ ya si; mlalɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba, kiliɛ gi malɔ mlɔ ɛ.

english_verse: The greatest way to show love for friends is to die for them.
translation_verse: Kulɔlɔ sanɔ gi ɔnɔ aaki yɛ baʋia nɛ ba kunu si, aakɔ̀ yɛ ligbã́ nɛ ɔkɔ ní ba litukpo.

english_verse: And you are my friends, if you obey me.
translation_verse: Lɛ mlɔ mlenu mɛ baʋia ba a, xe mlɛbitɛ ní mɛ ɔsã nɔ aʋa ɛ.

english_verse: Servants don't know what their master is doing, and so I don't speak to you as my servants. I speak to you as my friends, and I have told you everything my Father has told me.
translation_verse: Máʋixwa mlɔ si besumubi tɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si osumubi óʋite kidiliɛ gi yɛ ɔkaɛ ɛɛbitɛ ɛ. Boŋu i, maxwa mlɔ si baʋia, lɛ ese linu si kidɔ kakaa gi menu adɔ ni Mɔka Aya klɔ ɛ, kɛ masi mlɔ.

english_verse: You did not choose me. I chose you and sent you out to produce fruit, the kind of fruit that will last. Then my Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Aní mlɔ mlɛkya mɛ ɛ; Mɛ makya mlɔ lɛ makpɛ mlɔ si mlazeeyo esebi glegle, esebi ala klɔ gi aaze tsini kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ ɛ. Atɔ Kaka Aya aaki mlɔ kidɔ kakaa gi mlaaʋi ye ní mɛ linyi ne me e.

english_verse: So I command you to love each other. The World's Hatred
translation_verse: Liboe lɛ ya ɔsã maki mlɔ: Mlalɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba. Banima ní kelea mɛ bɛtrɔ badɔkpasi ba ahwafi

english_verse: If the people of this world hate you, just remember that they hated me first.
translation_verse: “Xe kelea mɛ banima bɛtrɔ mlɔ ahwafi i, mlaplɛ aŋu si, betu mɛ ahwafi kutrɔ.

english_verse: If you belonged to the world, its people would love you. But you don't belong to the world. I have chosen you to leave the world behind, and this is why its people hate you.
translation_verse: Xe mlenu kelea mɛ banɛ ɛ, kelea mɛ kialɔ mlɔ ŋwisi ka ɔtutɔ banɛ kinɛ ɛ. Pɔ̀ makya mlɔ ebu ní kelea mɛ ɛ, lɛ mlénu kelea mɛ banɛ tɔ ɔ; lɛ loso kelea mɛ banima bɛtrɔ mlɔ ahwafi i.

english_verse: Remember how I told you that servants are not greater than their master. So if people mistreat me, they will mistreat you. If they do what I say, they will do what you say.
translation_verse: Mlaplɛ aŋu liboe lɛ gi masi mlɔ aʋa a si, ‘Osumubi ɔtɔtɔ óʋikeme sani yɛ ɔkaɛ ɛ.’ Xe bɛyɔ kedu ní mɛ su i, biayɔ kedu ní mlɔ fɛ su; xe bɛga ní mɛ bidɔ basɛbasɛ ʋɛ aʋa ɛ, biaga ni mlɔ binɛ mɛ fɛ aʋa.

english_verse: People will do to you exactly what they did to me. They will do it because you belong to me, and they don't know the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Biayɔ kedua lia ya ní mlɔ su kɔkpɛ mɛ linyi ne loso; agi béte ɔniliɛ gi akpɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin. But now they have no excuse for their sin.
translation_verse: Nya bátraŋa lipɔ ní ba kuzimizi yo me e, xe mába egu kunugu yo aki ba a, pɔ̀ abla ɛ, liboeboe líma ba awla gi biakɔŋwlɛ ba kuzimizi yo litukpo o.

english_verse: Everyone who hates me also hates my Father.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi atrɔ mɛ ahwafi i, atrɔ Mɔka Aya fɛ ahwafi.

english_verse: I have done things no one else has ever done. If they had not seen me do these things, they would not be guilty. But they did see me do these things, and they still hate me and my Father too.
translation_verse: Nya bátrabu ba lipɔ ɛkpɛ ba eboe zimizi na a, xe mábitɛ kidiliɛ gi ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́bitɛ ni ba kusi oʋídi i; Pɔ̀ abla ɛ, bɛmɔ enugutseboe a la gi mabitɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ fɛ ɛ, bɛtrɔ mɛ ni Mɔka Aya pɔ́ ahwafi.

english_verse: This is why the Scriptures are true when they say, “People hated me for no reason.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ya kɔ ɛ, lilɛ si liba lɛ mɛ atɔ liboe lɛ gi bɛŋwlimi kpɛ ní ba ɔsã nɔ mɛ ɛ, liba lɛ mɛ si, ‘Liboeboe mobamoba ɛ, bɛtrɔ mɛ ahwafi.’

english_verse: I will send you the Spirit who comes from the Father and shows what is true. The Spirit will help you and will tell you about me.
translation_verse: “Xegi Ɔpɔnɔpɔnɔɛ gi maatsisi mlɔ dɔni Kaka Aya klɔ aba ɛ, Yɛ adra mɛ su. Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ gi aabu anukwarɛɛ kubasɛ ní Aya su u, gi ɛdɔ ní Kaka Aya klɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Then you will also tell others about me, because you have been with me from the beginning.
translation_verse: Lɛ mlɔ fɛ ɛ, mlaadra mɛ su ki banima, lɛ ese linu si mleeze ní mɛ su dɔni okpese klɔ ke.

english_verse: I am telling you these things, so that you will not turn away.
translation_verse: “Masi mlɔ lɛ ya, tɔ mlakíyurɔ mlɔ kuziŋaa.

english_verse: You will be chased out of the synagogues. And the time will come when people will kill you and think they are doing God a favor.
translation_verse: Biakpikpini mlɔ ní Yudanɛ ma itsaklɔ; sugba ɛ, lipoe le litrába gi ɔnɔ kakaa gi aaye mlo e, aabu si gi yɛ abitɛ nite e, yɛ awa Aya lisumuxwɛ.

english_verse: They will do these things because they don't know either the Father or me.
translation_verse: Banima biabitɛ eboa la yurɔ mlɔ lɛ ese linu si béte Kaka Aya loo mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am saying this to you now, so that when the time comes, you will remember what I have said. The Work of the Holy Spirit I was with you at the first, and so I didn't tell you these things.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ masi mlɔ lɛ ya, tɔ xe lipoe le lina kí ba si babitɛ eboa la ya ɛ, mlaaplɛ aŋu si masi mlɔ. Mási mlɔ akpɛ ɔtɔ lɛ ese linu si meze ní mlɔ su u. Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ axwɛwawa la

english_verse: But now I am going back to the Father who sent me, and none of you asks me where I am going.
translation_verse: “Pɔ̀ abla ɛ, mɛɛsɛ ɛtrɛ ní ɔniliɛ gi yɛ akpɛ mɛ klɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ mlɔmɛ ɔtɔtɔ óʋi me si ‘nifɔ wɔɛtrɛ ɛ.’

english_verse: You are very sad from hearing all of this.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi masi mlɔ eboa la ya ɛ, mlɔ ina nɛ iku kunyipu.

english_verse: But I tell you I am going to do what is best for you. This is why I am going away. The Holy Spirit cannot come to help you until I leave. But after I am gone, I will send the Spirit to you.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ si, lipɛ kimlɔ si misɛ̀, lɛ ese linu si xe másɛ ɛ, Ɔpɔnɔpɔnɔɛ ɔ́traba mlɔ klɔ ɔ. Pɔ̀ xe masɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ maatsisi yɛ mlɔ klɔ.

english_verse: The Spirit will come and show the people of this world the truth about sin and God's justice and the judgment.
translation_verse: Xegi aba ɛ, aabu basɛ banima ní kelea mɛ si, bɛta kese xe gi bɛpani si béte liboe ni eboe zimizi, kude gyɔgyɔ, nì Aya litsi xwaxwa nɛ su u.

english_verse: The Spirit will show them that they are wrong about sin, because they didn't have faith in me.
translation_verse: Ní kuzimizi su i, bɛta kese lɛ ese linu si bázɛ mɛ aʋa aŋa a;

english_verse: They are wrong about God's justice, because I am going to the Father, and you won't see me again.
translation_verse: lɛ ní ba kude gyɔgyɔ aʋa mezemeze su i, bɛta kese lɛ ese linu si Mɛɛtrɛ ní Kakaa Aya klɔ, lɛ mlatrámɔ mɛ tɔ ɔ;

english_verse: And they are wrong about the judgment, because God has already judged the ruler of this world.
translation_verse: lɛ ní litsixwaxwa lɛ su i, bɛta kese lɛ ese linu si bɛxwa litsi nì kelea mɛ ɔʋaŋaɛ kooko.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but right now it would be more than you could understand.
translation_verse: “Eboe alɛ mɛ awla sanɔ gi maasi mlɔ ɛ, pɔ̀ asásrɛ ki mlɔ la ese kununu abla a.

english_verse: The Spirit shows what is true and will come and guide you into the full truth. The Spirit doesn't speak on his own. He will tell you only what he has heard from me, and he will let you know what is going to happen.
translation_verse: Xegi Ɔfuɛfuɛ dradra lɔ ɛɛba ɛ, gi yɛ izɛɛbasɛ anukwarɛɛ ɛ, aabu anukwarɛɛ basɛ ní Aya su, aagbani mlɔ tsini anukwarɛɛ mɛ. Ɔ́trapani ní yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kigagla mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ aapani ní liboe lɛ gi enu su u, lɛ aasi mlɔ eboa la gi ɛtrába ɛ.

english_verse: The Spirit will bring glory to me by taking my message and telling it to you.
translation_verse: Aaki si banima biaki mɛ kukɔkɔ, lɛ ese linu si aazi eboa la gi maapani i, aakɔ̀ la si mlɔ.

english_verse: Everything the Father has is mine. This is why I have said that the Spirit takes my message and tells it to you. Sorrow Will Turn into Joy
translation_verse: Kidɔ kakaa gi kilɛ ní Mɔka Aya awla ɛ, mɛ kinɛ kinu; lɛ loso mapani si Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ aazi kidiliɛ gi kinu mɛ kinɛ ɛ, tɔ aabasɛ mlɔ kɛ. Badɔkpasi ba asigaga la adzi isami

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “For a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.”
translation_verse: “Ligɔ taʋɛ ko mlatrámɔ mɛ tɔ ɔ, lɛ ní lipoe sisami itɔ kede e, mlamɔ mɛ.”

english_verse: They said to each other, “What does Jesus mean by saying that for a little while we won't see him, but after a while we will see him? What does he mean by saying he is going to the Father?
translation_verse: Yɛ badɔkpasi ba batɔ beʋi ní batsali kusi si, “Kitɛ liboe lɛ ya ese e? ‘Ɛɛsi blɔ si ligɔ taʋɛ kútramɔ yɛ tɔ ɔ, lɛ lipoe sisami itɔ kede e, kwiamɔ yɛ ɛ;’ lɛ apani kyɛ si, ‘Lɛ ese linu si mɛɛtrɛ ní Kaka Aya klɔ ɔ.’ ”

english_verse: What is this ‘little while’ that he is talking about? We don't know what he means.”
translation_verse: “Bɛtrɛ lɛ aʋa zeeʋi si, ‘Ligɔ taʋɛ ese si kitɛ ɛ’? Kúnu liboe lɛ gi ɛɛpani ese e!”

english_verse: Jesus knew they had some questions, so he said: You are wondering what I meant when I said that for a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.
translation_verse: Yesu etè si bɛɛpɛ si beeʋi ye liboe lɛ ya, loso asi ba si, “Mapani si, ‘Ligɔ taʋɛ ko mlátramɔ mɛ tɔ ɔ, lɛ lipoe sisami itɔ kede e, mlamɔ mɛ’. Liboe lɛ ya mleeʋi ní mlɔ atsali kusi na a?

english_verse: I tell you for certain that you will cry and be sad, but the world will be happy. You will be sad, but later you will be happy.
translation_verse: Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ: mlɛtrabemi lɛ mlawa awowoe la, pɔ̀ kelea mɛ banima biamɔ isami; mlɔ kɔ ɛ, mlaaze ni asigaga mɛ, pɔ̀ mlɔ asigaga la aadzi isami i.

english_verse: When a woman is about to give birth, she is in great pain. But after it is all over, she forgets the pain and is happy, because she has brought a child into the world.
translation_verse: Xe ɔmɛdzɛ si yipɔ ɛ, izeeze ní asigaga mɛ lɛ ese linu si yɛ lipɔ̀poe le lina, pɔ̀ xe apɔ obi ye e, izeedze yɛ kupepeo, lɛ ese linu si isami iiku ye si yɛ apɔ obi akpɛ ní kelea mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You are now very sad. But later I will see you, and you will be so happy that no one will be able to change the way you feel.
translation_verse: Nite lilɛ ki mlɔ: abla ɛ, mlalɛ ní asigaga mɛ, pɔ̀ maamɔ mlɔ dzɛ ɛ, lɛ mlɔ ina nɛ iayi ni isami, isami i nɛ klɔ elu gi ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani kuzɛ ní mlɔ awla ɛ.

english_verse: When that time comes, you won't have to ask me about anything. I tell you for certain the Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: “Xe liwe lɛ klɔ lina ɛ, mlátraʋi me kididɔ tɔ ɔ. Mɛɛsi mlɔ anukwarɛɛ: Kaka Aya aaki mlɔ kidɔ kakaa gi mlaʋi ye ní mɛ linyi ne me e.

english_verse: You have not asked for anything in this way before, but now you must ask in my name. Then it will be given to you, so you will be completely happy.
translation_verse: Gakɔna ni abla ɛ, mleʋíʋi kididɔ ní mɛ linyi ne me e, mleʋi tɔ mlaazɛ, atɔ mlɔ isami nɛ iana.

english_verse: I have used examples to explain to you what I have been talking about. But the time will come when I will speak to you plainly about the Father and will no longer use examples like these.
translation_verse: “Mapani eboa la ya aki mlɔ ní abee ʋa mɛ, Pɔ̀ lipoe le litrába gi mátrapani ni abee ʋa mɛ tɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ lipoe le litrába a, gi maadra Kaka Aya su si mlɔ ɔ.

english_verse: You will ask the Father in my name, and I won't have to ask him for you.
translation_verse: Xe liwe lɛ klɔ lina ɛ, mlaaʋi ye ní mɛ linyi ne me; lɛ maʋípani si maaʋi Kaka Aya ní mlɔ onu u.

english_verse: God the Father loves you because you love me, and you believe I have come from him.
translation_verse: lɛ ese linu si Kaka Aya ɔtutɔ lɔ alɔ mlɔ ɔ. Alɔ mlɔ lɛ ese linu si mlɛlɔ mɛ lɛ mlɛziŋa si madɔ Aya kɔ ɔ.

english_verse: I came from the Father into the world, but I am leaving the world and returning to the Father.
translation_verse: Madɔ Kaka Aya klɔ, xe maba kelea mɛ ɛ; lɛ abla ɛ, mɛɛsɛ ní kelea mɛ medzi itrɛ ní yɛ klɔ.”

english_verse: The disciples said, “Now you are speaking plainly to us! You are not using examples.
translation_verse: Lɛ yɛ badɔkpasi ba bɛsi yɛ si, “Ableke wɔɛdra wɔ eboe la mɛ, gi wɔʋípani ní abee ʋa me tɔ ɔ.

english_verse: At last we know that you understand everything, and we don't have any more questions. Now we believe you truly have come from God.”
translation_verse: Kwite ablɔ kɔ si wote liboe kakaa, wɔ́zia ɔnɔnɔ si oʋi wo beʋiʋi i. Lɛ ya liki si kwiziŋa si wɔnyadɔ Aya kɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Do you really believe me?
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu eʋi ba si, “Mlɛziŋa ablɔ kɔ na a?

english_verse: The time will come and is already here when all of you will be scattered. Each of you will go back home and leave me by myself. But the Father will be with me, and I won't be alone.
translation_verse: Lipoe le litrába, lɛ lina kooko o, gi mlɔ pɔ́ mlɛtrahle, mlɔ mɛ ɔnɔ kakaa aatrɛ ní yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kepea mɛ, lɛ mɛ tètè ko maagɔ ɔ. Pɔ̀ aní mɛ tètè maagɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si Kaka Aya ɔlɛ ni mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I have told you this, so that you might have peace in your hearts because of me. While you are in the world, you will have to suffer. But cheer up! I have defeated the world.
translation_verse: Masi mlɔ eboa la ya tɔ mlamɔ kusuyɔ ní likpɔ kpɛkpɛ mɛ ni mɛ. Kelea mɛ kiaki si mlaamɔ kini. Pɔ̀ mlalɛɛ gaglaa! Maŋa kelea mɛ kinie aʋa!”

english_verse: After Jesus had finished speaking to his disciples, he looked up toward heaven and prayed: Father, the time has come for you to bring glory to your Son, in order that he may bring glory to you.
translation_verse: Agi Yesu apani eboa la ya pɔ́ ɛ, edi lifunu ne lɛ apani si, “Kaka, ɔnyɔsasa nɔ ɛna. Kpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ ní wɔ obi ye su, tɔ wɔ obi ye fɛ ɔkpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ ní wɔ linyi ne su.

english_verse: And you gave him power over all people, so he would give eternal life to everyone you give him.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si wɔki yɛ kigagla ní banima petee aʋa a, tɔ banama gi wɔki yɛ ɛ, aaki ba ligbã́ moblo le.

english_verse: Eternal life is to know you, the only true God, and to know Jesus Christ, the one you sent.
translation_verse: Lɛ ligbã́ moblo le e, lɛ linu si, bete wo Aya ɔtutɔ lɔ, ani Yesu Kristo gi yɛ wɔkpɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I have brought glory to you here on earth by doing everything you gave me to do.
translation_verse: Makpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ ní wɔ linyi ne su ní banima kusi ní kesea aʋa; gi meblo ni axwɛ ana gi wɔki mɛ si miwa ɛ.

english_verse: You have given me some followers from this world, and I have shown them what you are like. They were yours, but you gave them to me, and they have obeyed you.
translation_verse: “Mebu wo abasi banama gi wɔkya ki mɛ dɔni kelea mɛ ɛ. Beze wɔ banɛ, xe wɔkɔ ba ɔkimɛ ɛ. Bexo wɔ liboe le oto,

english_verse: They know that you gave me everything I have.
translation_verse: lɛ abla ɛ, bete si kidɔ kakaa gi wɔki mɛ ɛ, kidɔ wɔ kɔ.

english_verse: I told my followers what you told me, and they accepted it. They know I came from you, and they believe you are the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Liboe lɛ gi wɔki mɛ ɛ, makɔ lɛ aki ba lɛ bɛzi liboe le e; bete si linu anukwarɛɛ si wɔklɔ madɔ, lɛ bɛziŋa si wɔ wɔkpɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am praying for them, but not for those who belong to this world. My followers belong to you, and I am praying for them.
translation_verse: “Maxwa Aya ní ba litukpo, máxwa Aya ki kelea banima petee, pɔ̀ ki banama gi wɔki mɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si wɔ banɛ benu u.

english_verse: All I have is yours, and all you have is mine, and they will bring glory to me.
translation_verse: Kidɔ kakaa gi kiliɛ mɛ awla ɛ, wɔ kinɛ kinu, lɛ wɔ kidɔ kakaa ɛ mɛ kinɛ kinu; lɛ mɛ banima bɛ kpɛ kukɔ́kɔ́ ní mɛ su gani bɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Holy Father, I am no longer in the world. I am coming to you, but my followers are still in the world. So keep them safe by the power of the name you have given me. Then they will be one with each other, just as you and I are one.
translation_verse: Lɛ abla ɛ, matraba wɔ klɔ; Máma kelea mɛ tɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ bakɔ bedzialɛ ní kelea mɛ. Ɔka Dradra yɛ! Ki tɔ wɔ linyi ne lɛ kigaglaɛ kize kuka kpɛkpɛ ní ba su, linyi lɛ klɔ gi wɔki mɛ ɛ, tɔ beze tole ŋwisi kiliɛ gi mɛ ni wɔ kunu kidɔ tile kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: While I was with them, I kept them safe by the power you have given me. I guarded them, and not one of them was lost, except the one who had to be lost. This happened so that what the Scriptures say would come true.
translation_verse: Agi meze ní ba su i, mazi ba onu nì wɔ linyi ne kigaglaɛ, linyii lɛ klɔ gi wɔki mɛ ɛ. Makpɛ kuka aklani ba gi bamɛ ɔ́tɔtɔ ɔ́lila a, sani ɔniliɛ klɔ gi lilɛ si ɔlila ɛ, lɛ ya liba lɛ mɛ tɔ Kuŋwlimi yɔ kuba kɔ mɛ.

english_verse: I am on my way to you. But I say these things while I am still in the world, so my followers will have the same complete joy that I do.
translation_verse: “Lɛ abla ɛ, matraba wɔ klɔ, lɛ loso mɛpani eboa la ya gi malɛ ní kelea mɛ ɛ, tɔ ba ina nɛ mɛ iayi ni mɛ isami nɛ.

english_verse: I have told them your message. But the people of this world hate them, because they don't belong to this world, just as I don't.
translation_verse: Makɔ wɔ odu lo aki ba, lɛ kelea mɛ banima bɛtrɔ ba ahwafi, lɛ ese linu si bénu kelea mɛ banɛ tɔ ɔ, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi mɛ fɛ mádɔ kelea mɛ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Father, I don't ask you to take my followers out of the world, but keep them safe from the evil one.
translation_verse: Maʋíʋi wo si bu ba dɔni kelea mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ meeʋi wo tɔ zi ba ní ozimizi ye iwla mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: They don't belong to this world, and neither do I.
translation_verse: Bádɔ kelea mɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi mɛ fɛ mádɔ kelea mɛ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Your word is the truth. So let this truth make them completely yours.
translation_verse: Dra ba su kíwɔ isu ya gani anukwarɛ liboe le me e; lɛ ese linu si wɔ liboe le linu anukwarɛɛ.

english_verse: I am sending them into the world, just as you sent me.
translation_verse: Mɛɛtsisi ba kelea mɛ, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi wɔtsisi mɛ ni kelea mɛ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I have given myself completely for their sake, so they may belong completely to the truth.
translation_verse: Kɔkpɛ ba loso, e madra isu ya su aki wɔ, tɔ ba fɛ wɔadra basu su. Yesu axwa Aya ni baʋaziŋa ba petee litukpo

english_verse: I am not praying just for these followers. I am also praying for everyone else who will have faith because of what my followers will say about me.
translation_verse: “Ani ba tètè meeʋi kɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ ki banama petee fɛ gi biazɛ mɛ aʋa ŋa gani liboe lɛ gi biapani ki ba mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I want all of them to be one with each other, just as I am one with you and you are one with me. I also want them to be one with us. Then the people of this world will believe that you sent me.
translation_verse: Meʋi si ba pɔ́ bedzi kidɔ tile. Kaka! kiliɛ gi wɔlɛ mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ, xe mɛ fɛ malɛ ní wɔ mɛ ɛ, tɔ beze ní blɔ mɛ, tɔ kelea mɛ kaziŋa si wɔ wɔkpɛ mɛ.

english_verse: I have honored my followers in the same way you honored me, in order that they may be one with each other, just as we are one.
translation_verse: Maki ba kusudra ŋwisi kiliɛ gi wɔki mɛ kusudra kinɛ ɛ, tɔ bedzi kidɔ tile, kiliɛ gi mɛ ni wɔ kunu kidɔ tile e.

english_verse: I am one with them, and you are one with me, so they may become completely one. Then this world's people will know that you sent me. They will know that you love my followers as much as you love me.
translation_verse: Malɛ ní ba mɛ lɛ wɔ fɛ wɔlɛ ní mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ, tɔ ba pɔ́ biaze kidɔ tile, tɔ kelea mɛ banima biate si wɔ wɔkpɛ mɛ, lɛ wɔdimɛ ni ba kiliɛ gi wɔdimɛ ni mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Father, I want everyone you have given me to be with me, wherever I am. Then they will see the glory you have given me, because you loved me before the world was created.
translation_verse: “Kaka! Wɔ wɔkɔ ba ɔki mɛ, lɛ mapɛ si beze ní mɛ su ní niklɔ gi malɛ ɛ, tɔ biamɔ mɛ kusudraa, kusudra liɔ gi wɔ ki mɛ ɛ; lɛ ese linu si wɔlɔ mɛ xe kelea kɛgyɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Good Father, the people of this world don't know you. But I know you, and my followers know that you sent me.
translation_verse: “Kaka gi ɔlɛ ní Kude Gyɔgyɔ aʋa a! Gani lɛ mɛ si kelea mɛ kéte wo fɛ ɛ, mɔkɔ mete wo, lɛ banɔaya bete si wɔ́ wɔkpɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I told them what you are like, and I will tell them even more. Then the love you have for me will become part of them, and I will be one with them.
translation_verse: Maki si bete wo, lɛ maatrɛ ni lɛ aʋa si tɔ bete wo, tɔ wɔ kulɔlɔ ki mɛ ɛ, kwiaze ní ba mɛ, atɔ mɛ fɛ maaze ní ba mɛ.”

english_verse: One of the high priest's servants was there. He was a relative of the servant whose ear Peter had cut off, and he asked, “Didn't I see you in the garden with that man?”
translation_verse: Kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ye yɛ ɔnɔdzidzi tole gi onu ɔŋanɛ ki ɔniliɛ gi yɛ kutukpaa Petro atsa ɛ, apani si, “Dani mamɔ wɔ ni yɛ ní lisekpɔ lɛ mɛ ɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus again asked, “Who are you looking for?” “We are looking for Jesus from Nazareth,” they answered.
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu eʋi ba dzɛ si, “Nyaŋwɛ mlɛɛpɛ ɛ?” bebu le onu si, “Yesu Nazaret ɔnɛɛ.”

english_verse: This time Jesus replied, “I have already told you that I am Jesus. If I am the one you are looking for, let these others go.
translation_verse: Lɛ Yesu apani si, “Masi mlɔ koko si Mɛ menu yɛ. Xegi mɛ mlɛɛpɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ mlaki tɔ mɛ badɔkpasi ba basɛ.”

english_verse: Then everything will happen, just as I said, ‘I did not lose anyone you gave me.’ ”
translation_verse: Apani nite tɔ liboe lɛ gi apani azanɔ ɔ si; “Ɔka, málila banɔaklɔ gi wɔ ki mɛ ɛ, bamɛ ɔtɔtɔ” Liaba lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Simon Peter had brought along a sword. He pulled it out and struck at Malchus, the servant of the high priest, cutting off his right ear.
translation_verse: Ihɛ gblamadza eze ní Simon Petro su, etso ye bu ní liklui lɛ mɛ, aŋwia yɛ, lɛ ati kusumu yo ɔka ʋidi ye yɛ ɔnɔdzidzi ye yɛ kaŋaa kutukpaa ɛ. Ɔnɔdzidzi ye yɛ linyi ne lize Malxo.

english_verse: The Roman officer and his men, together with the temple police, arrested Jesus and tied him up.
translation_verse: Lɛ Roma banɛ baguta ba ni ba ɔkaɛ kɔpɔni Yudanɛ banɔpe ba bevu Yesu lɛ bɛnya yɛ ɛ,

english_verse: Peter stayed outside near the gate. But the other disciple came back out and spoke to the girl at the gate. She let Peter go in,
translation_verse: pɔ̀ Petro kɔɔ awɔ kepea kevunu ya. Ɔdɔkpasi liɛ klɔ edzi atrɛ ní kepea kevunu ya nite si egu kunugu ni ɔdisamiɔ nɔ gi eepe kevunu ya, lɛ agbani Petro amani kepea mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: but asked him, “Aren't you one of that man's followers?” “No, I am not!” Peter answered.
translation_verse: Ɔdisami nɔ ní kevunu ya eeʋi Petro si, “Aní ɔka liɛ ya yɛ badɔkpasi ba mɛ tole wonu i?” Petro ebu le onu si, “Owo, ménu ba mɛ ɔnɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: It was cold, and the servants and temple police had made a charcoal fire. They were warming themselves around it, when Peter went over and stood near the fire to warm himself. Jesus Is Questioned by the High Priest (Matthew
translation_verse: Kublɔ kwize lɛ loso baxwɛdzɛ ba ni banɔpe ba bɛkpɛ lifuha gi bɛlɛɛ ní lɛ su u, xe bɛzɛɛŋani i. Lɛ Petro eti apɔni ba xe azɛɛŋani kifu yɛ ɛ. Kusumu yo ɔka ʋidi ye eʋi Yesu beʋiʋi

english_verse: The high priest questioned Jesus about his followers and his teaching.
translation_verse: Lɛ Kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ye eʋi Yesu beʋiʋi ní yɛ badɔkpasi ba ni yɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ su i.

english_verse: Why are you questioning me? Why don't you ask the people who heard me? They know what I have said.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ege lɛ loso mleeʋi me beʋiʋi i? Mleʋi banama gi beenu mɛ liboe le e. Mleʋi ba liboe lɛ gi masi ba ɛ, bete liboe lɛ gi mapani i.”

english_verse: Jesus was still tied up, and Annas sent him to Caiaphas the high priest. Peter Again Denies that He Knows Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu edzì eze ní igbé ne me xe Hana aki si bɛkɔ yɛ tsisi Kayafa Kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ye klɔ ɔ. Petro anada dzɛ si yete Yesu

english_verse: It was early in the morning when Jesus was taken from Caiaphas to the building where the Roman governor stayed. But the crowd waited outside. Any of them who had gone inside would have become unclean and would not be allowed to eat the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Bɛsɛ ni Yesu ni Kayafa kepea mɛ, livlɛ lɛ fififi ɛtsinɔ ní Roma ɔnɛ kesea ɔʋadi ye yɛ kepea mɛ. Yudanɛ baka ba bétieku kekusipea mɛ, lɛ ese linu si bápɛ si belulù isu, tɔ biatani Kutseolidɔzawe le kuŋa.

english_verse: Pilate came out and asked, “What charges are you bringing against this man?”
translation_verse: Lɛ loso, Pilato azɛɛtsani ba lɛ eʋi ba si, “Eboe woli mlɛkɔ ní onyime liɛ ya su u?”

english_verse: They answered, “He is a criminal! That's why we brought him to you.”
translation_verse: Bebu le onu si, “Kútramani yɛ ní wɔkɔ ɔ, xe ɔ́bitɛ liboe zimizi i.”

english_verse: And so what Jesus said about his death would soon come true.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya liba lɛ mɛ tɔ eboa la gi Yesu apani ní yɛ Kutseo liɔ ɔ, gi atrátse su i, aba la mɛ.

english_verse: Pilate then went back inside. He called Jesus over and asked, “Are you the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Pilato edzì atrɛ ní kekusipea mɛ lɛ axwa Yesu u, xe eʋi ye si i, “Wɔ wonu Yudanɛ ma Okusi ye na a?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Are you asking this on your own or did someone tell you about me?”
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Kuʋiʋi kuliɔ ya ɛ, wɔkɔ kwidɔ loo banɔ bɛpani mɛ su i si wɔ na a?”

english_verse: “You know I'm not a Jew!” Pilate said. “Your own people and the chief priests brought you to me. What have you done?”
translation_verse: Pilato eʋi ye si, “Kigyo wogyodi si Yuda ɔnɛ menu na a? Wɔ ɔtutɔ wɔ akɔanɛ ma ni Kusumu yo baka ba ba bɛkɔ wɔ ɛmani mɛ. Ege kɛ wɔ bitɛ ɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My kingdom doesn't belong to this world. If it did, my followers would have fought to keep me from being handed over to our leaders. No, my kingdom doesn't belong to this world.”
translation_verse: Yesu apani si, “Mɛ Kaʋaŋaa kádɔ kelea lia mɛ ɛ; atɛsi mɛ kaʋaŋaa kɛdɔ kelea lia ya mɛ ɛ, nya mɛ besumubi ba biaŋwlɛ mɛ litukpo tɔ Yudanɛ ma baki vu me e. Pɔ̀ abla ɛ, mɛ kaʋaŋaa kɛdɔ ɔkɔ dzedze!”

english_verse: “So you are a king,” Pilate replied. “You are saying that I am a king,” Jesus told him. “I was born into this world to tell about the truth. And everyone who belongs to the truth knows my voice.”
translation_verse: Lɛ Pilato eʋi Yesu si, “Kɔlɔ okusi wo nu na a?” Yesu ebu le onu si, “Wɔ wɔpani si menu okusi. Liboe tile loso bɛpɔ mɛ xe maba kelea mɛ ɛ, lɛ linu si tɔ mipani ní anukwarɛɛ su. Ɔnɔ kakaa gi onu anukwarɛɛ ɔnɛ ɛ izɛɛta mɛ liboe le kutu.”

english_verse: And since I usually set a prisoner free for you at Passover, would you like for me to set free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: “Pɔ̀ ni ɔkɔ ɔlɔ̀ gi ɔlɛ ní mlɔ awla onu i, Mizɛɛyurɔ ɔnɔ tole gi bɛkpɛ ligba ɛki mlɔ ní kutseolidɔzawe le aʋa a. Lɛ loso mlɛpɛ si miyurɔ ‘Yudanɛ ma Okusi ye ɔki mlɔ na a’?”

english_verse: They shouted, “No, not him! We want Barabbas.” Now Barabbas was a terrorist.
translation_verse: Bebu le onu ni ozi si, “Owo, aní yɛ ɛ! Kwipɛ Baraba!” Baraba liɛ eze odètsa.

english_verse: Pilate gave orders for Jesus to be beaten with a whip.
translation_verse: Lɛ Pilato aki si bɛfiaʋi Yesu litam nɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The soldiers made a crown out of thorn branches and put it on Jesus. Then they put a purple robe on him.
translation_verse: Baguta ba bɛklɔʋi bibu ʋe lɛ bɛkɔ lɛ ekume ki Yesu ŋwisi likusikuto kinɛ ɛ, lɛ kede e, bɛkpɛ liwu kyíkyĩ gblamadza ɛki yɛ

english_verse: They came up to him and said, “Hey, you king of the Jews!” They also hit him with their fists.
translation_verse: lɛ xe beti ipɔni yɛ ɛ, kɔ bɛpani si, “Yudanɛ ma Okusi ye oze ligbã́ gblamadza!” Kɔ bɛbɔ yɛ bidɔ mɛ, bɛbitɛ nite tasɛ tasɛ.

english_verse: Once again Pilate went out. This time he said, “I will have Jesus brought out to you again. Then you can see for yourselves that I have not found him guilty.”
translation_verse: Pilato edo atrɛ dzɛ lɛ asi linɔkpi le si, “Mledi, matrado ni ye mani ya ki mlɔ tɔ mlamɔ si mámɔ kesetata tɔtɔ gi makɔ bu yɛ lipɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus came out, wearing the crown of thorns and the purple robe. Pilate said, “Here is the man!”
translation_verse: Gi Yesu edo aba oŋwe no e, bibu ʋe likuto le lize yɛ litukpo le, lɛ liwu kyíkyĩ gblamadza nɛ kyɛ lize ní yɛ su u. Pilato asi ba si, “Mledi! Onyimee liɛ ya!”

english_verse: When the chief priests and the temple police saw him, they yelled, “Nail him to a cross! Nail him to a cross!” Pilate told them, “You take him and nail him to a cross! I don't find him guilty of anything.”
translation_verse: Agi Kusumu yo baka ba ni lisɔligba lɛ bepepe ba bɛmɔ Yesu i, bɛkpɛ ozi si, “Kú ye ní ose lo su, Ku ye ní ose lo su!” Lɛ Pilato ebu le onu aki ba si, “Mlɔ tutɔ mlagbani yɛ atsinɔ tɔ mlazɛkú ye. Mɛ xunyɔ mámɔ liboeboe gi maakɔ obu yɛ lipɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “He claimed to be the Son of God! Our law says that he must be put to death.”
translation_verse: Lɛ Yudanɛ ma bebú le onu si, “Ɔsã ɔlɛ blɔ awla gi ɛpani si, lilɛ si otse e, lɛ ese linu si akɔ lɛ si yɛ yenu Aya Yebi.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he was terrified.
translation_verse: Agi Pilato enu liboe le e, lifu liku ye sanɔ.

english_verse: He went back inside and asked Jesus, “Where are you from?” But Jesus did not answer.
translation_verse: Edzì atrɛ ní kekusipea mɛ lɛ eʋi Yesu si, “Nifɔ wɔdɔ ɔ?” Pɔ̀ Yesu óbu le onu ɔki yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: “Why won't you answer my question?” Pilate asked. “Don't you know I have the power to let you go free or to nail you to a cross?”
translation_verse: Pilato eʋi Yesu si, “Wɔtrafuɛ ni mɛ na a? Wóte si kigagla kiliɛ mɛ awla si miyurɔ wɔ loo tɔ miki si beku wo ní ose lo su na a.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If God had not given you the power, you couldn't do anything at all to me. But the one who handed me over to you did something even worse.”
translation_verse: Yesu ebu le onu si, “Wɔ́mɔ kigagla ní mɛ aʋa a, xe aní kiki bɛki wɔ kɛ dɔni lifunu ne e. Lɛ loso e, ɔniliɛ gi yɛ akɔ mɛ akpɛ awla ki wɔ ɛ, yɛ eboe zimizi na ekeme sanɔ.”

english_verse: Then Pilate wanted to set Jesus free. But the crowd again yelled, “If you set this man free, you are no friend of the Emperor! Anyone who claims to be a king is an enemy of the Emperor.”
translation_verse: Agi Pilato enu liboe lɛ ya ɛ, ekeni edi si yipɛ́ kude kutɔ onu tɔ yiyurɔ Yesu. Pɔ̀ Yudanɛ ma bɛkpɛ ozi dzɛ si, “Xe wɔyurɔ yɛ ɛ, kɔ libasɛ si wónu Kaisaro yɛʋia a! Ɔnɔ kakaa gi akɔ isu si ye onu okusi i, ayɔ kedu ní Okusi ʋidi ye Kaisaro su!”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he brought Jesus out. Then he sat down on the judge's bench at the place known as “The Stone Pavement.” In Aramaic this pavement is called “Gabbatha.”
translation_verse: Agi Pilato enu eboa la ya ɛ, agbani Yesu edo no ní oŋwe no lɛ azeeze ní yɛ litsi xwagbo le aʋa ní klɔ gi bɛplɛ Akla plataplata la gi bizɛxwa si, “line ne me e.” Ni si Hebri se me e, linyi ne linu Gabata.

english_verse: It was about noon on the day before Passover, and Pilate said to the crowd, “Look at your king!”
translation_verse: Lizè ŋwisi livlɛ lɛ ni kemizea kutsaa, liwe tile kpɛ ɔtɔ ɛki Kutseolidɔzawe le. Pilato asi Yudanɛ ma si, “Imɔ mlɔ okusi ye!”

english_verse: Then Pilate handed Jesus over to be nailed to a cross. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Lɛ Pilato akɔ Yesu aki ba si bazɛ ku ní ose lo su i. Baguta ba beku Yesu ní ose lo su Lɛ baguta ba bɛgbani Yesu i sɛnɔ ɛ.

english_verse: The soldiers first broke the legs of the other two men who were nailed there.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, baguta ba bɛtrɛ lɛ bɛzɛɛvini ɔnɔ tɔpu yɛ ni ɔnɔ ʋlaɛ gi bekú i pɔni Yesu i ba ikli lɛ.

english_verse: So the chief priests went to Pilate and said, “Why did you write that he is King of the Jews? You should have written, ‘He claimed to be King of the Jews.’ ”
translation_verse: Líze Yudanɛ ma kusumu yo baka ba ole e, lɛ bɛsi Pilato si, “Wógyeni ŋwlimi si ‘Yudanɛ ma Okusi ye,’ boŋu i, si Onyime liɛ si, ‘Mɛ menu Yudanɛ ma Okusi ye.’ ”

english_verse: When Jesus saw his mother and his favorite disciple with her, he said to his mother, “This man is now your son.”
translation_verse: Yesu amɔ yene ni yɛ ɔdɔkpasi liɛ gi alɔ ɛ, gi balɛɛ níklɔ ɔ; lɛ asi yene si, “Mone wobinyimee yɛ liɛ.”

english_verse: and he carried his cross to a place known as “The Skull.” In Aramaic this place is called “Golgotha.”
translation_verse: Lɛ loso bɛgbani yɛ dono, gi etu yɛ osetsase lo atsinɔ níklɔ gi bizɛɛxwa si Litukpoxwa lɛ Ozeklɔ ɔ, Ni si Hebri se me e, bizɛɛxwa níklɔ si, Golgota.

english_verse: There Jesus was nailed to the cross, and on each side of him a man was also nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Niklɔ beku ye ní osetsase lo su; xe bekú benyime tiaʋa ɛpɔni yɛ ɛ, tole ní yɛ kabaa me, ɔʋlaɛ ní yɛ kaŋaa mɛ lɛ Yesu eze ní ba kusi i.

english_verse: Pilate ordered the charge against Jesus to be written on a board and put above the cross. It read, “Jesus of Nazareth, King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Pilato aŋwlimi bidɔ gi aki si bɛkɔ eku ní Yesu etukpo la onu u si, “Yesu Nazaret ƆNƐƐ, YUDANƐ MA OKUSI YE.”

english_verse: The words were written in Hebrew, Latin, and Greek. The place where Jesus was taken wasn't far from the city, and many of the people read the charge against him.
translation_verse: Niklɔ gi bekú Yesu i, ódze ni ɔma ʋidi no su u, lɛ loso Yudanɛ glegle bɛkla bidɔ ŋwlimiŋwlimi ʋɛ. Bɛŋwlimi bidɔ mɛ ní si Hebri se, si Roma sɛ ani si Hela sɛ mɛ.

english_verse: But Pilate told them, “What is written will not be changed!”
translation_verse: Pilato ebu le onu si, “Kidiliɛ gi maŋwlimi i, mátrakyi ke e.”

english_verse: The soldiers said to each other, “Let's not rip it apart. We will gamble to see who gets it.” This happened so the Scriptures would come true, which say, “They divided up my clothes and gambled for my garments.” The soldiers then did what they had decided.
translation_verse: Lɛ baguta ba bɛpani ní ba tsali kusi si, “Mlakí ki tɔ kukyì liwu le e; boŋu i mlaki tɔ kuta exoeʋi la ní lɛ aʋa tɔ kudi si nyaŋwɛ linɛ liadzi na a.” Lɛ ya liba lɛ mɛ tɔ liboe le gi bɛŋwlimi kpɛ Aya yɛ liboe le me e, liba lɛ mɛ si, “Bɛlɛ mɛ ewu la ɛkpɛ ní ba kusi lɛ bɛta exoeʋi la ní mɛ liwu gblamadza nɛ aʋa ɛ.” Lɛ lɛ ya baguta ba bɛbitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus' mother stood beside his cross with her sister and Mary the wife of Clopas. Mary Magdalene was standing there too.
translation_verse: Ní Yesu yɛ ose lo su pɛ ɛ, Yesu yene, yeneda Maria gi onu Klopa yedze e, ani Maria Magdaladzee bɛlɛɛ.

english_verse: But when they came to Jesus, they saw he was already dead, and they did not break his legs.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ gi bɛna Yesu aʋa ɛ, bɛmɔ si yɛkɔɔ etse kooko lɛ loso, bávini yɛ ikli lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: In the place where Jesus had been nailed to a cross, there was a garden with a tomb that had never been used.
translation_verse: Bidɔŋaŋa kuka kutɔ kwize niklɔ gi beku Yesu ní ose lo su u, xe etse e, ɔdrɔ vuvu gi bakpɛ okpo lɔ mɛ oʋídi i, eze kɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Jesus knew that he had now finished his work. And in order to make the Scriptures come true, he said, “I am thirsty!”
translation_verse: Yesu ete si kɔna ni abla ɛ, yeblo ni liboe kakaa, lɛ tɔ liboe lɛ gi bɛŋwlimi plɛ liba lɛ mɛ ɛ, akpɛ ozi si, “Olile eeku me.”

english_verse: A jar of cheap wine was there. Someone then soaked a sponge with the wine and held it up to Jesus' mouth on the stem of a hyssop plant.
translation_verse: Keʋe katɔ mɛ gi kuda nyagba nyagba kwize e, keze niklɔ; lɛ bɛkɔ ɔsapo ɔtɔ ɛkpɛ ní kɔ mɛ ɛ, xe bɛkɔ lɔ ɛxla ní hisope yɛ kiseʋi gblamadzaɛtɔ onu lɛ bɛkɔ kɔ ɛtɔsi ki yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: kilograms of spices made from myrrh and aloes. This was the same Nicodemus who had visited Jesus one night.
translation_verse: Gi Yesu aŋwɛ kudaa pɔ́ ɛ, akpɛ ozi si, “Liblo e!” Lɛ kede e, akpɛ yɛ litukpo le kesea lɛ akɔ yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ akɔ ɛ. Bɛsɔ́ Yesu bidɔ ní opoga nɔ mɛ

english_verse: The next day would be both a Sabbath and the Passover. It was a special day for the Jewish people, and they did not want the bodies to stay on the crosses during this day. So they asked Pilate to break the men's legs and take their bodies down.
translation_verse: Lɛ Yudanɛ baka ba bezeʋi Pilato tɔ ɔki ba kude e, tɔ bavini banɔaklɔ gi beku ní ise le su i, ba ikli lɛ ani tɔ bati bekpo ʋa ní ise le su. Beʋi liboe lɛ ya lɛ ese linu si, liwe le lize Lisɔpa gi bizɛɛbla ɛki Lizemɔniwe le e, lɛ bápɛ si bekpo ʋa beze ní isetsase le su ní Lizemɔniwe le aʋa a, gi Lizemɔniwe le linu liwe dradra loso o.

english_verse: One of the soldiers stuck his spear into Jesus' side, and blood and water came out.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ baguta ba mɛ tole, asɔ Yesu ɔtrɛ nɔ ní opoga nɔ mɛ, nite me si ika lɛ ni kuni yo kwido kyɔŋ

english_verse: We know this is true, because it was told by someone who saw it happen. Now you can have faith too.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi amɔ eboa la ya aŋu mɛ ɛ, yɛ apani la su, tɔ mlɔ fɛ mlaazi ŋa. Liboe lɛ gi apani i, linu anukwarɛ lɛ ete si yɛ apani anukwarɛɛ.

english_verse: All this happened so that the Scriptures would come true, which say, “No bone of his body will be broken”
translation_verse: Eboa la ya ɛba la mɛ tɔ kuŋwlimi dradraa kuba kɔ mɛ si, “Bátravini yɛ lixwa ɛtɔtɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: and “They will see the one in whose side they stuck a spear.” Jesus Is Buried (Matthew
translation_verse: Lɛ dzɛ ɛ, kuŋwlimi dzedze kwipani si, “Banima biadi ɔniliɛ gi bɛsɔ́ bidɔ mɛ ɛ.” Yesu yɛ Kuviveo

english_verse: The tomb was nearby, and since it was the time to prepare for the Sabbath, they were in a hurry to put Jesus' body there.
translation_verse: Agi lize Yudanɛ ma liblawe le kpɛ ɔtɔ ɛki Lizemɔniwe le e, xe ɔdrɔ lɔ kyɛ eti ipɔnɔ, loso e, bɛkpɛ Yesu ní lɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Joseph from Arimathea was one of Jesus' disciples. He had kept it secret though, because he was afraid of the Jewish leaders. But now he asked Pilate to let him have Jesus' body. Pilate gave him permission, and Joseph took it down from the cross.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya kede e, Yosef, gi ádɔ Arimatia ɛ, azeeʋi Pilato tɔ ɔyurɔ Yesu yɛ okpo ye ɔki yɛ, Yosef eze ni Yesu kude ní kikpokpo me, lɛ ese linu si azeese Yudanɛ baka ba a. Pilato aki yɛ kude, lɛ Yosef atrɛ xe azɛɛsɛ ni okpo ye e.

english_verse: The two men wrapped the body in a linen cloth, together with the spices, which was how the Jewish people buried their dead.
translation_verse: Banɔ tiaʋa ya ɛ, bɛkɔ Yesu yɛ okpo ye lɛ bɛsra bawa flafla ʋa ɛki yɛ ɛ, lɛ bɛxla yɛ ɛkpɛ ní asaba pititi gblamadzaatɔ mɛ ɛ, ní Yudanɛ ma ligoʋi le onu kiliɛ gi bizɛbla bekpo ʋa ɛki kunɔvive e.

english_verse: Thomas replied, “You are my Lord and my God!”
translation_verse: Toma ebu le onu aki Yesu si, “Mɛ Ɔkaɛ ni mɛ Aya!”

english_verse: On Sunday morning while it was still dark, Mary Magdalene went to the tomb and saw that the stone had been rolled away from the entrance.
translation_verse: Lipadzruwe le olezatɔ nɔ gi kanaa mɛ kaʋídra ɛ, Maria Magdalene atrɛ ní Yesu ɔdrɔ lɔ su lɛ amɔ si likla nɛ líma ní ɔdrɔ lɔ onu u.

english_verse: So the two of them went back to the other disciples. Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalene (Mark
translation_verse: Lɛ badɔkpasi ba bedzi itrɛ ní ba kepea mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The disciple who got there first then went into the tomb, and when he saw it, he believed.
translation_verse: Gɔgɔ ɛ, ɔdɔkpasi liɛ gi yɛ etu ɔdrɔ lɔ su kuna ɛ, kyɛ eti eku, lɛ amɔ nite ke e, lɛ azɛ aŋa si Yesu anya ayɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Although Thomas the Twin was one of the twelve disciples, he wasn't with the others when Jesus appeared to them.
translation_verse: Badɔkpasi Liɔfɔ ni tiaʋa ba mɛ tole Toma, gi bizɛxwa si tiaʋa obi ye e, óze bagɔgɔ ba kusi i, xe Yesu aba a.

english_verse: and saw two angels inside. They were dressed in white and were sitting where Jesus' body had been. One was at the head and the other was at the foot.
translation_verse: lɛ amɔ Aya yɔ baxwɛdzɛ tiaʋa gi bɛkpɛ bidɔ pititi i, xe bedi ní niklɔ ɔ, gi Yesu yɛ okpo ye afɛ ɛ, tole ní yɛ etukpo la onu lɛ ɔʋlaɛ ní yɛ ikli lɛ onu i.

english_verse: She ran to Simon Peter and to Jesus' favorite disciple and said, “They have taken the Lord from the tomb! We don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Lɛ loso ese atrɛ ní Simon Petro ni ɔdɔkpasi liɛ klɔ gi Yesu alɔ ɛ, ba klɔ ɔ, lɛ asi ba si i, “Bebu Ɔkaɛ ní ɔdrɔ lɔ mɛ, lɛ kúte niklɔ gi bɛtsini yɛ ɛ!”

english_verse: Peter and the other disciple started for the tomb.
translation_verse: Lɛ Petro ni ɔdɔkpasi liɛ klɔ ɛ, bɛtrɛ ní ɔdrɔ lɔ su i.

english_verse: They ran side by side, until the other disciple ran faster than Peter and got there first.
translation_verse: Ba tiaʋa bezeese pɔ̀ ɔdɔkpasi liɛ klɔ ese aza ní Petro aʋa a, lɛ yɛ etu ɔdrɔ lɔ su ku na a.

english_verse: He bent over and saw the strips of linen cloth lying inside the tomb, but he did not go in.
translation_verse: Abùbɔ lɛ amɔ asaba pititi ala mɛ gi bɛxla Yesu ikpɛ ɛ, gi afini i, pɔ̀ oti oku ɔdrɔ lɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: When Simon Peter got there, he went into the tomb and saw the strips of cloth.
translation_verse: Simon Petro gi yɛ awɔ kedea ɛ, aba eku lɛ aza eku ní ɔdrɔ lɔ mɛ ɛ. Amɔ asaba pititi la gi afini i,

english_verse: He also saw the piece of cloth that had been used to cover Jesus' face. It was rolled up and in a place by itself.
translation_verse: ni kusa liɔ klɔ gi bɛkɔ ɛnya Yesu yɛ litukpo le e. Kusa liɔ klɔ kɔ ɛ, kwiklɔʋi gi kwifɛ lidze ní asaba pititi la su u.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene stood crying outside the tomb. She was still weeping, when she stooped down
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Maria alɛɛ ní ɔdrɔ lɔ su azeebemi; gi azeebemi i, abùbɔ lɛ edi ɔdrɔ lɔ mɛ atsisi i

english_verse: The angels asked Mary, “Why are you crying?” She answered, “They have taken away my Lord's body! I don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Lɛ beʋi ye si, “Ɔdzɛ, ege lɛ loso woebemi i?” Ebu le onu si, “Befeke mɛ Ɔkaɛ sɛnɔ, lɛ méte niklɔ gi bɛzɛɛplɛ yɛ ɛ!”

english_verse: Jesus asked her, “Why are you crying? Who are you looking for?” She thought he was the gardener and said, “Sir, if you have taken his body away, please tell me, so I can go and get him.”
translation_verse: Yesu eʋi ye si, “Ɔdzɛ, ege lɛ loso woebemi i? nyaŋwɛ wɔsi wɔɛpɛ ɛ?” Ɔdzɛɛ egyoedi si abɔ yɛ aʋa odidi onu, lɛ asi yɛ si, “Xe wɔ wofeke ye ɔsɛnɔ ɛ, Ɔka, si mɛ niklɔ gi wɔplɛ yɛ ɛ, atɔ mizeefeke ye.”

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Don't hold on to me! I have not yet gone to the Father. But tell my disciples I am going to the one who is my Father and my God, as well as your Father and your God.”
translation_verse: Yesu asi yɛ si, “Wukísú ní mɛ su u, lɛ ese linu si maʋidzitrɛ ní Mɔka klɔ ɔ. Pɔ̀ trɛ ní mɛ benemi ba klɔ ɔ tɔ si ba si medzi itrɛ ní yɛ klɔ gi onu Mɔka ni ba Ɔka, mɛ Aya ni ba Aya.”

english_verse: and showed them his hands and his side. When the disciples saw the Lord, they became very happy.
translation_verse: Agi apani ba pɔ́ ɛ, abasi ba yɛ kuwla mɛ ni yɛ opoga nɔ mɛ. Isami iku badɔkpasi ba koŋ gi bɛmɔ Ɔkaɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The disciples were afraid of the Jewish leaders, and on the evening of that same Sunday they locked themselves in a room. Suddenly, Jesus appeared in the middle of the group. He greeted them
translation_verse: Lize Lipadzruwe le ɔlagɔ, gi badɔkpasi ba bɛkpɛ likpɔ ɔ, xe bɛda ipupo le kpɛ isu ya ɛ, ɔkpɛ gi bezeese Yudanɛ baka ba loso e. Yesu aba ɔlɛɛ ní ba kusi lɛ apani ba si, “Kusuyɔ ki mlɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: After Jesus had greeted them again, he said, “I am sending you, just as the Father has sent me.”
translation_verse: Yesu asi ba dzɛ si, “Kusuyɔ ki mlɔ, kiliɛ gi Kakaa Aya akpɛ mɛ ɛ, nite mɛɛkpɛ mlɔ.”

english_verse: Then he breathed on them and said, “Receive the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi afuɛ abali ba aʋa ɛ, apani si, “Mlazi Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ.

english_verse: If you forgive anyone's sins, they will be forgiven. But if you don't forgive their sins, they will not be forgiven.” Jesus and Thomas
translation_verse: Xegi mlɛkɔ banima ba eboe zimizi na ɛkyɛ ba ɛ, Aya aakɔ̀ la kukyɛ ba; xe mlákɔ la akyɛ ba ɛ, bátrakɔ la ɛkyɛ ba.” Yesu ebu isu ya abasi Toma

english_verse: So they told him, “We have seen the Lord!” But Thomas said, “First, I must see the nail scars in his hands and touch them with my finger. I must put my hand where the spear went into his side. I won't believe unless I do this!”
