translation_verse: Kristo akí blɔ isuwla mɛ kuzeze! atɔ kwiamɔ ɔwla. Mlalɛ ŋwisi banɔ gi balɛ ní ɔwlamɔmɔ mɛ kinɛ ɛ, tɔ mlakíyurɔ mlɔ isu ya tɔ mlaadzi banɔdzidzi tɔ ɔ.

english_verse: I, Paul, promise you that Christ won't do you any good if you get circumcised.
translation_verse: Mlata kutu! Mɛ Paulo mɛɛsi mlɔ si xe mlɛɛyurɔ isu ya si batsà ɔyaʋi aki mlɔ ɛ, kɔ libasɛ si Kristo ónu kididɔ ki mlɔ kura.

english_verse: And if you try to please God by obeying the Law, you have cut yourself off from Christ and his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Mlɔ banama gi mlekeni idi si mlɔ bede ʋa biagyɔ ni Aya aŋu mɛ gani Ɔsã nɔ mɛ ɛ, mleebu lidze ní Kristo su. Lɛ Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ liadɔ mlɔ ɔza a.

english_verse: But the Spirit makes us sure God will accept us because of our faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Blɔ kɔ ɛ, gani blɔ kuziŋaa mɛ ɛ, kwidi kudeonu si blɔ bede ʋa biagyɔ gani Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ lɔ kigaglaɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If you are a follower of Christ Jesus, it makes no difference whether you are circumcised or not. All that matters is your faith that makes you love others.
translation_verse: Lɛ xe kulɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Yesu Kristo e, ɔyaʋi kutsatsa loo kumɔtsamɔtsa ɛ, kútramani lidzegaga ɛtɔtɔ; lɛ klɔ gi liziã ko linu kuziŋaa, gi kwibasɛ kiliɛ gi kwialɔ blɔ ahanuglɔ ba a.

english_verse: You were doing so well until someone made you turn from the truth.
translation_verse: Mlezekeni idi ní mlɔ kuziŋaa mɛ ɛ xe e! Nyaŋwɛ akɔ xe mlɛmɔni kutu kunu ki anukwarɛɛ?

english_verse: And that person was certainly not sent by the one who chose you.
translation_verse: Aní ɔniliɛ gi axwa mlɔ ɛ yɛ alìɔʋi mlɔ.

english_verse: A little yeast can change a whole batch of dough,
translation_verse: “Kuɖeme sisami ɔtɔ ko bizɛɛkɔ ɛpɔni kunɔɔ xe kɔ petee kuzeeho o.”

english_verse: but you belong to the Lord. This makes me certain you will do what I say, instead of what someone else tells you to do. Whoever is causing trouble for you will be punished.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mazi lɛ aʋa aŋa gani Ɔkaɛ mɛ si mlatráta ɔnɔ dzedze ɔtɔtɔ kutu u. Lɛ ɔniliɛ klɔ ɔ, gi yɛ ɛɛpisa mlɔ ɛ, kitɛ kitɛ ɔlɛ fɛ ɛ, Aya aahe kutu ɔki yɛ.

english_verse: My friends, if I still preach that people need to be circumcised, why am I in so much trouble? The message about the cross would no longer be a problem, if I told people to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mɛ benemi ba a, xegi mɛɛsɔli si ɔyaʋi tsatsa ɛzia ɛ, ege lɛ loso bɛɛyɔ kedu ní mɛ su i? Xe línu anukwarɛɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ mɛ kusɔliɔ si Kristo etse ni ose lo su i, líma si kumani eboe hehe e.

english_verse: I wish everyone who is upsetting you would not only get circumcised, but would cut off much more!
translation_verse: Maapɛ si banama gi beehe eboe ni mlo e, batrɛ lɛ aʋa petee; tɔ bebu isu ya agùaza ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you were chosen to be free. So don't use your freedom as an excuse to do anything you want. Use it as an opportunity to serve each other with love.
translation_verse: Mlɔ mɛ benemi ba a, bɛxwa mlɔ tɔ mleze isuwla mɛ banɔ. Pɔ̀ mlakíki si mlɔ ɔwlamɔmɔɔ nɔ ya ɛ, odzi eboe zimizi kubitɛ tɔ mlɔ bapɛ́pɛ ʋa baŋa mlɔ aʋa a. Boŋu i, mlaki tɔ kulɔlɔ kuki tɔ mlesumu mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba.

english_verse: All the Law says can be summed up in the command to love others as much as you love yourself.
translation_verse: Lɛ Ɔsã zizi nɔ pɔ ɛ, bɛnya nɔ likpɔ tile si; “Lɔ wɔ ɔhanuglɔɛ kiliɛ gi wɔ lɔ wɔ ɔtutɔ wɔ isu ya ɛ.”

english_verse: But if you keep attacking each other like wild animals, you had better watch out or you will destroy yourselves. God's Spirit and Our Own Desires
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe mlɛɛnemi i, xe mlɛtà mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba ŋwisi baŋuga kinɛ ɛ, xe mlɛkpɛ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba ebi i, xe mlɛkpɛ ba kusuyeʋio e, kɔlɔ mlevu aŋu xe aníte e, mlaazizi mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba. Mlaki tɔ kuze ligbã́ ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ kigaglaɛ mɛ

english_verse: If you are guided by the Spirit, you won't obey your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Mɛɛpani si; mlaki tɔ Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔgbani mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ, atɔ mlakíki tɔ mlɔ isu ya mɛ bapɛ́pɛ zimizi ʋa baŋa mlɔ aʋa a.

english_verse: The Spirit and your desires are enemies of each other. They are always fighting each other and keeping you from doing what you feel you should.
translation_verse: Lɛ kidiliɛ gi blɔ kisugyaɛ kiipɛ ɛ, kiyɔ kedu ní Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ kupɛ́pɛɔ su, lɛ kidiliɛ gi Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛɛpɛ ɛ, kiyɔ kedu ní kisugyaɛ kɛ kupɛ́pɛɔ su. Bɛ tuʋa ɛ binu ahwafianɛ aki bɛ ahanuglɔ ʋa, lɛ libasɛ si wɔtratani kidiliɛ gi wɔ ɛ pɛ́ ɛ, kubitɛ.

english_verse: But if you obey the Spirit, the Law of Moses has no control over you.
translation_verse: Xe Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛɛgbani mlɔ ɛ, kɔlɔ mláma ni Ɔsã nɔ ese e.

english_verse: People's desires make them give in to immoral ways, filthy thoughts, and shameful deeds.
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ gi kisugyaɛ kizɛbitɛ ɛ, kizɛbasɛ isu ya wee. Lɛ bɛ binu ádzɛ ni enyimeboe, anyaniboe, ni akpɛ̃boe;

english_verse: They worship idols, practice witchcraft, hate others, and are hard to get along with. People become jealous, angry, and selfish. They not only argue and cause trouble, but they are
translation_verse: ni kubúbitɛ, ani adzee, ofu kutrɔtrɔ, avitɛ; kìfu kugɔni, kusuyeʋi gagla, lipɛ ki mɛ tole, baglɔ ese kumonumonu, ni kulɛlɛ;

english_verse: envious. They get drunk, carry on at wild parties, and do other evil things as well. I told you before, and I am telling you again: No one who does these things will share in the blessings of God's kingdom.
translation_verse: kaŋuza, kuda mumu, ehwiboe ani edzedze la ŋwisi la ya elue e. Mledi mumɔ abla kiliɛ gi masi mlɔ edi i; si banama gi bizɛɛbitɛ eboa la ya elu i, bátraŋa Aya yɛ Kaʋaŋaa mɛ bidɔ ɔ.

english_verse: God's Spirit makes us loving, happy, peaceful, patient, kind, good, faithful,
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ izɛɛki esebi ŋwisi, kunɔlɔ, isami, kusuyɔ, litɔplɛplɛkese kese, lipomepɛpɛ, bidɔ gbã, kuziŋa,

english_verse: gentle, and self-controlled. There is no law against behaving in any of these ways.
translation_verse: kusububɔ, ani isu aʋa kuŋaŋa. Ɔsã ɔtɔtɔ ɔ́yɔ kedu ní bɛya su u.

english_verse: And because we belong to Christ Jesus, we have killed our selfish feelings and desires.
translation_verse: Lɛ banama gi benu Kristo Yesu banɛ ɛ, bɛkla bá bisugya ʋɛ ni kusuŋwasiɔ ni kɔ bapɛ́pɛ ʋa ní Kristo osetsase lo su.

english_verse: God's Spirit has given us life, and so we should follow the Spirit.
translation_verse: Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛki blɔ ligbã́ nɛ; lɔ kee linu si ɔgbani blɔ ligbã́ nɛ.

english_verse: But don't be conceited or make others jealous by claiming to be better than they are.
translation_verse: Líma si kudɔ isu ya loo kufati blɔ ahanuglɔ ba loo kukɔ kaŋuza ní blɔ ahanuglɔ ba su.

english_verse: My friends, you are spiritual. So if someone is trapped in sin, you should gently lead that person back to the right path. But watch out, and don't be tempted yourself.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba, xe ɔnutɔ adɔ eku ní eboe zimizi me e, mlɔ banama gi mlalɛ́ ní Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ɛ, mledzini yɛ alulɔ nì litɔ plɛplɛ kese, tɔ mlevu aŋu ni isu ya su, tɔ bakíkeni mlɔ kyɛ edi i.

english_verse: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
translation_verse: Mlapɔnɔ tɔ mletu mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba adɔtu la, gani lɛ mɛ ɛ, mlaaga ní Kristo yɛ Ɔsã nɔ aʋa a.

english_verse: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
translation_verse: Xe ɔnutɔ ebù isu ya si yenu ɔnɔ ní lípoe lɛ mɛ gi ónu ɔnɔnɔ ɛ, yɛ ɔtutɔ isu ya ko eemeno.

english_verse: Do your own work well, and then you will have something to be proud of. But don't compare yourself with others.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa ɔxwa litsi ni yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kizezee me. Xegi amɔ si kipɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ aatani isu kufeke ní yɛ kiboebitɛɛ aʋa, pɔ̀ ɔ́trakɔ kɛ ɛsrɔni kidiliɛ gi ɔnɔdzedze abitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We each must carry our own load.
translation_verse: Lɛ linu si ɔnɔ kakaa otu yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ lidɔtu le.

english_verse: Share every good thing you have with anyone who teaches you what God has said.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi bɛɛbasɛ Aya yɛ liboe le e, ɔlɛ yɛ bidɔ gbã mɛ petee ni yɛ ɔdɔbasɛ yɛ.

english_verse: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
translation_verse: Mlekímeni isu u: ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́ʋikpɛ Aya kuga a. Lisebi ilɛ gi ɔnɔ akpɛ ɛ, lɛ aagu.

english_verse: If you follow your selfish desires, you will harvest destruction, but if you follow the Spirit, you will harvest eternal life.
translation_verse: Xe akpɛ bidɔ ní kisugyaɛ kulekuku me e, dɔni lɛ mɛ ɛ, aayasi kutse; lɛ xe akpɛ bidɔ ní Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ɛ, dɔni Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ɛ, aayasi ligbã́ moblo le.

english_verse: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, mlakíki tɔ eboe gbã kubitɛ kupe blo; lɛ xegi kúki litukpo e, lipoe le litrába gi kwiavini blɔ bidɔ kpɛ́kpɛ ʋɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
translation_verse: Mlevu aŋu ní kuŋwlimi ʋidi liɔ ya gi mɛɛŋwlimi iiki mlɔ abla ni mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ ɔwla lɔ ɛ!

english_verse: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
translation_verse: Banama gi bizɛɛbitɛ aŋumɛboe la ɛ, ba bɛɛpɛ si bemi mlɔ aʋa tɔ mlatsa ɔyaʋi i. Bɛɛbitɛ lɛ nite, atɔ bakíyɔ kedu ní basu kɔkpɛ Kristo yɛ osetsase lo loso.

english_verse: They are circumcised, but they don't obey the Law of Moses. All they want is to brag about having you circumcised.
translation_verse: Banɔ baklɔ kura gi bɛga ɔyaʋi tsatsa lɔ mɛ fɛ ɛ, baʋíga ní Mose Ɔsã nɔ aʋa a; bɛpɛ si mlaga ɔyaʋi tsatsa lɔ mɛ atɔ biafeke isu ya ní mlɔ kisugyaɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
translation_verse: Mɔkɔɛ, maadɔ isu ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo kutseo ní yɛ osetsase lo aʋa; lɛ ese linu si gani yɛ osetsase lo aʋa ɛ, lilɛ ko ŋwisi kelea mɛ ketse kí mɛ, lɛ mɛ fɛ metse aki kelea mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are circumcised or not. All that matters is that you are a new person.
translation_verse: Líma veve kura a, xe ɔnɔ aga ɔyaʋi tsatsa lɔ mɛ ɛ; kidiliɛ gi kilɛ veve e, kɛ kinu si tɔ odzi ɔnɔ vuvu.

english_verse: If you follow this rule, you will belong to God's true people. God will treat you with undeserved kindness and will bless you with peace.
translation_verse: Banama gi bekuni batrɔtrɔ ba ya kude ní ba ligbã́ nɛ mɛ ɛ, atɔ kusuyɔ ni asigagadidi eze ni ba kude, ba ni Aya yɛ banima petee.

english_verse: On my own body are scars that prove I belong to Christ Jesus. So I don't want anyone to bother me anymore.
translation_verse: Tɔ migu lɛ ɛ; ɔnɔnɔ ɔkikpɛ mɛ kunugu tɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si bebikpoa ʋa gi balɛ ní mɛ isu ya ɛ, bɛɛbasɛ si menu ɔnɔdzidzi akí Kristo.

english_verse: My friends, I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you! Amen.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba, atɔ blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ lize ni mlɔ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ. Liba lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus. To God's people who live in Ephesus and are faithful followers of Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Keplekpaa lia ya kɛdɔ ní mɛ Paulo, gi Aya axwa gani yɛ kupɛ́pɛɔ onu, si midzi Yesu Kristo yɛ ɔnɔkpɛkpɛ kɔ ɔ. Mɛɛŋwlimi ka ɛki Aya yɛ banima ní Efeso, banama gi balɛ ní anukwarɛɛ aʋa ni Kristo Yesu i.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Christ Brings Spiritual Blessings
translation_verse: Atɔ Aya gi onu blɔ Ɔka ni blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo bapɛ lipo me aki mlɔ ɔ, tɔ baki mlɔ kusuyɔ ɔ. Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ Kukrira ní Kristo me

english_verse: Praise the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ for the spiritual blessings that Christ has brought us from heaven!
translation_verse: Mlaki tɔ kukpɔ̀ Aya gi onu blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ Aya ani yɛka fɛ ɛ. Yɛ akrira blɔ lɛ aki blɔ Ɔfuɛfuɛ mɛ kukrira kakaa dɔni lifunu ne gani Kristo aʋa a.

english_verse: Before the world was created, God had Christ choose us to live with him and to be his holy and innocent and loving people.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si akya blɔ kooko ní Kristo me, xe ableke biabitɛ kelea a, si kudzi yɛ banɛ, tɔ blɔ isu iadra dɔni kesetata kakaa mɛ ní yɛ aŋu mɛ ɛ. Gani yɛ kunɔlɔɔ mɛ ɛ,

english_verse: God was kind and decided that Christ would choose us to be God's own adopted children.
translation_verse: Aya atrɔ lɛ kooko si gani Yesu Kristo me e, yɛ abitɛ blɔ yɛ bebi i, lɛ ya lize yɛ isami ni yɛ kutrɔtrɔ

english_verse: God treated us with undeserved grace because of the Son he dearly loves, and so we should praise God.
translation_verse: ki yɛ kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ ní yɛ lipomepɛpɛ glegle le, gi aki blɔ faã gani Yebi ye e gi alɔ koŋ i me!

english_verse: and by what Christ has done, God has shown us his own mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Aya abitɛ ní yɛ batrɔtrɔ ʋa aʋa, lɛ aki si kwite yɛ eboe kpokpo ala gi atrɔ kooko e gani Kristo me.

english_verse: Then when the time is right, God will do all he has planned, and Christ will bring together everything in heaven and on earth.
translation_verse: Batrɔtrɔ ʋa ya gi Aya aablo no ní lipoe gbã nɛ aʋa a, aakpɛ kidɔ kakaa likpɔ ní lifunu ne ni kesea aʋa ki Kristo gi yɛ onu kidɔ kakaa litukpo le e.

english_verse: He did this so we Jews would bring honor to him and be the first ones to have hope because of him.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mlaki tɔ blɔ banama gi kwize banɔ tɔpu ma a, gi kwidi kudeo nu ní Kristo me e, kuze ki Aya yɛ kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ ki yɛ kusudraa.

english_verse: Christ also brought you the truth, which is the good news about how you can be saved. You put your faith in Christ and were given the promised Holy Spirit to show you belong to God.
translation_verse: Mlɔ fɛ mledzi Aya yɛ banɔ gi mlenu anukwarɛ liboe le e, Liboe Gbã nɛ gi limani mlɔ kubúbú i. Agi mlɛzɛ Kristo aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ, lɛ Aya akpɛ mlɔ gyesi, gi aki mlɔ Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔ, gi lɔ su apani aplɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The Spirit also makes us sure we will be given what God has stored up for his people. Then we will be set free, and God will be honored and praised. Paul's Prayer
translation_verse: Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔlɛɛ kede ɔki blɔ xe ɛɛka lɛ aʋa si kwiamɔ kidiliɛ ɛ, gi Aya aka aplɛ aki yɛ banima a, lɛ lɛ ya litrɔ likla lɛ aʋa ɛki blɔ si Aya aaki yɛ banima ɔwlamɔmɔ nɔ tratratra. Mlaki tɔ kukpɔ̀ yɛ kudradraa. Paulo Axwa Aya ní baʋaziŋa ba ní Efeso litukpo

english_verse: I have heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, dɔnɔ lipoe lɛ gi menu mlɔ kuziŋaa ní Ɔkaɛ Yesu me e, ni mlɔ kulɔlɔɔ ki Aya yɛ banima petee onu i,

english_verse: So I never stop being grateful for you, as I mention you in my prayers.
translation_verse: maʋímɔni Aya ɖase kudo ní mlɔ onu u. Mizɛɛplɛ aŋu ní mlɔ aʋa xegi mɛɛxwa Aya a,

english_verse: I ask the glorious Father and God of our Lord Jesus Christ to give you his Spirit. The Spirit will make you wise and let you understand what it means to know God.
translation_verse: lɛ mizeeʋi blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ Aya, Ɔka gi ekeme e, tɔ ɔki mlɔ yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ, gi aabitɛ mlɔ beboete tɔ aabu Aya basɛ mlɔ tɔ mlaate ye sanɔ ɔ.

english_verse: My prayer is that light will flood your hearts and you will understand the hope given to you when God chose you. Then you will discover the glorious blessings that will be yours together with all God's people.
translation_verse: Meʋi si mlɔ begyodi ʋa mɛ badra, tɔ mlamɔ yɛ kuklekleo atɔ mlaate kidiliɛ gi kɛ kinu kudeonudidi uliɔ ɔ, gi kɔ onu axwa mlɔ ɛ, kukrira ʋidi uliɔ gi kunu kaŋasea aki yɛ banima ɛ,

english_verse: I want you to know about the great and mighty power that God has for us followers. It is the same wonderful power he used
translation_verse: ani kiliɛ gi yɛ kigaglaɛ ɛ, gi batrátani kɛ kukɔsrɔ nɔ kididɔ ɛ kikeme ní blɔ mɛ, blɔ banama a, gi kwizi ŋa ɛ. Kigaglaɛ liɛ ya gi kiiwa axwɛ na ní blɔ mɛ ɛ, kɛ kee kinu yɛ kigagla ʋidi ye,

english_verse: when he raised Christ from death and let him sit at his right side in heaven.
translation_verse: kɛ kee akɔ ayɔni Kristo adɔ ní bekpo ʋa mɛ, xe edu ye ní yɛ kaŋawla mɛ ní lifunu ne kelea mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: There Christ rules over all forces, authorities, powers, and rulers. He rules over all beings in this world and will rule in the future world as well.
translation_verse: Niklɔ Kristo ɛɛŋa kukusi yo ní lifunu ne bekusi ba pɔ́, kigagla kakaa ani baka ba aʋa; yɛ linyi ne e, lisani enyi na petee ní kelea lia ya ani kalia kɔlɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God has put all things under the power of Christ, and for the good of the church he has made him the head of everything.
translation_verse: Aya akɔ kidɔ kakaa akpɛ ní Kristo kukliseo, lɛ akɔ yɛ aki baʋaziŋa ba si, yɛ onu baʋaziŋa ba petee litukpo le.

english_verse: The church is the body of Christ and is filled with Christ who completely fills everything.
translation_verse: Ɔha lɔ onu Kristo yɛ kisugyaɛ, gi kina ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ ɛ, lɛ yɛ kee ebloni kidɔ kakaa ní ɔkɔ kakaa ɛ.

english_verse: In the past you were dead because you sinned and fought against God.
translation_verse: Mlɔ kɔ ɛ, mletse ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ kɔkpɛ mlɔ kesetataa ni mlɔ eboe zimizi na

english_verse: You followed the ways of this world and obeyed the devil. He rules the world, and his spirit has power over everyone who doesn't obey God.
translation_verse: gi la mɛ mleeze e lipoe lɛ gi mlezeni kelea mɛ bede zimizi ʋa kude e; mlezeenu kutu iki ifuɛfuɛ zimizi nɛ gi ilɛ ní liwɔ lɛ mɛ lɛ okusi ye e, ɔfuɛfuɛ ɔnɔ gi lɔ ɛɛŋa kamla abla ní banama a, gi baʋínu kutu i aʋa.

english_verse: Once we were also ruled by the selfish desires of our bodies and minds. We had made God angry, and we were going to be punished like everyone else.
translation_verse: Blɔ pɔ́ blɔ fɛ kwize ní ba kusi, lɛ kwize ní blɔ tutɔ kupɛpɛɔ onu u, gi kwizɛɛbitɛ kidiliɛ ɛ, gi kiku blɔ isu ya nì begyodi ʋa aŋu i. Ní blɔ kizezee me onu i, kwize ko ŋwisi banɔ gɔgɔ ba kinɛ ɛ, gi Aya kusuyeʋio ko kwigyeni blo o.

english_verse: But God was merciful! We were dead because of our sins, but God loved us so much he made us alive with Christ, and God's gift of undeserved grace is what saves you.
translation_verse: agi kwitse e ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ gani blɔ kutu monumonu yo me e, aki blɔ ligbã́ nì Kristo. Ebu mlo gani Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God raised us from death to life with Christ Jesus, and he has given us a place beside Christ in heaven.
translation_verse: Ni blɔ likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ nì Kristo me e, Aya ayɔni blɔ apɔni yɛ tɔ kwiaŋa kukusi nì yɛ ní lifunu ne kelea mɛ.

english_verse: God did this so in the future world he could show how truly good and kind he is to us because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Nite Aya abitɛ tɔ yikɔ ɛbasɛ ní ɔtɔ nɔ mɛ, kidiliɛ gi yɛ lipomepɛpɛ ʋidi ne e, gi batrákɔ ɛsrɔni kididɔ ɔ, xe ebu abasɛ ní yɛ kulɔlɔ liɔ ɔ, gi abasi blɔ gani Kristo Yesu me e, binu.

english_verse: You were saved by faith in God, who treats us much better than we deserve. This is God's gift to you, and not anything you have done on your own.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si gani Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ mɛ ebu mlo gani kuziŋa mɛ, aní mlɔ tutɔ mlɔ kukenidi me lidɔ, pɔ̀ Aya yɛ bidɔkɔkɔ binu u,

english_verse: It isn't something you have earned, so there is nothing you can brag about.
translation_verse: ani dɔni mlɔ axwɛwawa mɛ kyɛ, lɛ loso ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani isu kufeke ní lɛ su u.

english_verse: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
translation_verse: Aya yɛ abitɛ blɔ kidiliɛ gi kunu u, lɛ gani blɔ likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Kristo Yesu i, abitɛ blɔ si kwiaze ligbã́ ki axwɛ gbã kuwawa. Kristo kutseo kwikpɛ Yudanɛ ni banama gi bénu Yudanɛ ma likpɔ ɔ

english_verse: At that time you did not know about Christ. You were foreigners to the people of Israel, and you had no part in the promises God had made to them. You were living in this world without hope and without God,
translation_verse: Mlaplɛ aŋu si ní lipoe lɛ klɔ mɛ ɛ, mléte Kristo o, mlézè ní Israel bebi ba kusi i, lɛ mlézè ní Aya yɛ banɔkyakya ba kusi i. Mlámɔ ɔŋakɔ ní Aya kunyanyaa gi kɔ kwize yɛ kakaplɛa aki yɛ banima mɛ ɛ, lɛ mleze ní kelea mɛ ɛ, gi kudeonudidi kúze ní mlɔ awla a, lɛ mléte Aya fɛ ɛ.

english_verse: and you were far from God. But Christ offered his life's blood as a sacrifice and brought you near God.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ abla ɛ, ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Kristo Yesu i, mlɔ banama gi mleze ní ɔdzage no e, gani Kristo ika lɛ mɛ ɛ, bɛki mletipɔnɔ.

english_verse: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
translation_verse: Lɛ Kristo ɔtutɔ amani blɔ kusuyɔ gi abitɛ Yudanɛ ma a, ni Banama gi bénu Yudanɛ ma a, ɔnɔ tole. Nì yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kisugyaɛ ɛ, ayaʋi ofutrɔtrɔ lɔ klɔ gi eze ŋwisi ligli i, gi lilɛ ba kusi i, xe beze ahwafianɛ ki bahanuglɔ ba ɛ.

english_verse: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
translation_verse: Gani yɛ kutseo me e, ebu Yudanɛ ma ɔsã nɔ ni lɔ batrɔtrɔ ʋa azanɔ tɔ yidzini banɔ tiaʋa ya ʋa ɛbitɛ tɔ bedzi ɔnɔ tole ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni yɛ isu ya, atɔ gani lɛ mɛ ɛ, tɔ kusuyɔ ku ba a.

english_verse: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
translation_verse: Gani yɛ kutseo me ní osetsase lo su i, Kristo ezizi ba ofu lo, lɛ gani osetsase lo me e, akpɛ banɔ tiaʋa ya ʋa likpɔ gi bedzi ɔnɔ tole e, lɛ edzini ba amanɔ ní Aya klɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso Kristo aba a, xe asɔli kusuyɔ Liboe Gbã nɛ aki ɔnɔ kakaa a, ki mlɔ banama gi mlénu Yudanɛ ɛ, gi mlalɛ ní ɔdzage ní Aya su u, ni kí Yudanɛ ma, gi beti apɔni yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: And because of Christ, all of us can come to the Father by the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Gani Kristo me blɔ petee, Yudanɛ ni banama gi bénu Yudanɛ ɛ, biatani Ɔfuɛfuɛ tole me kuze xe biatrɛ ní blɔ Ɔka yɛ aŋu mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso, mlɔ banama gi mlénu Yudanɛ ɛ, mlénu bababa loo ahwafianɛ tɔɔ; abla ɛ, mlenu blɔ akɔanɛ kɔpɔni Aya yɛ banima, lɛ mlenu Aya yɛ kepeme bebi i.

english_verse: You are like a building with the apostles and prophets as the foundation and with Christ as the most important stone.
translation_verse: Mlɔ fɛ bɛwa mlɔ ɛtrɔ ní ɔxɔ lɔ aʋa kiliɛ gi banɔkpɛkpɛ ba ni beboedoplɛ ba bɛkpɛ lɔ ɛplɛ ɛ, nì likɔtɔ lɛ mɛ likla ɛnɛ gi linu Kristo Yesu ɔtutɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Christ is the one who holds the building together and makes it grow into a holy temple for the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɛ onu ɔniliɛ gi evu ligba zizi nɛ edu u, lɛ yɛ izɛki si lizɛba edzì lisɔligba a, gi libu isu lidze ki Ɔkaɛ.

english_verse: And you are part of that building Christ has built as a place for God's own Spirit to live.
translation_verse: Ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni yɛ ɛ, mlɔ fɛ bɛɛtrɔ mlɔ ɛkpɛ likpɔ ni banɔ gɔgɔ ba si mledzi ozekɔ lɔ gi Aya aaze gani yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Christ Jesus made me his prisoner, so I could help you Gentiles.
translation_verse: Kɔkpɛ lɛ ya loso e, mɛ Paulo, bɛkpɛ mɛ ligba ki Kristo Yesu ní mlɔ banama gi mlénu Yudanɛ ma loso o,

english_verse: You have surely heard about God's gift of undeserved grace in choosing me to help you.
translation_verse: mazi aŋa si mlenu si Aya ní yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ mɛ ɛ, akɔ lixwɛ ɛ nɛ ya aki mɛ si miwa akí mlɔ kupɛ̀pɛ.

english_verse: In fact, this letter tells you a little about how God has shown me his mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Aya ebu yɛ batrɔtrɔ kpokpo ʋa abasɛ mɛ. Kiliɛ gi maŋwlimi aki mlɔ taʋɛ azanɔ ɛ,

english_verse: As you read the letter, you will also find out how well I really do understand the mystery about Christ.
translation_verse: lɛ xe mlaakla kidiliɛ gi maŋwlimi i, mlaamɔ kiliɛ gi menu Kristo yɛ eboe kpokpo la ese e.

english_verse: No one knew about this mystery until God's Spirit told it to his holy apostles and prophets.
translation_verse: Tsã́ ɛ, bébu eboe kpokpo la ya elue abasɛ ɔnɔ gbagbe ɔtɔtɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ Aya ebu la abasɛ abla gani yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ aki yɛ banɔkpɛkpɛ dradra ba ni yɛ beboedoplɛ ba.

english_verse: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
translation_verse: Liboe kpokpo le linu si gani Liboe Gbã nɛ mɛ ɛ, banama gi bénu Yudanɛ fɛ ɛ, bɛmɔ ɔŋakɔ pɔni Yudanɛ ma ní Aya yɛ kukriraa mɛ, lɛ bedzi banɔ likpɔkpɛkpɛ tile ni kisugya tile, lɛ bɛmɔ ɔŋakɔ ní kakaplɛa lia gi Aya akɔ gani Kristo Yesu me e.

english_verse: God treated me with kindness. His power worked in me, and it became my job to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Aya abitɛ mɛ ɔnɔsumu ye ki Liboe Gbã nɛ gani yɛ bidɔkɔkɔɛ ʋɛ gi aki mɛ aʋa a, kɔgani yɛ kigaglaɛ axwɛwawa la mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
translation_verse: Mɛ menu ɔgɔgɔɛ ní Aya yɛ banɔ gɔgɔ ba petee kusi; pɔ̀ Aya gani yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ mɛ ɛ, aki mɛ kudeonu si mikɔ Liboe Gbã nɛ ni eboe gbã na gi kwiamɔ dɔni Kristo klɔ ɔ, gi ekeme e sani kiliɛ gi banima bianu la ese e, kɔ tsini banama gi bénu Yudanɛ ɛ,

english_verse: God, who created everything, wanted me to help everyone understand the mysterious plan that had always been hidden in his mind.
translation_verse: tɔ miki banima petee bamɔ kiliɛ gi Aya yɛ kikpokpo me batrɔtrɔ ʋa a biawa axwɛ na. Aya gi yɛ abitɛ kidɔ kakaa ní kelea mɛ ɛ, ekpo yɛ batrɔtrɔ ʋa dɔni okpese klɔ kɔna ni abla a,

english_verse: Then God would use the church to show the powers and authorities in the spiritual world that he has many different kinds of wisdom.
translation_verse: atɔ ní lipoe lɛ ya mɛ ɛ, ɔnɔ kakaa gani baʋaziŋa ba aʋa ɛ, baʋaŋa ba ni, bekusi ba nì bigagla ʋɛ ní lifunu ne kelea mɛ ɛ, biakpasi yɛ kuboeteo ní kɔ edeke la ni kukyikyi kakaa mɛ.

english_verse: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
translation_verse: Aya yɛ abitɛ lɛ kɔkpɛ yɛ batrɔtrɔ moblo ba gi aki liba lɛ mɛ gani Kristo Yesu blɔ Ɔkaɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: Christ now gives us courage and confidence, so we can come to God by faith.
translation_verse: Ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Kristo ani gani blɔ kuziŋa ní yɛ mɛ ɛ, Aya klɔ kudeo kwidra gi kwiatani Aya aŋu mɛ kutrɛ lifumose e.

english_verse: This is why you should not be discouraged when I suffer for you. After all, it will bring honor to you. Christ's Love for Us
translation_verse: Maki mlɔ litukpo si, mlɔ ɔna ɔkigbɔ̀ kɔkpɛ ɔzia nɔ gi mɛɛmɔ ní mlɔ onu loso o; lɛ petee liiba lɛ mɛ ɛki mlɔ kupɛpɛ. Yesu alɔ blɔ

english_verse: All beings in heaven and on earth receive their life from him.
translation_verse: gi yɛ kɔ okú kakaa ní lifunu ne nì kesea ʋa izɛɛzi lɔ linyi ne ɔtutɔ lɔ ɔ.

english_verse: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
translation_verse: Meʋi Aya si dɔni yɛ kukrira glegleo me e, ɔki mlɔ kigagla gani yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ tɔ mlɔ begyodi ʋa beze gagla a,

english_verse: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
translation_verse: lɛ meʋi Aya si Kristo aaze ní mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ gani kuziŋa mɛ ɛ. Meʋi Aya si tɔ mlalɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba, tɔ xe mlɛbitɛ nite e, mlɔ igu ne ni ɔxɔ lɔ iaze ní kunɔlɔɔ mɛ.

english_verse: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
translation_verse: tɔ mlakpɛ likpɔ ni Aya yɛ banima pɔ́, tɔ mlate blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ kunɔlɔɔ kɔ kinenee me ni kɔ kidzedzee me, kɔ kimumu ye me ani kɔ kidzudzu ye me,

english_verse: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
translation_verse: tɔ mlaate yɛ kulɔlɔ ɔ, gi kwimu i sani kuboete kakaa tɔ mlaayi ni Aya yɛ kizezee me.

english_verse: I pray that Christ Jesus and the church will forever bring praise to God. His power at work in us can do far more than we dare ask or imagine. Amen.
translation_verse: Aya kunɛ kunu kusudraa ní ɔsɔli ha lɔ mɛ ni Kristo Yesu me lipoe kakaa, kɔtsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ! Amen.

english_verse: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mɛ gi makpasi ligba lɛ ɛ, kɔkpɛ gi meesumu Ɔkaɛ ɛ; mɛɛkpɛ lɛ mlɔ mɛ si mleze ligbã́ gi lisrɔnɔ lɛ klɔ gi Aya atrɔ aplɛ ɛ, xe axwa mlɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
translation_verse: Mlepleni isu ya lipoe kakaa, mlayɔ ni ɔna mɛ, tɔ mlaplɛ litɔ kese. Mlabasɛ mlɔ kulɔlɔɔ, lɛ mlakíyeʋi isu u, xegi banɔdzedze ba bɛta kese e.

english_verse: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
translation_verse: Mlekeni edi tɔ likpɔkpɛkpɛ lɛ lize ní mlɔ kusi kiliɛ gi Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛki kusuyɔ liɔ ɔ, gi kwinya mlɔ ɛkpɛ likpɔ ɛ.

english_verse: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
translation_verse: Kisugya tile ni Ɔfuɛfuɛ tole bilɛ, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi kudeonudidi tule e, gi kɔ Aya axwa mlɔ akɔ kulɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We have only one Lord, one faith, and one baptism.
translation_verse: Ɔkaɛ tole ɔlɛ, kuziŋa tule, kunikpɛkpɛ tule;

english_verse: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Aya tole gi onu Ɔka ki blɔ petee yɛ ɔlɛ ɛ, lɛ yɛ onu Ɔkaɛ, gi ɛɛwa axwɛ na gani blɔ petee me e, xe ɔlɛ ní blɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Christ has generously divided out his gifts to us.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ki blɔ mɛ ɔkakaa ɛ, bɛki blɔ lipomepɛpɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Kristo alɛ bɛ ɛ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
translation_verse: Kiliɛ gi bɛŋwlimi kpɛ Aya yɛ liboe le me si, “Agi atrɛ ní lifunu ne kaʋa ke e, atsini banɔ vuvu ba kpaŋu kɔpɔni isu ya, lɛ aki banima bidɔ kɔkɔ ʋɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: When it says, “he went up,” it means that Christ had been deep in the earth.
translation_verse: Abla ɛ “emu atrɛ kaʋaa,” lɛ ese linu si kitɛ ɛ? Lɛ ese linu si kutɔpu yɔ ɛ, eple atrɛ ní kesea odzudzu klɔ ké.

english_verse: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, ɔniliɛ klɔ gi yɛ eple aba ɛ, yɛ ke emu atrɛ ní ayɛɛ mɛ lɛ adɔ lifunu ne aza a, tɔ yɛ kaʋaŋaa kana ní lifunu ne, ni kesea aʋa ani kesea ese e.

english_verse: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
translation_verse: Kɔzɛna ni lipoe lɛ gi blɔ ɔ pɔ́ kwiadzi kidɔ tile ní blɔ kuziŋaa ni blɔ kuboeteo ní Aya Yebi ye me e; lɛ kwiatsi gi kwiazɛ Kristo yɛ kizezee me petee e.

english_verse: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, kutraze banuvɔ tɔ ɔ. Kútraze ŋwisi keniaʋa ohu u, gi kuni yo akpɔ la loo asia na kudɔbasɛ liwɔ gagla lɛ, liazefu klanɔ ɔ, lɛ banama gi bizɛbasɛ asia na ɛ batrátani blɔ kumeno o, xe kwiazi asia na aʋa ŋa tɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Love should always make us tell the truth. Then we will grow in every way and be more like Christ, the head
translation_verse: Boŋu i, gani anukwarɛɛ kupaniɔ mɛ ɛ, ní kulɔlɔ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ɛ, lilɛ si kwiatsi ní kapɛ kakaa mɛ kí Kristo o, gi yɛ onu litukpo le e.

english_verse: of the body. Christ holds it together and makes all of its parts work perfectly, as it grows and becomes strong because of love. The Old Life and the New Life
translation_verse: Dɔni yɛ kɔ ɛ, isu ya kapɛ kakaa kɛkpɛ likpɔ, lɛ ika lɛ ivu kapɛ kakaa ɛkpɛ likpɔ ní ka itsaklɔ. Loso xe kapɛ kakaa kɛwa ka axwɛ na a, kiliɛ gi liziã ɛ, ɔnɔse lo izɛmɔ kigaglaɛ gani kulɔlɔ mɛ ɛ. Ligbã́zeze ŋwisi Aya yɛ bebi kinɛ ɛ

english_verse: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
translation_verse: lɛ ba kuboesenu yo kwidɔ litumu u. Ɔŋakɔ ɔma kí ba ní ligbã́ɛ nɛ gi Aya izɛɛkɔ mɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si, ba pɔ́ béte liboe, lɛ ba batu ʋa mɛ bali gagla a.

english_verse: and they are so greedy they do all kinds of indecent things.
translation_verse: Béte kuye tɔ ɔ; lɛ bɛyurɔ isu ya ɛki eboe zimizi ni anyaniboe kakaa ni kupɛpɛ si bɛɛbitɛ sani nite e.

english_verse: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
translation_verse: Agi mlenu yɛ onu tututu u, xe mlekuni yɛ kude e, bɛbasɛ mlɔ anukwarɛɛ liɛ gi ɔlɛ ní Yesu me e.

english_verse: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, bɛbasɛ mlɔ si mlayurɔ mlɔ ligbã́ koko le gi liki si mleeze kiliɛ ɛ, gi mlɛpɛ ɛ, ligbã́ koko le gi lɛ liizizi kɔkpɛ lɛ kupɛpɛ zimizi yo o, gi kwimeni mlo o, xe kwiki si mlɛlila ɛ.

english_verse: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
translation_verse: Mlaki tɔ mlɔ ina nɛ ni mlɔ begyodi ʋa bidzi bidɔ vuvũ,

english_verse: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
translation_verse: atɔ mlakɔ isu vuvũ akpɛ ŋwisi liwu kinɛ ɛ, gi lɛ bɛbitɛ ní Aya yɛ kilɛlɛɛ mɛ ɛ, xe libu isu ya ɛbasɛ ní anukwarɛɛ ligbã́ nɛ mɛ ɛ, gi ligyɔ ɔ xe lidra ɛ.

english_verse: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
translation_verse: Mlakísɛ asia tɔ ɔ! Ɔnɔ kakaa odo anukwarɛɛ ki yɛ ɔhanuglɔ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si blɔ petee kunu kupɛ kí kisugya tile e.

english_verse: Don't get so angry that you sin. Don't go to bed angry
translation_verse: Xe mlɛmɔ kusuyeʋi i, mlakíki tɔ kugbani mlɔ kpɛ eboe zimizi me e, lɛ mlakíki tɔ liwo le liku ní mlɔ kusuyeʋio aʋa a.

english_verse: and don't give the devil a chance.
translation_verse: Lɛ mlakíki ozimizi ye kudeonu u.

english_verse: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
translation_verse: Banama gi bizezuru i, bamɔni kuzuru tɔ bawa axwɛ tɔ beze ligbã́ gbã aki isu, tɔ batani bazianete ba kupɔnɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
translation_verse: Mlakíki eboe zimizi atɔtɔ edo ní mlɔ onu, pɔ̀ eboe gbã ko, la klɔ gi aaki kupɔnɔ ɛ, tɔ eboa la gi mlaapani i, aabitɛ eboe gbã aki banama gi bɛɛta mlɔ kutu i.

english_verse: Don't make God's Spirit sad. The Spirit makes you sure that someday you will be free from your sins.
translation_verse: Lɛ mlakíkpɛ Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ní asigaga mɛ ɛ; gi lɔ Aya ɔkɔ akpɛ mlɔ gyesi ye ki liwe lɛ gi aabu mlo e.

english_verse: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
translation_verse: Mlebú kuyeʋiyeʋi kakaa, kusuyeʋi gagla, avitɛ, banɔ su kuzizizizi ani liboe zimizi kakaa azanɔ.

english_verse: Instead, be kind and merciful, and forgive others, just as God forgave you because of Christ.
translation_verse: Boŋu i mlapɛ lipo me tɔ mledi mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba asigaga, tɔ mlakɔ eboe akyɛ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba kiliɛ gi Aya akɔ akyɛ mlɔ ní Kristo me e.

english_verse: Do as God does. After all, you are his dear children.
translation_verse: Agi mlenu Aya yɛ bebi ba gi alɔ koŋ i, mlekeni edi tɔ mlakpasi yɛ ligbãzeze ne.

english_verse: Let love be your guide. Christ loved us and offered his life for us as a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Mlaki kulɔlɔ kugbani mlɔ ligbã nɛ, kiliɛ gi Kristo alɔ blɔ ɔ, xe etse ni blɔ litukpo e. Akɔ yɛ ligbã́ nɛ aki Aya ŋwisi bidɔkɔkɔ ni bidɔ pɔʋi pɔʋi flafla gi biku Aya aŋu kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
translation_verse: Agi mlenu Aya yɛ banɔ ɛ, líma si mlapani ní adzɛ ni enyimeboe loo anyaniboe atɔtɔ loo kimbikyikyi itɔtɔ su ní mlɔ kusi. Lɛ ese linu si eboa la ya elu égyeni Aya yɛ banɔ dradra ba a.

english_verse: Don't use dirty or foolish or filthy words. Instead, say how thankful you are.
translation_verse: Lígyeno si mlazɛɛpani eyekuboe loo anyaniboe loo anukpaboe loo mlazɛɛkpɛ atsɛ́ɛ dovo. Boŋu i, mledo Aya ɖase e.

english_verse: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
translation_verse: Lilɛ si mlete si banama gi benu bahasi nɛ, loo banama mɛ gi kumɔdramɔdra kulɛ loo banama gi bizɛɛza kimbi i, batrámɔ ɔŋakɔ ní Kristo ni Aya yɛ Kukusi yo me e. Ɔniliɛ gi izɛɛza kimbi i, onu ɔbusumu.

english_verse: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
translation_verse: Mlakíki ɔnɔnɔ omeni mlo ni asasaboe; lɛ ese linu si ɔkpɛ la ya elu loso Aya kusuyeʋio kwiaba banama gi baʋínu kutu iki yɛ ɛ aʋa.

english_verse: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e mlakíkpɛ ɔha ni banɔaklɔ ba elu u.

english_verse: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
translation_verse: Kutɔpu yɔ ɛ, mlɔ tutɔ fɛ mleze ní litumu me, pɔ̀ gi mledzi ɔkaɛ yɛ banɛ ɛ, mlalɛ ní kuklekle me. Lɛ loso mleze ligbã́ ŋwisi banɔ gi benu kuklekle me banɔ ɔ,

english_verse: as you try to please the Lord.
translation_verse: Banama gi balɛ ní kuklekle me e, bizɛɛkpasi kidiliɛ gi kizeeku Ɔkaɛ aŋu i.

english_verse: Don't take part in doing those worthless things that are done in the dark. Instead, show how wrong they are.
translation_verse: Mlakíkpɛ ɔha ni litumu ne me bidɔ mɛ ɛ, gi banima bizɛɛbitɛ ɛ. Boŋu i, mlebu ʋe edono ní kuklekleo onu.

english_verse: It is disgusting even to talk about what is done in the dark.
translation_verse: Linu liyeyeboe si tɔ bapani ní kikpokpo me kiboebitɛ liɛ gi banama a, gi baʋínu kutu i, bizɛɛbitɛ su.

english_verse: But the light will show what these things are really like.
translation_verse: Lɛ xe bɛmani kidɔ kakaa ní kuklekleo onu i, kɔ ba kizezee me ɔtutɔ lɔ kiŋwui.

english_verse: Light shows up everything, just as the Scriptures say, “Wake up from your sleep and rise from death. Then Christ will shine on you.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si kuklekle kuzɛɛkɔ si kidɔ kakaa gi bebu ibasɛ ɛ, kizɛŋwi mɔmɔɔmɔ. Lɛ loso bɛpani si, “Nyime, wɔ liɛ gi wɔɛdɔ sra sɛ ɛ, tɔ yɔ dɔni kutse me, atɔ Kristo aakle bali wɔ aʋa.”

english_verse: These are evil times, so make every minute count.
translation_verse: Mlawa lipoe kakaa ɛlɛ gi mlɛmɔ ɛ su axwɛ, lɛ ese linu si lipoe zimizi lɛ ya.

english_verse: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
translation_verse: Mlakíze kunukpaʋi i, boŋu mlekeni edi tɔ mlete kidiliɛ gi kinu Ɔkaɛ yɛ kupɛpɛɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
translation_verse: Mlakíŋwɛ kuda gi kwizizi mlo o; boŋu i, mlaki tɔ Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ oze ní mlɔ aʋa.

english_verse: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
translation_verse: Mlaka sika sɛ ni mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba gani isɔlidzi kukpɔ̀kpɔɔ̀ idzi nɛ ani Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ idzizaza mɛ; mlaza idzi isɔlidzi aki Ɔkaɛ ni kukpɔ̀kpɔɔ̀ dɔni mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
translation_verse: Ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo linyi ne me e, mledo Aya blɔ Ɔkaɛ ɖase lipoe kakaa ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ. Paulo agba benyime ba ni ba bedzɛ ba

english_verse: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
translation_verse: Badzɛ ba, mlepleni isu ya ki mlɔ benye ba ŋwisi kiliɛ gi mlepleni isu ya aki Ɔkaɛ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si onyimee yɛ onu ɔdzɛ yɛ litukpo le, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Kristo onu litukpo ní ɔsɔli ha lɔ onu kinɛ ɛ. Lɛ Kristo ɔtutɔ yɛ onu ɔsɔli ha lɔ gi onu yɛ kisugyaɛ lɔ litukpo le, lɛ yɛ ebu ɔsɔli ha lɔ ɔ.

english_verse: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
translation_verse: Benye ba a, mlalɔ mlɔ bedze ba kiliɛ gi Kristo alɔ ɔsɔli ha lɔ ɔ, xe akɔ yɛ ligbã́ nɛ akyɛ ɛ, gi etse ní ɔha lɔ litukpo e.

english_verse: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
translation_verse: Abitɛ lɛ nite tɔ yidra ɔsɔli ha lɔ su ɛki Aya gani yɛ liboe le me, adra lɔ su ŋwisi kiliɛ gi bizeewloni ɔnɔ ni kuni i,

english_verse: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
translation_verse: tɔ yidzini ɔsɔli ha lɔ ɛki isu ya ní lɔ kupedi yo me e, ɛdra lɛ kesetata atɔtɔ káma lɔ su u, gi liŋwi itɔtɔ líma lɔ su u, lɛ lɔ ɔkɔkɔ kyɛ ɔ́sunya a.

english_verse: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
translation_verse: Nite ke lilɛ si benyime ba balɔ ba bedze ba kiliɛ gi bɛlɔ ba tutɔ ba isu ya a. Onyime gi alɔ yedze e, alɔ yɛ kisugya ɛ.

english_verse: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
translation_verse: Ɔnɔnɔ ɔʋítrɔ yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kisugyaɛ ofu u, boŋu i izɛɛgani yɛ isu ya lɛ izeedi yɛ kisugyaɛ aʋa, kiliɛ gi Kristo izɛɛbitɛ ki ɔsɔli ha lɔ ɛ;

english_verse: because we are each part of his body.
translation_verse: lɛ ese linu si kunu yɛ isu ya bidɔ ɔ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
translation_verse: Kiliɛ gi bɛŋwlimi kpɛ ní Aya yɛ liboe le keplekpaa mɛ si, “Lɛ ya loso, onyime aayurɔ yɛka ni yene lɛ aakpɛ likpɔ ni yedze e, lɛ ba tiaʋa biadzi kisugya tile.”

english_verse: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
translation_verse: Liboe kpokpo dzudzu lilɛ ní liboe lɛ ya mɛ, gi mɛɛpani i, lɛ ese si linu Kristo ni ɔsɔli ha lɔ su liboe.

english_verse: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀, lihali mlɔ fɛ; onyime kakaa ɔlɔ yedze ŋwisi yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ isu ya kinɛ ɛ, lɛ ɔdzɛ kakaa ɔkpɛ kubùbù ní yenye su.

english_verse: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
translation_verse: Banuvɔ ba, linu si mlenu mlɔ bapɔnɛ ba igbè tɔ mlebù ba, lɛ ese linu si lipɛ lɛ nite lilɛ si mlabitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: and you will have a long and happy life.”
translation_verse: “tɔ liadɔ ní lɛ aʋa ɛki wɔ, atɔ wɔaze ligbã́ gblamadza ní kesea aʋa.”

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
translation_verse: Mlɔ bapɔnɛ ba, mlakíkpɛ mlɔ bebi ba kusuyeʋi i. Boŋu i, mlagani ba nì bagbágba ni kuhehe ní ɔsã onu kiliɛ gi Ɔkaɛ apɛ ɛ. Banɔdzidzi ba ni ba Baka ba

english_verse: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
translation_verse: Mlɔ banɔdzidzi ba ɛ, mlenu kutu aki mlɔ kesea aʋa baka ba ni lifu ani kusugu; lɛ mlabitɛ lɛ ni mlɔ ɔna nɔ petee, ŋwisi Kristo yɛ mleesumu kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Mlakízɛɛbitɛ lɛ xegi bedi mlo ko o, lɛ ese linu si mlɛpɛ si mlɛɛmɔ kukpɔ̀kpɔɔ̀ ɛdɔni ba kɔ; boŋu i nì ɔna petee, mlabitɛ kidiliɛ gi Aya apɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si Kristo yɛ banɔdzidzi mlenu.

english_verse: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
translation_verse: Mlawa mlɔ axwɛ na ni isami, ŋwisi Ɔkaɛ mleesumu kinɛ ɛ, lɛ aní banɔ ko mleesumu u.

english_verse: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
translation_verse: Mlaplɛ aŋu si Ɔkaɛ aatsa liʋɛ ki ɔnɔ kakaa, ɔnɔdzidzi loo ɔnɔ gi ɔlɛ yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ isuwla mɛ, ní axwɛ gbã na gi awa onu u.

english_verse: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
translation_verse: Baka ba, mlabitɛ niteme ke aki mlɔ banɔdzidzi ba, atɔ mlamɔni ba lifu ne kukpɛ. Mlaplɛ aŋu si mlɔ ni mlɔ banɔdzidzi ba ɛ, mlenu Ɔka tole ní lifunu ne yɛ banɔ, yɛ gi izɛɛxwa litsi ni ɔnɔ kakaa aŋu mɛ modi i. Paulo asi Baʋaziŋa ba si Bakpɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ Kigũ yɛ Awu la

english_verse: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
translation_verse: Tɔ migù mɛ liboe le e, ze kigagla ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ lɛ ese linu si yɛ kigaglaɛ ki srɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
translation_verse: Kpɛ bidɔ mɛ petee gi Aya aki wɔ ŋwisi ɔguta awu gi izeekpo ye kinɛ ɛ, tɔ wɔatani kulɛɛ ní ozimizi ye edeke la onu.

english_verse: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso kpɛ Aya yɛ kigũ yɛ awu ala petee gi aakpo wɔ ɔnɔse lo e, abla! Atɔ xe liwe zimizi ne lina ɛ, wɔatani ahwafiɔnɛɛ yɛ axwɛwawa la onu kulɛ ɛ, lɛ ní kigũ yɛ kede e, wɔatani kulɛ ní wɔ ɔlɛɛ klɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, bla tɔ lɛɛ, tɔ nya wɔ kasɛa mɛ ni anukwarɛɛ ŋwisi kasɛmɛ ɔnyagbe kinɛ ɛ, tɔ kɔ ligbã́ gi lɛ kude kwigyɔ ɛ, ŋwisi wɔ kakɔ mɛ liwu gi liakpo wɔ kakɔa mɛ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
translation_verse: Kpɛ kublabla ki kusuyɔɔ Liboe Gbã nɛ kupaniɔ ŋwisi wɔ afɔkpa ʋa kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
translation_verse: Lɛ lipoe kakaa ɛ, vu wɔ kuziŋaa ŋwisi bidɔ gi wɔakɔ nì asia na itrɛɛ nɛ gi iisɔ ŋwisi kifu kinɛ ɛ, gi ozimizi ye aata ɛ.

english_verse: Let God's saving power be like a helmet, and for a sword use God's message that comes from the Spirit.
translation_verse: kɔ wɔ kubúbú yo kume ŋwisi wɔ akatsaloglo ye kinɛ ɛ, atɔ kɔ Aya yɛ liboe le ŋwisi wɔ ihɛ gblamadza yɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ aaki wɔ ɛ kinɛ vu ni wɔ ɔwla ʋla lɔ.

english_verse: Never stop praying, especially for others. Always pray by the power of the Spirit. Stay alert and keep praying for God's people.
translation_verse: Bitɛ la ya petee ní Aya kuxwaxwa mɛ, ki Aya kupɔnɔ ɔ. Xwa Aya lipoe kakaa, kiliɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ aagbani wɔ ɛ. Lɛ loso ze ni aŋu tɔ wukíki litukpo lipoe tɔtɔ ɔ; xwa Aya lipoe kakaa ki Aya yɛ banima petee.

english_verse: Pray that I will be given the message to speak and that I may fearlessly explain the mystery about the good news.
translation_verse: Mlaxwa Aya ní mɛ onu, tɔ Aya ɔki mɛ liboe le e, xe malɛ ní kublabla mɛ si mipani i, atɔ mipani lifumose tɔ mibu Liboe Gbã nɛ eboe kpokpo la kubasɛ.

english_verse: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Kɔkpɛ liboe lɛ ya loso menu Kristo yɛ ɔnɔ kpɛkpɛ! Pɔ̀ abla, ɛ malɛ ní ligba a. Mlaxwa Aya tɔ mitani kulɛɛ tɔ mipani liboe le lifumose kiliɛ gi linu si lize e. Paulo ni Baʋaziŋa ba Bɛtsisi ba Kunɔpaniɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
translation_verse: Atɔ Aya gi onu Ɔka a, ni blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo baki benemi baʋaziŋa ba petee kusuyɔ, ni kulɔlɔ ani kuziŋa.

english_verse: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Atɔ Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ lize ni banama petee gi bɛlɔ blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo ni ba ɔna nɔ petee e.

english_verse: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
translation_verse: Mɛ Paulo ni Timoteo gi kunu Kristo Yesu yɛ banɔsumu ba ɛ, blɔ kwiiŋwlimi keplekpaa lia ya; ɛki Aya yɛ banima pɔ́ gi bɛkpɛ likpɔ ni Kristo Yesu u, kɔpɔni baʋaziŋa ba baka ba ani ɔha lɔ banɔpɔnɔ ba gi bali ní Filipi i;

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
translation_verse: Tɔ Aya blɔ Ɔka ni Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo baki mlɔ lipomepɛpɛ ni kusuyɔ. Paulo axwa lɛ edo Aya ɖase e

english_verse: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
translation_verse: Mizeedo Aya ɖase ní mlɔ litukpo lipoe kakaa ɛ lɛ gi maplɛ aŋu ní mlɔ aʋa ɛ;

english_verse: And whenever I mention you in my prayers, it makes me happy.
translation_verse: lɛ lipoe kakaa gi maxwa Aya ní mlɔ petee litukpo e, mizɛɛbitɛ lɛ ni isami,

english_verse: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
translation_verse: kɔkpɛ kiliɛ gi mlɛpɔni mɛ gi mamani mlɔ Liboe Gbã nɛ dɔni liwe tɔpu nɛ aʋa gakɔna ni abla ɛ.

english_verse: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
translation_verse: Lɛ maka lɛ aʋa si Aya a, gi yɛ ekpese axwɛ gbã la ya ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ, aatrɛ ní lɛ aʋa kɔzɛna ni la ɔgù kɔ ní liwe lɛ gi Kristo Yesu aadzi ba aʋa a.

english_verse: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso lipɛ ɛki mɛ si mizebù mlɔ su u, lɛ ese linu si mlakpasi ní mɛ ɔna nɔ mɛ ɛ. Lɛ mlɔ petee mlakpasi ní Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ mɛ ni mɛ ɛ, xegi ligba malɛ ɛ, loo gi malɛ ní mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ isuwla mɛ ɛ, xe meebu liboe gbã nɛ onu i.

english_verse: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
translation_verse: Aya aaŋa katsalia ɔki mɛ si, lilɛ lɛ mɛ, xe mapani si meegyo mlɔ petee edi i, nì kulɔlɔ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Yesu Kristo alɔ mlɔ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I pray that your love will keep on growing and you will fully know and understand
translation_verse: Maxwa Aya si mlɔ kunɔlɔɔ kwiazetsi pɔnɔ, tɔ mlate liboe ni tɔ mlaanu eboe ese mɔmɔmɔ,

english_verse: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
translation_verse: atɔ mlaakya kidiliɛ gi kinu ki gbãɛ ɛ, lɛ mlɔ su adra a, lɛ lipɔŋaŋa ɛtɔtɔ lítraze ní mlɔ su kɔzɛna ni liwe lɛ gi Kristo aadzi ba ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
translation_verse: Tɔ mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ mɛ bede ʋa biagyɔ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Yesu Kristo ko aatani kukɔ kinɛ ɛ, ki Aya yɛ kusudraa ni yɛ kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀. Kristo me kuzeze

english_verse: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba, mapɛ si mlete si, eboa la gi ɛba mɛ aʋa ɛ, la ɛpɔni Liboe Gbã nɛ lɛ ɔtɔ kutrɛtrɛ.

english_verse: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
translation_verse: gani lɛ mɛ ɛ, kekusipea bepepe ba pɔ́ ani banɔ gɔgɔ ba gi bali ní ya ɛ, betè si malɛ ligba lɛ ese linu si menu Kristo yɛ ɔnɔsumu u.

english_verse: Now most of the Lord's followers have become brave and are fearlessly telling the message.
translation_verse: Lɛ mɛ ligba lɛ kuzezeo kwiki benemi glegle ba ɔna ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ, lɛ bɛɛpani Liboe Gbã nɛ nì ɔna lifumose e lipoe kakaa.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: Lilɛ ní lɛ mɛ si banɔatɔ bɛpani Kristo su kɔkpɛ kaŋuza ni eboe hehe, pɔ̀ banɔatɔ fɛ ɛ, bɛɛpani nì ɔna gbã.

english_verse: They love Christ and know I am here to defend the good news about him.
translation_verse: Banama gi bɛɛpani nì ɔna gbã ɛ, bɛbitɛ nite nì kulɔlɔ, lɛ ese linu si betè si Aya aki mɛ axwɛ si miŋwlɛ liboe gbã nɛ litukpo.

english_verse: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
translation_verse: Ba tɔpu ba ɛ, baʋíbu Kristo su ni ɔna gbã a, pɔ̀ dɔni ba ɔtutɔ ba bidɔpɛ́pɛ mɛ ɛ; begyo le edi si biamani kedu yɔyɔ ní mɛ su tɔ mimɔ kinie sanɔ gi malɛ ligba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ líziã! Isami iku me kɔkpɛ gi bɛɛsɔli Kristo ní kude kakaa onu i, xegi gani kude nyani nyani onu loo gani kude gbã onu kyɛ ɛ, isami iaze kume.

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: lɛ ese linu si mete si gani mlɔ Aya kuxwaxwa mɛ ɛ, ani kupɔnɔɔ gi kwidɔ Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ klɔ gani Yesu Kristo aʋa ɛ, liboe lɛ gi liba mɛ aʋa ɛ, liadzi ɔwlamɔmɔ ki mɛ.

english_verse: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Mapɛ koŋ lɛ meedi kudeonu si kuye kútraku me e, lɛ ɔna aaze mɛ lipo si gani mɛ aʋa ɛ, banima biakpɔ Kristo yɛ linyi ne ní mɛ mɛ̀, xegi metse loo malɛ ligbã a.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Lɛ ege kinu ligbã́ nɛ ɛ? Ki mɛ xunyɔ ɛ, tɔ mize ligbã́ ɛ, binu Kristo pɔ̀ xe metse e, binu libibubu iki mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I don't know what to choose. I could keep on living and doing something useful.
translation_verse: Kɔ xe malɛ ligbã́ ɛ, liaki si maawa axwɛ gbã, pɔ̀ kɔ liwoli maavu kɔ̀ ɛ? Méte.

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: Malɛ ní begyodi tiaʋa kusi, Mapɛ vevee si misɛ ní kelea lia mɛ tɔ mizeeze ni Kristo, gi lipɛ sanɔ kura a;

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: Maka lɛ aʋa lɛ mete si maaze. Maaze ni mlɔ petee, tɔ mipɔni mlɔ ki ɔtɔ kutrɛtrɛ tɔ mlaamɔ isami ní kuziŋa mɛ,

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: atɔ xe maba mlɔ klɔ dzɛ ɛ, mlamɔ isami glegle ní Yesu Kristo me kɔkpɛ mɛ loso.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Abla ɛ liveve le linu si mlɔ ligbã́zeze ne lize ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Kristo su Liboe Gbã nɛ lipɛ ɛ, atɔ xe maatani mlɔ kumɔ loo xe máma a, xe kinu menu mlɔ onu kyɛ ɛ, maate si mlalɛɛ mumɔ ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ tole me, gi mlɛŋwlɛ ŋwisi ɔnɔ tole ki kuziŋaa ni Liboe Gbã nɛ ɛ,

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: mlakíse mlɔ ahwafianɛ ma. Ɔna oze ní mlɔ lipo lipoe kakaa, lɛ ya liabasɛ ba si Aya aakyrɔ ba, pɔ̀ mlɔ kɔɔ Aya aabu mlo, lɛ ese linu si Aya yɛ atráki mlɔ kaʋaŋaa a.

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si bɛki mlɔ kudeonu ní Kristo linyi ne me aní si mlazi yɛ aʋa aŋa tètè ko, pɔ̀ tɔ mlamɔ ɔzia nɔ aki yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: agi mlɔkyɛ mlɛta kigũ yɛ ɛ, kigũi liɛ gi kɛ mlɛmɔ si mazɛɛta a, xe abla kyɛ ɛ, mleenu si mɛɛta ɛ.

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: kɔlɔ mlaki tɔ mɛ isami nɛ ina gani mlɔ kuzeze ŋwisi ɔnɔ tole gi yɛ begyodi ʋa benu tule e, xe yɛ kulɔlɔɔ kunu tule e, xe yɛ esobo la ni yɛ batrɔtrɔ ʋa kyɛ binu tule e.

english_verse: Care about them as much as you care about yourselves
translation_verse: Mleze ni aŋu ní mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba bapɛ́pɛ ʋa su, aní mlɔ banɛ ma tete e.

english_verse: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
translation_verse: Lilɛ si mlɔ kiboebitɛɛ kize ŋwisi Kristo Yesu kiniɛ.

english_verse: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
translation_verse: Aya kilɛlɛɛ mɛ kize yɛ awla lipoe kakaa pɔ̀ ɔ́kɔ lɛ si lilɛ si yɛ ni Aya basɔ̀ ɔ,

english_verse: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
translation_verse: Boŋu ní yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kupɛpɛ onu i, epleni isu ya gi akɔ ɔnɔsumu kilɛlɛɛ mɛ ɛ, gi bɛpɔ yɛ ɛ, xe bɛmɔ ɔnɔgbagbe kizeze me ní yɛ su i.

english_verse: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
translation_verse: Epleni isu ya, lɛ enu kutu kɔtsini kutseo me, kɔzɛna ni osetsase lo su kutseo me ke.

english_verse: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso Aya emuni ye atsini ɔgyɔgyɔ klɔ ke, lɛ akɔ linyii nɛ gi likeme sani linyi kakaa ɛ, aki yɛ,

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: atɔ xe bɛxwa yɛ linyi ne e, banima biadu aklamasi kese aki yɛ. banama gi bali ní lifunu ne ni banama gi bali ní kesea aʋa a, ani banama gi bákpasi ní kesea ese e,

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: atɔ ɔnɔ kakaa aadra lɛ mɛ si, Yesu Kristo yɛ onu Ɔkaɛ, ki Ɔka Aya yɛ kusudraa. Mlekle ŋwisi badzidziebi ní kelea mɛ

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mɛ baʋia dimɛnɔ ba, kiliɛ gi mlezenu kutu lipoe kakaa a, aní lipoe lɛ gi meze ní mlɔ su tètè e, pɔ̀ abla gi máma ni mlɔ su kyɛ ɛ, liziã si mlatrɛ ní lɛ aʋa ki mlɔ kubúbú yo ni lifu ni kusugu.

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: Atɔ mlaadzi bebi dradra gi kutɛnɔ kútraze ní ba su u, Aya yɛ bebi ba, gi kesetata káma ní ba su u, gi balɛ ní kele nyani nyani ni banɔ zimizi kusi i, atɔ mlaaze banama gi bizeekle ŋwisi badzidziebi ní lifunu ne me kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: Atɔ mlaki ba ligbã́ nɛ liboe le e, xegi mlɛtani la ya kubitɛ ɛ, maadɔ isu ya ní liwe lɛ gi Kristo aaba aʋa a, lɛ ese linu si liabasɛ si mése pluplu loo wa lixwɛ fiteete.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: Kɔ xe bɛbali mɛ ika lɛ ɛ, ŋwisi kuda gi bɛkɔ edo igbè, ni kidiliɛ gi mlɛɛki Aya a, kɔkpɛ gi mlɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa loso e, isami iaku me lɛ mɛ ni mlɔ pɔ́ kwiamɔ isami i.

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: Niteme ké lilɛ si isami iku mlo, lɛ mlaamɔ isami ni mɛ ɛ! Timoteo ni Epafrodito

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Lɛ meedi kudeonu si i, xegi Ɔkaɛ Yesu apɛ́ ɛ, maakpɛ Timoteo tsisi mlɔ kpekpemii, tɔ mɛfɛ isami iaku me, xegi menu mlɔ onu i.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́ma ní mɛ awla ŋwisi yɛ gi akɔ litɔ lɛ mɛ aki mlɔ kupɛpɛ ɛ;

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: lɛ ese linu si banɔ dzedze ba petee, ba isu linɛ ko beebemi, lɛ ɔ́tɔtɔ ɔ́kɔ lɛ mɛ ɔki Yesu Kristo yɛ liboe le e.

english_verse: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Lɛ mlɔ tutɔ mlete kiliɛ gi abasi isu ya ɛ, kiliɛ gi ŋwisi obi ni yɛka kinɛ ɛ, awa axwɛ na nì mɛ ɛki liboe gbã nɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso meedi kudeonu si maatsisi yɛ kyɔŋ xegi lɛ mɛ lidra ɛki mɛ ɛ, kiliɛ gi eboe la aaze ki mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
translation_verse: Mazi lɛ aʋa aŋa si mɛ ɔtutɔ maaba mlɔ klɔ kpekpe e.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: Lɛ megyo le edi si liziã si midzini Epafrodito tsisi mlɔ, onu mɛ onemi, ɔhanɛ ɔxwɛwa, ni ɔʋatrɔ ɔguta, ani mlɔ ɔnɔ kpɛkpɛ gi mlɛtsisi si ɔzeedi mɛ baziazia ʋa aʋa ɛ.

english_verse: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si linu yɛ kupɛ́pɛ si yimɔ mlɔ petee, lɛ liwa axwɛ ní yɛ aʋa si, mlenu si yɛ adɔ kunya a.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: Lɛ anya adɔ kunya a, gi etse kloe e; pɔ̀ Aya edi yɛ asigaga a, lɛ aní yɛ tete e, pɔ̀ edi mɛ fɛ asigaga a, tɔ mikínu kuyeʋiyeʋi i trɔ kuyeʋiyeʋi aʋa a.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso matrɔ lɛ, si maatsisi yɛ kyɔŋ, tɔ xe mlɛmɔ yɛ ɛ, mlaamɔ isami dzɛ, atɔ mɛ fɛ mɛ kàŋuganɔa kiati ka aʋa a.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, mlazi yɛ ní Ɔkaɛ linyi ne me ni isami, tɔ mlakpɛ kubùbù ní banɔ ba ya elu su.

english_verse: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si etse kloe, gi akɔ yɛ ligba nɛ aki Kristo yɛ axwɛwawa la a, gi azɛɛki mɛ kupɔnɔ uliɔ ɔ, gi mlɔ ɔtutɔ mlátani mɛ kukɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: Tɔ migù mɛ liboe le e, mɛ benemi ba, mlamɔ isami ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ! Mɛ kɔ ɛ, lími mɛ aʋa si, midzini eboa la ya kee kuŋwlimi ki mlɔ ɔ; lɛ linu kupɔnɔ ɛki mlɔ.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Mledi mumɔ ní banama gi bizɛbitɛ eboe zimizi na a, gi balɛ ŋwisi kuŋwafudroʋi yo o, banama gi bizeedi lɛ aʋa si bɛkpɛ kisugyaɛ ebì la su u,

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si blɔ banama gi kuzeesumu Aya ní yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ɛ, blɔ kwimɔ ɔyaʋi tsatsa gbã nɔ, lɛ kuzɛɛmɔ kudradra ní Kristo Yesu me e, lɛ kuʋítrɔ blɔ aŋu ní kisugyaɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: although I could. Others may brag about themselves, but I have more reason to brag than anyone else.
translation_verse: Nya maaplɛ aŋu ní kisugyaɛ aʋa xe e, lɛ xe ɔnutɔ aabu si yɛ atani aŋu kuplɛ ní kisugyaɛ aʋa ɛ, mɛ kɔ masani yɛ.

english_verse: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Bɛtsa ɔyaʋi ki mɛ ní liwe ɔgɔtɔʋa yɛ aʋa, menu Israel ɔnɛ dɔni Benyamin likpɔ lɛ mɛ, mɛ bakatsi ba benu Hebrianɛ nɛ, lɛ ní Mose ɔsã nɔ mɛ ɛ, menu Farisi ɔnɛ;

english_verse: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
translation_verse: kɔkpɛ kifu iliɛ gi kize ní mɛ mɛ̀ onu i, mayɔ kedu ní baʋaziŋa ba su. Lɛ xe ɔnɔ gbagbe liboe liagyɔ ní ɔsã nɔ axwɛwawa la onu i, meze ɔnɔ gi lipɔŋaŋa ɛtɔtɔ líze ní mɛ su u.

english_verse: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ kudɔkpaa liɔ klɔ ɔ, gi kɔ nya kwiabu libi ki mɛ ɛ, mebù kɔ abla si kúbu libiitɔtɔ ɛki mɛ kɔkpɛ Kristo loso o.

english_verse: Nothing is as wonderful as knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have given up everything else and count it all as garbage. All I want is Christ
translation_verse: Lilɛ gi lisanɔ ɛ, makɔ kidɔ kakaa si kilila kɔkpɛ kidiliɛ gi kimu isanɔ loso o, Kristo Yesu gi onu mɛ Ɔkaɛ yɛ kutèteo o, lɛ kɔkpɛ yɛ loso e, mayurɔ awla ni kidɔ kakaa su, lɛ makɔ bɛ si binu sivu atɔ mamɔ kudeonu tɔ maaze Kristo yɛ ɔŋanɛ ɛ,

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: tɔ mize likpɔ ni yɛ, lɛ loso aní ɔsã nɔ ɛki si mɛ linɛ ligyɔ ɔ, boŋu i, mɛ linɛ ligyɔ gani mɛ kuziŋaa ní Kristo me aʋa; ɔnɔ yɛ kude gyɔgyɔ kwidɔ ní Aya kɔ, ni kuziŋa mɛ.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ gi mapɛ ɛ, kɛ kinu si mite Kristo ani tɔ mite yɛ kuyɔyɔɔ kigaglaɛ, ni tɔ mikpɛ ɔha ni yɛ ní yɛ ɔzia mɔmɔ nɔ mɛ ɛ, atɔ midzi ŋwisi yɛ kiniɛ ní yɛ kutseo me,

english_verse: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
translation_verse: ni kugyodi si biayɔni mɛ kyɛ dɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ mani ligbã́ nɛ mɛ. Mlekeni edi tɔ mlaazɛ kaʋaŋaa liʋɛ nɛ

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: Maʋípani si maŋa aʋa kooko loo si mana kooko, pɔ̀ meekeni edi si mizɛ liʋɛɛ nɛ gi lɛ loso Kristo ehe me apɔni yɛ isu ya ɛ.

english_verse: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso meese si mina ɔnakɔ lɔ klɔ gi maatsa ogbe no o, xe maazɛ liʋɛ nɛ ɛ. Liʋɛ nɛ linu Aya yɛ kuxwaxwa liɔ gi axwa mɛ ɛ, gani Yesu Kristo aʋa, gi linu ligbã́ nɛ ní lifunu ne e, kɔkpɛ kidiliɛ gi Kristo abitɛ aki mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, blɔ banama petee gi kwitsi ni Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ɛ, lilɛ si kugyodi tule uliɔ ya kuze ní blɔ awla. Pɔ̀ xe kugyodi dzedze utɔ kulɛ ni mlɔ mɛ ɔtɔ awla ɛ, Aya aabu lɛ mɛ ɔki mlɔ.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ kitɛkitɛ lilɛ kyɛ ɛ, mlaki tɔ kutrɛ lɛ aʋa tɔ kuga ní isãɛ nɛ aʋa gi kwiga koko e.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: Benemi ba, mlakpasi mɛ kibitɛɛ, Mlevu aŋu ní banama gi balɛ ni bede gbã ma a, gi kwibasɛ mlɔ ɛ su.

english_verse: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
translation_verse: Masi mlɔ liboe lɛ ya lipoe glegle, lɛ meedzini lɛ ɛpani ni kube dzɛ si, banɔ glegle balɛ ní mlɔ kusi, gi ba ligbã́zeze ne e, liki si bɛyɔ kedu ní kidiliɛ gi kɛ loso Kristo etse ní osetsase lo su i su.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: Banɔaklɔ ba oblo kɔ onu kifu moni ye me, banɔaklɔ ba epò la alɛ ŋwisi babu gi beesumu kinɛ ɛ, lɛ ba kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ɔ kunu eyeyeboe e, banɔaklɔ ba ɛ, kesea aʋa bidɔ mɛ su ko ba begyodi ʋa balɛ.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Blɔ pɔ̀ blɔ kepea kenu lifunu ne, lɛ blɔ kimbi kizã a, gi kwipe blɔ obúbú ye e, gi onu blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo e,

english_verse: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, mɛ benemi ba gi malɔ ɔ, xe mizeegyo mlo edi i, mlɔ mlenu mɛ isami nɛ, gi mizeefeke isu ɔkpɛ mlɔ loso o, nite lilɛ si mlalɛɛ gagla ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ, mɛ benemi balɔlɔ nɛ ba!

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Mɛɛgba Ewodia ni Sintixe, tɔ benu ba ahanuglɔ ba ese ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Lɛ maki wɔ litukpo, mɛ ɔxwɛwa hanuglɔ vevee si, tɔ pɔni badzɛa ya ba, lɛ ese linu si bɛwa axwɛ gagla ni mɛ gi kwipani Liboe Gbã nɛ ɛ. Ba ni Klemens ani mɛ baxwɛwa hanuglɔ gɔgɔ ba, banama enyi na gi bɛŋwlimi kpɛ ní Aya yɛ ligbã́ nɛ keplekpaa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
translation_verse: Isami iku mlo ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ lipoe kakaa; meedzini pani si: Isami iku mlo!

english_verse: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
translation_verse: Mlaki tɔ banima pɔ́ bete mlɔ ɔnayɔyɔ lɔ! Ɔkaɛ yɛ kibabaɛ kina pɔ́.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: Atɔ Aya yɛ kusuyɔɔ gi kwimu isani ɔnɔ kesenunu kakaa ɛ, kwiapé mlɔ ina nɛ ni mlɔ begyodi ʋa su, ni Kristo Yesu me e.

english_verse: Finally, my friends, keep your minds on whatever is true, pure, right, holy, friendly, and proper. Don't ever stop thinking about what is truly worthwhile and worthy of praise.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba ní lɛ ɔgù kɔ ɛ, kidiliɛ gi ki nu anukwarɛ ɛ, kidiliɛ su gi kuzɛɛkpɛ kubùbù u, kidiliɛ gi kigyɔ ɔ, kidiliɛ su gi kidra ɛ, kidiliɛ gi kizɛkpɛ isami i, kidiliɛ su gi bizɛɛpani eboe gbã a, xe kiditɔ kigyeno o, lɛ xe kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ kutɔ kulɛ ɛ, mlegyo la ya elue edi i!

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ gi mlɛkpasi i, loo kidiliɛ gi mlɛzɛ ɛ, loo mlenu idɔni mɔ klɔ, loo mlɛmɔ ní mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ, mlakɔ bɛ akpɛ axwɛwawa mɛ. Atɔ Aya gi izɛɛki kusuyɔ ɔ, aaze nì mlo. Paulo edo Filipianɛ ma ɖase

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mamɔ isami glegle ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ abla si mlɛkɔ ní lɛ mɛ ɛki mɛ dzɛ ɛ, lilɛ lɛ mɛ si mlekeni idi, pɔ̀ kudeonu kúze ɛki kidiliɛ ɛ, gi mlegyo edi si mlɛbitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: Maʋípani te kɔkpɛ mɛ baziazia ʋa loso o; lɛ ese linu si mɛkɔ ɛ, makpasi lɛ si, kizeze kakaa mɛ gi malɛ ɛ, lilɛ si kiku mɛ aŋu.

english_verse: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
translation_verse: Mete kidiliɛ gi linu si tɔ ɔnutɔ oze ɔzianete e, lɛ mete kidiliɛ gi linu si tɔ ɔnutɔ oze oxonete e. Makpasi liboe kpòkpò lɛ ya si kizeze kakaa mɛ gi malɛ ɛ, lilɛ si kikè me, xe kuʋɛ kwiku me o, kike meke o, bidɔ bisrɛ ní mɛ awla o, kididɔ kíma ní mɛ awla o.

english_verse: Christ gives me the strength to face anything.
translation_verse: Mizɛɛtani kidɔ kakaa kubitɛ gani Kristo, ɔniliɛ klɔ gi izɛɛkpɛ mɛ kigaglaɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlɛbitɛ lɛ mumɔ si, mlɛzɛɛki mɛ kupɔnɔ ní mɛ baxixa ʋa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Lɛ mlɔ Filipianɛ ma mlete si, lipoe lɛ gi mazɛɛpani Liboe Gbã nɛ aki mlɔ ɔ, gi masɛ ní Makedonia ɛ, mlɔ ko mleze baʋaziŋa ba ɔha lɔ gi ɛpɔni mɛ ni bidɔkɔkɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi meze ní Tesalonika kyɛ ɛ, mlɛtsisi mɛ bidɔziazia ʋɛ sani tule gi kuziazia kwiba ɛ.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: Aní si mɛɛpɛ kididɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ mapɛ si mlabitɛ eboe gbã sanɔ tɔ biakɔ ʋɛ pɔni mlɔ eboe Gbã na ní lifunu ne.

english_verse: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mazi kidɔ kakaa gi mlɛtsisi mɛ ɛ, lɛ bisani kiliɛ gi mazia kyɛ ɛ, gi Epafrodito amani mɛ kudɔkpaa liɔ ɔ, gi mlɛtsisi mɛ ɛ, kidɔ kakaaɛ iliɛ gi kizia mɛ ɛ, kilɛ ní mɛ awla. Mlɛki Aya bisumudɔ gi bilɛ flafla ɛ, gi Aya azɛ ɛ, lɛ biku Yɛ aŋu u.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: Lɛ mɛ Aya aaki mlɔ mlɔ bidɔziazia ʋɛ petee dɔni yɛ exo glegle la mɛ kɔkpɛ Yesu Kristo loso.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Mlaki tɔ kukpɔ̀ blɔ Ɔka Aya dɔni abla kɔtsini kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ! Tɔ liba lɛ mɛ. Paulo yɛ kunɔpanɔ gɔgɔɔ

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Mlapani Aya yɛ banima petee aki mɛ ní Kristo Yesu me! Benemi ba gi balɛ ní mɛ su kyɛ ɛ, bɛpani mlɔ.

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: Aya yɛ banima petee bɛtsisi mlɔ ba kunɔpaniɔ, liveve le kí banama gi benu baxwɛwa ni Kaisaro kepea mɛ ɛ ní Filipi.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless your life!
translation_verse: Blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ lize ni mlɔ ifuɛfuɛ nɛ! Tɔ liba lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Mɛ Paulo gi menu Kristo Yesu yɛ ɔnɔ kpɛkpɛ ɛ, gani Aya kupɛpɛ onu, ni blɔ onemi Timoteo, blɔ kwiŋwlimi keplekpaa lia ya;

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: ɛki banɔdradra ba ní Kolose ni benemi ba gi benu baʋaziŋa ba ní Kristo me e: atɔ Aya blɔ Ɔka ni Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo baki mlɔ lipomepɛpɛ ni kusuyɔ! Paulo axwa lɛ edo Aya ɖase

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Kuzeedo Aya gi onu blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛka ɖase e lipoe kakaa, xegi kwixwa Aya ní mlɔ litukpo e,

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: lɛ ese linu si kwinu mlɔ onu ní mlɔ kaʋaziŋaa ní Kristo Yesu me, ni mlɔ kunɔlɔɔ kí Aya yɛ banima pɔ́.

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: Kaʋaziŋa ni kunɔlɔ uliɔ gi kwidɔ ní kudeonudidi uliɔ ɔ, gi bɛbla ɛplɛ ɛki mlɔ ní lifunu ne e, gi kɔ onu mlenu lipoe lɛ ɛ, gi mlenu anukwarɛɛ liboe le e, gi linu Liboe Gbã nɛ ɛ,

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: gi liba mlɔ klɔ kinɛ ɛ. Ŋwisi kiliɛ gi lilɛ ní kelea mɛ pɔ ɛ, Liboe Gbã nɛ liibu libi, lɛ liine onugu, ŋwisi kiliɛ ɛ, gi liibitɛ ní mlɔ kusi i, dɔni liwe lɛ klɔ gi mlenu le e, xe mlenu Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ ni lɛ anukwarɛɛ petee ese e.

english_verse: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
translation_verse: Mlɛkpasi lɛ ɛdɔni Epafra, blɔ ɔxwɛwa ɔhanuglɔ dimɛnɔ ɛ, gi izeesumu Kristo ni yɛ ɔna petee e, gi ɔlɛ ní blɔ linyi ne me e, kɔ.

english_verse: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ klɔ kee apani asi blɔ ní mlɔ kunɔlɔɔ gi Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛki mlɔ su u.

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
