translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, dɔni liwe lɛ klɔ gi kwinu liboe lɛ ya ni mlɔ su i, kúmɔni Aya kuxwa ní mlɔ litukpo o, lɛ kuzeeʋi si Aya ɔki si mlete yɛ kupɛpɛɔ ni tɔ yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔki mlɔ kuboete ni kuboesenu kakaa tɔ mlete kidiliɛ gi apɛ si mlabitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: Kwixwa Aya si mlaatani ligbã́ nɛ kuze kiliɛ gi Ɔkaɛ apɛ́ ɛ, lɛ mlabitɛ kidiliɛ gi kiku yɛ aŋu i, ní kude kakaa onu. Lɛ kwiʋi Aya si mlaawa axwɛ gbã kakaa a, lɛ mlatsi i, lɛ mlaate Ye ɔsã nɔ ɔ.

english_verse: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
translation_verse: Tɔ Aya aakpɛ mlɔ kigagla gani kigaglaɛ liɛ gi kidɔ ní yɛ kusudraa mɛ ɛ, atɔ mlaatani kulɛɛ ni igyi dodo, ni litɔplɛplɛkese kese ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ.

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
translation_verse: Kwiʋi si mlaakɔ isami udo Ɔka Aya ɖase, gi aaki si mlamɔ ɔ ɔŋakɔ ní kidiliɛ gi abla aki yɛ banima a, ní Aya yɛ kaʋaŋaa, gi kenu kuklekle me e.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si ebu blo ní litumu ne kigaglaɛ ese, lɛ akɔ blɔ amanɔ ní Yebi dimɛnɔɛ yɛ kaʋaŋaa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
translation_verse: Kristo gi kuzɛɛmɔ ɛ, yɛ onu Aya gi ɔnɔnɔ ɔʋímɔ ɔ, yɛ kilɛ́lɛɛ mɛ. Yɛ onu obi tɔpu yɛ, gi amɔ kigagla a, ní kidɔ kakaa gi Aya abitɛ ɛ aʋa.

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si gani yɛ aʋa Aya abitɛ kidɔ kakaa, ní lifunu ne ni kesea aʋa, kidɔ kakaa gi bizɛɛmɔ ɔ, ni kidɔkakaa gi baʋímɔ ɛ, xe ekusigbo o loo bigagla, xe kukàŋaŋa, loo baʋaŋa a, bɛbitɛ kidɔ kakaa gani yɛ aʋa, lɛ bɛbitɛ ʋɛ ki yɛ ɛ,

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: lɛ Kristo ɔlɛ xe Aya abitɛ kidɔ kakaa a, lɛ ní yɛ mɛ ɛ, kidɔ kakaa kikpɛ likpɔ.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: Yɛ onu litukpo le ki ɔnɔse lo gi onu ɔsɔli ha lɔ ɔ; yɛ onu okpese klɔ ni obi tɔpu yɛ gi bɛyɔnɔ ɛdɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛ, tɔ yɛ aazɛ ɔtɔpu klɔ ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si liku Aya liŋu si, yɛ kidɔ kakaa kilɛ ní Kristo me e,

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: lɛ gani yɛ obi ye aʋa ɛ, aavu kigũ ní yɛ isu ya ni kidɔ kakaa kusi, lɛ gani Yebi ye ikaɛ lɛ gi bɛ bali ní osetsase lo su me e, aamani kusuyɔ ní kidɔ kakaa ní kesea aʋa ni kidɔ kakaa ní lifunu ne kusi i.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Ní lipoe lɛ gi liza mɛ ɛ, mlekyi kede kpɛ Aya, lɛ mlɛbitɛ isu ya yɛ ahwafianɛ ní mlɔ begyodi ʋa mɛ kɔkpɛ mlɔ biboebitɛ zimizi ʋe loso,

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: pɔ̀ abla ɛ, Aya akpɛ mlɔ ni yɛ likpɔ gani Yebi ye kutseo ní osetsase lo su me, lɛ loso aki si mlalɛ ní yɛ aŋu mɛ ŋwisi banɔ dradra a, gi liŋwitɔtɔ lìma ní mlɔ su u, lɛ kunutsatsa kutɔtɔ kúma ní mlɔ su kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: Mlaze ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ me ni Kristo xegi mlɛtrɛ lɛ aʋa a, xe mlalɛɛ ní mlɔ kuziŋaa mɛ ɛ, gi bedu mlo o, xe mleli i, xe bátratani mlɔ kuhwanɔ ɔ dɔni kudeonudidi uliɔ gi Liboe Gbã nɛ liki mlɔ mɛ ɛ. Lɛ ya linu Liboe Gbãɛ nɛ gi mlenu u, gi bɛpani si kidɔbitɛbitɛ kakaa a ní lifunu ne ese. Liboe Gbã ɛ nɛ ya lɛ ɔnɔsumu mɛ Paulo medzi. Paulo yɛ axwɛwawa la ki ɔsɔli ha lɔ

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Abla ɛ, mizɛɛmɔ isami ní ɔzia nɔ gi matsanɔ ní mlɔ litukpo e su, lɛ mɛɛpɔnɔ tɔ míblono ní mɛ kisugyaɛ mɛ, kidiliɛ gi kigɔ ní Kristo yɛ ɔzia mɔmɔ nɔ mɛ ɛ, ní yɛ kisugyaɛ mɛ, gi kinu ɔsɔli ha lɔ ɔ.

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Lɛ medzi ɔsɔli ha lɔ ɔnɔsumu kɔkpɛ lixwɛ ɛ nɛ gi Aya aki mɛ ɛ, si mikɔ yɛ Liboe zizi nɛ kɔki mlɔ loso.

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: Lɛ linu liboe lɛ gi bekpo edɔni kanaa mɛ ní blɔ baka koko ba lipoe le ke e; pɔ̀ abla ɛ, ebu le abasɛ Aya yɛ banɔ dradra ba.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Aya apɛ si tɔ bete yɛ Liboe kpòkpò le lɛ kedzizɛzɛa gi kalɛ ni yɛ awla a aki banama gi bénu Yudanɛ ma a, gi linu Kristo o, gi yɛ ɔkpasi ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ, gi lɛ linu blɔ kudeonudidi i, si blɔ kyɛ kwiamɔ ɔŋakɔ ní Aya yɛ kusudra mɛ.

english_verse: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
translation_verse: Kwidra yɛ su si ɔnɔ kakaa gi kwibu lɛ mɛ ɛ, lɛ kwigba ɔnɔ kakaa a, lɛ kwibasɛ ɔnɔ kakaa a gani kuboete kakaa mɛ, tɔ kwiaki ɔnɔ kaka aalɛ ní Aya aŋu mɛ ɔnɔ zizi, gi ɔlɛ ni likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Kristo e.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: Tɔ mitani lɛ kubitɛ ɛ, mɛɛŋwlɛ gani Kristo yɛ kigaglaɛ petee gi aki mɛ ɛ, xe kiiwa axwɛ na ní mɛ mɛ̀ ɛ.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: Mapɛ si mlete kiliɛ gi mizɛɛŋwlɛ mlɔ litukpo o. Mlɔ ni banama gi balɛ ní Laodikea a, kɔpɔni banama petee gi bámɔ mɛ aŋu mɛ ni aŋu mɛ ʋidi i.

english_verse: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
translation_verse: Mɛ kupɛpɛɔ kunu si tɔ bakpɛ ɔna ní ba lipo, tɔ bakpɛ ba likpɔ ní kunɔlɔ mɛ ani tɔ bamɔ exo ala petee gi anukwarɛ kuboesenu yo kuzɛɛmanɔ ɛ, tɔ biate Aya yɛ Liboe kpòkpò le gi linu Kristo ɔtutɔ lɔ ɛ.

english_verse: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
translation_verse: Yɛ onu ɔniliɛ gi izɛɛdra Aya yɛ kuboeteo ni kuboesenu yo kɔ bikesinɔdɔ kpòkpò ʋe petee su u.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: Mɛɛsi mlɔ lɛ ya tɔ mlakíki si ɔnɔnɔ ɔkɔ yɛ onugu me gyigyi no omeni mlo o, xe yɛ eboe la ɛɛŋwi ŋwisi anukwarɛɛ enu fɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si xe máma ní mlɔ su ní kisugyaɛ mɛ fɛ ɛ, malɛ ní mlɔ su ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ, lɛ isami izeeku me e, xe mamɔ kiliɛ gi mlɔ batrɔtrɔ ʋa balɛ ɛ, ni mlɔ Kristo aʋa kuziŋaa kɔ kigaglaɛ liɛ mɛ gi mlalɛ ɛ. Ɔnɔ gbagbe yɛ ligbã nɛ lɛ Kunanaa kulɛ ní Kristo me

english_verse: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
translation_verse: Abla ɛ, kiliɛ gi mlɛzi Kristo Yesu ŋwisi Ɔkaɛ kinɛ ɛ, niteme ke lilɛ si mlaga ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni yɛ,

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: tɔ mledzi banɔ gi ba igu ne idɔ ní yɛ mɛ ɛ, tɔ mlawa mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ atrɔ ní yɛ aʋa, atɔ mleze gagla ní kuziŋa mɛ, kiliɛ gi bɛbasɛ mlɔ ɛ, tɔ mleyi agbigba ni ɖase kudodo.

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Mledi lɛ aʋa tɔ ɔnɔnɔ ɔkimeni mlo evu gani kelea mɛ kuboeteo ni kemeno pluplu gi kuʋíbu libi itɔtɔ mɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si kuboete uliɔ kunu ikɔ̀ gi banima bizɛɛbasɛ ɛ, ani kelea mɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ gi bídɔ ní Kristo me e.

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: lɛ Aya aki si mlɛna ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ ɛ, xe mlɛkpɛ likpɔ ní Kristo o, gi yɛ ɛɛŋa kigagla kakaa ni kukaŋaŋa kakaa aʋa ɛ.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: Lɛ bevive mlo ni yɛ ɛ gani kunikpɛkpɛɔ mɛ, bɛyɔni mlɔ ni Kristo gani mlɔ kuziŋaa ní Aya yɛ kigaglaɛ gi akɔ ayɔni yɛ adɔ ni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛ mɛ.

english_verse: You were dead, because you were sinful and were not God's people. But God let Christ make you alive, when he forgave all our sins.
translation_verse: Gi mletse ní mlɔ eboe zimizi na mɛ ɛ, xe mlámɔ ɔwla dɔni eboe zimizi na kigaglaɛ ese e, gi lɛ ese linu si bátsa ɔyaʋi aki mlɔ ɛ, Aya aki si mledzi ligbã́ ni Kristo. Akɔ blɔ eboe zimizi na petee akyɛ blɔ,

english_verse: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
translation_verse: gi akyì ode e akpɛ ní ɔsã nɔ gi bɛŋwlimi i mɛ, nì lɔ kudetsítsi yo ni kedu alia gi biyɔ ni blɔ su mɛ ɛ; akɔ ʋɛ asɛ ní blɔ su lɛ eku ʋe ni osetsase lo su u.

english_verse: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi Kristo azɛ kigagla ni kukaŋaŋa ní ifuɛfuɛ nɛ baka ʋa ni baʋaŋa ba awla ɛ, akpɛ ʋɛ kuye ní ɔha kusi gi aŋa bɛ aʋa gani osetsase lo me e.

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mlakíki tɔ ɔnɔnɔ obu mlɔ lipɔ ní mlɔ kiŋaŋa loo biŋwɛŋwɛ, loo ní liwe ŋaŋa loo ɔdzidzi vuvu yɛ loo Lizemɔniwe le su.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: La ya elue enu gyesi gi Aya aki yɛ banima a ní Kristo kubaba su; pɔ́ liboe le ɔtutɔ lɔ linu Kristo o.

english_verse: Don't be cheated by people who make a show of acting humble and who worship angels. They brag about seeing visions. But it is all nonsense, because their minds are filled with selfish desires.
translation_verse: Mlakíki tɔ ɔnɔ gi izɛɛplɛ imɔ ɔ, si yɛ ebu banɔ loo yɛ eesumu Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ ɔki tɔ mlɔ liʋɛ nɛ lidɔ mlɔ ɛza. Banɔ ba ya elu i, bizɛpani ní kidiliɛ gi bɛmɔ su u, lɛ ba kelea mɛ begyodi ʋa bizɛki si bizeefeke isu ya nì eboe fiteete la a.

english_verse: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
translation_verse: Oʋívu kudɔbasɛ yɔ ní Kristo gi yɛ onu litukpo le awla a, lɛ kiliɛ gi litukpo le lizɛɛbasɛ onɔse lo kudeo e, nite Kristo izɛɛbasɛ yɛ banima petee tɔ beze likpɔ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi axwa la ni ika lɛ izeevu kisugyaɛ kapɛ kakaa ɛkpɛ likpɔ kinɛ ɛ, xe izeetsi ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Aya apɛ si otsi kinɛ ɛ. Kutse ni ligbã́ ní Kristo me

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: Gi mletse ni Kristo ɛki kelea mɛ isã nɛ ɛ, xe mláma ní lɛ kigaglaɛ ese tɔ ɛ, ege loso mlɛki si bakpɛ ɔsã aki mlɔ ŋwisi kele me ligbã́ mlalɛ dzɛ ɛ?

english_verse: “Don't handle this. Don't taste that. Don't touch this.”?
translation_verse: “Mlakívu kidiliɛ ɛ! mlakímini kiŋaŋaɛ liɛ edi i! mlakígbɔnɔ kidiliɛ klɔ ɔ!”?

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: La ya petee ɛtrádu xegi bɛwa la su axwɛ pɔ́ ɛ; lɛ ese linu si ɛdɔ ní banima isã kpɛkpɛ ni bidɔbasɛbasɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: Isãɛ lɛ ya elu izɛɛŋwi ŋwisi kuboete kɔkpɛ lɛ kusumu uliɔ gi izɛki si besumu i, tɔ liŋwi si beesumu Aya, ni lɛ imɔ nɛ mɛ kunɔbu yo, ni kiliɛ gi izebu kinie ɛki kisugyaɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ isãɛ nɛ íʋikɔ si ɔnɔnɔ ɔŋa yɛ kisugyaɛ kɛ kulekuku yo aʋa a.

english_verse: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
translation_verse: Abla gi Aya ayɔni mlɔ nì Kristo adɔ ni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛ, mlapɛ́ kidiliɛ gi kilɛ ní lifunu ne e, niklɔ gi Kristo odi ní Aya yɛ kaŋawla mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Mlatrɔ mlɔ begyodi ʋa ní lifunu ne bidɔ mɛ aʋa asani kesea aʋa bidɔ mɛ.

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si mletse lɛ abla ɛ, mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ bekpo le ni Kristo ní Aya mɛ.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: Tɔ xe Kristo o, gi yɛ onu mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ aado e, tɔ mlɔ fɛ mlaado ni yɛ ní kusudraa mɛ. Ligbã́ koko le ni ligbã́ vuvu nɛ

english_verse: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
translation_verse: Loso mleye mlɔ isu ya bidɔɛ mɛ, gi binu kesea aʋa kusuŋwasi i: gi binu kihasi i, kumɔdramɔdra, kulekuku, ani bapɛ́pɛ zimizi gi bizɛɛgbani banɔ ɛtsini kuzimizi me, kuŋazi gi binu kubusumu;

english_verse: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
translation_verse: kɔkpɛ bɛya elu loso Aya yɛ kusuyeʋio kwitraba batumonu ba aʋa,

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: mlɛga bede ba ya elu izanɔ kɔkpɛ ligbã́ɛ nɛ gi mleze e loso.

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ abla ɛ, lilɛ si mlebu bidɔ bɛ ya elue azanɔ gi binu u: Kusuyeʋi, kusuyeʋi gagla, banɔ su kuzizi, ebusioboe, eyeyeboe akí do edɔni mlɔ onu u.

english_verse: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
translation_verse: Mlakímeni mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba, gi mlebu mlɔ ligbã́ koko le ni lɛ kiboebitɛɛ ɛzanɔ ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
translation_verse: Gi mledzi banɔvuvu u, gi Aya eedzini abitɛ ní kuboete ní yɛ kilɛlɛɛ mɛ onu u, tɔ yidzini mlo emanɔ tɔ mlaate ye mɔmɔmɔ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso lidzegaga líma ní Hela ɔnɛ ni Yuda ɔnɛ, ɔyaʋi tsatsa ni ɔyaʋi mɔtsamɔtsa kusi. Nite ke lidzegaga líma ní bababa ni Sikianɛ gi ba aŋu ádra, ɔnɔdzidzi ye ni ɔnɔ gi ɔlɛ ni isuwla mɛ kusi i, pɔ̀ Kristo yɛ onu kidɔ kakaa lɛ yɛ ɔkpasi ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso agi mlenu Aya yɛ banɔ gi akya ni banɔ dradra ba ni banɔ gi alɔ ɛ, mlɔ ligbãzeze ne libasɛ asigaga didi, lipome pɛpɛ, litɔplɛplɛkese, kusububɔ ni ɔnayɔyɔ,

english_verse: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
translation_verse: Lɛ kɔpɔni eboe gbã na ya ɛ, mlabasɛ kunɔlɔ, lɛ ese linu si kɔ kuzɛɛnya ʋɛ petee kpɛ likpɔ.

english_verse: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Mlaki tɔ Kristo yɛ kusuyɔɔ kuŋa aʋa ní mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ, lɛ ese linu si ŋwisi kisugya tile me banɔ kinɛ ɛ, Aya ɛxwa mlɔ ɛki kusuyɔ. Lɛ loso mlazeedo Aya ɖase e.

english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Lɛ kidɔ kakaa gi mlaabitɛ gani kunugu loo axwɛwawa mɛ ɛ, mlabitɛ bɛ petee ní Ɔkaɛ Yesu linyi ne me, atɔ mlazeedo Ɔka Aya ɖase gani yɛ aʋa. Paulo akpɛ isã akí basɔlisɔli ba kupeo

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Mlɔ benyimedze ba, mlepleni isu ya akpɛ ní mlɔ benye ba ese, kiliɛ gi lilɛ si mlabitɛ lɛ ŋwisi banɔ gi bali ni Ɔkaɛ kude kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Mlɔ badzɛnye ba, mlalɔ mlɔ bedze ba, mlakí zɛɛtɛni ba.

english_verse: Children must always obey their parents. This pleases the Lord.
translation_verse: Mlɔ banuvɔ ba, mlenu mlɔ bapɔnɛ ba ìgbe ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ, lɛ ese linu si bɛ bizeeku Ɔkaɛ aŋu.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Mlɔ bebika ba, mlakíkpɛ mlɔ bɛbi ba kusuyeʋi i, xe aní te e, ba ina nɛ iagbɔ̀ ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Mlɔ banɔdzidzi ba, mlenu mlɔ kesea aʋa baka ba ìgbe ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ; lɛ mlabitɛ lɛ aní xegi ba aŋu na alɛ ní mlɔ su ko o, aloo tɔ mlɛɛzi kukɔkɔ ɛdɔni ba kɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ ɛ, mlabitɛ lɛ ni ɔna mɛ dradra kɔkpɛ kubùbù kí Ɔkaɛ loso.

english_verse: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
translation_verse: Lɛ ni kidɔ kakaa gi mlaabitɛ mɛ ɛ, mlabitɛ kɛ dɔni mlɔ ɔna mɛ, ŋwisi Ɔkaɛ mlɛɛbitɛ lɛ ɛkɔ kinɛ ɛ, lɛ aní ki banɔ ɔ.

english_verse: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
translation_verse: Agi mlete si, mlɛtramɔ ɔŋakɔ ɛdɔni Ɔkaɛ klɔ ɔ, ŋwisi liʋɛ tsatsa kinɛ ɛ, kɔ Ɔkaɛ Kristo yɛ mleesumu i.

english_verse: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
translation_verse: Lɛ ɔnɔ kakaa gi izɛɛbitɛ eboe zimizi i, xegi Aya axwa litsi le e, aatsa lɛ liʋɛ nɛ ɔki yɛ gi aŋu mɛ didi atráze lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
translation_verse: Mlɔ baka ba, mlabitɛ kidiliɛ gi kipɛ ɛ, xe kisrɔnɔ nɔ ɛki mlɔ banɔdzidzi ba, agi mlete si Ɔka ɔlɛ ní mlɔ fɛ mlɔ awla ní lifunu ne loso. Paulo abitɛ batrɔtrɔ apɔnɔ aki ba

english_verse: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
translation_verse: Mleze ní Aya kuxwaxwa aʋa lipoe kakaa, lɛ mleze ni aŋu tɔ mlazeedo yɛ ɖase e.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Lɛ mlaxwa Aya ní blɔ fɛ litukpo o, tɔ Aya ɔdra liboe le kudeo ɔki blɔ, tɔ kupani Kristo yɛ Liboe kpokpo le, gi lɛ loso bɛkpɛ mɛ ligba lɛ ɛ,

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: mlaxwa Aya tɔ midra lɛ su mumɔ kiliɛ gi lilɛ si mibitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Mlaki tɔ lipomepɛpɛ ligbani mlɔ sìka kakaa se, tɔ mlɔ siya sɛ sidɔ ade lipoe kakaa, atɔ mlate kiliɛ gi ligyeno si, mlaabu eboe la onu ki ɔnɔ kakaa ɛ. Paulo atsisi yɛ kunɔpanɔ

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: Tixiko aasi mlɔ eboa la petee gi ɛba mɛ aʋa ɛ, onu onemi ɔlɔlɔ nɛ ni ɔnɔsumu anukwarɛɛ onete ni blɔ ɔhanɛ ɔxwɛwa ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: Mɛɛkpɛ yɛ ɛtsisi mlɔ si tɔ aaki mlate kidiliɛ nì eboa la gi alɛ ní ya ɛ, ani tɔ aakpɛ mlɔ ina nɛ kigagla a,

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: lɛ maki si Onesimo okuni yɛ kude e. Onesimo onu blɔ onemi gi kwilɔ xe odzi onu anukwarɛɛ onete e, gi onu mlɔ mɛ tole e, ba biaki si mlaate kidiliɛ gi kilɛ ní blɔ ní ya a.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Aristarxo gi bɛkpɛ ligba ɛpɔni mɛ ɛ, yɛ kyɛ apani mlɔ nite ke, Marko gi yɛ ni Barnaba benu bakaʋia bebi kyɛ ɛ, apani mlɔ. Mlɛzi batrɔtrɔ ni yɛ su edi lɛ loso xe aba mlɔ klɔ ɛ, tɔ mlazi yɛ.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Yesu gi bizɛɛxwa si Yusto e, yɛ fɛ apani mlɔ. Ba ko benu Yudanɛ ní mɛ ahanuglɔ baxwɛwa ba kusi ki Aya yɛ kaʋaŋaa, lɛ benu ɔnadɔdɔ akí mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Epafra, gi ádɔ ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ, xe onu Kristo Yesu yɛ ɔnɔsumu i, yɛ fɛ apani mlɔ, yɛ izɛɛŋwlɛ mlɔ litukpo ní Aya kuxwaxwa mɛ lipoe kakaa, si tɔ mlalɛɛ mumɔ ŋwisi banɔ gi betsi i, xe mlɛka ní isu aʋa a.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: Lɛ maŋa katsalia aki yɛ si ɛɛwa axwɛ gagla ní mlɔ ni banama gi balɛ ní Laodikea ni Hierapoli i litukpo.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: Blɔ ɔʋia ɔlɔlɔ nɛ ɛ Luka, ɔwabitɛɛ, ni Dema bɛpani mlɔ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Kwipani benemi ba ní Laodikea, kɔpɔni ɔdzɛɛ gi bizɛɛxwa si Nimfa a, ani baʋaziŋa ba gi bizɛɛtsa ní yɛ kepea mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Lɛ xegi mlɛkla keplekpaa lia pɔ́ ɛ, mledi le aʋa si bɛkla ka ɛki Laodikeanɛ ma baʋaziŋa ba fɛ, atɔ mlɔ fɛ mlakla keplekpaa lia gi maŋwlimi aki Laodikeanɛ ma ɛ.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: Atɔ mlasi Arxipo si, “di le aʋa si wɔgù wɔ axwɛ ana gi wɔzɛ dɔni Ɔkaɛ klɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Mɛ Paulo makɔ mɛ awla la xe maŋwlimi kunɔ pani uliɔ ya ʋa. Mlakídze si bɛkpɛ mɛ bibɔ ɔ. Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ lize nì mlɔ.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Keplekpa lia ya kɛ́dɔ ní Paulo, Silvano ani Timoteo klɔ ɛki banama gi balɛ ní Tesalonika ɔsɔli ha lɔ mɛ ɛ, gi bɛzi Ɔka Aya ani Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo ba aʋa kuŋa ɛ: Atɔ lipomepɛpɛ ni kusuyɔ kuze ni mlo. Kwido Aya ɖase ní mlɔ Ligbãzeze ne ni Kuziŋa ní Yesu Kristo me Litukpo

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Kuzedo Aya ɖase lipoe kakaa ní mlɔ petee litukpo lɛ kuzɛɛplɛ aŋu ní mlɔ aʋa ní Aya kuxwaxwa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: we tell God our Father about your faith and loving work and about your firm hope in our Lord Jesus Christ. The Thessalonians' Faith and Example
translation_verse: Lɛ kuzɛɛplɛ aŋu ní mlɔ aʋa ní Aya blɔ Ɔka yɛ aŋu mɛ kiliɛ gi mlɛɛwa mlɔ kuziŋaa su axwɛ ɛ, kiliɛ gi mlɔ kunɔlɔɔ ɔ, kwiki si mlɛɛwa axwɛ gagla la a, ani kiliɛ gi mlɔ kudeonudidi ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo me kwize gagla ɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: Benemi ba, kwite si Aya alɔ mlɔ lɛ ebú mlo tɔ mleze yɛ banɛ ɛ.

english_verse: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
translation_verse: Lɛ kúmani mlɔ Liboe Gbã nɛ ɛ, ni eboe tètè ko, pɔ̀ kɔpɔni kigagla ni Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ ɔ, ani likla trɔtrɔ ní lɛ anukwarɛɛ aʋa. Mlete kiliɛ gi kwize ní mlɔ kusi i, tɔ lipɛ kí mlɔ kokoko.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Mlɛkpasi blɔ ni Kristo; lɛ gi mlɛga kini mɔmɔ mɛ fɛ ɛ, mlɛzi liboe le ni isami gi idɔ ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: Lɛ mledzi liŋwitsɛ ɛki banama pɔ́ gi bɛziŋa ní Makedonia ani Axaya ɛ.

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: Lɛ Liboe Gbã nɛ lídɔ mlɔ klɔ ɛtrɛ ní Makedonia ni Axaya tete e, pɔ̀ Liboe le ni mlɔ kuziŋa ni Aya aʋa ɛ, lidzɛ ɔkɔ kakaa. Lɛ loso liboeboe líma gi kwiapani tɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
translation_verse: Banɔ baklɔ ba pɔ́ bɛpani ní kiliɛ gi mlɛzi blɔ gi kwiba mlɔ klɔ ɛ su, ani kiliɛ gi mlɛyurɔ mlɔ kubúbitɛɔ, xe mlɛba Aya klɔ ɛ, tɔ mlesumu Aya liɛ gi yɛ onu anukwarɛɛ onetee e, xe ɔlɛ ligba nɛ ɛ,

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: atɔ mlepe Yebi ye gi aadɔ lifunu ne kuba a, gi yɛ ayɔni adɔ ni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛ. Yesu gi yɛ ebu blo o, dɔni Aya yɛ kutuheheo gi kwitraba mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
translation_verse: Benemi ba, mlete si mlɔ kusi kubaba ɛ, kúze kufiteete e.

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: Mlete kóko kiliɛ gi bágani blɔ mumɔ ɛ, xe bekpini blo ní Filipi i, xe ableke kwiba mlɔklɔ ní Tesalonika ɛ. Lɛ gi keduyɔyɔ glegle keze fɛ ɛ, blɔ Aya akpɛ blɔ kigagla, tɔ kupani Liboe Gbã nɛ gi lidɔ yɛ klɔ ɛki mlɔ ɔ.

english_verse: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
translation_verse: Blɔ liboe lɛ gi kwisi mlɔ ɛ, lídɔ kesetata mɛ ɛ, loo kude mɔdramɔdra mɛ, loo kunɔmeno me.

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Mlete mɔmɔmɔ si kúba mlɔ kɔ ni onugu me gyigyi i, able ke kúpani eboa la tɔ kwikɔ ekpo blɔ kuŋazi i. Aya onu blɔ katsalia!

english_verse: We were not trying to get you or anyone else to praise us.
translation_verse: Kúpɛ kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ ɛdɔni ɔnɔnɔ kɔ ɔ, dɔni mlɔ kɔ loo dɔni banɔdzedze batɔtɔ kɔ.

english_verse: But as apostles, we could have demanded help from you. After all, Christ is the one who sent us. We chose to be like children or like a mother nursing her baby.
translation_verse: Ŋwisi Kristo yɛ banɔkpɛkpɛ kinɛ kyɛ ɛ, kúze lidɔtu iiki mlɔ ɔ. Pɔ̀ kwiplɛ litɔ kese agi kwize ní mlɔ su i, ŋwisi one gi eedi yɛ biba ba aʋa kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: Kɔkpɛ blɔ kunɔlɔɔ kí mlɔ onu i, kwize kublabla mɛ si kwiapani Aya yɛ Liboe Gbã nɛ ki mlɔ. Lɛ kwiabitɛ kidɔ kakaa gi kiziã tɔ kukɔ ɛpɔni mlɔ ɔ. Lɛ ese linu si mlalɛ veve aki blɔ!

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Maka si mlɛplɛ aŋu, benemi ba, kiliɛ gi kwiwa axwɛ ni kupèpè! Kwiwa axwɛ elesi ni kemize tɔ kukíze lidɔtu ikí mlɔ ɔ, agi kwizɛsɔli Aya Liboe Gbã nɛ kí mlɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Mlaŋa katsalia ki blɔ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Aya kyɛ aŋa ní blɔ kizezee me ní mlɔ kusi su i, si kipɛ̀, kina lɛ kesetataa tɔtɔ fɛ kéze e.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Mlete si kwibitɛ mlɔ mɛ ɔkakaa ŋwisi kiliɛ gi obika aaga ni yɛ ɔtutɔ Yebi kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: Kwikpɛ mlɔ kigagla, kwiyɔ mlɔ ɔna, lɛ kwizɛkpɛ lɛ ɛkpɛ ní mlɔ mɛ si mleze ligbã́ɛ nɛ gi liaku Aya aŋu i, yɛ gi yɛ axwa mlɔ si mlamɔ ɔŋakɔ ní yɛ Kukusi yo ni kuklekleo me e.

english_verse: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
translation_verse: Lɛ liboe dzedze lilɛ gi lɛ loso kuzedo Aya ɖase e. Agi kwimani mlɔ Aya yɛ Liboe le e, mlenu le, mlɛzi lɛ aní ŋwisi banɔ liboe dodo pɔ̀ ŋwisi Aya yɛ Liboe le e gi linu kinɛ ɛ. Lɛ ese linu si Aya ɛɛmani kukyíkyi ní mlɔ banama gi mlɛziŋa ɛ, mlɔ agbã́ na mɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: Benemi ba, liboe lɛ gi liba mlɔ aʋa ɛ, lɛ ké liba Aya isɔliha lɛ aʋa ni Yudea, ni banɔ baklɔ gi benu Kristo Yesu banɛ aʋa a. Mlɛmɔ keduyɔyɔ kini, idɔni mlɔ akɔanɛ ma kɔ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi bɛmɔ ɛdɔni Yudanɛ ma iwla lɛ mɛ kinɛ ɛ,

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
translation_verse: ba gi beye Ɔkaɛ Yesu, ani Aya yɛ beboedoplɛ ba a, xe bɛyɔ kedu ní blɔ su i. Béku Aya aŋu u! Bɛyɔ kedu ní ɔnɔ kakaa su!

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: Bekeni edi si betsí kudeonu iiki liboe le kupani yɔ kí Banama gi bénu Yudanɛ ɛ, liboe lɛ gi liamani ba ligbã vuvu dɔni Aya kɔ ɛki ba ɛ. Gani bede ba ya ʋa onu i, ba eboe zimizi na gi bɛbitɛ ɛ ɛsrɛ, lɛ gɔgɔ ɛ, Aya kusuyeʋio kwiba ba aʋa! Paulo apɛ si yizeedi Tesalonika banɛ ma dzɛ

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: Abla benemi ba, gi blɔ kusi kwilɛ lipoe kpekpemi itɔ lɛ ya ɛ, aní ní begyodi me e, pɔ̀ ní kisugyaɛ mɛ ɛ, kuzegyo mlo edi lɛ kwikenidi si kwiamɔ mlɔ dzɛ ɛ!

english_verse: We really wanted to come. I myself tried several times, but Satan always stopped us.
translation_verse: Lɛ kwipɛ si kudziba mlɔ klɔ. Mɛ Paulo ɔtutɔ mekeni edi si midziba sani tule, pɔ̀ ozimizi ye ɔ́ki blɔ kudeonu u.

english_verse: After all, when the Lord Jesus appears, who else but you will give us hope and joy and be like a glorious crown for us?
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ní lɛ mɛ ɛ, mlɔ mlenu blɔ kudeonu didi, blɔ isami, ani blɔ kusudɔɔ ni kaʋaŋaŋa ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu aŋu mɛ xe aba ɛ?

english_verse: You alone are our glory and joy!
translation_verse: Ní anukwarɛɛ mɛ ɛ, mlɔ mlenu blɔ kusudɔɔ nì blɔ isami nɛ.

english_verse: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
translation_verse: Gɔgɔ ɛ, kútani isu ya kuvu u, gi kúʋimɔ mlɔ tɔ ɛ. Lɛ loso, kwitrɔ si blɔ tètè kwiawɔ ní Atene,

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: atɔ kwiakpɛ Timoteo, blɔ oneminyimee gi ɛɛwa axwɛ na ni blɔ ɛki Aya ni Kristo yɛ Liboe Gbã nɛ kupaniɔ su u. Kwikpɛ yɛ si ɔkpɛ mlɔ kigagla tɔ ɔpɔni mlɔ tɔ mlaziŋa asanɔ,

english_verse: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
translation_verse: tɔ mlɔ mɛ ɔtɔtɔ ɔ́kidzi kede kɔkpɛ keduyɔyɔ a lia. Mlɔ ɔtutɔ mlete si keduyɔyɔ kaklɔ ʋa elue kenu Aya yɛ kupɛ́pɛ ki blɔ ɔ.

english_verse: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi kwize ní mlɔ kusi i, kwisi mlɔ kpɛ ɔtɔ si bɛtráyɔ kedu ní blɔ su; lɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi mlete kinɛ ɛ, nite me ɖii liba lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso liziã si mikpɛ Timoteo. Agi mátratani lɛ onu kulɛɛ tɔ ɛ, makpɛ yɛ si ɔga adi si kitɛ mlɔ kuziŋaa kulɛ na a? Mese lifu si gani kude kutɔ onu i, ozimizi ye efeke mlo edi lɛ blɔ kupepeo kwidzi kufiteete e. Timoteo yɛ Kunutsatsa Gbã ki Paulo

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Timoteo edzi aba, lɛ amani blɔ asamiboe ní mlɔ Aya aʋa kuziŋa ni kunɔlɔɔ su u. Asi blɔ si mleegyo blo edi lɛ mlɛpɛ si mlɛmɔ blɔ ɔ, kiliɛ gi blɔ fɛ kwipɛ si kumɔ mlɔ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso ní blɔ kinimɔmɔ ni kupepeo pɔ́ mɛ ɛ, mlɛkpɛ blɔ kigagla, benemi ba. Mlɔ Aya aʋa kuziŋaa kwikpɛ blɔ kigagla.

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: lɛ ese linu si abla ɛ, kulɛ ligbã́ nɛ koŋu gi mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ lilɛɛ gagla ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Ɔkaɛ ɛ.

english_verse: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
translation_verse: Abla ɛ, kwiatani blɔ Aya yɛ, ɖase kudo ní mlɔ litukpo. Kwido yɛ ɖase kɔkpɛ isamii nɛ gi kwimɔ ní yɛ aŋu mɛ ɛ, kɔkpɛ mlɔ loso.

english_verse: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
translation_verse: Elesi ni kemize e, kuzeeʋi ye ni blɔ ina nɛ petee si ɔki tɔ blɔ ɔtutɔ kumɔ mlɔ dzɛ atɔ kwiaki mlɔ kidiliɛ gi mlaziã ní mlɔ kuziŋaa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Atɔ blɔ Ɔka Aya ɔtutɔ ani blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu ɔlulɔ kudeo kí blɔ tɔ kuba mlɔ klɔ!

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: Atɔ Ɔkaɛ ɔki mlɔ kulɔlɔɔ kí mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba ni kí banima pɔ́ ɛ, kutsípɔnɔ atɔ kukeme ŋwisi blɔ kulɔlɔ kí mlɔ kiniɛ ɛ!

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: Ní kudeo liɔ ya onu i, Aya aakpɛ mlɔ kigagla, tɔ mlana ni tɔ mladra ní blɔ Ɔka Aya aŋu mɛ, xe blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu aaba aki banama a, gi benu yɛ banɔ dradra ba ɛ.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: Gɔgɔ ɛ, mɛ benemi ba, mlɛkpasi dɔni blɔ klɔ kiliɛ gi mlaze ligbã́ nɛ ɛ, xe mlaaku Aya aŋu i. Lɛ línu kiliɛ gi mlalɛ ligbã́ nɛ abla a. Abla ɛ, kwiki mlɔ litukpo, lɛ kwikpɛ lɛ ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ, ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu linyi ne me si mlabitɛ asani nite.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Lɛ mlete eboa la gi kwibasɛ mlɔ ɛ, gani blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu linyi ne me.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: Aya apɛ si mlɔ isu idra tɔ mlana ní mlɔ isuwla mɛ dɔni kihasi wawa mɛ.

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: aní ní kelea mɛ kisugyaɛ kulekuku me e, kiliɛ gi babubitɛ ba a, gi bése Aya bizɛbitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: Ní liboe lɛ ya mɛ ɛ, líma si ɔnɔnɔ ɔza kimbi ní yɛ ɔhanuglɔ yedze su loo ɔtafa yɛ ní kididɔ mɛ. Kwisi mlɔ liboe lɛ ya edi, lɛ kwitɛni mlɔ si Ɔkaɛ aahe kutu ɔki banama gi biabitɛ nite e.

english_verse: God didn't choose you to be filthy, but to be pure.
translation_verse: Aya ɔ́xwa blɔ si kuze bahasi nɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ tɔ kuze ligbã dradra a.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso, ɔniliɛ gi ɔ́trazɛ kudɔbasɛ uliɔ ya ɛ, aní ɔnɔ ɔ́zɛ ɛ, pɔ́ Aya a, gi yɛ izɛki mlɔ yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ ɛ, yɛ ɔ́zɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: Líziã si miŋwlimi ki mlɔ ní kulɔlɔ kí mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba gi bɛzi Kristo aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ su. Mlɔ ɔtutɔ ɛ, Aya abasɛ mlɔ bidɔ mɛ kiliɛ gi mlaalɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba ɛ.

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: Lɛ nite me mlɛga ní benemi ba petee su ní Makedonia kesea petee aʋa. Lɛ loso kwiki mlɔ litukpo benemi ba, tɔ mlalɔ ba sani nite e.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Mlabitɛ lɛ mlɔ kupɛ́pɛ tɔ mleze ligbã́ nɛ kpoo, tɔ mlakíkpɛ onugu ní ɔnɔ dzedze yɛ liboe me e, atɔ mlawa mlɔ tutɔ mlɔ axwɛ kiliɛ gi kwisi mlɔ ɛzanɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: Ní kudeo liɔ ya onu i, mlamɔ kubùbù dɔni banama gi bazɛ Aya aʋa aŋa kɔ ɔ, lɛ mlátradí ɔnɔnɔ aŋu mɛ ɛki mlɔ baziazia ʋa a. Ɔkaɛ yɛ kudzibaa

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: Benemi ba, kwipɛ si mlete anukwarɛ ní banama gi betse su u, atɔ mlakíze ní asigaga mɛ ɛ, ŋwisi banama awla gi kudeonudidi kúma kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
translation_verse: Kwiziŋa si Yesu etse lɛ ayɔ dzɛ ɛ, lɛ loso kwiziŋa si Aya aadzi ni Yesu ni banama gi bɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa a, xe betse e, manɔ.

english_verse: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
translation_verse: Kiliɛ gi kwibasɛ mlɔ abla ɛ, binu Ɔkaɛ yɛ kudɔbasɛ; blɔ banama gi kwiaze ligbã́ nɛ ɛ, xe Ɔkaɛ aaba ɛ, kútraku ɔtɔ ɛki banama gi betse e.

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: Biakpɛ ɔsã ni ozi gagla, lɛ Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba ɔkaɛ yɛ ole aayi i. Aya yɛ kakuklui ya kiayi, lɛ Ɔkaɛ yɛ ɔtutɔ lɔ le dɔni lifunu ne e. Banama gi bɛzɛ Kristo aʋa ɛɛŋa a, xe betse e, ba biatu kuyɔ;

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: Lɛ kede e, blɔ banama gi kulɛ ligbã́ nɛ ní lipoe lɛ klɔ mɛ ɛ, biakpɛ blɔ ni ba likpɔ ní aplɛ la mɛ tɔ kwitsani Ɔkaɛ ní liwɔ lɛ mɛ. Kɔ ɛ, kwize ni Ɔkaɛ lipoe kakaa ɛ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: Líziã si miŋwlimi kí mlɔ mɛ benemi ba, ní lipoe le ni ewe ala mɛ gi eboa la ya aba la mɛ tɔ ɔ.

english_verse: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
translation_verse: Lɛ mlɔ ɔtutɔ mlete si blɔ Ɔkaɛ yɛ liwe le líaba ŋwisi oze ní elesi me kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
translation_verse: Lipoe lɛ gi banima bɛɛpani si, “Kusuyɔ ni ɔnadɔdɔ ɛba ɛ,” lɛ baxixa ʋa bialili ba a! Liaba ŋwisi kuyeʋiyeʋi ní kubipɔ mɛ kinɛ ɛ, lɛ banima bátratani kuse ní kɔsu u.

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlɔ, benemi ba mláma ní litumu me e, lɛ líma si liwe veve lɛ klɔ lilili mlo ŋwisi oze kibaba kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: Mlɔ pɔ́ mlenu kuklekle me banɔ ɔ, gi mlalɛ ní keletiti mɛ ɛ. Aní elesi loo litumu me banɔ kunu u.

english_verse: Others may sleep, but we should stay awake and be alert.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso líma si kuzɛɛdɔ sra a, ŋwisi banɔ dzedze ba kinɛ ɛ; lilɛ si kuze ni aŋu tɔ kuvù isu.

english_verse: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si elesi me banɔ bizɛdɔ sra; lɛ elesi me bizemu kuda a.

english_verse: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ keletiti me banɔ kunu u, lɛ liziã si kuvu isu u. Lɛ ŋwisi ɔgũta kinɛ ɛ, lilɛ si kukpɛ kuziŋaa ni kulɔlɔɔ ŋwisi kakɔ mɛ liwu, ani tɔ kukúme kudeonudidi kí kubúbú yo ŋwisi akatsaloglo ye kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Aya ɔ́kya blɔ kí yɛ kusuyeʋi yo, pɔ̀ tɔ kumɔ kubúbú gani blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo me e,

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: Yɛ gi etse aki blɔ si i, xe kwitse e, loo kulɛ ligbã́ o, xegi edzì aba ɛ, kwiaze likpɔ ni yɛ.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mlakpɛ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba kigagla tɔ mlapɔni mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba, kiliɛ gi mlɛɛbitɛ abla ɛ. Paulo yɛ Bagbágba gɔgɔ ʋa ni Kunɔpaniɔ

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: Kwiki mlɔ litukpo, blɔ benemi ba, tɔ mlakpɛ kubùbù yo ní banama gi bɛɛwa axwɛ na gaglaa ní mlɔ kusi i, gi bɛɛbasɛ mlɔ kudeo o, xe bɛɛgbá mlɔ ɛ, ní Kristo anɛ ma ligbã́zeze ne me e.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Mlakɔ kubùbù glegle ni kulɔlɔ aki ba kɔkpɛ axwɛ ana gi bɛwa ní mlɔ kusi i loso, atɔ mleze ni mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba ní kusuyɔ mɛ.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: Kwiikpɛ lɛ mlɔ mɛ, benemi ba, atɔ mlatɛni basranɛ ba, mlakpɛ befufluse ba kigaglaɛ, mlapɔni banama gi bɛziã kupɔnɔ ɛ, mlaplɛ litɔ kese aki ɔnɔ kakaa.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Mledi lɛ ɔza si ɔnɔnɔ ódzini kuzimizi tsa ɛki kuzimizi i, pɔ̀ ní lipoe kakaa mɛ ɛ, mlatrɔ lɛ si mlabitɛ eboe Gbã akí mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba ni banima pɔ́.

english_verse: Always be joyful
translation_verse: Mleze ní isami mɛ lipoe kakaa,

english_verse: and never stop praying.
translation_verse: mlaxwa Aya lipoe kakaa.

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Mledo ɖase ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ. Lɛ Aya ɛɛpɛ dɔni mlɔ klɔ ní mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ mɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Yesu Kristo.

english_verse: Don't turn away God's Spirit
translation_verse: Mlakítsi kudeonu aki Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ kigaglaɛ;

english_verse: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
translation_verse: Mlatá liboe kakaa edi; atɔ mlabitɛ ní agbã̀ na aʋa.

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: tɔ mlayurɔ liboe zimizi kakaa elu.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Atɔ Aya gi yɛ izɛki blɔ kusuyɔ ɛ, ɔki tɔ mladra ní kude kakaa aʋa tɔ ɔbla mlɔ inɔse le pɔ́, Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ, esobo la, ani kisugyaɛ dɔni kesetata kakaa mɛ ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ kubabaa mɛ.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: Aya liɛ gi yɛ axwa mlɔ ɛ, aabitɛ lɛ, lɛ ese linu si izɛbitɛ yɛ kakáplɛa aʋa.

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: Mlaxwa Aya ní blɔ litukpo, benemi ba.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Mlapani tɔ mlakpɛ awla ole aki banama petee gi bɛziŋa ɛ.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: Makpɛ lɛ ní mlɔ mɛ ní Ɔkaɛ yɛ linyi ne me, si mlakla keplekpa lia ya akí banama petee gi bɛziŋa a.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ lize ni mlo.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Keplekpaa lia ya kɛdɔ ní mɛ Paulo, Silvano ani Timoteo klɔ ɛki banama gi balɛ ní Tesalonika ɔsɔli ha lɔ mɛ ɛ, gi bɛzi Aya blɔ Ɔka ani Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ:

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Kwiʋi lipomepɛpɛ ni kusuyɔ dɔni blɔ Ɔka Aya ni Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo kɔ ɛki mlɔ. Ɖase dodo

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: Blɔ benemi ba, liziã si kudo Aya ɖase ní mlɔ litukpo lipoe kakaa. Lipɛ ɛki blɔ si kubitɛ nite, lɛ ese linu si mlɔ kuziŋaa kwiitsi trɔ lɛ kulɔlɔɔ klɔ ɔ, gi kulɛ ní mlɔ kusi i, kwiisrɛ pɔnɔ.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: Liki si blɔ tutɔ fɛ kuzɛɛdɔ̀ isu ya ní mlɔ aʋa ní Aya isɔliha lɛ mɛ, ní kiliɛ gi mlalɛɛ ní mlɔ kuziŋaa aʋa a, ani kiliɛ gi mlɛɛga eboe gagla la mɛ ɛ, ní keduyɔyɔ ni kupepeo me su.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: La ya pɔ́ ɛtrɔ likla lɛ aʋa si Aya yɛ litsixwaxwa lɛ ɛ, lilɛ lɛ ozekɔ, gani lɛ mɛ ɛ, mlagyeno ki yɛ kaʋaŋaa, gi ka lɛ loso mlɛɛmɔ ɔziã nɔ ɛ.

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: Aya atráxwa litsi le ní kude gyɔgyɔɔ aʋa aaki kupèpè kwiaba banama gi bɛɛkpɛ mlɔ kupèpèo aʋa a,

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: lɛ aaki mlɔ banama gi mleepe e, ani blɔ fɛ ɔnadɔdɔ. Nite liaze xe Ɔkaɛ Yesu aadɔ lifunu ne ni kifu u, ani yɛ baxwɛdzɛ gagla ba,

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: atɔ aahe kutu kí banama gi bazɛ Aya a, ani banama gi béxo blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu yɛ Liboe Gbã nɛ oto e.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Ba kutuheheo kwiaze kuzizizizi petee, kulɛlɛ dɔni Ɔkaɛ aŋu mɛ ani yɛ kudradra kigagla mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: La ya pɔ́ aaba la mɛ ní Liwe lɛ klɔ aʋa, tɔ yizɛ kudradra ɛdɔni yɛ banima petee kɔ ani kubùbù yo dɔni banama gi bɛziŋa klɔ ɛ. Mlɔ fɛ mlaze ba ole, lɛ ese linu si mlɛzi liboe lɛ gi kwisi mlɔ aʋa ɛɛŋa a.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso kuzɛɛxwa Aya ní mlɔ litukpo lipoe kakaa. Kuzeeʋi blɔ Aya si, tɔ ɔkisi mlapɛ̀ aki ligba ɛ nɛ gi lɛ loso axwa mlɔ si mleze e. Atɔ gani yɛ kigaglɛ mɛ ɛ, ɔbitɛ mlɔ kupɛ́pɛɔ petee aʋa akí bidɔ gbã ɛ mɛ gi mlɛɛpɛ si mlɛɛbitɛ ɛ, ani tɔ ɔgù mlɔ axwɛ na gi mlɛwa ɛ gi mlɛziŋa loso o.

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: Kwigyo edi si gani kudeo liɔ ya onu i, blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu yɛ linyi ne liazɛ Kusudra gani mlɔ ligbã́zeze ne me, lɛ mlɔ kyɛ ɛ, mlazɛ gani yɛ mɛ, dɔni blɔ Aya ani Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: Maki mlɔ litukpo mɛ benemi ba, ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu yɛ Kristo kubabaa, ni blɔ likpɔkpɛkpɛ lɛ ni yɛ su kuzeze su i,

english_verse: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
translation_verse: mlakípisa ní mlɔ bedgyodi ʋa mɛ loo, tɔ mlawɔli ku ní kemeno mɛ si blɔ Ɔkaɛ yɛ liwe le liza kooko. Mlakízi banima eboe panipani la si kwipani lɛ ɛplɛ loo si kwiŋlimi nɛ ɛkpɛ ní keplekpa mɛ.

english_verse: But don't be fooled! People will rebel against God. Then before the Lord returns, the wicked one who is doomed to be destroyed will appear.
translation_verse: Mlakíki si ɔnɔnɔ omeni mlo ní kudeo tɔtɔ onu u. Lɛ liwe le litrába kɔzɛna ni keduyɔyɔ gɔgɔa kɛba a, xe ɔnɔ zimizi ye e, gi yɛ linu si ɔtrɛ ní kifu moni ye me aŋu i.

english_verse: He will brag and oppose everything holy or sacred. He will even sit in God's temple and claim to be God.
translation_verse: Yɛ atráyɔ kedu ya ní aya kakaa elu, loo kidɔ kakaa gi bize sumu i su i, kɔ akɔ isu ya edu bɛ petee onu i. Yɛ kura aatiku ní Aya yɛ lisɔligba lɛ mɛ lɛ aaxwa isu ya si Aya a.

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Mláplɛ aŋu na a? Masi mlɔ la ya lipoe lɛ gi meze ní mlɔ su i.

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ kiditɔ kitsi kudeonu iiki yɛ abla, lɛ mlete ke. Ní lipoe gbã nɛ aʋa ɛ, ɔnɔ zimizi ye aaŋwi.

english_verse: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ litumu ne kutu monumonu yo kigaglaɛ ɛ, kiwa axwɛ na kooko, pɔ̀ liboe lɛ gi liaba ɛ, lítraba kɔzɛna ni si Aya ebu ɔniliɛ klɔ gi eetsi le kudeonu izanɔ.

english_verse: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
translation_verse: Kɔ able ke Aya ebu ɔnɔ zimizi ye edono e, pɔ̀ xegi Ɔkaɛ Yesu aba ɛ, aaye ye ni yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ gi ɛdɔni yɛ onugu lo mɛ lɛ aazizi ɔniliɛ klɔ ní yɛ kusudraa a.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ zimizi ye aaba ní Satana yɛ kigagla ɛ mɛ, lɛ aabitɛ asia na enugutseboe glegle ani eboe gi banima bamɔ edi i.

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: Lɛ aakɔ̀ litukpo me gagla, ni kunɔmeno kakaa elu komeno banama gi biakyrɔ ɛ. Biakyrɔ lɛ ese linu si bázɛ liboe le e, lɛ bádimɛ ni anukwarɛɛ gi yɛ aaki si biamɔ kubúbú u.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e Aya aatsisi ba motemote gagla ɔtɔ gi aaki si biazɛ asia na aʋa ŋa a.

english_verse: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
translation_verse: Gani lɛ mɛ, ɛ banama pɔ́ gi bázɛ anukwarɛɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ, xe bɛmɔ isami nɛ ni eboe zimizi na kubitɛbitɛɔ ɛ, Aya aabu ba lipɔ. Paulo akpɛ ɔna ba lipo tɔ balɛɛ gaglaa

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Benemi ba, lilɛ si kudo Aya ɖase lipoe kakaa ní mlɔ litukpo, mlɔ banama gi Ɔkaɛ alɔ ɛ. Lilɛ nite si Aya akya mlɔ dɔni ɔtɔpu kɔ ŋwisi banɔ tɔpu kí kubúbú gani Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ lɔ kigaglaɛ mɛ, tɔ babitɛ mlɔ yɛ banɔ dradra ba, ní mlɔ kuziŋa ní anukwarɛɛ mɛ.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Aya axwa mlɔ aki lɛ ya gani Liboe Gbã nɛ gi kwipani iki mlɔ mɛ ɛ; yɛ axwa mlɔ atɔ mlaazi mlɔ ɔŋakɔ ní kuklekle me ni blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, blɔ benemi ba, mlalɛɛ mɔmɔmɔ, atɔ mlevu anukwarɛ mɛ ní awla gi kwibasɛ mlɔ ɛ, ní blɔ bidɔ basɛbasɛ ʋɛ ani ní blɔ kuplekpa ŋwlimiŋwlimi yɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
translation_verse: Tɔ blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ ɔtutɔ ni Aya blɔ Ɔka gi alɔ blɔ ɛ, xe gani yɛ lipomepɛpɛ mɛ ɛ, akpɛ ɔna ní blɔ lipo lipoe kakaa, xe aki blɔ kudeonudidi gbã ɛ.

english_verse: will encourage you and help you always to do and say the right thing.
translation_verse: Kwiʋi si ɔkpɛ mlɔ kigagla tɔ ɔkpɛ ɔna ni mlɔ lipo tɔ mlabitɛ eboe gbã lipoe kakaa ani tɔ mlapani Liboe Gbã kakaa.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: Gɔgɔ ɛ, blɔ benemi ba, mlazɛxwa Aya ní blɔ litukpo tɔ Ɔkaɛ yɛ Liboe le linè onugu kìse ìse, tɔ bazɛ lɛ ni kubùbù, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi lize ní mlɔ kusi i.

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: Mlaxwa Aya tɔ obu blo ní banɔ nyani nyani ni litukpo me gagla benete ba iwla mɛ; lɛ ese linu si aní ɔnɔ kakaa yɛ azɛ Liboe Gbã nɛ aʋa aŋa a.

english_verse: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Ɔkaɛ onu ɔnɔ gi biaziɔnɔ ɔ, lɛ aakpɛ mlɔ kigagla a, kɔ ewe mlo ní ozimizi ye su i.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: Lɛ likla trɔtrɔ lilɛ ní blɔ awla ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ mɛ, lɛ kwizi lɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa si mlɛɛbitɛ, lɛ mlɛzɛbitɛ ní eboa la gi kwisi mlɔ aʋa a.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: Atɔ Ɔkaɛ ɔki mlɔ kesenunu glegle ki yɛ kulɔlɔ ɔ, ani igyidodo ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Kristo izɛkɔ kinɛ ɛ. Lilɛ si Lixwɛwawa lize ní ɔnɔ Kakaa awla

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: Blɔ benemi ba, kwikpɛ ɔsã ɛki mlɔ ní Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo linyi ne me si, mlebú isu lidze ní benemi ba ya gi benu basranɛ ani banama gi bɛyurɔ awla ní blɔ kudɔbasɛ yɔ su i su.

english_verse: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
translation_verse: Mlɔ ɔtutɔ mlete le mɔmɔɔmɔ si lilɛ si mlabitɛ ní blɔ kibitɛɛ aʋa ɖii. Kúze basranɛ lipoe lɛ klɔ gi kwiize ní mlɔ kusi i.

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: Kúzɛ ɔnɔnɔ yɛ kupɔnɔ gi kútsa liʋɛ kɔ litukpo o. Nite me ke kwiwa axwɛ na ni kupèpè; lɛ kwizɛwa axwɛ na elesi ni kemize atɔ kukíze lidɔtu iiki mlɔ mɛ ɔtɔtɔ ɔ.

english_verse: We had the right not to work, but we wanted to set an example for you.
translation_verse: Kwibitɛ lɛ ya, aní si kúmɔ kude si kwaʋi mlɔ kupɔnɔ ɔ; boŋu i, kwibitɛ nite tɔ kuze kuŋudra gi kɔ mlaakpasi i.

english_verse: We also gave you this rule: If you don't work, you don't eat.
translation_verse: Agi kwize ní mlɔ kusi i, kwizɛsi mlɔ si, “Ɔniliɛ gi egbe si yɛ ɔ́trawa lixwɛxwɛ ɛ, mlakíki yɛ bidɔ tɔ ɔŋa a.”

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: Nite kwipani, lɛ ese linu si kwinu si banɔ batɔ balɛ ní mlɔ kusi gi benu basranɛ ɛ, lɛ baʋíbitɛ kididɔ sani si bazɛkpɛ onugu ní banɔ dzedze ba eboe la mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: Ní Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo linyi ne me e, kwikpɛ ɔsã lɛ kwigba banɔ ba ya si bekyi tɔ beze ligbã́ gbã tɔ bawa axwɛ atɔ bakɔ apɛ ba tutɔ ba lìklã nɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ní mlɔ mɛ benemi ba a, liboe gbã kubitɛ kukípè mlo o.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Liatani lɛ mɛ kuba si ɔnutɔ ní mlɔ mɛ ɔ́traxo liboe lɛ gi kwiŋlimi kimlɔ ní keplekpa lia ya mɛ oto o. Xegi nite e, mlakpɛ yɛ lixaŋu tɔ mlakíbitɛ kididɔ ni yɛ ɛ, tɔ kuye kùku ye e.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlakibitɛ yɛ ŋwisi ahwafiɔnɛ ɛ; boŋu i, mlagba yɛ ŋwisi onemi nɛ kinɛ ɛ. Eboe gɔgɔ la

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Tɔ blɔ Ɔkaɛ ɔtutɔ, gi yɛ onu blɔ kusuyɔ ɔdɔ́klɔ ɛ, ɔki mlɔ kusuyɔ lipoe kakaa ní kude kakaa onu. Ɔkaɛ oze ni mlɔ petee.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Meʋi blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ si lize ni mlɔ petee.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Keplekpaa lia ya kɛdɔ ní mɛ Paulo gi menu Kristo Yesu yɛ ɔnɔkpɛkpɛ yɛ yɛ klɔ ɔ, ɔnɔ gi bɛkpɛ ɛ, ní Aya blɔ Ɔnɔbu ye ni Kristo Yesu gi yɛ kudeonu kwidi i, ba kigaglaɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: Mɛɛŋwlimi ka ɛki Timoteo, mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ obi ní kuziŋaa mɛ: Meʋi Kaka Aya ni Yesu Kristo blɔ Ɔkaɛ tɔ bapɛ lipo me aki mlɔ, bedi mlo asigaga ani tɔ baki mlɔ kusuyɔ. Paulo agba ba si bedi mumɔ ní asia badɔbasɛ ba su.

english_verse: When I was leaving for Macedonia, I asked you to stay on in Ephesus and warn certain people there to stop spreading their false teachings.
translation_verse: Kiliɛ gi masi wɔ ɔ, lipoe lɛ gi mazasɛ̀ atrɛ ni Makedonia ɛ, mapɛ si ze ní Efeso ɔma nɔ me. Benyimeatɔ bɛɛbasɛ bidɔ gi biga lidze e, ni kidiliɛ gi kwibasɛ ní Yesu Kristo aʋa kuziŋaa su u. Liziã si wɔatsí kudeo ki ba kiboebitɛ liɛ ya.

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: Ki tɔ bamɔni kudzídzi yɔ kuta ani tɔ bamɔni siŋanɛ kpaŋukpaŋu sɛ kusrɔ. La ya petee izɛɛmani eboe hehe, lɛ aʋíki si Aya axwɛ na aatrɛ ɔtɔ gi la mɛ pɔ Aya aʋa kuziŋaa kulɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You must teach people to have genuine love, as well as a good conscience and true faith.
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ loso gi maki wɔ ɔsã lɔ ya kɛ kinu si i, kitɔ baʋaziŋa ba beze ní kunɔlɔ gi kwidɔ ɔna gbã mɛ ɛ, begyodi dradra mɛ, ni kuziŋaa ɔtutɔ mɛ.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Banɔatɔ bɛlila, lɛ bekyi kede kpɛ la ya a, lɛ bɛkɔ otro pluplu ete kunu yo xe bɛtrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: Bɛpɛ si beeze Mose ɔsã nɔ lɔ badɔbasɛ, pɔ̀ béte kidiliɛ gi kɛ su bɛɛpani i, loo kidiliɛ gi kɛ aʋa bɛɛka a.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: Kwite si Mose ɔsã nɔ ɛpɛ xe bɛwa lɔ su axwɛ mumɔ ɛ.

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: Bɛkpɛ lɛ ɛki bamamɛga ba, benyime ba ya gi bizɛfɛ ni ba ahanuglɔ benyime ba, ni badzɛ gi bizɛfɛ ni ba ahanuglɔ badzɛ ba, banama gi bizɛɛga kanɔ́dzia, ni banɔdzidzi ba, banɔmeno ba, kí basia nɛ ba gi bizɛɛtàni bidɔ mɛ ɛ, ani kidɔ kakaa gi kiyɔ kedu ní kudɔbasɛ gbã su u,

english_verse: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
translation_verse: Medo Kristo Yesu gi onu blɔ Ɔkaɛ ɖase e, si aki mɛ kigagla kí yɛ axwɛ na. Medo ye ɖase gi azɛ mɛ aʋa aŋa a, xe ebú me si misumu ye e.

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: Meze ɔnɔ gi tsa ɛ, mapani ebusioboe amani yɛ su, lɛ metí ye e, lɛ meze ɔnyraga a. Pɔ̀ Aya edi me asigaga a, lɛ ese linu si mabitɛ la ya ní kumetemete ni kumɔziŋa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: Lɛ blɔ Ɔkaɛ ewlo ni me ni yɛ lipomepɛpɛ glegle le, kɔpɔni kuziŋa ni kunɔlɔ gi bidɔ ní Yesu Kristo me e.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: Liboe lɛ ya linu anukwarɛ liboe gi liziã si ɔnɔ kakaa ɔzɛ lɛ aʋa ŋa a, si Yesu Kristo aba kelea lia mɛ si yibu banɔ zimizi ba, lɛ mɛ menu ɔnɔ zimizi sani ba petee e,

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: pɔ̀ kɔkpɛ lɛ ya loso e, Aya edi me asigaga atɔ gani mɛ banɔ zimizi ba ɔkaɛ aʋa ɛ, Kristo Yesu aabasɛ yɛ litɔplɛplɛkese kese gi liʋi blo o, ŋwisi liŋwitsɛ kinɛ ki banama gi biazɛ yɛ aʋa ŋa a, xe biamɔ ligbã́ moblo le e.

english_verse: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mlaki tɔ kukpɔ̀ blɔ Okusi ye gi ɔlɛ dɔni kanɔmɛ tsini kanɔmɛ, gi óʋitse e, gi ɔ́ʋiŋwi, Aya tolee, yɛ binɛ binu kubùbù yo ni kusudraa kɔtsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ! Atɔ liba lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: Timoteo, mɛ obinyimee, maki wɔ ɔsã lɔ ya kɔkpɛ eboa la gi bɛpani plɛ ní wɔ su i. Wa eboa la ya su axwɛ ŋwisi wɔ bigutadɔ kinɛ ɛ, tɔ wɔata kigũ gbã.

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: Ze ní wɔ kuziŋa ni wɔ begyodi gbã ʋa aʋa a. Banɔatɔ béxo eboa la ya oto o, lɛ bɛlila ba kuziŋa ŋwisi kiliɛ gi banɔ bɛzɛɛlila ba kude kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: Himenayo ni Aleksandro beze ní banɔaklɔ ba kusi, lɛ mehe kutu aki ba gi makɔ ba akí Ozimizi ye; gi biaki si biamɔni ebusioboe la kupani tsini Aya su u.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: Ní okpese kɔ ɛ, mapɛ si mlete si lilɛ si mleʋi bidɔ, mlafa ní banɔ litukpo, mlaxwa Aya ní ɔnɔ kakaa litukpo, lɛ mledo Aya ɖase ní kidiliɛ gi abitɛ aki ɔnɔ kakaa a,

english_verse: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
translation_verse: kí bekusi ba ni banama petee gi bedi ní banɔ onu i, tɔ kwiaze ní kusuyɔ ɔ, ni ligbã́ gi lidɔ kpoo me e, atɔ kwiaze ligba kiliɛ gi Aya apɛ ɛ, ani tɔ blɔ su iadra.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: Aya kuxwaxwa ni banima litukpo te e, kwipɛ̀ lɛ kuzeeku Aya blɔ Obúbú ye aŋu u,

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: gi yɛ apɛ si ɔnɔ kakaa a, ɔmɔ kubúbú tɔ ote anukwarɛɛ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Aya tole ɔlɛ, ɔnɔ tole ɔlɛ gi yɛ ɔlɛ ní Aya ni banima kusi i, yɛ onu Yesu Kristo,

english_verse: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso Aya edu me ɔklakla ni ɔnɔkpɛkpɛ, ani Liboe Gbã nɛ ɔdɔbasɛ kí banama gi bénu Yudanɛ ɛ, ní kuziŋaa ni anukwarɛɛ mɛ ɛ, máʋisɛ asia a.

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Lɛ xe mlɛtsa si mleesumu Aya ɛ, mapɛ si benyime ba baxwa Aya ni ba iwla lɛ ní lifune, gi kusuyeʋi loo eboe hehe atráze ní lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: Mapɛ fɛ si badzɛ ba beze mumɔ ní ba bidɔkpɛkpɛ ʋɛ mɛ, tɔ bakpɛ ewu Gbã; aní ni siya kunyánya ede ede, loo ni sika ni ihwia, loo ni basa gi bɛzi kedzi i,

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: pɔ̀ ní eboe gbã kubitɛ mɛ, gi ɛsrɔnɔ ɔ, ɛki badzɛa ba gi bete si beesumu Aya ɛ.

english_verse: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
translation_verse: Lilɛ si badzɛ ba badɔ zĩi, tɔ babùbɔ isu ya, atɔ bakpasi bidɔ.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: Máki ba kudeonu si ba basɛ bidɔ loo bamɔ kigagla ní benyime ba aʋa a; pɔ̀ ba dà ba inugu le e.

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Lɛ aní Adam ozimizi ye emeno o; boŋu i, ɔdzɛɛ yɛ bemeno xe ata Aya yɛ ɔsã nɔ ɛse e.

english_verse: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ biaabu ɔdzɛ gani yɛ kubipɔ mɛ ɛ, xe alɛɛ gagla ní kuziŋa, kunɔlɔ, kusudra ni isu aʋa kuŋaŋa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
translation_verse: Liboe lɛ ya linu anukwarɛ si, xe ɔnutɔ apɛ si yiwa ɔha ɔʋadi ye axwɛ ɛ, yɛ kupɛpɛɔ kunu kugbã.

english_verse: That's why officials must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. They must be self-controlled, sensible, well-behaved, friendly to strangers, and able to teach.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso líma si kesetataa tɔtɔ keze ní ɔha lɔ ɔʋadi ye su u; lilɛ si ɔdzɛ tole ko oze ní yɛ awla, ɔbùbɔ̀ isu ya, ɔŋa isu aʋa, kubùbù kuze ní yɛ su, oze ɔnɔ gi izɛzi bababa ɛkpɛ ní yɛ kepea mɛ ɛ, lilɛ si ɔtani bidɔ kubasɛ;

english_verse: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
translation_verse: líma si oze ɔdaŋwɛ loo ɔnɔ gi izɛɛwa anyra a, pɔ̀ oze ɔnɔ gi izɛɛplɛ litɔ kese e, oze ɔnɔ gi óʋigu avitɛ ɛ, líma si oze ɔnɔ gi adimɛ ni kibɔ ɔ;

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: lilɛ si ɔgani yɛ kepea mɔmɔɔmɔ atɔ ɔki Yebi ba benu kutu aki yɛ ɛ, atɔ baki yɛ kubùbù ni kapɛ kakaa mɛ.

english_verse: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
translation_verse: Xegi onyime óte kiliɛ gi aaga ni yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kepaɛ ɛ, kitɛ aatani Aya yɛ ɔha lɔ aʋa kudi i?

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Líma si oze ɔnɔ vuvu ní kuziŋa mɛ ɛ, xe aní nite e, yɛ litukpo le liaye ni kusufeke, kɔ Aya ebu ye lipɔ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi ebu ozimizi ye lipɔ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
translation_verse: Lilɛ si oze ɔnɔ gi banama gi báma ní baʋaziŋa ba ɔha lɔ mɛ kyɛ ɛ, bizɛkpɛ kubùbù ní yɛ su, atɔ bakíkpɛ yɛ kuye e, tɔ aawɔli ku ní ozimizi ye yɛ kupe me. Banɔpɔnɔ ba Ní Ɔha lɔ mɛ

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: Lilɛ si bevu kuziŋaa kɔ anukwarɛɛ yɛ kidzudzu ye mɛ gi Aya ebu abasɛ ɛ, ni ɔna dradra.

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: Lilɛ si befeke ba edi ní ɔtɔpu kɔ, lɛ xe bɛga lɛ mɛ edo e, lɛ ko biasumu ŋwisi ɔha lɔ banɔpɔnɔ ba kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
translation_verse: Lilɛ si ba bedze ba fɛ ɛ, ligbã́ gbã lize ní ba awla, bakíze onugutro begugu u; ba bùbɔ isu ya tɔ baplɛ litɔ kese, lilɛ si beze banɔ gi biazɛ ba aʋa aŋa ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: Mledi le aʋa si ɔdzɛ tole ko aaze ní Ɔha lɔ ɔnɔpɔnɔɛ awla, tɔ odi yɛ bebi ba ni yɛ kepea aʋa mɔmɔɔmɔ.

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: Banɔpɔnɔ ba klɔ gi bɛwa ba axwɛ na mɔmɔɔmɔ ɛ, biamɔ ɔlɛkɔ gbã kí isu ya, lɛ biapani lifumose ní ba kuziŋa su ní Yesu Kristo me. Liboe Kpokpo Ʋidi le

english_verse: I hope to visit you soon. But I am writing these instructions,
translation_verse: Agi mɛɛŋwlimi keplekpa lia ya ɛki wɔ kyɛ ɛ, mapɛ si maaba di wo kpekpemi i.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani lɛ kunada si tɔ kuze ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Aya apɛ ɛ, linu liboe kpokpo ni linugutseboe ʋidi i: “Ebu isu ya abasɛ ni ɔnɔ kilɛlɛ mɛ, Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛbasɛ si aŋwɛ eyi, lɛ Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba bɛmɔ yɛ ɛ. Bɛ sɔli yɛ ní amade na kusi, banɔ glegle bɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa ní kelea pɔ́ mɛ, lɛ befeke ye ní kuklekle me tsini lifunu ne e.”

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Ɔfuɛfuɛ dradra lɔ ɛdra lɛ mɛ si ní ewe gɔgɔ la mɛ ɛ, banɔatɔ bɛtráyurɔ ba kuziŋa; lɛ biazeni asia na ifuɛfuɛ nɛ kude e, lɛ biazɛ kudɔbasɛ uliɔ gi ifuɛfuɛ zimizi ne izɛbasɛ ɛ.

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: Kudɔbasɛ uliɔ klɔ ʋa ɛ, kwidɔ ní kulagadzekpa basia nɛ gi ba ina nɛ itse e, ŋwisi ɔlaa kpikpi bɛkɔ ɛkani ba kinɛ ɛ kɔ.

english_verse: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
translation_verse: Banɔaklɔ ba bizɛɛbasɛ bidɔ si benyime ba bakígbani badzɛ ɛ, loo si badzɛ ba bakízeni benyime e. Lɛ bizɛɛbasɛ si banima bakíŋa bidɔŋaŋaɛtɔ gi Aya abitɛ ɛ, si banama gi bɛziŋa a, xe bete anukwarɛ ɛ, baŋa tɔ bedo Aya ɖase ni bɛ litukpo.

english_verse: Everything God created is good. And if you give thanks, you may eat anything.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si kidɔ kakaa gi Aya abitɛ ɛ, kipɛ̀; mlakígbe kididɔ ɔ, xegi mlɛzi kɛ ní Aya kuxwaxwa ni ɖase kudodo me e.

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Aya liboe le ni yɛ kuxwaxwaa kwidra kiŋaŋaɛ klɔ su u.

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: Xegi wɔbasɛ benemi ba batrɔtrɔ ʋa ya ɛ, wɔaze ɔnɔsumu gbã kí Yesu Kristo ní kiliɛ gi bɛgani wɔ ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ɛ, ní kuziŋa anukwarɛ ni kudɔbasɛ gbã liɔ gi kɔ kude wozeno me e.

english_verse: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
translation_verse: Kúkpɛ ɔha ni kelea lia mɛ eboe ni kudzídzi pluplu gi kúbu libi i, boŋu i, he isu ki ligbã́zeze gbã ŋwisi ɔʋaziŋa kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: Kuzɛɛŋwlɛ lɛ kuzɛɛkpɛ ikù nɛ, lɛ ese linu si kwikɔ blɔ kudeonudidi yo kpɛ ní Aya gi ɔlɛ ligbã́ nɛ ɛ, yɛ awla. Yɛ onu ɔnɔbu ye ɔki ɔnɔ kakaa, lilɛ gi liplànɔ ɛ, ki banama gi bɛziŋa ɛ.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Kɔ̀ eboa la ya kɔ̀basɛ ba bidɔ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Wukíki kudeonu tɔ ɔnɔnɔ ɔmɔ wɔ ese e, gi ɔyasɔʋi ko wonu loso o, pɔ̀ ze liŋwitsɛ kí banama a, gi bɛziŋa ɛ gani wɔ kunugu yo me e, wɔ kizezee me, wɔ kunɔlɔɔ mɛ, wɔ kuziŋaa ni wɔ kudradra mɛ.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Kɔzɛna ni liwe lɛ gi maaba ɛ, kɔ wɔ lipoe le ni wɔ kuŋwlɛŋwlɛɔ kí liboe le kuklàklà ni ɔha lɔ kusi, ki Aya liboe le kudodo ni kudɔbasɛ.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Wukíyurɔ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ bidɔkɔkɔɛ bɛ klɔ gi bikpasi ní wɔ mɛ ɛ, gi bɛki wɔ gani kuboedoplɛ mɛ ɛ lipoe lɛ gi banɔtsi ba bɛtrɔ awla ní wɔ aʋa a.

english_verse: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
translation_verse: Bitɛ eboa la ya tɔ kɔ isu kpɛ ní la mɛ lipoe kakaa, tɔ ɔtɔ kutrɛtrɛ ní wɔ ligbã́ nɛ mɛ ɛ, kwiaŋwi ki ɔnɔ kakaa tɔ biamɔ.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Vu aŋu ní wɔ isu ya su, tɔ vu aŋu ní wɔ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ su mumɔ. Kpɛ ikù nɛ ní la kubitɛɔ mɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si xe wɔbitɛ nite e, wɔabu isu ya nì banɔaklɔ gi bizeenu wɔ liboe le e.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
