translation_verse: Wukítɛni onyime gi etsi asani wɔ, pɔ̀ Gbã yɛ ŋwisi wɔka kinɛ ɛ, tɔ vu iyasɔʋi lɛ ŋwisi wɔ beneminyime kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: Kɔ badzɛtsitsi ba ŋwisi wɔ bene kinɛ ɛ, ni idisami nɛ ŋwisi wɔ benemidzɛ kinɛ, ze ní kudradra mɛ nì ba.

english_verse: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe bebi balɛ ní badzɛa ya awla a, loo besoebi balɛ ni ba awla ɛ, ki tɔ bakpasi lɛ adɔ ni ɔtɔpu kɔ si, xegi beedi ba benete ba aʋa ɛ, bɛwa ba kusɔliɔ su axwɛ ni kɔ kudeonu. Gani lɛ ya mɛ ɛ, beedzini aʋɛ ana gi bɛɛdɔ ní ba bapɔnɛ ba su i, beedzini la ɛtsa ɛki ba, lɛ lɛ ya lizeeku Aya aŋu u.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Ɔdzɛ liɛ gi yenye etse e, xe yɛ tete ko ɔlɛ ɛ, xe ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́ma gi aadi yɛ aʋa ɛ, akɔ yɛ kudeonudidi yo petee akpɛ ní Aya awla, lɛ izɛɛxwa Aya elesi ni kemize lɛ izeeʋi ye kupɔnɔ ɔ.

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔtrɛtrɛ yedze liɛ ɛ, gi aakɔ̀ isu akí ligbã́ kuŋaŋa ɛ, etse ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ kooko gi ɔlɛ ligbã́ nɛ kyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Kɔ batrɔtrɔ ʋa ya ki ba, atɔ ɔnɔnɔ ɔkibu ɔnɔnɔ lipɔ ɔ.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe ɔnutɔ ɔ́kɔ lɛ mɛ ɔki yɛ benete ba a, loo yɛ bapɔnɛ ba ɛ, alila yɛ kuziŋaa lɛ anyani asani ɔmɔziŋa a.

english_verse: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
translation_verse: Lɛ bete ye si izɛɛbitɛ eboe gbã; ɔdzɛ gi ete bebi kiganɔ ɔ, izɛzi bababa ba, izeesumu yɛ ahanuglɔ baʋaziŋa ba, izɛpɔni banama gi balɛ ní kuxixa mɛ ɛ, lɛ akɔ isu akɔ akí liboe gbã kakaa kubitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ wukíkpɛ badzɛ ba ya gi bétsi i xe ba benye ba betse e, enyi na ní la mɛ; lɛ ese linu si xe ba kusuŋwasiɔ kwiŋa ba aʋa ɛ, biayurɔ Yesu kpɛ ní kedea kɔ bazeedi ni benyime e,

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: Kɔpɔnɔ ɛ, gi kididɔ kíma a, gi biabitɛ ɛ, bizɛɛga ɛklanɔ dɔni kepe me tsini kepe me; lɛ linyaninyani nɛ linu si i, bátradzi basranɛ tètè e; pɔ̀ gi bɛkpasi onugutro lo kugugu yo e, kɔ bɛga kagadu ya kɔ bɛpani eboe pluplu ala gi líma si bazɛɛpani i.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, maapɛ si badzɛa ba gi bétsi i, xe ba benye ba betse e, beze ni benyime, tɔ bapɔ̀, atɔ bedi ba kupeo aʋa, tɔ bakíki ahwafiɔnɛɛ kudeonu si ozizi blɔ su u.

english_verse: Look what's already happened to some of the young widows! They have turned away to follow Satan.
translation_verse: Badzɛatɔ gi ba benye ba betse e, bɛlila kooko gi bali ni ozimizi ye kude e.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe badzɛ gi ba benye ba betse e, xe balɛ ní ɔʋaziŋa ɔdzɛ ɛtɔ kepe me e, lɛ kɔ odi ba aʋa tɔ ɔkikɔ ba lidɔtu le kɔɛtrɔ ní ɔha lɔ aʋa a, atɔ ɔha lɔ pɔ̀ odi báklɔ gi ɔpɔnɔpɔnɔ ɔ́ma ní ba awla ɛ aʋa.

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Banɔtsitsia klɔ gi bizɛɛgbani baʋaziŋa ba ɔha lɔ ɛ, begyeno si baki ba kubùbù glegle ni liʋɛ, sanɔ ɛ, ki banama gi bizɛɛpani Liboe Gbã nɛ ɛ, xe bizɛɛbasɛ bidɔ mɛ kyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si kuŋwlimi dradraa kwipani si, “Wukínya onugu lo ɛki ligume ne gi wɔɛkɔ ehe lihɔkla nɛ ɛ” ani “Lilɛ si batsà liʋɛ akí ɔxwɛwa yɛ.”

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Wukíxo ɔnɔ onu kutsatsa kutu ní ɔnɔtsitsi ye su u, xe aní banɔ tiaʋa loo sanɔ bɛmani kunutsatsa a.

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: Tɛni banama gi bɛta kese ní ɔhá lɔ kusi i, tɔ lifu liku banɔ gɔgɔ ba.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: Ní Aya, Yesu Kristo ani Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba aŋu mɛ ɛ, maxwa wɔ si xo batrɔtrɔ ba ya pɔ́ oto, tɔ wukídi banɔ aŋu mɛ, loo tɔ di ɔnutɔ asigaga ní wɔ kigaglaɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Wukíkɔsi si wutrɔ awla ní ɔnɔ aʋa kí Ɔkaɛ yɛ axwɛwawa la a. Wukítrɔ ni banima eboe zimizi na aʋa a, vu isu ya tɔ ki wɔ isu idra a.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: Wukíŋwɛ kuni tètè ko, pɔ̀ ŋwɛ wain yɛ taʋɛ tɔ ɔpɔni wɔ lipo le me, gi lipo le me lizɛta wɔ lipoe me ni lipoe me e.

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Banɔatɔ bá eboe zimizi na ɛɛŋwi gi ɔnɔ kakaa ɛɛmɔ ɛ, lɛ ba kuzimizi yo kwiku ba ɔtɔ ɛtrɛ ní otsixwaklɔ ɔ; pɔ̀ banɔ dzedze ba ba eboe zimizi na aaŋwi lɛ kede e.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Niteme ke bidɔ gbã kubitɛ ɛ, kuzɛɛŋwi, lɛ la klɔ gi la su ádra kyɛ ɛ, bátratani la kukpo o.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Si Banama gi benu banɔdzidzi i, xe bali ní kunɔsumu ese e si, bebù ba baka ba ní kapɛ kakaa mɛ, atɔ ɔnɔnɔ ɔkipani eboe zimizi mani Aya linyi ne ni blɔ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ su.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: Banɔdzidzi ba ba gi balɛ ní basɔlisɔli ba kaʋadi ese e, bakídi ba baka ba aŋu mɛ, gi benu benemi loso o. Boŋu i, lilɛ si besumu ba sanɔ, lɛ ese linu si banama gi bɛmɔ libi bu ní ba axwɛ na mɛ ɛ, benu baʋaziŋa gi bɛdimɛ nɔ ɛ. Eboa la ɛzia si wɔabasɛ xe wɔaze ɔkpɛ ba kigagla a. Asia kudɔbasɛ ni Kuxixa liɔ gi kulɛ ní exo la kupɛpɛ su u

english_verse: Anyone who teaches something different disagrees with the correct and godly teaching of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi aabasɛ kidɔ dzedzeetɔ ɔ, gi kíma ni baʋaziŋa ba kudeonu u, xe ɔ́trazɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ Liboe Gbã nɛ ni kusɔliɔ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ ɛ,

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: eyi ni kusudɔ lɛ ónu eboe ese e. Adimɛ nì, eboe hehe ni kuboeŋwlɛ, gi kuzɛɛmani kaŋuza a, eboe ese kumonumonu, banɔ su kuzizi, ni begyodi zimizi,

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: ani eboe hehe lipoe kakaa ni banama gi ba begyodi ʋa baʋíwa axwɛ na a, xe anukwarɛɛ ɔ́ma ní bamɛ tɔ ɔ. Bizeebù si Aya kusumu yo kunu kudeo tɔ onu gi wɔaga xe wɔamɔ kibɔ ɛ.

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Aya kusumu yo ni isami i, kuzebu libi ɛki yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si kúmani kididɔ kelea mɛ ɛ, gi bɛpɔ blɔ ɔ, lɛ kútratani kididɔ kúkɔsɛnɔ ní kelea lia mɛ xe kwitse e.

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: Kɔlɔ, xe kiŋaŋa ni ewu alɛ blɔ awla ɛ, linu si biku blɔ liŋu.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ banama gi bizɛɛpɛ si bɛɛmɔ exo e, bizɛɛdɔ eku ní kufekedi me lɛ bizɛɛdɔ ozimizi ye kùpe ni begyodi zimizi, olése zimizi gi kuzɛɛgbani ba ɛtsinɔ kuzizi ni kukyrɔkyrɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si kibɔɛ kudimɛnɔ ɛ, kɔ kunu kuzimizi yo pɔ́ kɔ okpese klɔ. Banɔatɔ ɔkpɛ gi bɛŋwlɛ si bɛmɔ exo la loso e, bɛlila ní ba kuziŋaa mɛ, lɛ bɛkpɛ isu ebi gani lɛ mɛ ɛ. Lɛ ní wɔ kuziŋaa aʋa

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ wɔ gi wonu Aya yɛ ɔnɛ ɛ, se ní eboa la ya petee su. Ŋwlɛ kí eboe gbã, Aya kusese, kuziŋa, kulɔlɔ, eboe onu kulɛlɛ, ni litɔplɛplɛkese kese.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Ŋwlɛ ní wɔ kuziŋaa mɛ tɔ zi ligbã moblo le, gi lɛ loso Aya axwa wɔ ɛ, lipoe lɛ gi wɔdra ɔna mɛ ní banɔ glegle ba ya gi bɛɛŋa katsalia aŋu mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: Ní Aya gi yɛ izɛɛki kidɔ kakaa ligbã́ aŋu mɛ ɛ, ni Kristo Yesu, lipoe lɛ gi yɛ alɛɛ ní Pontio Pilato aŋu mɛ ɛ, xe azeebu isu ya onu i, xe adra isu mɛ ɛ, makpɛ ɔsã aki wɔ

english_verse: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: si wukíplà ní eboa la ya aʋa a, tɔ ɔnɔnɔ ɔkipani eboe zimizi ní wɔ su u, kɔzɛna ni lipoe lɛ klɔ gi blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo aaŋwi i.

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: Aya ɔtutɔ aaki Yesu Kristo aaŋwi ní lipoe gbã nɛ aʋa, Aya gi biakrira a, gi yɛ tètè ko onu Ɔʋaŋa ɛ, bekusi ba Okusi ye, ni baka ba Ɔkaɛ.

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
translation_verse: Yɛ ko oʋítse e; yɛ ɔlɛ ní kuklekle gagla gi ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani kutipɔnɔ mɛ ɛ. Yɛ gi ɔnɔnɔ ɔʋímɔ ʋidi i; xe ɔnɔnɔ fɛ ɔ́tratani kumɔ ɛ. Yɛ binɛ binu kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ ni kigagla kɔtsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ. Atɔ liba lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: Kpɛ ɔsã ki banama gi benu bexonete ba ní kelea lia mɛ si bakídɔ isu u, lɛ bakíkɔ ba aŋu atrɔ ní ba exo la aʋa a, boŋu i, bakɔ ba kudeonudidi yo atrɔ ní Aya gi yɛ izɛɛki blɔ kidɔ kakaa a, ní kisrɛsrɛ mɛ kí blɔ isami mɔmɔ nɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: Kpɛ ɔsã ki ba tɔ babitɛ eboe gbã, beze bexonete ní axwɛ gbã kuwawa mɛ, baki banɔ bidɔ, tɔ balɛ ba exo la ni banɔdzedze ba faã a.

english_verse: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
translation_verse: Gani lɛ mɛ ɛ, biabla exo kí isu ya gi biaaze ɔxɔ gagla kí ligbã́ɛ nɛ ɛ, gi litraba ní ɔtɔ nɔ mɛ ɛ. Tɔ biavu ligba ɛnɛ gi lɛ koŋ linu ligbã́ nɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: Timoteo, di kidiliɛ gi bɛkɔ ɛkpɛ ní wɔ awla ɛ aʋa. Kúta asasaboe ni agaboe kuhehe gi banɔatɔ bɛzɛxwa si “Kuboeteo” kutu u.

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Gi banɔatɔ bɛkɔ lɛ si bilɛ ní ba awla a, lɛ gani lɛ mɛ ɛ, bɛlila kudeo kí kuziŋaa. Aya ɔpɛ lipo me ɔki mlɔ.

english_verse: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus. God himself chose me to be an apostle, and he gave me the promised life that Jesus Christ makes possible.
translation_verse: Keplekpaa lia ya kɛdɔ ní mɛ Paulo kɔ gi menu Yesu Kristo yɛ ɔnɔkpɛkpɛ yɛ ní Aya yɛ kupɛpɛɔ onu u, gi bɛkpɛ ní ligbã́ moblo le kakaplɛa a, gi kalɛ ní Kristo Yesu me onu u.

english_verse: Timothy, you are like a dear child to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Christ Jesus will be kind and merciful to you and will bless you with peace! Do Not Be Ashamed of the Lord
translation_verse: Ki Timoteo, mɛ obi gi malɔ ɛ. Atɔ Kaka Aya ni Yesu Kristo blɔ Ɔkaɛ bapɛ lipo me aki wɔ tɔ bedi wo asigaga tɔ baki wɔ kusuyɔ. Paulo edo Aya ɖase lɛ akpɛ ɔna ní Timoteo lipo o

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: Medo Aya gi mizeesumu u, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi mɛ bakatsitsi ba bɛzɛɛbitɛ kinɛ ɛ, ɖase ni ɔna gi ɛdra ɛ. Mizɛɛplɛ aŋu ní wɔ aʋa elesi ni kemize xegi mɛɛxwa Aya ɛ.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: Maplɛ aŋu ní wɔ kubeo aʋa, lɛ linu mɛ kupɛ́pɛ si mimɔ wɔ, tɔ isami iaku me.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: Bɛplɛ aŋu iiki mɛ ní kuziŋa dzudzu liɔ klɔ gi kulɛ ní wɔ awla a su, kuziŋaa liɔ klɔ gi kwize ní wone tsitsi ye Loide ni wone Enike me e, gi bɛka lɛ aʋa ɛki mɛ si kulɛ ní wɔ kyɛ wɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mɛplɛ aŋu lɛ aʋa ɛki wɔ tɔ ki kidiliɛ gi Aya aki wɔ ɔ, lipoe lɛ gi matrɔ awla ní wɔ aʋa ɛ, ki tɔ kidzi kifu gi kiisɔ ní wɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God's Spirit doesn't make cowards out of us. The Spirit gives us power, love, and self-control.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Ɔfuɛfuɛ ɔnɔ klɔ gi Aya aki blɔ ɛ, aní lifu ɔnɛ ɛ; boŋu i, Ɔfuɛfuɛ gi ɛki blɔ kigagla a, kunɔlɔ ni isu aʋa kuŋaŋa.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso kuye kukíku wo xe wɔɛŋa katsalia ɛki blɔ Ɔkaɛ ɛ; loo tɔ se kuye ní mɛ su, gi malɛ ligba akí Kristo o. Boŋu i, pɔni mɛ tɔ kutu Liboe Gbã nɛ ɔzia kakaa gani kigaglaɛ gi Aya aki wɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: Ebu blo adɔ ni blɔ eboe zimizi na mɛ lɛ axwa blɔ tɔ kuze ligbã́ dradra, aní gani blɔ liboe gbã kubitɛ mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ gani yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kupɛpɛ ni lipomepɛpɛ mɛ. Aki blɔ lipomepɛpɛɛ lɛ ya gani Yesu Kristo me dɔni okpese klɔ ke,

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: lɛ abla ɛ, Aya ebu le abasɛ blɔ gani blɔ Ɔnɔbu ye Kristo Yesu me, gi yɛ aŋa kutseo kigaglaɛ aʋa a, lɛ gani Liboe Gbã nɛ mɛ ɛ, ebu ligbã́ moblo le abasɛ.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: Aya axwa mɛ ŋwisi ɔtɔ ɔnɔkpɛkpɛ ni ɔdɔbasɛ tɔ miklaa Liboe Gbã nɛ.

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: Lɛ kɔkpɛ eboa la ya loso mɛɛmɔ ɔzia lɔ ya elue e. Pɔ̀ kuye kuʋíku me e, lɛ ese linu si mete ɔniliɛ klɔ gi yɛ aʋa mazi aŋa ɛ, lɛ maka ní lɛ aʋa si aatani kidiliɛ klɔ gi makɔ akpɛ yɛ awla ɛ, aʋa kudi mɔmɔɔmɔ kɔzɛna ni liwe lɛ klɔ aʋa.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: Eboa la gi wonu dɔni mɔklɔ ɛ, vu na mɛ awla mɔmɔɔmɔ, ŋwisi liŋwitsɛ kinɛ ɛ, ki kudɔbasɛ gbã atɔ ze ní kuziŋaa ni kunɔlɔɔ, gi binu blɔ binɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Yesu Kristo me e.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Gani Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ kigaglaɛ gi kikpasi ní blɔ mɛ ɛ, vu bidɔ gbã ɛ mɛ gi bɛkɔ ɛkpɛ ni wɔ awla ɛ mɛ.

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: Mazi aŋa si wote si baʋaziŋa ba kapɛ ʋidi ya ni Asia kesea mɛ ɛ, kɔpɔni Figelo ni Hermogene bɛɛdzi kede ní mɛ su.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: Atɔ Ɔkaɛ odi Onesiforo yɛ kepea asigaga, lɛ ese linu si akpɛ mɛ isami epoe glegle. Kuye kúku ye si bɛkpɛ mɛ ní ligba a,

english_verse: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
translation_verse: pɔ̀ kiliɛ gi eku Roma ko e, lɛ ekpese mɛ litukpo kuʋi i, zɛkɔna ni lipoe lɛ klɔ gi amɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: Atɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu odi yɛ asigaga ní litsixwawe le aʋa! Lɛ wote wee bede ʋa ya onu gi apɔni mɛ ní Efeso e.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Wɔ mɛ obi ye kɔ ɛ, ze gagla ní Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ lɛ gi linu blɔ linɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Kristo Yesu me e.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: Vu mɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ gi wonu u, gi mabasɛ ní banɔ glegle e, gi bɛŋa katsalia ɛki mɛ ɛ, aŋu mɛ; tɔ kɔ bɛkpɛ awla kí banama gi wɔka ní ba aʋa si biatani banɔdzedze ba bidɔ kubasɛ ɛ.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: Kpɛ ikù nɛ tɔ pɔni blɔ ní kupepeo me, ŋwisi ɔgũta gbã kí Yesu Kristo kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Soldiers on duty don't work at outside jobs. They try only to please their commanding officer.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si ɔguta gi ɔlɛ ní yɛ axwɛ mɛ ɛ, izɛɛpɛ si yiku yɛ ɔkaɛ aŋu, lɛ loso e, ɔʋíkpɛ onugu ní kele me eboe me e.

english_verse: No one wins an athletic contest without obeying the rules.
translation_verse: Lɛ ɔnɔ gi ɔlɛ ní besese ba kusi i, ɔ́tratani kaʋà kuŋa a, xe óxo kuseseo isã nɛ oto o.

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: Ɔnyrɔmɛdzɛɛ gi awa axwɛ gagla ɛ, yɛ lilɛ si ɔmɔ yɛ ɔnyrɔ nɔ mɛ kiŋaŋa tɔpu yɛ.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Gyo eboa la ya gi mɛɛpani su di i, lɛ ese linu si Ɔkaɛ aapɔni wɔ tɔ wɔanu la petee ese.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Plɛ aŋu ní Yesu Kristo, gi Aya ayɔnɔ adɔ ni bekpo ʋa mɛ aʋa a, Yɛ eze Dawid yɛ osobi lɛ linu mɛ liboe le ose lo o, gi masɔli mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mamɔ ɔzia nɔ lɛ abla ɛ, bɛkpɛ mɛ bibɔ ŋwisi ɔnɔ gi abitɛ eboe zimizi kinɛ ɛ. Pɔ̀ Aya yɛ Liboe le e, bákpɛ lɛ bibɔ ɔ.

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso kɔkpɛ Aya yɛ banɔ kyakya ba ɛ, mazɛ likakaa tɔ bá fɛ bamɔ kubúbú yo gani Kristo Yesu me, tɔ biamɔ kusudra liɔ gi kutrádu i.

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya linu anukwarɛ liboe gi bɛpani i si, Xe kwitse ni Kristo e, kwiaze ligbã́ nì yɛ.

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: Xe kwitani eboe la onu kulɛɛ ni yɛ ɛ, kwiaŋa kukusi ni yɛ. Xe kwikyi kede kpɛ yɛ ɛ, yɛ fɛ aanada si yete blo.

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: Xe kúzi yɛ aʋa ŋa ɛ, yɛ kɔ ɔ́tradzi kede ní yɛ kakaplɛa su u, lɛ ese linu si ɔ́tratani isu ya kunada a. Ɔxwɛwa Gbã ɛ gi eku Aya aŋu i

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Zɛplɛ aŋu kí wɔ benete ba ní la ya su, tɔ kpɛ ɔsã ki ba ní Aya aŋu me si, bakígɔní akpɛ eboe. Atrábu libi i, pɔ̀ bidɔ izezizi ní banama gi benu la su u.

english_verse: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
translation_verse: Ki tɔ Aya ɔki wɔ kude ŋwisi ɔxwɛwa gi óse kuye ní yɛ axwɛwawa la su kinɛ ɛ, ɔniliɛ klɔ gi izɛɛbasɛ Aya yɛ liboe le lɛ anukwarɛɛ mumɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
translation_verse: Kúkpɛ ɔha ni banama gi bizɛɛpani asasaboe e ni agaboe, lɛ ese linu si banama gi bizɛɛbitɛ eboa la ya elu i, bizɛɛdzi kede ni Aya su i sanɔ.

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: Ba bidɔbasɛbasɛ bɛ bilɛ ŋwisi ebì gi izeenè etrɔ ɔ. Banɔ tiaʋa gi bɛbasɛ asasaboe ala elu i, bá benu Himenayo ni Fileto.

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: Bɛsɛ ní anukwarɛɛ kudeo su lɛ bɛɛpisa banɔatɔ ba kuziŋaa gi bɛɛpani si banima kuyɔyɔ dɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛ, kwiba kɔ mɛ kooko.

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔxɔ gaglaa lɔ klɔ gi Aya akpɛ ɛ, ɔma gi biasugu u; lɛ ní lɔ aʋa ɛ, Aya aŋwlimi eboa la ya si, “Ɔkaɛ ete banama gi benu yɛ banɛ ɛ” ni “Ɔnɔ kakaa gi apani si yenu Ɔkaɛ ɔnɛ ɛ, lilɛ si ɔmɔni eboe zimizi kubitɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: Ní kepe ʋidi me e, kùzí ede ede kulɛ: bɛbitɛ kùtɔ́ ni klosalo ni sika, kùtɔɛ bɛkɔ ise ni sise ɛʋɔ kɔ; kùtɔ́ fɛ ɛ, kùlɛ ɛki kùtutɔʋi lɛ kùtɔ fɛ ki axwɛ veve atɔ kuwawa.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Nite lilɛ ki baʋaziŋa ba, xe ɔnutɔ eplo isu ya adɔ ní kututɔʋi yɔ mɛ ɛ, Ɔkaɛ akɔ yɛ ɔwa axwɛ gbã, lɛ ese linu si abla isu aki lixwɛ gbã kakaa elu.

english_verse: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
translation_verse: Se ní sɔhɛ ba kusuŋwasiɔ su, tɔ bitɛ eboe gbã ní kude kakaa onu, ze ligbã́ gi ligyeno ɔʋaziŋa ɛ, lɔ banɔ, ze ní kusuyɔ mɛ ni banɔ, atɔ ga kudeo ni banama gi bɛɛxwa Ɔkaɛ ni ɔna gbã si ɔpɔni ba ɛ.

english_verse: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
translation_verse: Boŋu i bú isu ya ní banama gi bizehe agaboe ni motemote eboe kusi i; lɛ ese linu si wote si izɛɛmani avitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Ɔkaɛ yɛ ɔnɔsumu ye, limá si ohe eboe. Boŋu i, lilɛ si pɛ̀ lipo me kí ɔnɔ kakaa, ze ɔdɔbasɛ lɛ kítrɔ ɔnɔnɔ ahwafi.

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: Ze ɔnɔ gi aaplɛ litɔ kese bú eboe me ki banama gi bɛyɔ kedu ní liboe le su i, ni kudeonudidi si Aya aaki ba ɔna mɛ kukyikyi si biate anukwarɛɛ.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: Plɛ aŋu si ligbã́ nɛ litráze gagla ní ewe gɔgɔ la mɛ.

english_verse: People will love only themselves and money. They will be proud, stuck-up, rude, and disobedient to their parents. They will also be ungrateful, godless,
translation_verse: Banima biaze bamimi nɛ ni banɔ gi bɛdimɛ ni kibɔ ɔ. Biaze basudɔ ni banɔ gi beku isu ya aŋu u. Banima biaze banɔkpini ni banɔ gi bátrabù ba bapɔnɛ ba a, Biaze banɔ gi bidɔ bitráku ba aŋu u, ni banɔ gi ba isu ítradra a;

english_verse: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
translation_verse: batrápɛ̀ lipo me ɛki banɔ ɔ, batrádi ɔnɔ asigaga a, biazegu kunugu banɔ su, bátraŋa isu aʋa a, ba etukpo me azeegagla lɛ batrápɛ́ kidɔ gbã a.

english_verse: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
translation_verse: Biaze banɔ gi bizɛga banɔ ese e, banɔ gi bali nì ba begyodi ʋa kude e, banɔ gi beku isu liŋu u, xe kusudɔɔ kwiyi ba mɛ ɛ, biadimɛ ni ligbã́ ŋaŋa sani Aya kulɔlɔ;

english_verse: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
translation_verse: biazɛɛbitɛ ŋwisi beesumu Aya a, pɔ̀ batrázɛ Aya yɛ kigaglaɛ ɛ. Ya kí banɔaklɔ ba elu e.

english_verse: Some men fool whole families, just to get power over those women who are slaves of sin and are controlled by all sorts of desires.
translation_verse: Bamɛ batɔ bizɛɛtrɛ ní banima kupeo me lɛ bizɛɛŋa kamlaa ní badzɛ kunukpadze kuliɔ gi ba agbã́zeze nyani nyani na edzì kùye kɔ ɔ, xe kusuŋwasiɔ kwikpɛ ba kunugu yo aʋa a.

english_verse: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
translation_verse: Badzɛ ba ya gi beekeni di lipoe kakaa a, si bɛɛkpasi bidɔ pɔ̀ xe baʋíte anukwarɛɛ liwewe e.

english_verse: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people are enemies of the truth. Their minds are sick, and their faith isn't real.
translation_verse: Ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Yane ni Yambre bɛyɔ kedu ní Mose su izanɔ ɛ, nite ke asia na badɔbasɛ ba ya fɛ bɛyɔ kedu ní Liboe Gbã nɛ gi kwipani su u, banɔ gi ba begyodi ʋa baʋíwa axwɛ ɛ, xe bɛwɔli ní ba kuziŋaa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ batrádzi ɔtɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si ɔnɔ kakaa aamɔ ba motemote e. Lɛ ɖi liba Yane ni Yambre aʋa a. Paulo yɛ Batrɔtrɔ gɔgɔ ʋa ki Timoteo

english_verse: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ wɔkɔ ɛ, wote me, ni mɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ, mɛ kizezee me ni mɛ kupɛ́pɛ ní ligbã́ nɛ mɛ ɛ; wovu aŋu ní mɛ kuziŋaa su, mɛ litɔplɛplɛkese, mɛ kunɔlɔ, ni kiliɛ gi mizɛɛkpɛ ikù nɛ ní baxixa ʋa mɛ su u.

english_verse: trouble and suffering in the cities of Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. Yet the Lord rescued me from all those terrible troubles.
translation_verse: Wote kedua lia gi bɛyɔ ní mɛ su i, ani mɛ kupepeo. Wote kidɔ kakaa gi kiba mɛ aʋa ní Antioxia, Ikonion ani Listra ɛ, kedu yɔyɔ zimizia lia mɛ gi maga ɛ! Pɔ̀ Ɔkaɛ ebu me ní la petee me e.

english_verse: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso ɔnɔ kakaa gi apɛ si yize ligbã́ gbã ní Kristo Yesu me e, biayɔ kedu ní ɔniliɛ klɔ su u;

english_verse: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
translation_verse: lɛ banɔ zimizi ba ni asia na badɔbasɛ ba ɛ, biazɛnyani pɔnɔ, biazeemeni banima lɛ banɔdzedze ba biameni ba fɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ wɔkɔ ɛ, trɛ ní anukwarɛɛ gi bɛbasɛ wɔ gi wɔká lɛ aʋa a, xe wɔziŋa ɛ aʋa. Wote banɔaklɔ gi wɔ badɔbasɛ ba beze e,

english_verse: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
translation_verse: lɛ wɔplɛ aŋu si dɔni wɔ kunuvɔɔ mɛ ɛ, wote kidiliɛ gi bɛŋwlimi kpɛ ní Kuŋwlimi Dradraa mɛ ɛ, gi kiki wɔ kuboeteo liɔ klɔ ɔ, gi kwigbani wɔ ɛtsini kubúbú me gani wɔ kuziŋaa ní Yesu Kristo me e.

english_verse: Everything in the Scriptures is God's Word. All of it is useful for teaching and helping people and for correcting them and showing them how to live.
translation_verse: Kidɔ kakaa gi bɛŋwlimi kpɛ ní Kuŋwlimi dradraa mɛ ɛ, Aya yɛ ebu ke abasɛ, lɛ kipɛ ɛki anukwarɛɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ, kí aŋu mɛ kukaka, ki kupɔnɔ ki banima tɔ bekyi ba biboebitɛ zimizi ʋe, ni tɔ biki kuhehe ki ligbã gbã kuzeze e,

english_verse: The Scriptures train God's servants to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: atɔ ɔniliɛ gi eesumu Aya ɛ, aana ní kapɛ kakaa mɛ ki axwɛ gbã kuwawa a.

english_verse: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
translation_verse: Mɛɛki wɔ lixwɛ nɛ ní Aya ni Yesu Kristo aŋu mɛ ɛ, yɛ gi atráxwa litsi ni bagbagbe ba ni bekpo ʋa ɛ, lɛ ese linu si atrába lɛ aaŋa aʋa ŋwisi Okusi kinɛ ɛ:

english_verse: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
translation_verse: Lixwɛ nɛ linu si pani liboe le, tɔ di le aʋa si bɛpani liboe le lipoe kakaa, tɔ liɔʋi banɔ, loo tɛni ba, loo tɔ kpɛ ba kigagla xe wɔɛbasɛ ba bidɔ nì litɔplɛplɛkese kese e.

english_verse: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
translation_verse: Lipoe le litrába gi banima bátrazɛ bidɔ gbã kubasɛ tɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ biakuni batutɔ ba bapɛ́pɛ ʋa kude e, lɛ biapɛ́ badɔbasɛ báklɔ gi biabasɛ ba eboa la klɔ gi bɛɛpɛ si beenu i.

english_verse: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
translation_verse: Biakyi ba atukpa la ní anukwarɛɛ liboe le su, lɛ biata kudzidziɔ kutu usanɔ ɔ.

english_verse: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ wɔ ŋa isu aʋa ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ ɛ; kpɛ ikù nɛ ní kupepe me, wa ɔklakla yɛ axwɛ na ni Liboe Gbã nɛ, tɔ wa wɔ axwɛ na petee ŋwisi Aya yɛ ɔnɔsumu ye kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
translation_verse: Mɛkɔ ɛ, lipoe le lina ɛki mɛ si mikɔ mɛ ligbã́ nɛ kukɔ tɔ ba bali mɛ ní ɔdɔpɔʋisuʋɔ lɔ aʋa ŋwisi kiliɛ gi bizɛɛbali kuda kesea kinɛ ɛ; lipoe le lina ɛki mɛ si misɛ ní ligbã ɛnɛ ya mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I have fought well. I have finished the race, and I have been faithful.
translation_verse: Matá akpafu la mumɔ, meblo ni kuseseo, lɛ mevu mɛ kuziŋaa ni Kristo me awla kɔzɛna ni ɔgũ klɔ.

english_verse: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
translation_verse: Lɛ dɔni abla kɔtsinɔ ɛ, bɛbla kaʋaŋaa likusikuto le gi bɛtrákume ɛki banama gi bɛŋa aʋa ɛ, ɛki mɛ. Likusikuto elɛ gi Ɔkaɛ litsi gbã nɛ ɔxwaxwa yɛ aaki mɛ ni Liwe lɛ klɔ aʋa ɛ. Lɛ ani kí mɛ tètè, pɔ̀ kí banama pɔ́ gi beedi yɛ kibabaɛ kudeonu u. Paulo ni Timoteo kusi Eboe la

english_verse: Come to see me as soon as you can.
translation_verse: Kenidi tɔ gana mɛ kpekpee.

english_verse: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Dema gi alɔ kelea mɛ ɛ, asɛ ní mɛ su atrɛ ní Tesalonika. Kreske asɛ atrɛ ní Galatia, lɛ Tito fɛ atrɛ ní Dalmatia.

english_verse: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
translation_verse: Luka tete kpoo ko ɔlɛ ní mɛ su. Pɛ́ Marko tɔ gbani yɛ manɔ, lɛ ese linu si aatani mɛ kupɔnɔ ní mɛ axwɛ na mɛ.

english_verse: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
translation_verse: Makpɛ Tixiko atsisi Efeso.

english_verse: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
translation_verse: Xe wɔtraba ɛ, kɔ̀ mɛ kublɔ mɛ liwu le gi mayurɔ aplɛ ní Karpo klɔ ni Troa ɛ, ni mɛ kuplekpaa fɛ mani mɛ, kuveveo kunu kuliɔ klɔ gi bɛbitɛ ni kagaplekpa ɛ.

english_verse: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
translation_verse: Aleksandro gi onu bala ʋa su ɔxwɛwa yɛ, awa anyra ní mɛ su u; Ɔkaɛ aatsa liʋɛ ɔki yɛ kɔkpɛ kidiliɛ gi abitɛ loso o.

english_verse: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
translation_verse: Wɔ fɛ ze ní aŋu plɛplɛ mɛ ní yɛ su, lɛ ese linu si ayɔ kedu gagla ní blɔ liboe le su.

english_verse: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́lɛɛ nì mɛ kude e lipoe lɛ gi mazeebú isu unu kutɔpu yɔ ɔ ni otsixwa klɔ; ba pɔ́ bɛsɛ ní mɛ su. Aya ɔkíbu ba kiboebitɛ liɛ ya ɛki ba a!

english_verse: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Ɔkaɛ ezeni me lɛ akpɛ mɛ kigaglaɛ, lɛ gani mɛ aʋa ɛ, banama pɔ́ gi bénu Yudanɛ ma ɛ, benu Aya yɛ liboe le petee gi mapani i. Lɛ ebu me gi bátsa kutsépia aki mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Lɛ Ɔkaɛ aabu me ní lizimizi kakaa mɛ ɛ, lɛ aatsini mɛ ní lifunu ne Kaʋaŋaa mɛ ɛ. Yɛ linɛ liaze kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ɔ kɔtsini kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ! Tɔ liba lɛ mɛ. Paulo aklaa ba kugɔgɔ

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
translation_verse: Mapani Priskila ni Akwila ani Onesiforo yɛ okú no.

english_verse: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
translation_verse: Erasto eze ní Korinto, lɛ masɛ ní Trofimo su ní Mileto lɛ ese linu si yɛ isu mɛ izizi.

english_verse: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Kenidi tɔ ga ku ni ya xe kwiakú kublɔ lipoe le me e. Eubulo, Pude, Lino ni Klaudia ani benemi baʋaziŋa ba pɔ́ bɛpani wɔ ɔ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Ɔkaɛ ozeni wɔ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ. Aya ɔpɛ lipo me ɔki mlɔ petee.

english_verse: From Paul, a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. I encourage God's own people to have more faith and to understand the truth about religion.
translation_verse: Kɛdɔ ní mɛ Paulo gi menu Aya yɛ ɔnɔsumu u, ni Yesu Kristo yɛ ɔnɔ kpɛkpɛɛ klɔ, Aya akya mɛ lɛ atsisi mɛ si mizɛɛpɔni Aya yɛ banɔkyakya ba tɔ baziŋa asanɔ ani tɔ benu anukwarɛ liɛ gi izɛɛki si biaze ligbã nɛ kiliɛ gi Aya apɛ ɛ ese asanɔ,

english_verse: Then they will have the hope of eternal life God promised long ago. And God never tells a lie!
translation_verse: anukwarɛɛ liɛ gi onu ɔtɔ kudidi ki ligbã moblo le e. Aya gi ɔʋísɛ asia ɛ, yɛ aka aplɛ aki blɔ dɔni kana mɛ ke,

english_verse: So, at the proper time, God our Savior gave this message and told me to announce what he had said.
translation_verse: lɛ ní yɛ lipoe trɔtrɔ lɛ aʋa ɛ, Aya blɔ ɔnɔbu ye ebu liboe le abasɛ mɛ. Lɛ Aya akpɛ mɛ si mipani liboe le su u.

english_verse: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
translation_verse: Mɛɛŋwlimi ki Tito, Mɛ ɔtutɔ mɛ obi ní kuziŋaa gi kulɛ ní blɔ awla mɛ ɛ. Tɔ Aya blɔ Ɔka ni Kristo Yesu blɔ Obúbú ye ɔki wɔ lipomepɛpɛ ni kusuyɔ ɔ. Paulo aki Tito axwɛ ní Kreta

english_verse: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ gi kɛ loso masɛ ní wɔ su ní Kreta ɛ, kɛ kinu si tɔ wɔakpɛ eboa la gi ɛgɔ ní la ikpɛ kɔ ɔ, ni tɔ wɔadu banɔtsitsi ba ní baʋaziŋa ba onu ní ɔma kakaa mɛ, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi mabasɛ wɔ ɛ,

english_verse: they must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. Their children must be followers of the Lord and not have a reputation for being wild and disobedient.
translation_verse: kesetata kakíze ní baʋaziŋa ba ɔnɔtsitsi ye su u, ɔdzɛ tole ko lilɛ si ɔgbanɔ, lɛ yɛ bebi ba fɛ ɛ, lilɛ si beze baʋaziŋa lɛ bakípani ní basu si bénu banɔ yɔyɔ loo si benu banɔ gi baʋíbù banɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Church officials are in charge of God's work, and so they must also have a good reputation. They must not be bossy, quick-tempered, heavy drinkers, bullies, or dishonest in business.
translation_verse: Agi ɔhalɔ onu ozeze yɛ odi ní Aya yɛ axwɛ na onu loso e, líma si kunutsatsa kutɔtɔ kuze ní yɛ su u. Okíze ɔnɔ gi izɛɛtrɔ ɛki banɔ ɔ, loo izeyeʋi isu kise ise, loo ɔdaŋwɛmu, loo ɔnɔ gi izɛɛbitɛ agaglaboe e, loo ɔnɔ gi yɛ kimbi kizɛɛzã a, xe izɛɛŋa kibɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Instead, they must be friendly to strangers and enjoy doing good things. They must also be sensible, fair, pure, and self-controlled.
translation_verse: Boŋu i, lilɛ si oze ɔnɔ gi izɛɛzi bababa ba, tɔ ɔdimɛ ni kidiliɛ gi kipɛ ɛ. Ɔŋa isu aʋa, tɔ ɔlɛ ní kude gyɔgyɔɔ aʋa a, ɔdra, tɔ ovu isu ya.

english_verse: There are many who don't respect authority, and they fool others by talking nonsense. This is especially true of some Jewish followers.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si banɔ glegle balɛ, gi bɛyɔ kedu ni liboe le su u, banama gi bizeebú onugu me e, li veve le banama gi bizeemeni banɔgɔgɔ ba ni Yudanɛ ma ikɔ lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But you must make them be quiet. They are after money, and they upset whole families by teaching what they should not.
translation_verse: Lilɛ si betsí kudeonu aki ba lɛ ese linu si, beezizi kupe zizi gi bɛɛbasɛ bidɔ ɔ gi líma si babasɛ ɛ, kɔkpɛ ba kibɔ pɛpɛ̀ loso.

english_verse: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
translation_verse: Kretanɛ gi onu ba ɔtutɔ ba oboedoplɛ ɛ, edo anukwarɛɛ gi apani si i, “Kretanɛ ma ɛ, bizɛsɛ asia lipoe kakaa, benu baga dovo, basranɛ ni baŋazinɛ.”

english_verse: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
translation_verse: Liboe lɛ gi oboedoplɛ liɛ apani i, linu anukwarɛ; lɛ loso e, ká aŋu mɛ ki ba mɔmɔɔmɔ, tɔ beze ní kuziŋa gbã mɛ

english_verse: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
translation_verse: atɔ bakínu Yudanɛ ma kudzídzi ni isã gi idɔ ní banama a, gi bekyi kede kpɛ anukwarɛ ɛ klɔ.

english_verse: Everything is pure for someone whose heart is pure. But nothing is pure for an unbeliever with a dirty mind. That person's mind and conscience are destroyed.
translation_verse: Kidɔ kakaa su kidra ɛki banama gi ba tutɔ bɛdra ɛ, pɔ̀ kididɔ su kídra ɛki banama gi bezizi isu ya a, xe baziŋa ɛ, lɛ ese linu si ba begyodi ʋa ni ina nɛ mɛ ɛ, iinyani kooko.

english_verse: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
translation_verse: Bizeegyo le edi si betè Aya, pɔ̀ ba kiboebitɛ ɛ kiibasɛ kooko si béte ye. Bizeevu banɔ ɛkpɛ lipo me lɛ baʋínu kutu u, lɛ báma kidɔ gbã kubitɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Titus, you must teach only what is correct.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ wɔ ɛ, lilɛ si basɛ kidiliɛ gi kisrɔni bidɔbasɛbasɛ gbã ʋɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
translation_verse: Niteme ke basɛ badzɛtsitsi ba tɔ beze ligbã́ gbã gi likpɛ kubùbù ní Aya su u. Bakíze banɔ gi bizeegu kunugu banɔ su u, loo banɔdzidzi ki kuda. Boŋu i, lilɛ si babasɛ banɔ ligbãzeze gbã,

english_verse: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
translation_verse: Babasɛ ba tɔ baŋa isu aʋa, tɔ badra ani tɔ bawa ba kupeo me axwɛ na mumɔ, tɔ badìmɛ ni banɔ ani tɔ bepleni isu ya aki ba benye ba, tɔ ɔnɔnɔ ɔkipani liboe nyani nyani ní liboe lɛ klɔ gi lidɔ Aya klɔ su u.

english_verse: Tell the young men to have self-control in everything.
translation_verse: Nite ke kpɛ iyasɔʋi lɛ sise tɔ baŋa isu aʋa.

english_verse: Use clean language that no one can criticize. Do this, and your enemies will be too ashamed to say anything against you.
translation_verse: Mlakɔ eboe gbã gi atrámani kuboehe e, tɔ biakpɛ mlɔ ahwafianɛ ma kuye gi batrámɔ liboe nyani nyani tɔtɔ ɔ, gi biapani ní blɔ su u.

english_verse: Tell slaves always to please their owners by obeying them in everything. Slaves must not talk back to their owners
translation_verse: Lilɛ si banɔdzidzi ba bepleni isu aki ba baka ba, tɔ beku ba aŋu ní kidɔ kakaa mɛ. Líma si bedu onugu ayurɔ ba a,

english_verse: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
translation_verse: loo tɔ bezuru ba bidɔ, boŋu i, babasɛ lipoe kakaa si benu banɔ gi biazɛ ba aʋa ŋa a, tɔ gani kidɔ kakaa mɛ ɛ, ba kiboebitɛɛ kiaki si bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ ní Aya blɔ Obúbú ye su i, biaku banɔ glegle aŋu u.

english_verse: God has shown us undeserved grace by coming to save all people.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Aya ebu yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ abasɛ ki banima petee kubúbú yo.

english_verse: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Agi kwiipe liwe ʋidi ilɛ klɔ ɔ, gi lɛ kudeonu kwiidi i. Liwe ʋidi lɛ klɔ gi lɛ mɛ blɔ Aya ʋidi ye ni blɔ Obúbú ye Yesu Kristo yɛ kuklekleo kwiaŋwi i.

english_verse: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
translation_verse: Akɔ yɛ isu ya akɔ ní blɔ litukpo, tɔ yibu blo edɔni litukpo me gagla kakaa mɛ ani tɔ yibitɛ blɔ tɔ kuze banɔ dradra gi kwiaze yɛ tètè banɛ ɛ, gi biapɛ́ veve e si bɛbitɛ kidiliɛ gi kipɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Teach these things, as you use your full authority to encourage and correct people. Make sure you earn everyone's respect.
translation_verse: Eboa la ya enu kidiliɛ gi wɔabasɛ ɛ, lɛ ní wɔ ɔlɛɛ klɔ onu i, kpɛ ba kigagla, tɔ tɛni banama gi beenu wɔ liboe le e. Wukíki tɔ bamɛ ɔtɔtɔ ɔmɔ wɔ ese e.

english_verse: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
translation_verse: Plɛ aŋu ki wɔ benete ba tɔ bepleni isu aki baʋaŋa ba ni banama awla gi izèkɔ ilɛ ɛ, tɔ benu ba igbè, atɔ babla aplɛ aki axwɛ gbã kuwawa ní kude kakaa onu.

english_verse: We used to be stupid, disobedient, and foolish, as well as slaves of all sorts of desires and pleasures. We were evil and jealous. Everyone hated us, and we hated everyone.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si lipoetɔ lɛ ɛ, blɔ fɛ kwidɔ kuga, kúbu banɔ ɔ, lɛ bemeni blo edi i. Kwize banɔdzidzi ki kusuŋwasi ni ligbã́ŋaŋa kakaa elu. Kwizizi blɔ ligbã́ nɛ ni eboe zimizi kubitɛ, ni kaŋuza, gi banɔatɔ bɛtrɔ blɔ ahwafi i, lɛ blɔ fɛ kwitrɔ ba ahwafi i.

english_verse: God our Savior showed us how good and kind he is.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ gi Aya blɔ Obúbú ye ebú yɛ kunɔlɔɔ, ni yɛ kunɔdimɛnɔɔ abasɛ ɛ,

english_verse: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
translation_verse: ebú blo, aní kɔgani blɔ tutɔ eboe gyɔgyɔ ɔ, gi kwibitɛ mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ gani yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ asigagadidi me ebu blo, gani Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ mɛ, gi edzini blo apɔ ɔ, xe eewlo ni blo ni ligbã vuvu u.

english_verse: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
translation_verse: Aya aki blɔ yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ faã gani Yesu Kristo blɔ Obúbú ye me e.

english_verse: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
translation_verse: Lɛ gani yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ mɛ ɛ, bialulɔ blɔ ɔki Aya tɔ kwiamɔ ɔŋakɔ ní ligbã́ moblo le gi lɛ kwidi kudeonu ikɔ ɛ mɛ.

english_verse: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya linu anukwarɛ gi bizɛpani i. Mapɛ si mlakpɛ eboa la ya lixaŋu, tɔ banama gi bɛzi Aya aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ, biakɔ lɛ trɔ isu aʋa tɔ biabitɛ eboe gbã gi ɛpɛ ɛ, eboe ala la ya ɛpɛ lɛ aabu libi ki ɔnɔ kakaa a.

english_verse: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlayurɔ eboe fiteete kuŋwlɛŋwlɛ, siŋanɛ kusrɔsrɔ, eboe hehe ani akpafu kutata ní Mose ɔsã nɔ su u. Lɛ ese linu si libiitɔtɔ líma ní la mɛ ɛ, lɛ ápɛ aki kididɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Warn troublemakers once or twice. Then don't have anything else to do with them.
translation_verse: Mlagba banama gi bizɛɛmani kulɛlɛ tule e, lɛ kede e, mlagba ba kuʋla, lɛ ya kede e, mlayurɔ ba.

english_verse: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Lilɛ si lize kutète me kí mlɔ si ɔnɔ liɛ ya elu i, onu ɔnɔ gi ekyi kede akpɛ anukwarɛ ni ɔnɔ zimizi i, lɛ yɛ kiboebitɛɛ kibasɛ si ata kese e. Kunɔpanɔɔ nì batrɔtrɔ gɔgɔ ʋa

english_verse: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
translation_verse: Xegi makpɛ Artema loo Tixiko ní wɔklɔ ɛ, kenidi tɔ ba mɔklɔ ní Nikopoli; lɛ ese linu si matrɔ lɛ si maaze niklɔ ní kublɔ lipoe le me.

english_verse: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
translation_verse: Kenidi tɔ pɔni Zena otsixwa yɛ ni Apolo mɔmɔɔmɔ gi bɛbla ɛki ba kudegaga a, atɔ di le aʋa si kididɔ kikízia ba a.

english_verse: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Banama petee gi balɛ ní mɛ su i, bɛpani mlɔ. Mlapani banama petee gi bɛlɔ blɔ ní kuziŋa mɛ ɛ. Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ lizè ni mlɔ petee.

english_verse: From Paul, who is in jail for serving Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is like a brother because of our faith. Philemon, you work with us and are very dear to us. This letter is to you
translation_verse: Keplekpaa lia kɛdɔ ní mɛ Paulo gi makpasi ligba a, kɔkpɛ lixwɛ nɛ gi mɛɛwa ɛki Kristo Yesu loso o, ni blɔ onemi Timoteo klɔ, ki blɔ ɔʋia veve ni blɔ ɔhanuglɔ ɔxwɛwa yɛ Filimon.

english_verse: and to the church that meets in your home. It is also to our dear friend Apphia and to Archippus, who serves the Lord as we do.
translation_verse: Ani kí baʋaziŋa ba gi bizɛɛtsa ní wɔ kepea mɛ ɛ, ni blɔ onemidzɛ Appia kɔpɔni Arkipus gi izɛɛlɛɛ gagla ní Ɔkaɛ axwɛ na mɛ ŋwisi ɔguta kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
translation_verse: Meʋi si Aya blɔ Ɔka ani Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo bapɛ lipo me aki mlɔ tɔ baki mlɔ kusuyɔ. Paulo axwa Aya lɛ edo yɛ ɖase ní Filemon yɛ kunɔlɔɔ ni yɛ kuziŋaa litukpo

english_verse: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
translation_verse: Onemi Filemon, lipoe kakaa xe mɛɛxwa Aya ɛ, mizɛɛplɛ aŋu ní wɔ aʋa lɛ mizeedo Aya ɖase e.

english_verse: I hear about your faith in our Lord Jesus and about your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si mizeenu wɔ kunɔlɔɔ ki Aya yɛ banima petee ni wɔ kuziŋaa ní Ɔkaɛ Yesu me onu.

english_verse: As you share your faith with others, I pray they may come to know all the blessings Christ has given us.
translation_verse: Mɛ kupɛ́pɛɔ kunu si blɔ likpɔkpɛkpɛ lɛ ni mlɔ ŋwisi baʋaziŋa kinɛ ɛ, kwiamani eboe ese kununu dzudzu ni kukrira kakaa gi kuli blɔ awla a ní ligbã nɛ mɛ gani likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ní Kristo me.

english_verse: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
translation_verse: Wɔ kunɔlɔɔ kwiku mɛ isami glegle lɛ kwikpɛ mɛ kigagla a! Wɔkpɛ Aya yɛ banima petee ba ina nɛ isami. Paulo eʋi kukɔkyɛ akí Onesimo

english_verse: But I would rather ask you to do it simply because of love. Yes, as someone in jail for Christ,
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ kɔkpɛ mɛ kulɔlɔ kí wɔ onu i, meeʋi ɛdɔni wɔ iwla mɛ boŋu. Mabitɛ lɛ nite gi menu Paulo ɔnɔ tsitsi i ni Kristo Yesu yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ, xe malɛ ligba abla kɔkpɛ yɛ loso kyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I beg you to help Onesimus! He is like a son to me because I led him to Christ here in jail.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mɛɛki wɔ litukpo kɔkpɛ Onesimo, gi edzì mɛ ɔtutɔ mobi ní Kristo me e; gi malɛ ní ligba kyɛ ɛ, medzi yɛka ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Before this, he was useless to you, but now he is useful both to you and to me.
translation_verse: Kɔkí lipoetɔ ɛ, óze ɔnɔ gi ebu libiitɔtɔ aki wɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ abla ɛ, edzì ɔnɔ gi eebu libi iki wɔ ni mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Sending Onesimus back to you makes me very sad.
translation_verse: Meedzini Onesimo gi malɔ ɔ ni mɛ ɔna petee tsisi wɔ abla a.

english_verse: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
translation_verse: Nya mapɛ si oze ní mɛ su ní ya, gi malɛ ligba lɛ kɔkpɛ liboe gbã nɛ loso e, tɔ aazɔki mɛ kupɔnɔ ní wɔ onu.

english_verse: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀, mátrapɛ si mími wɔ aʋa si pɔni mɛ ɛ; Boŋu i, mapɛ si bitɛ lɛ ní wɔtutɔ wɔ kupɛ́pɛ onu. Lɛ loso mátrabitɛ kididɔ ɔ, xe wɔ́dimɛ ní kɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: Perhaps Onesimus was taken from you for a little while so you could have him back for good,
translation_verse: Liaze si kidiliɛ loso gi Onesimo asɛ ní wɔ su lipoe kpekpemi itɔ ko linu si tɔ wɔadzini ye kuzɛ lipoe kakaa.

english_verse: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Lɛ abla ɛ, ónu ɔnɔdzidzi tɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ asani ɔnɔdzidzi; onu onemi gi azɛ kedzi ní Kristo me e. Onu ɔnɔ gi azɛ kedzi aki mɛ! Lɛ aaze ɔnɔ gi azɛ kedzi aki wɔ ŋwisi ɔnɔdzidzi ani onemi ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ ɛ!

english_verse: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso, xe wɔkɔ mɛ ŋwisi wɔ ɔha nɛ ɔxwɛwa kinɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ dzini ye zɛ kiliɛ gi wɔazɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If he has cheated you or owes you anything, charge it to my account.
translation_verse: Xegi ata wɔ ese loo adɔ liʋɛɛtɔ ní wɔ su i, bú le mɛ ní liʋɛ nɛ mɛ.

english_verse: My dear friend and follower of Christ our Lord, please cheer me up by doing this for me.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mɛ onemi ye, maki wɔ litukpo tɔ mikpɛ wɔ kunugu taʋɛ kɔkpɛ Ɔkaɛ loso; ŋwisi onemi ní Kristo me kinɛ ɛ, ki tɔ mimɔ isami!

english_verse: I am sure you will do all I have asked, and even more.
translation_verse: Maka lɛ aʋa si, gi mɛɛŋwlimi lɛ ya ɛ, wɔabitɛ kidiliɛ gi meʋi i, lɛ mete si wɔabitɛ sanɔ kiliɛ gi meʋi i.

english_verse: Epaphras is also here in jail for being a follower of Christ Jesus. He sends his greetings,
translation_verse: Epafra, gi ɔlɛ ligba nì mɛ kɔkpɛ Kristo Yesu i, atsisi wɔ yɛ kunɔpanɔɔ,

english_verse: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
translation_verse: nite ke mɛ ahanuglɔ baxwɛwa ba, Marko, Aristarxo, Demas ani Luka kyɛ bɛpani wɔ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Tɔ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ gi lidɔ blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo klɔ ɛ, lize ni mlɔ petee.

english_verse: Long ago in many ways and at many times God's prophets spoke his message to our ancestors.
translation_verse: Ni kana mɛ ɛ, Aya egu kunugu yo epoe glegle nì gani bede glegle aʋa aki blɔ baka tsitsi ba gani yɛ beboedoplɛ ba aʋa.

english_verse: But now at last, God sent his Son to bring his message to us. God created the universe by his Son, and everything will someday belong to the Son.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ní ewe gɔgɔa la ya mɛ ɛ, egu kunugu aki blɔ gani Yebi ye aʋa a. Yɛ Aya akya si ɔŋa kidɔ kakaa aʋa, lɛ yɛ onu ɔniliɛ gi yɛ aʋa Aya aga a, xe abitɛ kelea a.

english_verse: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
translation_verse: Aya Yebi ye yɛ onu Aya yɛ kusudraa gì kwidɔ ní Aya yɛ kuklekleo me e, lɛ yɛ kee onu Aya yɛ kizezee me tutu gi yɛ aki kelea kalɛ gani yɛ liboe le kigaglaɛ mɛ ɛ. Lɛ gi akɔ isu ya akɔ aki Aya a, ŋwisi bidɔ pɔʋi pɔʋi kinɛ ɛ, xe eplo eboe zimizi na azanɔ pɔ́ ɛ, odi ni Aya yɛ kigaglaɛ petee kɛ kaŋawla mɛ ní lifunu ne. Aya Yebi ye emu asani Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba

english_verse: He had become much greater than the angels, and the name he was given is far greater than any of theirs. God's Son Is Greater than Angels
translation_verse: Lɛ loso Aya abitɛ yɛ si emu asani Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba petee ŋwisi kiliɛ gi linyii nɛ ɛ, gi aki yɛ ɛ, liŋa kedzi sani ba enyi na petee.

english_verse: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba mɛ owoli bɛsi edi si, “Mobi wonu, omono liwe le medzi wɔ Ɔka a”? Xe asi yɛ dzɛ si i, “Mɛ maadzi Ɔka ki yɛ, lɛ yɛ fɛ ɛ, aadzi mɛ obinyime e”?

english_verse: When God brings his first-born Son into the world, he commands all of his angels to worship him.
translation_verse: Lɛ xegi Aya edzini yebinyime e gi ɔlɛ ɛ, xe ableke bebu kidɔ kakaa, amani kelea mɛ ɛ, Aya apani si, “Lilɛ si Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba petee bakpɛ litukpo kese aki yɛ.”

english_verse: And when God speaks about the angels, he says, “I change my angels into wind and my servants into flaming fire.”
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya apani ní yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba su si, “Aya abitɛ yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba ŋwisi liwɔ lɛ kinɛ ɛ, lɛ abitɛ yɛ banɔsumu ba ŋwisi kifu binemi kinɛ ɛ,”

english_verse: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
translation_verse: lɛ apani ní Yebi ye su si, “Aya wɔ kaʋaŋaa kiaze tsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ. wɔaŋa wɔakɔanɛ ma aʋa ní kude gyɔgyɔ aʋa.

english_verse: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
translation_verse: Wɔdimɛ ni eboa la gi ɛgyɔ; lɛ wɔ́dimɛ ni eboe nyani nyani i. Lɛ loso Aya wɔ Aya, akya wɔ xe aki wɔ ozekɔ gi emu isani izekɔɛ lɛ klɔ gi aki wɔ ahanuglɔ ba, lɛ wɔmɔ̀ isami gi Aya asra kumu yɔ aki wɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
translation_verse: Apani kyɛ si, “Oo Ɔkaɛ, wɔ wɔbitɛ kesea dɔni okpese klɔ, lɛ lifunu ne linu wɔ iwla onu axwɛwawa.

english_verse: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
translation_verse: Bidɔ bɛ ya petee bɛ onu biaza, pɔ̀ wɔkɔ ɛ, wɔaze tsinɔ; lɛ bɛpɔ́ biahá ŋwisi kusa kinɛ ɛ,

english_verse: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
translation_verse: Wɔaklɔʋi bɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi bizɛklɔʋi liwu kinɛ ɛ; lɛ wɔatsrɛ ʋɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi bizɛɛtsrɛ basa koko kinɛ ɛ. pɔ̀ wɔkɔ ɛ, nite ko wɔlɛ, lɛ wɔ agɔ la onu atráza a.”

english_verse: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
translation_verse: Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ woli Aya asɛ edi si, “Ze ní mɛ kaŋaa mɛ, kɔzɛna ni lipoe lɛ gi maakɔ wɔ ahwafianɛ ma kpɛ ní wɔ kuklise o?”

english_verse: Angels are merely spirits sent to serve people who are going to be saved.
translation_verse: Lɛ ege Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba benu u? Ba petee aní ifuɛfuɛ gi izesumu Aya a, xe izɛɛkpɛ lɛ si izɛɛpɔni banama gi biamɔ kubúbú na a?

english_verse: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya loso lilɛ ɛki blɔ si kuvù anukwarɛɛ liɛ gi kwinu ní awla gaglaa sanɔ ɔ, atɔ kukílila ní kudeo aʋa a.

english_verse: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
translation_verse: kitɛ kwiabitɛ xe kwiase ní lɛ onu u, xe kwiyurɔ kubúbú ʋidi uliɔ ya a? Ɔkaɛ ɔtutɔ lɔ aklá ní kubúbú uliɔ ya su lɛ banama gi benu yɛ liboe le e, bɛtrɔ likla ní lɛ aʋa ɛki blɔ si linu anukwarɛ

english_verse: God himself showed that his message was true by working all kinds of powerful miracles and wonders. He also gave his Holy Spirit to anyone he chose to. The One Who Leads Us To Be Saved
translation_verse: gi liitrɛ lɛ aʋa ɛ, Aya ɔtutɔ fɛ atrɔ ba liboe le aʋa a, gi abitɛ enugutseboe ni eboe mamɔ edi i, gi aki banima Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ mɛ bidɔ glegle ní yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kupɛpɛ onu u. Ɔniliɛ gi aaki blɔ Kubúbú i

english_verse: We know that God did not put the future world under the power of angels.
translation_verse: Aya ɔ́kɔ kelea lia gi kɛtraba ɛ ɔ́kɔ ka akpɛ ní yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba awla si baŋa ka aʋa a, kelea lia gi ka su kwipani i.

english_verse: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔnutɔ aŋa katsalia ní ɔkutɔ si i, “Ege ɔnɔ gbagbe onu xe wuzɛɛplɛ aŋu ní yɛ aʋa a, kelea lia mɛ obi, xe wɔkɔ litɔ ní lɛ mɛ ɔki yɛ ɛ?

english_verse: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
translation_verse: Wɔki si yɛ ozeklɔ eple taʋɛ sani wɔ baxwɛdzɛ ba ɔni nɔ ɔ, wɔki yɛ kusudra ni kubùbù lɛ wɔkɔ yɛ odu wɔ ɔwla lɔ onu axwɛwawa la petee onu i,

english_verse: And you have put everything under our power!” God has put everything under our power and has not left anything out of our power. But we still don't see it all under our control.
translation_verse: wɔki si ɔŋa kidɔ kakaa aʋa a.” Gi Aya abitɛ yɛ si ɔŋa kidɔ kakaa aʋa ɛ, kididɔ kígɔ gi Aya ɔ́kɔkpɛ ni yɛ ese e. Pɔ̀ kuʋímɔ si yɛ ɛɛŋa kidɔ kakaa aʋa abla a.

english_verse: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ kwimɔ Yesu, ɔniliɛ gi yɛ ozekɔ bepleno esani Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba, atɔ gani Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ mɛ ɛ, otse ní ɔnɔ kakaa litukpo. Abla ɛ, kwimɔ yɛ si bɛki yɛ kusudra ni kubùbù kɔkpɛ yɛ kutseo mɛ gi aga ɛ.

english_verse: Everything belongs to God, and all things were created by his power. So God did the right thing when he made Jesus perfect by suffering, as Jesus led many of God's children to be saved and to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Lipɛ si Aya gi yɛ abitɛ kidɔ kakaa ɛ, xe yɛ aki si kidɔ kakaa kize kiliɛ ɛ, gi kilɛ ɛ, ɔki tɔ ɔniliɛ gi yɛ onu ba kubúbú yo kɔ ɔxɔ lɔ ɛ, ɔna gani ɔziã mɛ atɔ yɛ ɔgbani bebi glegle manɔ ní yɛ kusudraa mɛ. Lɛ ese linu si Yesu yɛ onu ɔniliɛ gi yɛ aagbani ba tsinɔ ní kubúbú yo me e.

english_verse: Jesus and the people he makes holy all belong to the same family. This is why he isn't ashamed to call them his brothers and sisters.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si ɔniliɛ gi izɛɛdra banima su i, kɔpɔni banama su gi bɛdra ɛ, ba petee bɛdɔ lipo tile me, lɛ loso e, kuye kúʋiku Yesu si ɔxwa ba si yɛ benemi i,

english_verse: He even said to God, “I will tell them your name and sing your praises when they come together to worship.”
translation_verse: Apani kyɛ si, “maadra wɔ linyi ne su ki mɛ benemi ba; lɛ ní baʋaziŋa ba ɔha lɔ kusi i, maakpɔ wɔ gani idzi zàzà mɛ.”

english_verse: He also said, “I will trust God.” Then he said, “Here I am with the children God has given me.”
translation_verse: Lɛ apani dzɛ si, “Maaka ní yɛ su aʋa” Lɛ edzì apani si, “Imɔ mɛ, ni bebi ba ya gi Aya aki mɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: We are people of flesh and blood. This is why Jesus became one of us. He died to destroy the devil, who had power over death.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi bebi ba benu kisugya ni ika mɛ banɔ ɛ, Yesu ɔtutɔ kyɛ edzì ŋwisi ba kiniɛ lɛ eze ligbã́ ni kisugyaɛ mɛ ba kiniɛ. Abitɛ lɛ nite tɔ gani yɛ kutseo me e, aazizi ɔniliɛ gi yɛ awla kutseo kigaglaɛ kilɛ ɛ, gi yɛ onu ozimizi ye e.

english_verse: But he also died to rescue all of us who live each day in fear of dying.
translation_verse: Lɛ gani yɛ kutseo me e, aabu banama petee gi ní ba ligbã́ nɛ mɛ ɛ, beze ŋwisi banɔdzidzi ki ozimizi ye ɔkpɛ gi bezeese se kutseo loso o.

english_verse: Jesus clearly did not come to help angels, but he did come to help Abraham's descendants.
translation_verse: Lɛ mɛ lidra si, aní Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba apɔnɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ Abraham yɛ besoebi ba apɔnɔ ɔ.

english_verse: And now that Jesus has suffered and was tempted, he can help anyone else who is tempted.
translation_verse: Lɛ abla ɛ, aatani banama gi beekeni idi i, kupɔnɔ lɛ ese linu si yɛ ɔtutɔ lɔ fɛ bekeni ye edi lɛ amɔ ɔziã a.

english_verse: Jesus was faithful to God, who appointed him, just as Moses was faithful in serving all God's people.
translation_verse: Abitɛ kidɔ kakaa ní kude gbã onu gi Aya a, gi yɛ akya yɛ ɛ, asi yɛ si ɔbitɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Mose abitɛ ní kude gbã onu ní Aya yɛ kepea petee me kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But Jesus deserves more honor than Moses, just as the builder of a house deserves more honor than the house.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si kubùbù glegle kulɛ ní Yesu su i, sani Mose ŋwisi kiliɛ gi ɔgbawaɛ izɛzi kubùbù isani kepea ɔtutɔ lɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Of course, every house is built by someone, and God is really the one who built everything.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si ligba kakaa ɛ, ɔnɔ izɛɛwa lɛ, pɔ̀ Aya yɛ izɛɛbitɛ kidɔ kakaa a.

english_verse: But Christ is the Son in charge of God's people. And we are those people, if we keep on being brave and don't lose hope. A Rest for God's People
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Kristo abitɛ kidɔ kakaa ní kude gbã onu ŋwisi obi gi yɛ iwla mɛ Aya yɛ kepea kalɛ ɛ kinɛ. Lɛ blɔ kunu yɛ kepea, xegi kwivu blɔ ina nɛ ani kudeonudidi yo awla ní kidiliɛ gi kɛ loso kwifeke isu ya ɛ. Bɛgba Israel bebi ba ní kumɔziŋa su

english_verse: It is just as the Holy Spirit says, “If you hear God's voice today,
translation_verse: Lɛ loso kiliɛ gi Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛpani i si, “xegi mlenu Aya yɛ ole lo omono e,

english_verse: For forty years your ancestors tested God and saw the things he did.
translation_verse: Niklɔ gi mlɔ baka ba bekeni me edi i, xe befeke me edi i, gi bɛɛmɔ kidiliɛ gi mabitɛ agɔ avitene na kyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: “Then God got tired of them and said, ‘You people never show good sense, and you don't understand what I want you to do.’
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, meyeʋi isu ní kigyɔgyɔɛ mɛ liɛ klɔ aʋa lɛ mapani si ‘ba ina nɛ imá ni mɛ kude lɛ béte mɛ bede ʋa’

english_verse: God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ”
translation_verse: Lɛ loso maka kitamu aki isu ní mɛ kusuyeʋio me si, ‘Batrátiiku ní mɛ kusuyɔɔ mɛ liwewe!’ ”

english_verse: My friends, watch out! Don't let evil thoughts or doubts make any of you turn from the living God.
translation_verse: Benemi ba, mledi isu aʋa mumɔ tɔ ɔna zimizi gi ɔ́zɛ ɔŋa ɛ, okize ní mlɔ mɛ ɛtɔtɔ mɛ, tɔ mláʋakyi kede kpɛ Aya gi yɛ izɛki kidɔ kakaa ligbã nɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You must encourage one another each day. And you must keep on while there is still a time that can be called “today.” If you don't, then sin may fool some of you and make you stubborn.
translation_verse: Boŋu i, mlazɛɛkpɛ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba kigaglaɛ liwe kakaa liwe, gi bɛɛxwa lɛ si omono e, atɔ eboe zimizi atɔtɔ akímeni mlɔ mɛ ɔtɔtɔ.

english_verse: We were sure about Christ when we first became his people. So let's hold tightly to our faith until the end.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si mlaamɔ ɔŋakɔ nì Kristo, xegi mlevu kidiliɛ ɛ, gi kɛ kudeonu kwidi i, lipoe lɛ gi kwizi ŋa ɛ, kɛ mɛ kɔzɛna nì ɔgukɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Who were those people that heard God's voice and rebelled? Weren't they the same ones that came out of Egypt with Moses?
translation_verse: Lɛ nyaŋwɛ ba benu Aya yɛ ole lo o, xe bɛyɔ kedu ya ní yɛ su u? Aní banama petee gi Mose agbani adɔ nɔ ní Egipte na a?

english_verse: And who did God say would never enter his place of rest? Weren't they the ones that disobeyed him?
translation_verse: Lɛ nyaŋwɛ ba Aya aka yɛ kitamu yɛ akɔ si, batrátiiku ní yɛ kusuyɔɔ mɛ liwewe e, xe ani banɔ ba ya gi bénu kutu aki yɛ ɛ?

english_verse: We see that those people did not enter the place of rest because they did not have faith.
translation_verse: Lɛ kwiba ɛmɔ egyesi si, bátani kesea mɛ kuti iku kɔkpɛ gi báziŋa loso o.

english_verse: The promise to enter the place of rest is still good, and we must take care that none of you miss out.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso gi Aya yɛ kakaplɛa kedzia lɛ si kwiatiku ní yɛ kusuyɔɔ mɛ ɛ, mlaki tɔ kudi isu aʋa mumɔ, tɔ likíbase si mlɔ mɛ ɔtɔ ebu isu ní lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We have heard the message, just as they did. But they failed to believe what they heard, and the message did not do them any good.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si bɛpani Liboe Gbã nɛ si blɔ fɛ, ŋwisi banɔ baklɔ ba ke; pɔ̀ liboe le gi benu i, líbu libiitɔtɔ ɛki ba banɔ baklɔ, lɛ ese linu si banama gi benu le e, bákɔ kuziŋa apɔni lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Only people who have faith will enter the place of rest. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ” God said this, even though everything has been ready from the time of creation.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso blɔ banama gi kwizi ŋa ɛ, kwiatiku kusuyɔ liɔ klɔ mɛ, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Aya aka aplɛ ɛ si, “Lilɛ ko ŋwisi kiliɛ gi maka kitamu yɛ ní mɛ kusuyeʋio mɛ si; ‘batrátiiku ní mɛ kusuyɔɔ mɛ liwewe.’ ” Pɔ̀ kyɛ Aya yɛ lixwɛ nɛ liblo dɔni kelea okpese klɔ ke.

english_verse: In fact, somewhere the Scriptures say that by the seventh day, God had finished his work, and so he rested.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si bɛpani ní yɛ Liboe le kapɛ katɔ mɛ ní liwe gloele liwe le su si, “Lɛ ní liwe gloele aʋa ɛ, Aya eze amɔni ní yɛ axwɛ na petee me e.”

english_verse: We also read that he later said, “You people will never enter my place of rest!”
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛpani niklɔ dzɛ si, “batrátiiku ní mɛ kusuyɔɔ mɛ liwewe e.”

english_verse: This means that the promise to enter is still good, because those who first heard about it disobeyed and did not enter.
translation_verse: Kudeonu kudzi ulɛ ki banɔ batɔ si beti iku ní kɔ mɛ, Pɔ̀ banama gi beedo Liboe Gbã nɛ ese kpɛ ɔtɔ ɛ, bázɛ kuzemɔni yɔ kɔkpɛ gi bénu kutu loso o.

english_verse: If Joshua had really given the people rest, there would not be any need for God to talk about another day of rest.
translation_verse: Xegi nya Yosua aki ba kuzemɔni uliɔ ya ɛ, nya Aya ɔ́trapani lɛ kede ní liwe dzedze etɔtɔ su tɔɔ ɔ.

english_verse: We should do our best to enter the place of rest, so none of us will disobey and miss going there, as they did.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, mlaki tɔ kuga kude kakaa onu tɔ kutiku ní kuzemɔni uliɔ klɔ mɛ tɔ blɔ mɛ ɔnɔnɔ ɔkido ní lɛ mɛ ŋwisi banɔ baklɔ ba kɔkpɛ ba kutu gaglaa loso o.

english_verse: God's word is alive and powerful! It is sharper than any double-edged sword. His word can cut through our spirits and souls and through our joints and marrow, until it discovers the desires and thoughts of our hearts.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Aya yɛ Liboe le lilɛ ligbã́, lɛ lizɛwa lɛ axwɛ na kise ise, lɛ lilɛ nunu isani ihɛ inugu tiʋa kakaa a. Lɛ lizɛɛtsa bidɔ ɛtsinɔ kimɛ ɛmɛ ke, kɔzɛna ni esobo la ni Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔtsaklɔ, ani axwa la ni kumu yɔ itsaklɔ ke e. Lɛ Aya yɛ Liboe le lizɛɛxwa etsi ni ɔna nɔ mɛ bapɛ́pɛ ʋa ni begyodi ʋa kyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Nothing is hidden from God! He sees through everything, and we will have to tell him the truth. Jesus Is the Great High Priest
translation_verse: Kidɔbitɛbitɛ ɛtɔtɔ kítratani kukpo ní Aya aŋu mɛ ɛ, kidɔ kakaa gi bɛbitɛ ɛ, kifini liya lɛ kifini ni yɛ aŋu mɛ ɛ. Lɛ yɛ blɔ petee kwitraki akɔnta ni isu ya su ikɔ ɔ. Yesu yɛ onu blɔ Kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ye

english_verse: We have a great high priest, who has gone into heaven, and he is Jesus the Son of God. This is why we must hold on to what we have said about him.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso gi kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ye e, gi ɔlɛ ní blɔ awla a, yɛ atrɛ ní bekpo ʋa mɛ xe atrɛ ní lifunu ne ní Aya aŋu mɛ ɛ, Yesu Aya Yebi ye, mlaki tɔ kuvù blɔ kuziŋaa liɔ gi kwibasɛ banima ɛ mɛ gaglaa.

english_verse: So whenever we are in need, we should come bravely before the throne of our merciful God. There we will be treated with undeserved grace, and we will find help.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, mlaki si ɔna oze ní blɔ lipo atɔ kutipɔni Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ likusigbo le, tɔ blɔ ɔwla lɔ ɔka yɛ asigagadidi la, atɔ kwiamɔ yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ gi liapɔni blɔ ɔ, xe kwizia yɛ kupɔnɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Every high priest is appointed to help others by offering gifts and sacrifices to God because of their sins.
translation_verse: Kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi kakaa, gi bebu idɔnɔ ní banima kusi i, bedu ye si oze ní ba onu tɔ osumu Aya tɔ ɔki Aya bidɔ pɔʋi pɔʋi ni bidɔ kɔkɔ ní ba eboe zimizi na litukpo.

english_verse: A high priest has weaknesses of his own, and he feels sorry for foolish and sinful people.
translation_verse: Agi yɛ ɔtutɔ kyɛ ebotso ní bede glegle me e, aatani litɔ kuplɛ kese ki banama gi báʋite e, xe bizɛɛta kese e.

english_verse: This is why he must offer sacrifices for his own sins and for the sins of others.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso gi ebotso e, lilɛ si ɔpɔʋi bidɔ ɔki Aya aní ní banima eboe zimizi na tètè loso o, pɔ̀ ki yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ eboe zimizi na kyɛ loso o.

english_verse: But no one can have the honor of being a high priest simply by wanting to be one. Only God can choose a priest, and God is the one who chose Aaron.
translation_verse: Lɛ ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́ʋikya kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ye yɛ kubùbù yo ɔki isu u, Aya ko izɛɛxwa ɔnɔ si oze kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ŋwisi kiliɛ gi axwa Aron kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: This is how it was with Christ. He became a high priest, but not just because he wanted the honor of being one. It was God who told him, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!”
translation_verse: Nite ke Kristo fɛ ɔ́kɔ kubùbù yo ɔ́ki isu ya ŋwisi kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi kinɛ ɛ, boŋu i, Aya asi yɛ si, “Mɛ obi wonu; Omono e, medzi wɔ Ɔka.”

english_verse: In another place, God says, “You are a priest forever just like Melchizedek.”
translation_verse: Apani ní ɔkɔ dzedze kyɛ si, “Wɔaze kusumu yo Ɔka kɔtsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Melxizedek eze kinɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: God had the power to save Jesus from death. And while Jesus was on earth, he begged God with loud crying and tears to save him. He truly worshiped God, and God listened to his prayers.
translation_verse: Ni yɛ kesea aʋa ligbã́ nɛ mɛ ɛ, Yesu azaaxwa Aya lɛ azɛɛkɔ yɛ beʋiʋi ʋa aki yɛ ni ozi gagla ni kube e, gi yɛ aatani yɛ kubu dɔni kutse me e. Lɛ gi abùbɔ isu ya a, xe ɔkɔ kubùbù aki yɛ onu i, Aya ata yɛ kutu.

english_verse: Jesus is God's own Son, but still he had to suffer before he could learn what it really means to obey God.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi onu Aya Yebi kyɛ ɛ, akpasi kutununu gani yɛ ɔziã nɔ gi amɔ ɛ, mɛ.

english_verse: This is because God chose him to be a high priest like Melchizedek. Warning against Turning Away
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya axwa yɛ si yɛ onu kusumu yo Ɔka ʋidi ye ní kudeo liɔ aʋa gi Melxizedek eze ŋwisi kusumu yo Ɔka kinɛ ɛ. Mlakídzɛ kede ní kuziŋaa su

english_verse: Much more could be said about this subject. But it is hard to explain, and all of you are slow to understand.
translation_verse: Eboe glegle alɛ gi kwiapani ní liboe lɛ ya su u, pɔ̀ lɛ ese kununu yo kwiazee gagla ki mlɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si mlaʋítani eboe la ese kunu kise ise.

english_verse: By now you should have been teachers, but once again you need to be taught the simplest things about what God has said. You need milk instead of solid food.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si nya lipoe le lina gi lilɛ si mledzi badɔbasɛ xe e, pɔ̀ mledzizia si ɔnutɔ ɔbasɛ mlɔ eboe tɔpu na ní Aya yɛ Liboe le su dzɛ ɛ. Gi nya mlaazɛŋa bidɔ nyipu abla ɛ, mledzizia kumwani yɔ dzɛ.

english_verse: People who live on milk are like babies who don't really know what is right.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si ɔnɔ kakaa gi izɛɛmwa ɛ, odzi onu obivigye lɛ ɔ́ʋina niklɔ gi aanu kudɔbasɛ yɔ ní kiliɛ gi aaze ligbã́ ní kude gyɔgyɔ aʋa su u.

english_verse: We must try to become mature and start thinking about more than just the basic things we were taught about Christ. We shouldn't need to keep talking about why we ought to turn from deeds that bring death and why we ought to have faith in God.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mlaki tɔ kutrɛ ɔtɔ nɔ ní kudɔbasɛ uliɔ gi kwidzi ɔtɔ mɛ ɛ, atɔ kuyurɔ bidɔbasɛbasɛ tɔpu imɛ gi kwikɔ ekpese liboe le ní Kristo su u. Líma si kudzini ɔxɔ vuvu kukpɛ ɛ, gi onu kukyikyi dɔni eboe zimizi i, gi izɛmani kutse me e, ani Aya aʋa kuziŋa mɛ.

english_verse: And we shouldn't need to keep teaching about baptisms or about the laying on of hands or about people being raised from death and the future judgment.
translation_verse: Kɔpɔnɔ ɛ, kudɔbasɛ ní kunikpɛkpɛ ni awla kutrɔtrɔ banɔ aʋa su, kuyɔyɔ dɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ, ni kiliɛ gi Aya yɛ litsixwaxwa nɛ ɛ, ni yɛ litsi le kutsàtsaa kútrakyi i, su.

english_verse: Let's grow up, if God is willing.
translation_verse: Xe Aya aki blɔ kudeonu i, nite kwitrabitɛ.

english_verse: But what about people who turn away after they have already seen the light and have received the gift from heaven and have shared in the Holy Spirit? What about those who turn away after they have received the good message of God and the powers of the future world? There is no way to bring them back. What they are doing is the same as nailing the Son of God to a cross and insulting him in public!
translation_verse: pɔ̀ xe bɛɛdzi kede ní ba kuziŋaa mɛ ɛ, límaɛ plɔplɔ si bedzini ba amanɔ si bekyi ɔna mɛ dzɛ, lɛ ese linu si bɛɛkla Aya Yebi ye ní ose lo su dzɛ, lɛ bɛɛkpɛ yɛ kakpaa ní ɔha kusi i.

english_verse: A field is useful to farmers, if there is enough rain to make good crops grow. In fact, God will bless such a field.
translation_verse: Aya yɛ izɛɛkrira kesea lia gi kizɛɛŋwɛ dzeni ye kuni yo o, gi kuzɛɛdɔ ɛbali ka aʋa a, xe kizɛɛyɛ bidɔ kpɛkpɛɛ ʋɛ ɛ, gi bilɛ veve ki banama a, gi ba loso bɛkpɛ ʋɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But land that produces only thornbushes is worthless. It is likely to fall under God's curse, and in the end it will be set on fire.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ kesea gi kɛyɛ bibu ni siwa sɛ ɛ, kɔ kébu libi tɔtɔ, lɛ kalɛ ní kuxixa mɛ si Aya aaxo ifi kpɛ ka kɔ gɔgɔ ɛ, kifu biakpɛ ka.

english_verse: My friends, we are talking this way. But we are sure that you are doing those really good things people do when they are being saved.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mɛ baʋia dimɛnɔ ba a, xe kwipani nite kyɛ ɛ, ní mlɔ kapɛa mɛ ɛ, kwite si eboe gbã gi aaki mlɔ kubúbú i, aagbani mlɔ kpɛ.

english_verse: God is always fair. He will remember how you helped his people in the past and how you are still helping them. You belong to God, and he won't forget the love you have shown his people.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Aya ɔlɛ ní yɛ kude gyɔgyɔɔ aʋa, lɛ ɔ́tradze axwɛ ana gi mlɛwa a, loo kiliɛ gi mlɛlɔ yɛ ɛ, gani kupɔnɔ liɔ gi mlɛkɔ ɔ, xe mlɛɛki baʋaziŋa ba a.
