english_verse: Why do you fight and argue with each other? Isn't it because you are full of selfish desires that fight to control your body?
translation_verse: Nifɔ kuboeŋwlɛ nì avitɛ ɛdɔ ní mlɔ kusi i? Mlamɔ si kusuŋwasi ni kulekuku uliɔ gi biita kigũ yɛ ní mlɔ mɛ, bɛkɔ́ bidɔ na a?

english_verse: You want something you don't have, and you will do anything to get it. You will even kill! But you still cannot get what you want, and you won't get it by fighting and arguing. You should pray for it.
translation_verse: Mlɛpɛ́ bidɔ pɔ̀ mlátratani bɛ kumɔ ɔ, lɛ loso mlɛtrɔ si mlaye ɔnɔ, mlɛɛpɛ bidɔ ni kimbi kyikyi, pɔ̀ mlátratani bɛ kumɔ ɔ, lɛ loso mlɛɛzɛpɛ avitɛ, lɛ mlɛzɛgɔni i. Mlaʋímɔ kidiliɛ gi mlɛpɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si mláʋiʋi Aya si ɔki mlɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Yet even when you do pray, your prayers are not answered, because you pray just for selfish reasons.
translation_verse: Lɛ xe gi mleeʋí i, mlaʋímɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si mlɔ begyodi ʋa bɛnyani, mlezeʋi bidɔ gi bɛsu axwɛ mlawa kí mlɔ ɔtutɔ mlɔ isami kumɔmɔ ʋɛ.

english_verse: You people aren't faithful to God! Don't you know if you love the world, you are God's enemies? And if you decide to be a friend of the world, you make yourself an enemy of God.
translation_verse: Mlɔ bahasi nɛ! Mléte si xe mlevu kelea mɛ kuʋia ɛ, libasɛ si mlenu ahwafianɛ aki Aya na a? Banɔ ba klɔ gi bɛpɛ si beze baʋia nɛ ɛki kelea mɛ ɛ, bɛbitɛ isu ya ahwafianɛ ki Aya.

english_verse: Do you doubt the Scriptures that say, “God truly cares about the Spirit he has put in us”?
translation_verse: Mlakígyo le edi si anukwarɛ ɔ́tɔtɔ ɔ́ma ní Aya kuŋwlimi yɔ mɛ gi kwipani si, “Ɔfuɛfuɛ ɔnɔ gi Aya akɔ akpɛ ní blɔ mɛ ɛ, eyi ni kaŋuza gagla.”

english_verse: In fact, God treats us with even greater kindness, just as the Scriptures say, “God opposes everyone who is proud, but he blesses all who are humble with undeserved grace.”
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ lipomepɛpɛɛ lɛ gi Aya akɔ ɛ, lilɛ gagla ɛsanɔ. Ŋwisi kiliɛ gi yɛ kuŋwlimi dradraa kwipani si, “Aya ayɔ kedu ní basudɔ ba su, pɔ̀ izɛɛpɛ lipo me ɛki banama gi bepleni isu ya ɛ.”

english_verse: Surrender to God! Resist the devil, and he will run from you.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso, mlepleni isu aki Aya. Mlayɔ kedu ní ozimizi ye su, tɔ aase ní mlɔ su.

english_verse: Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Clean up your lives, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you people who can't make up your mind.
translation_verse: Mleti apɔni Aya tɔ aati pɔni mlɔ. Mleplo mlɔ awla la, mlɔ banɔ zimizi ba! Mlebu eboe nyani nyani na ní mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ, mlɔ banɔ aŋumɛboe bitɛ ba.

english_verse: Be sad and sorry and weep. Stop laughing and start crying. Be gloomy instead of glad.
translation_verse: Mleze ni ɔna nyipu, mlebemi, mleze asigaga mɛ, mlekyi mlɔ kimwɛ tɔ kidzi kubemi, mlɔ isami nɛ tɔ idzi aŋu mɛ kunyasi!

english_verse: Be humble in the Lord's presence, and he will honor you. Saying Cruel Things about Others
translation_verse: Mlepleni isu ní Ɔkaɛ aŋu mɛ tɔ aamuni mlo. Mledi mumɔ ní litsixwaxwa ni onemi ɔsɔlisɔli yɛ su

english_verse: My friends, don't say cruel things about others! If you do, or if you condemn others, you are condemning God's Law. And if you condemn the Law, you put yourself above the Law and refuse to obey either it
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba, mlakípani eboe nyani nyani yurɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba. Ɔnɔ gi izɛɛpani eboe nyani nyani yurɔ yɛ ɔhanuglɔ ɔsɔlisɔli i, loo xwa litsi ni ye e, apani liboe nyani nyani ayurɔ ɔsã nɔ, lɛ axwa litsi ni lɔ ɔ. Xe wɔxwa litsi ni Ɔsã nɔ ɛ, kɔlɔ wónu ɔniliɛ gi ɛɛbitɛ ni Ɔsã nɔ aʋa tɔ ɔ, pɔ ɔniliɛ gi ɛɛxwa litsi ni lo e.

english_verse: or God who gave it. God is our judge, and he can save or destroy us. What right do you have to condemn anyone? Warning against Bragging
translation_verse: Aya tole ko onu Ɔsã nɔ ɔkɔkɔ ɛ nì otsixwa yɛ. Yɛ tètè ko aatani ɔnɔ kubu loo kuzizi. Nyaŋwɛ wogyodi si wonu xe wɔaxwa litsi ni wɔ ɔhanuglɔ ɔ? Mledi mumɔ ní kusufeke su

english_verse: You should know better than to say, “Today or tomorrow we will go to the city. We will do business there for a year and make a lot of money!”
translation_verse: Abla ɛ mlata mɛ kutu, mlɔ banama gi mlɛɛpani si i, “Omono loo kivo e, kwiaga kude trɛ ni ɔma ʋidi ɔtɔ mɛ, kwiaze niklɔ ligɔ tile tɔ kwiawa axwɛ atɔ kwiamɔ kibɔ kpaŋuu.”

english_verse: What do you know about tomorrow? How can you be so sure about your life? It is nothing more than mist that appears for only a little while before it disappears.
translation_verse: Mléte kiliɛ gi mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ liaze kivo kyɛ ɛ! Mlalɛ ŋwisi ɖebleku ye, gi aŋwi taʋɛ ko o, xe edzì alila kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You should say, “If the Lord lets us live, we will do these things.”
translation_verse: Liboe lɛ gi mlaapani linu si, “Xe Ɔkaɛ adimɛ ɛ, kwiaze ligbã́ nɛ tɔ kwiabitɛ kɛya ni kɛkɔlɔ.”

english_verse: Yet you are stupid enough to brag, and it is wrong to be so proud.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ abla ɛ, mlɛɛdɔ̀ isu lɛ mleefeke isu, kusudɔ klɔ petee kwinyani.

english_verse: If you don't do what you know is right, you have sinned.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, ɔniliɛ gi ete liboe gbã nɛ ɛ, gi lilɛ si ɔbitɛ ɛ, xe ɔʋíbitɛ lɛ ɛ, abitɛ liboe zimizi.

english_verse: You rich people should cry and weep! Terrible things are going to happen to you.
translation_verse: Abla ɛ, mlɔ bexonete ba mlata mɛ kutu! Mlebemi tɔ mlawa awowoe la ní kubleble liɔ gi kwitraba mlɔ aʋa su u!

english_verse: Your treasures have already rotted, and moths have eaten your clothes.
translation_verse: Mlɔ exo la ɛfumu, lɛ sakplakpa ʋa bɛta mlɔ ewu la a.

english_verse: Your money has rusted, and the rust will be evidence against you, as it burns your body like fire. Yet you keep on storing up wealth in these last days.
translation_verse: Mlɔ sika yɛ ni klosalo ʋa begyewle, lɛ kugyewleo liɔ ya kwiaze katsali ní mlɔ su, lɛ biata mlɔ kigyɛ ŋwisi kifu kinɛ ɛ. Mlɛbla exo la ní ewe gɔgɔa la ya mɛ.

english_verse: You refused to pay the people who worked in your fields, and now their unpaid wages are shouting out against you. The Lord All-Powerful has surely heard the cries of the workers who harvested your crops.
translation_verse: Mlata kutu! Mleto banama gi bɛwa axwɛ na ní mlɔ inyrɔ nɛ mɛ ɛkpɛ ɛ. Mláta ba aʋɛ na kunutsatsa kutu! Banama gi bɛwa axwɛ na ɛki mlɔ ɛ, ba kubemi yo kwiku Aya Ɔka ʋidi ye yɛ kutu yɔ mɛ.

english_verse: While here on earth, you have thought only of filling your own stomachs and having a good time. But now you are like fat cattle on their way to be butchered.
translation_verse: Mlɔ ligbã nɛ ní kesea ʋa ya ɛ, liiyi ni ligbã́ŋaŋa ni isami mɔmɔ. Mleku kumu ikí mlɔ liye we le.

english_verse: You have condemned and murdered innocent people, who couldn't even fight back. Be Patient and Kind
translation_verse: Mlebu banima lipɔ lɛ mleye banama gi bata kese e, xe báyɔ kedu ní mlɔ su i. Litɔ plɛplɛ kese nì Aya kuxwaxwa

english_verse: My friends, be patient until the Lord returns. Think of farmers who wait patiently for the autumn and spring rains to make their valuable crops grow.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba, mlaplɛ litɔ kese, kɔzɛna ni Ɔkaɛ yɛ kibaba ɛ. Mledi kiliɛ gi ɔnyrɔmɛdzɛɛ izɛɛplɛ litɔ kese e, xe izeepe yɛ kesea tɔ kaki bidɔkpɛkpɛ gi kedzi ŋaŋa kalɛ ní bɛ su i, izeeze nì litɔ plɛplɛ kese ki kedzenilea.

english_verse: Be patient like those farmers and don't give up. The Lord will soon be here!
translation_verse: Mlɔfɛ mlaplɛ litɔ kese. Mlaki mlɔ kudeonu didi yo kumu gi Ɔkaɛ libawe le liti pɔnɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't grumble about each other or you will be judged, and the judge is right outside the door.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba mlakítsà mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba onu u, tɔ Aya ɔkixwa litsi ni mlo o. Otsixwa yɛ, eti apɔnɔ abla gi atráŋwi i.

english_verse: My friends, follow the example of the prophets who spoke for the Lord. They were patient, even when they had to suffer.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba, mlaplɛ aŋu ní beboedoplɛ ba gi bɛpani ní Ɔkaɛ linyi ne me aʋa a. Mlakɔ ba ŋwisi kukɔsrɔnɔ kí litɔ plɛplɛ kese nì kulɛ́lɛɛ ní kini me kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: In fact, we praise the ones who endured the most. You remember how patient Job was and how the Lord finally helped him. The Lord did this because he is so merciful and kind.
translation_verse: Kwixwa ba si basami nɛ lɛ ese linu si bɛtani kulɛɛ. Mlenu Hiob yɛ litɔ plɛplɛ kese onu, lɛ mlete kiliɛ gi Ɔkaɛ abitɛ aki yɛ gɔgɔ ɛ. Lɛ ese linu si asigagadidi nì lipomepɛpɛ bilɛ ní Ɔkaɛ mɛ.

english_verse: My friends, above all else, don't take an oath. You must not swear by heaven or by earth or by anything else. “Yes” or “No” is all you need to say. If you say anything more, you will be condemned.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba, kɔsanɔ ɛ, mlakítàni bidɔ ɔ, xe mlɛɛka ɛplɛ ɛ. Mlakítàni lifunu ne loo kese loo kidɔ dzedze tɔtɔ ɔ. Mlapani ko si, “Ee” xe mlɛtrɔ si ee, nì “Oo” xe mlɛtrɔ si oo, tɔ mlekíku Aya yɛ litsixwaxwa mɛ ɛ. Aya Kuxwaxwa ní Kuziŋa mɛ

english_verse: If you are having trouble, you should pray. And if you are feeling good, you should sing praises.
translation_verse: Dani mlɔ mɛ batɔ beku kuxixa mɛ ɛ? Baxwa Aya. Dani mlɔ mɛ batɔ bɛɛmɔ isami i? Bazà idzi tɔ bakɔ akpɔ̀ Aya.

english_verse: If you are sick, ask the church leaders to come and pray for you. Ask them to put olive oil on you in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Dani mlɔ mɛ batɔ beetse e? Bakpɛ banɔ atsisi ɔha lɔ banɔtsitsi ba, tɔ baxwa Aya ní ba litukpo atɔ basra kumu aki ba ní Ɔkaɛ linyi ne me.

english_verse: If you have faith when you pray for sick people, they will get well. The Lord will heal them, and if they have sinned, he will forgive them.
translation_verse: Aya kuxwaxwa liɔ ní kuziŋa mɛ ɛ, kwiayɔ ni ba; Ɔkaɛ aaki si biadziku ba kìku ye. Lɛ xegi bɛbitɛ eboe zimizi i, biakɔ ba eboe zimizi na kɔkyɛ ba.

english_verse: If you have sinned, you should tell each other what you have done. Then you can pray for one another and be healed. The prayer of an innocent person is powerful, and it can help a lot.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso, mladra mlɔ eboe zimizi na mɛ akí mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba, tɔ mlaxwa Aya ní mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba litukpo tɔ biayɔni mlɔ. Ɔnɔ gbã yɛ Aya kuxwaxwa ɛ, kuli gagla lɛ kuzebu libi i.

english_verse: Elijah was just as human as we are, and for three and a half years his prayers kept the rain from falling.
translation_verse: Eliya eze ɔnɔ blɔ kiniɛ. Axwa Aya ni kimbi kyikyi si dzeni ye ɔkidɔ ɔ, lɛ dzeni ɔtɔtɔ ɔ́dɔ ní kesea aʋa agɔ tata ni kapɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But when he did pray for rain, it fell from the skies and made the crops grow.
translation_verse: Lɛ axwa Aya dzɛ, lɛ ayɛɛ aki dzeni ye, lɛ kesea kyɛ kɛki bidɔŋaŋa ʋɛ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, if any followers have wandered away from the truth, you should try to lead them back.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi ba, xe mlɔ mɛ ɔtɔ adzɛ kede ní anukwarɛ su u, xe ɔnɔ dzedze edzini yɛ amanɔ ɛ,

english_verse: If you turn sinners from the wrong way, you will save them from death, and many of their sins will be forgiven.
translation_verse: mlaplɛ aŋu lɛ ya aʋa si, ɔniliɛ gi aakyi ɔnɔ gi abitɛ eboe zimizi dɔni yɛ eboe zimizi na mɛ ɛ, aabu yɛ esobo la dɔni kutse me, lɛ biakɔ eboe zimizi glegle kɔkyɛ.

english_verse: From Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ. To God's people who are scattered like foreigners in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia.
translation_verse: Keplekpaa lia kɛdɔ ní Petro, Yesu Kristo yɛ ɔnɔ kpɛkpɛ yɛ klɔ ɛki Aya yɛ banɔ kyakya ba gi benu bababa ni kelea lia mɛ ɛ, gi behle eku ní Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia ani Bitinia kuseo me e.

english_verse: God the Father decided to choose you as his people, and his Spirit has made you holy. You have obeyed Jesus Christ and are sprinkled with his blood. I pray that God will be kind to you and will keep on giving you peace! A Real Reason for Hope
translation_verse: Ɔka Aya gi ete mlo akpɛ ɔtɔ ɛ, yɛ akya mlɔ. Aki si yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔdra mlɔ su, ki kutununu ki Yesu Kristo, atɔ yɛ ika lɛ iplo mlɔ su. Lipomepɛpɛ ni kusuyɔ bisrɛ ɛki mlɔ. Mlakpɔ̀ Aya ɔkpɛ kudeonudidi gi kulɛ Ligbã́ nɛ ɛ

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. God is so good, and by raising Jesus from death, he has given us new life and a hope that lives on.
translation_verse: Mlakpɔ̀ Aya gi onu Ɔka aki blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo e! Gani yɛ asigagadidi ʋidi ala gi aki blɔ mɛ ɛ, aki si bedzini blo ɛpɔ̀ ki kudeonudidi gi kulɛ ligbã́ gani Yesu Kristo me e, gi ayɔni yɛ adɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛ,

english_verse: God has something stored up for you in heaven, where it will never decay or be ruined or disappear.
translation_verse: ki kaŋase gi kátrakyrɔ, loo zizi loo kiakpã ɛ. Bɛkɔ kaŋase alia ɛbla ɛki mlɔ ní lifunu ne.

english_verse: You have faith in God, whose power will protect you until the last day. Then he will save you, just as he has always planned to do.
translation_verse: Mlɔ banama gi gani kuziŋa mɛ ɛ, Aya yɛ kigaglaɛ kiwe mlo zɛkɔna ni lipoe lɛ klɔ gi kubúbú yo kwiaba a, gi bɛtrábu ibasɛ ní lipoe gɔgɔ lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: On that day you will be glad, even if you have to go through many hard trials for a while.
translation_verse: Mlamɔ isami glegle ní liboe lɛ ya mɛ, xegi kɔki lipoe kpekpemi itɔ ɛ, liziã si mleze ní asigaga mɛ kɔkpɛ kukenidi ede ede ala mɛ gi mlɛga kyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Your faith will be like gold that has been tested in a fire. And these trials will prove that your faith is worth much more than gold that can be destroyed. They will show that you will be given praise and honor and glory when Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Eboe ala ya ɛba la mɛ tɔ mlɔ kuziŋaa gi kwizɛ kedzi isani sika a, gi izɛɛkyrɔ ɔ, gi nya bekyí awla ní yɛ su gani kifu yɛ mɛ xe e, biamɔ si kulɛ, lɛ liadzi kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀, kusudra ni kubùbù ki mlɔ, xegi bebu Yesu Kristo ebasɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You have never seen Jesus, and you don't see him now. But still you love him and have faith in him, and no words can tell how glad and happy
translation_verse: Gani lɛ mɛ si mlámɔ yɛ fɛ ɛ, mlɛɛlɔ yɛ, lɛ gani lɛ mɛ si mláʋimɔ yɛ abla fɛ ɛ, mlɛzi yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa a, lɛ isami gi batrátani kupani ní lɛ su i, iyi mlɔ mɛ.

english_verse: you are to be saved. This is why you have faith.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si mlɛɛzi kidiliɛ gi kɛ mledi kudeonu ikɔ ɛ, gi kinu kubúbú kí mlɔ esobo la ɛ.

english_verse: Some prophets told how God would treat you with undeserved grace, and they searched hard to find out more about the way you would be saved.
translation_verse: Ní kubúbú uliɔ ya su i, beboedoplɛ ba ya gi bɛpani ní lipomepɛpɛɛ nɛ ɛ, gi liaba ki mlɔ su i, bɛpami lɛ mɛ mɔmɔmɔ ni litɔplɛplɛkese glegle,

english_verse: The Spirit of Christ was in them and was telling them how Christ would suffer and would then be given great honor. So they searched to find out exactly who Christ would be and when this would happen.
translation_verse: gi bekeni edi si betè lipoe le ni kiliɛ ɛ, gi eboe ala aaba la mɛ ɛ, gi la Kristo yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔ, gi eeze ni ba mɛ ɛ, ɛzɛbasɛ lipoe lɛ gi ɛpani plɛ ní Kristo yɛ kinie e, ni eboe gbã ana a, gi aagbani la kukpɛ su i.

english_verse: But they were told that they were serving you and not themselves. They preached to you by the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven. And their message was only for you, even though angels would like to know more about it. Chosen To Live a Holy Life
translation_verse: Aya ebu le abasɛ beboedoplɛ ba si, ba axwɛwawa la ɛ, aní ba isu beesumu, pɔ̀ mlɔ. Ní lipoe lɛ mɛ gi bɛpani ní eboe ala gi la mlenu abla a, gi la banama a, gi bɛpani Liboe Gbã nɛ ɛsi mlɔ, gani Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ ɔ, gi bɛtsisi dɔni lifunu ne aʋa a. Eboe ala enu eboe gi Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba kura kyɛ bɛpɛ si bete e. Mleze ligbã́ Dradra

english_verse: Be alert and think straight. Put all your hope in how God will treat you with undeserved grace when Jesus Christ appears.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, mlabla mlɔ begyodi ʋa aki kakli kubúbú. Mlaŋa isu aʋa; mlatrɔ mlɔ ɔtɔ kudidi yo pɔ́ ní lipomepɛpɛɛ nɛ gi biaki mlɔ ɔ, xegi bebu Yesu Kristo ebasɛ ɛ aʋa.

english_verse: Behave like obedient children. Don't let your lives be controlled by your desires, as they used to be.
translation_verse: Ŋwisi bebi gi bizenu kutu kinɛ ɛ, mlakíki si mlɔ ɔtutɔ mlɔ bapɛ́pɛ zimizi ʋa bagbani mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi mleze e, lipoe lɛ gi mleze ní motemotee me e.

english_verse: Always live as God's holy people should, because God is the one who chose you, and he is holy.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ kiliɛ gi ɔniliɛ ɛ, gi axwa mlɔ adra ɛ, nite lilɛ si mladra ni kidɔ kakaa gi mlabitɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say, “I am the holy God, and you must be holy too.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si bɛŋwlimi plɛ si, “Mladra lɛ ese linu si Madra.”

english_verse: You say that God is your Father, but God doesn't have favorites! He judges all people by what they do. So you must honor God while you live as strangers here on earth.
translation_verse: Agi mlɛzɛxwa Aya si Ɔka a, gi yɛ izɛɛxwa litsi ni ɔnɔ kakaa yɛ axwɛ na aŋu mɛ modi i, mleze mlɔ agbã́ na ŋwisi bababa ní ya ní kubùbù glegle me.

english_verse: You were rescued from the useless way of life you learned from your ancestors. But you know you were not rescued by such things as silver or gold that don't last forever.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si mlete si aní bidɔ gi biazizi ŋwisi klosalo loo sika kinɛ bɛkɔ ebu mlo edɔni kelea mɛ ligbã́ pluplu i lɛ gi lidɔ ní mlɔ bakatsi ba lipoe le me.

english_verse: Christ was chosen even before the world was created, but because of you, he did not come until these last days.
translation_verse: Aya akya yɛ xe bɛbitɛ kelea mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ bebu ye ebasɛ ní ewe gɔgɔa la mɛ kɔkpɛ mlɔ loso o.

english_verse: And when he did come, it was to lead you to have faith in God, who raised him from death and honored him in a glorious way. This is why you have put your faith and hope in God.
translation_verse: Gani yɛ aʋa ɛ, mlɛzɛ Aya aʋa ɛɛŋa gi ayɔni yɛ adɔni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛ, xe emuni ye e; lɛ loso e, mlɔ kuziŋaa ni ɔtɔ kudidi yo e, bikpasi ní Aya mɛ.

english_verse: You obeyed the truth, and your souls were made pure. Now you sincerely love each other. But you must keep on loving with all your heart.
translation_verse: Abla gi mlɛdra isu ya su u, gi mlenu kutu iiki anukwarɛ ɛ, xe kunɔlɔɔ kulɛ ní mlɔ mɛ ki mlɔ benemi ba ɛ, mlalɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba dɔni ɔna mɛ ke.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Humans wither like grass, and their glory fades like wild flowers. Grass dries up, and flowers fall to the ground.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si, “Banima petee balɛ ŋwisi siwa kinɛ ɛ, lɛ ba kupedi yo petee ŋwisi siwa sɛ sɛ kufùfù yo kinɛ ɛ. Siwa sɛ sizɛɛ yrɔ, lɛ sɛ kufùfù yo kuzɛɛwɔli i,

english_verse: But what the Lord has said will stand forever.” Our good news to you is what the Lord has said.
translation_verse: pɔ̀ Ɔkaɛ yɛ liboe le e, liaze tsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ.” Liboe lɛ ya linu Liboe lɛ gi lɛ bɛpani iiki mlɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Stop being hateful! Quit trying to fool people, and start being sincere. Don't be jealous or say cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, mlebu mlɔ isu ya ní kuzimizi kakaa mɛ, mlakísɛ asia loo mlakɔ ɔŋufa loo kaŋuzã loo mlezizi ɔnɔ su ni kapɛatɔtɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the pure spiritual milk that will help you grow and be saved.
translation_verse: Ŋwisi bebivigye kinɛ ɛ, mlapɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ kumwani gbã tɔ gani kɔ mɛ ɛ, mlaatsi ní mlɔ kubúbú yo me,

english_verse: You have already found out how good the Lord really is.
translation_verse: abla gi mlete si Ɔkaɛ apɛ ɛ. Kristo yɛ onu Limwa nɛ aʋa Likla nɛ ki Aya yɛ ligba lɛ

english_verse: Come to Jesus Christ. He is the living stone people have rejected, but which God has chosen and highly honored.
translation_verse: Gi mlɛba yɛ klɔ ɛ, ligbã́ nɛ likla ɛnɛ gi banima bázɛ si linu kididɔ ɛ, lɛ Aya akya gi liŋa kedzi kí yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: And now you are living stones being used to build a spiritual house. You are also a group of holy priests, and with the help of Jesus Christ you will offer sacrifices that please God.
translation_verse: Mlɔ kyɛ ŋwisi akla gbagbe kinɛ ɛ, bɛɛwa mlɔ su axwɛ tɔ bɛkɔ ɛwa Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ligba, tɔ mlaze kusɔliɔ baka dradra, gi mlazɛɛki Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ bidɔpɔʋipɔʋi i, gi biaku Aya aŋu gani Yesu Kristo me e.

english_verse: It is just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a choice and precious cornerstone. No one who has faith in this one will be disappointed.”
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya yɛ liboe le lipani si, “Dike maplɛ likla ní Zion, Likla kyakya gi lizɛ kedzi i, gi mɛɛkɔ ɛtrɔ ŋwisi limwa nɛ aʋa likla kinɛ ɛ; lɛ ɔniliɛ gi azɛ yɛ aʋa aŋa ɛ kuye kutráku ye liwewe e.”

english_verse: You are followers of the Lord, and this stone is precious to you. But it isn't precious to those who refuse to follow him. They are the builders who tossed aside the stone that turned out to be the most important one of all.
translation_verse: Abla ki mlɔ banama gi mlɛziŋa ɛ, likla ɛnɛ ya liŋa kedzi. Pɔ̀ ki banama gi baziŋa ɛ, “Likla ɛnɛ klɔ gi bagbawa ʋa bɛyurɔ si lipɛ ɛ, lɛ lidzi ɔxɔ lɔ aʋa likla nɛ.”

english_verse: But you are God's chosen and special people. You are a group of royal priests and a holy nation. God has brought you out of darkness into his marvelous light. Now you must tell all the wonderful things he has done. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlɔ kɔɔ mlenu banɔ gi bɛkya a, kusɔliɔ baka, kekusipe me banɔ gi bizesumu Aya a, limade gi lidra a, banɔ gi benu Aya yɛ banɛ ɛ, atɔ mlaaza kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ idzi ki yɛ gi yɛ axwa mlɔ adɔni litumu ne me manɔ ní yɛ kuklekle dradraa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: “Once you were nobody. Now you are God's people. At one time no one had mercy on you. Now God has treated you with kindness.” Live as God's Servants Should
translation_verse: Lipoetɔ gi liza mɛ ɛ, mléze Aya yɛ banɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ abla ɛ, mlenu yɛ banɔ; lipoetɔ gi liza mɛ ɛ, mlázɛ Aya yɛ asigagadidi la a, pɔ̀ abla ɛ, mlɛzi yɛ asigagadidi la.

english_verse: Dear friends, you are foreigners and strangers on this earth. So I beg you not to surrender to those desires that fight against you.
translation_verse: Mɛ baʋia ba, mapɛ dɔni mlɔ klɔ, ŋwisi banɔ gi bɛdɔ kese dzedze me nì bababa ní kelea lia mɛ ɛ kinɛ, si mlakíyurɔ isu aki mlɔ kisugyaɛ kɛ bapɛ́pɛ ʋa gi bɛɛta kigũ yɛ ní mlɔ esobo la a.

english_verse: Always let others see you behaving properly, even though they may still accuse you of doing wrong. Then on the day of judgment, they will honor God by telling the good things they saw you do.
translation_verse: Mleze agbã́ Gbã ní banama gi bázɛ Aya aʋa aŋa ɛ, ba kusi tɔ xegi bedo si mlenu banɔ nyani nyani fɛ ɛ, biamɔ mlɔ eboe gbã na tɔ biakpɔ Aya ní liwe lɛ gi aaba blɔ klɔ aʋa a. Kusububɔ ki mlɔ Baka ba ni mlɔ Baʋaŋa ba

english_verse: The Lord wants you to obey all human authorities, especially the Emperor, who rules over everyone.
translation_verse: Kɔkpɛ kubùbù yo gi mlɛɛki blɔ Ɔkaɛ loso e, mlabubɔ isu aki kaʋaŋaa kakaa gi bedu ní banima kusi i; xegi ki Okusi ye gi yɛ ɛɛŋa ɔnɔ kakaa aʋa a,

english_verse: You must also obey governors, because they are sent by the Emperor to punish criminals and to praise good citizens.
translation_verse: loo yɛ baʋaŋa ba gi akpɛ si behe kutu aki banama a, gi bɛbitɛ eboe zimizi ani tɔ bakpɔ̀ banama a, gi bɛbitɛ eboe gbã.

english_verse: God wants you to silence stupid and ignorant people by doing right.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Aya kupɛ́pɛ linu si mlabitɛ eboe gbã tɔ mletsi motemotee kunugu yo akpɛ ni banima onu.

english_verse: You are free, but still you are God's servants, and you must not use your freedom as an excuse for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Mleze ligbã ŋwisi banɔ gi balɛ ní ɔwlamɔmɔ mɛ ɛ; pɔ̀ mlakíkɔ mlɔ ɔwlamɔmɔ nɔ ɛkɔ ewe eboe zimizi na, boŋu i, mleze ligbã́ ŋwisi Aya yɛ banɔsumu kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Respect everyone and show special love for God's people. Honor God and respect the Emperor. The Example of Christ's Suffering
translation_verse: Mlakpɛ kubùbù ní ɔnɔ kakaa su, mlalɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ baʋaziŋa ba, mlese Aya atɔ mlakɔ kubùbù aki Okusi ye.

english_verse: Servants, you must obey your masters and always show respect to them. Do this, not only to those who are kind and thoughtful, but also to those who are cruel.
translation_verse: Mlɔ banɔ dzidzi ba a, mlepleni isu akpɛ ní mlɔ baka ba ese ni kubùbù kakaa, tɔ mlakpɛ kubùbù yo aní ki banɔaklɔ gi bɛpɛ ɛ, xe bizeebù banɔ su u, tètè ko o, pɔ̀ ki banama gi balɛ kitikiti fɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God will bless you, even if others treat you unfairly for being loyal to him.
translation_verse: Lipɛ xe ɔnɔ aatani kuze ní kupèpè gi nya kúnu yɛ kunɛ ɛ ese, lɛ ese linu si ɛɛplɛ aŋu ní Aya aʋa a.

english_verse: You don't gain anything by being punished for some wrong you have done. But God will bless you, if you have to suffer for doing something good.
translation_verse: Libi woli liabu ki mlɔ xe bekusi mlo o, xe mlɛlɛɛ ní kɔ onu kɔkpɛ liboe zimizi gi mlɛbitɛ ɛ? Pɔ̀ xe bekusi mlo kɔkpɛ liboe gbã gi mlɛbitɛ ɛ, xe mlɛtani kɔ onu kulɛ ɛ, lɛ ya linu kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ ɛki mlɔ ní Aya aŋu mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: After all, God chose you to suffer as you follow in the footsteps of Christ, who set an example by suffering for you.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya loso Aya axwa mlɔ, lɛ ese linu si Kristo amɔ ɔzia ní mlɔ onu lɛ aki mlɔ liŋwitsɛ si, tɔ mlaga yɛ kugakli yɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Christ did not sin or ever tell a lie.
translation_verse: “Ɔ́bitɛ liboe zimizi, lɛ kemeno kama ni yɛ onu u.”

english_verse: Although he was abused, he never tried to get even. And when he suffered, he made no threats. Instead, he had faith in God, who judges fairly.
translation_verse: Agi bekpini ye kyɛ ɛ, óbu le onu ni kukpini i; gi amɔ ɔzia nɔ ɛ, ɔ́kpɛ ɔnɔnɔ lifu u. Boŋu i, akɔ yɛ isu ya atrɔ ní ɔniliɛ gi izɛɛtsa litsi gyɔgyɔ lɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: Christ carried the burden of our sins. He was nailed to the cross, so we would stop sinning and start living right. By his cuts and bruises you are healed.
translation_verse: Kristo ɔtutɔ etu blɔ eboe zimizi na ní yɛ isu ya mɛ kɔtsinɔ ni ose lo su, tɔ eboe zimizi na akíŋa blɔ aʋa tɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ tɔ kwiaze ligbã́ ki eboe gyɔgyɔ la. Gani yɛ ebì la mɛ bɛyɔni blɔ ɔ.

english_verse: You had wandered away like sheep. Now you have returned to the one who is your shepherd and protector.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si mleze ŋwisi iʋesi gi ilila, pɔ̀ abla ɛ, mledziba ní Oʋesigbanɔ yɛ ni mlɔ esobo la Ɔʋadi ye klɔ.

english_verse: If you are a wife, you must put your husband first. Even if he opposes our message, you will win him over by what you do. No one else will have to say anything to him,
translation_verse: Niteme ke mlɔ benyimedze ba kyɛ ŋwisi banɔdzidzi ba kinɛ ɛ, mlepleni isu aki mlɔ benye ba, atɔ xe bamɛ batɔ bázɛ Aya yɛ liboe le aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ, mlɔ kizeze me kiaki si biaziŋa gi litrázia si mlapani tɔɔ ɔ,

english_verse: because he will see how you honor God and live a pure life.
translation_verse: lɛ ese linu si biamɔ kiliɛ gi mlɔ ligbãzeze ne lidra ɛ, ni kubùbù yo gi mlɛkpɛ ní isu ya su i, si bipɛ.

english_verse: Don't depend on things like fancy hairdos or gold jewelry or expensive clothes to make you look beautiful.
translation_verse: Mlɔ kusululɔɔ kukídɔ ní oge no bidɔkpɛkpɛ ʋɛ ŋwisi siya sɛ kututu yo loo ni sika yɛ bidɔ mɛ loo awu gbã na kukpɛkpɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Long ago those women who worshiped God and put their hope in him made themselves beautiful by putting their husbands first.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si kude uliɔ aʋa kana mɛ badzɛ dradraa ba gi bɛkɔ ba kudeonu didi yo etrɔ ní Aya aʋa ɛ, bɛga xe bɛbitɛ ɛ, gi bezeepe di i. Bɛ pleni isu ikpɛ ní ba ɔtutɔ ba benye ba ese.

english_verse: For example, Sarah obeyed Abraham and called him her master. You are her true children, if you do right and don't let anything frighten you.
translation_verse: Ŋwisi Sara gi enu kutu u aki Abraham xe axwa yɛ si yɛkaɛ kinɛ ɛ. Mlenu yɛ bebidzɛ xegi mlɛbitɛ eboa la gi ɛpɛ ɛ, xegi mlése lifu i.

english_verse: If you are a husband, you should be thoughtful of your wife. Treat her with honor, because she isn't as strong as you are, and she shares with you in the gift of life. Then nothing will stand in the way of your prayers. Suffering for Doing Right
translation_verse: Lɛ niteme kee mlɔ badzɛnye ba kyɛ ɛ, mlezè nì mlɔ bedze ba ní kuboesenu me, tɔ mlamɔ ba si ba benu mlɔ bapɔnɔpɔnɔ ba klɔ ba awla gi kigagla kíma a. Mlakpɛ kubùbù yo ní ba su, lɛ ese linu si mlɔ ni ba mlɛtrazɛ kaŋase alia gi kenu Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ bidɔkɔkɔɛ ʋɛ gi binu ligbã́ nɛ ɛ, tɔ kididɔ kikítsi kude ɛki mlɔ xegi mlɛxwa Aya a. Ɔzia mɔmɔ nɔ gani bidɔ gbã kubitɛ mɛ ɛ

english_verse: Finally, all of you should agree and have concern and love for each other. You should also be kind and humble.
translation_verse: Tɔ migù mɛ liboe le e, mlɔ petee mleze ní kusuyɔ mɛ ni mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba; mlakɔ litɔ lɛ mɛ aki mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba, lɛ mlalɔ ba ŋwisi benemi kinɛ ɛ, mlenu eboe ese atɔ mlabubɔ isu ya.

english_verse: Don't be hateful and insult people just because they are hateful and insult you. Instead, treat everyone with kindness. You are God's chosen ones, and he will bless you. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Mlakídzini eboe zimizi atsa liʋɛ ɛki eboe zimizi i, loo kukpini ki kukpini, boŋu i, mlakɔ kukrira atsa liʋɛ, lɛ ese linu si liboe lɛ ya loso bɛxwa mlɔ atɔ mlaazɛ kukrira ŋwisi kaŋase kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Give up your evil ways and do right, as you find and follow the road to peace.
translation_verse: Lilɛ si okyi kede ɔkpɛ eboe zimizi tɔ ɔbitɛ eboe gbã; lilɛ si ɔpɛ kusuyɔ tɔ ose kuni kɔ kude e.

english_verse: The Lord watches over everyone who obeys him, and he listens to their prayers. But he opposes everyone who does evil.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Ɔkaɛ yɛ aŋu na alɛ ní banama gi ba bede ʋa bɛgyɔ su lɛ izeenu xegi bɛxwa yɛ ɛ, Pɔ̀ Ɔkaɛ izɛɛyɔ kedu ní banama gi bizɛbitɛ eboe zimizi na su u.”

english_verse: Can anyone really harm you for being eager to do good deeds?
translation_verse: Ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́trakpɛ mlɔ ebi xegi mleekeni idi si mlɛɛbitɛ eboe gbã a.

english_verse: Even if you have to suffer for doing good things, God will bless you. So stop being afraid and don't worry about what people might do.
translation_verse: Lɛ xegi mlɛmɔ ɔzia kɔkpɛ gi mlɛbitɛ eboe gbã fɛ ɛ, mlamɔ isami! “Mlakíse kidiliɛ gi bese e, lɛ lifu likíku mlo o.”

english_verse: Honor Christ and let him be the Lord of your life. Always be ready to give an answer when someone asks you about your hope.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlakpɛ kubùbù yo ní Kristo su ŋwisi Ɔkaɛ kinɛ dɔni mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ. Mleze ní kublabla mɛ lipoe kakaa tɔ mlebú mlɔ kudeonudidi uliɔ gi kulɛ ní mlɔ awla ɛ, ese aki ɔnɔ kakaa gi aaʋi mlo e. Pɔ̀ mlabitɛ lɛ ní litɔplɛplɛkese ni kubùbù me e.

english_verse: Give a kind and respectful answer and keep your conscience clear. This way you will make people ashamed for saying bad things about your good conduct as a follower of Christ.
translation_verse: Mlaki tɔ mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ idra, tɔ banama gi beekpini mlo kɔkpɛ mlɔ kizeze me gbã ɛ, ŋwisi banɔ gi bali ní Kristo me e, atɔ kuye kwiaku ba kɔkpɛ ba asia na gi beezizi mlɔ su i.

english_verse: You are better off to obey God and suffer for doing right than to suffer for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Lɛ lipɛ sanɔ si wɔamɔ ɔzia kɔkpɛ wɔ eboe gbã na xe liaze Aya yɛ kupɛpɛ ɛ, sanɔ si wɔabitɛ eboe zimizi i.

english_verse: Christ died once for our sins. An innocent person died for those who are guilty. Christ did this to bring you to God, when his body was put to death and his spirit was made alive.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Kristo etse aki eboe zimizi na tule kpoo, ɔnɔ gi yɛ bede ʋa bɛgyɔ ɛki banama gi ba bede ʋa bágyɔ ɔ, tɔ yɛ aatu ɔtɔ ni blɔ tsini Aya klɔ. Beye ye ní kisugyaɛ mɛ, pɔ̀ Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛyɔni yɛ ɛ,

english_verse: Christ then preached to the spirits that were being kept in prison.
translation_verse: lɛ gani Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ klɔ aʋa ɛ, azɛɛpani liboe gbã nɛ aki ifuɛfuɛ nɛ klɔ gi bɛkpɛ ní ligba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: They had disobeyed God while Noah was building the boat, but God had been patient with them. Eight people went into that boat and were brought safely through the flood.
translation_verse: Lɛ inu banama gi bénu kutu aki Aya lipoe gblamadzaɛtɔ lɛ ya ʋa, ba ifuɛfuɛ nɛ. Lipoe lɛ gi Aya azeepe ba a, ni litɔplɛplɛkese ní ewe ala klɔ mɛ gi Noa azɛɛwa onitsahu lo e. Banɔ kiklakla kitɔ ɔgɔtiaʋa ba ko bɛmɔ kubúbú gani kuni yo me.

english_verse: Those flood waters were like baptism that now saves you. But baptism is more than just washing your body. It means turning to God with a clear conscience, because Jesus Christ was raised from death.
translation_verse: Lɛ kuni uliɔ ya kunu kunikpɛkpɛɔ gyesi gi kɔ kwibu mlo abla fɛ ɛ. Aní simlu se kuploplo ni mlɔ kisugyaɛ su, pɔ̀ gani kukaka ki Aya dɔnɔ ní begyodi gbã ʋa mɛ ɛ. Bɛ bibu blo gani Yesu Kristo yɛ kuyɔyɔ mɛ ɛ,

english_verse: Christ is now in heaven, where he sits at the right side of God. All angels, authorities, and powers are under his control.
translation_verse: gi yɛ atrɛ ní lifunu ne e, xe ɔlɛ ní Aya yɛ kaŋawla mɛ ɛ, xe Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba, ni baʋaŋa ba ani lifunu ne bigagla ʋɛ bikpasi ní yɛ ese e.

english_verse: It means you have turned from your own desires and want to obey God for the rest of your life.
translation_verse: Lɛ klɔ ʋa loso e, yɛ ligbã nɛ dɔni abla kɔtsinɔ ɛ, líma ɛki kelea lia ya me kisugya mɛ kupɛ́pɛ zimizi i, boŋu ki Aya yɛ kupɛ́pɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You have already lived long enough like people who don't know God. You were immoral and followed your evil desires. You went around drinking and partying and carrying on. In fact, you even worshiped disgusting idols.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si mlezizi lipoe glegle eza nɔ gi mlɛzɛɛbitɛ eboe ala gi babubitɛ ba bɛkya si biazɛɛbitɛ ɛ. Beze ligbã́ ní ahasiboe, kinyani, kudaŋwɛŋwɛ ádzɛ ni enyime boe, ligbãŋaŋa ni kubusumu me.

english_verse: Now your former friends wonder why you have stopped running around with them, and they curse you for it.
translation_verse: Litu ba kugyɔ si mláma likpɔ ni ba ní ba ligbã́ zimizi ne me tɔɔ, lɛ loso beekpini mlo o.

english_verse: But they will have to answer to God, who judges the living and the dead.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ biabu isu unu ki Aya, gi yɛ ɔlɛ ní kublabla mɛ si yixwa litsi ni banama gi balɛ ligbã́ a, nì banama gi betse e.

english_verse: The good news has even been preached to the dead, so that after they have been judged for what they have done in this life, their spirits will live with God.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya loso bɛsɔli Liboe Gbã nɛ ɛki banama gi betse abla kyɛ ɛ, atɔ biaxwa litsi ni ba ní kisugyaɛ onu u; bɛsɔli ki ba tɔ ní ba Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ mɛ ligbãzeze ne me e biaze ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Aya ɔlɛ ɛ kinɛ.

english_verse: Everything will soon come to an end. So be serious and be sensible enough to pray.
translation_verse: Kidɔ kakaa kɛ ɔgùkɔ ɛna pɔ́. Lɛ loso, mladra mlɔ begyodi ʋa mɛ, tɔ mlaŋa isu aʋa atɔ mlaatani Aya kuxwa.

english_verse: Most important of all, you must sincerely love each other, because love wipes away many sins.
translation_verse: Ni kidɔ kakaa mɛ ɛ, mlalɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba ni ɔna gbã, lɛ ese linu si kulɔlɔɔ kuzeewe eboe zimizi glegle.

english_verse: Welcome people into your home and don't grumble about it.
translation_verse: Mladra mlɔ kupeo aki mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba faã kutɛ̀tɛ̀ kukíze ní lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Each of you has been blessed with one of God's many wonderful gifts to be used in the service of others. So use your gift well.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa ɔwa bidɔkɔkɔɛ ʋɛ gi azɛ ɛ, su axwɛ tɔ ɔkɔ bɛ ɔpɔni banɔdzedze ba ní anukwarɛɛ mɛ gi ɛɛwa Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ su axwɛ ní lɛ edeke la onu u.

english_verse: If you have the gift of speaking, preach God's message. If you have the gift of helping others, do it with the strength that God supplies. Everything should be done in a way that will bring honor to God because of Jesus Christ, who is glorious and powerful forever. Amen. Suffering for Being a Christian
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi izɛpani liboe le e, ɔpani lɛ ŋwisi Aya yɛ liboe le ɔtutɔ ɛɛpani. Ɔniliɛ gi eesumu i, osumu ni kigaglaɛ liɛ gi Aya aki yɛ ɛ, atɔ ní liboe kakaa mɛ ɛ, biakɔ kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ ki Aya gani Yesu Kristo me. Atɔ kusudraa ni kigaglaɛ kize yɛ kinɛ kɔtsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ. Atɔ liba lɛ mɛ. Ɔzia mɔmɔ Ŋwisi Kristoɔnɛ kinɛ

english_verse: Dear friends, don't be surprised or shocked that you are going through testing that is like walking through fire.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi dimɛnɔ ba, kufekedi yeʋiyeʋi uliɔ mɛ gi mlɛɛga ɛ, kukíze onugutsetse ɛki mlɔ ŋwisi bidɔ gi baʋímɔ edi i kɛ kiba mlɔ aʋa kinɛ.

english_verse: Be glad for the chance to suffer as Christ suffered. It will prepare you for even greater happiness when he makes his glorious return.
translation_verse: Boŋu i, mlamɔ isami si mlɛmɔ kapɛatɔ ní Kristo yɛ ɔzia mɔmɔ nɔ mɛ, tɔ isami iku mlo ɛsanɔ xegi bebu yɛ kuklekleo ɛbasɛ i.

english_verse: Count it a blessing when you suffer for being a Christian. This shows that God's glorious Spirit is with you.
translation_verse: Bɛkrira mlɔ xegi bekpini mlo kɔkpɛ Kristo yɛ linyi ne loso o, lɛ ese linu si kuklekleo Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ gi onu Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛ, ɔtini ní mlɔ aʋa.

english_verse: But you deserve to suffer if you are a murderer, a thief, a crook, or a busybody.
translation_verse: Xegi mlɔmɛ ɔtɔ ɛɛmɔ ɔzia ɛ, likíze kɔkpɛ si onu ɔnɔye, loo oze, loo ɔnɔ gi ɛɛbitɛ eboe zimizi, loo ɛɛkpɛ onugu ní banɔ eboe me e.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to suffer for being a Christian. Praise God that you belong to him.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xegi wɔɛmɔ ɔzia kɔkpɛ gi wonu Kristoɔnɛ ɛ, likíku wɔ kuye e, boŋu i, do Aya ɖase si linyii nɛ klɔ lilɛ ní wɔ su.

english_verse: God has already begun judging his own people. And if his judgment begins with us, imagine how terrible it will be for those who refuse to obey his message. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si lipoe le lina si litsixwaxwa nɛ likpese ni Aya yɛ banima; lɛ xe likpese ni blɔ ɛ, kitɛ liaze ki banɔaklɔ gi bénu kutu aki Aya yɛ Liboe Gbã nɛ ɛ?

english_verse: “If good people barely escape, what will happen to sinners and to others who don't respect God?”
translation_verse: Lɛ kiliɛ gi Liboe le lipani si i, “Xegi lilɛ gagla si bebu banama gi ba bede ʋa bɛdra ɛ, kitɛ, liaze ki banama gi bénu Aya yɛ banɛ nì banɔ zimizi ba ɛ?”

english_verse: If you suffer for obeying God, you must have complete faith in your faithful Creator and keep on doing right.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, banama gi bɛmɔ ɔzia nɔ ní Aya yɛ kupɛpɛɔ onu i, lilɛ si bakɔ ba isu akpɛ ní ba ɔbitɛbitɛɛ anukwarɛɛ onetee yɛ awla tɔ batrɛ ní ba eboe gbã na aʋa a.

english_verse: Church leaders, I am writing to encourage you. I too am a leader, as well as a witness to Christ's suffering, and I will share in his glory when it is shown to us.
translation_verse: Mɛɛki banɔtsitsi ba ní mlɔ kusi litukpo ŋwisi ɔnɔtsitsi kinɛ ɛ, ɔnɔ gi aŋa katsalia aki Kristo yɛ ɔzia mɔmɔ ni ɔnɔ gi yɛ kyɛ aamɔ ɔŋakɔ ní kuklekleo liɔ gi bɛtrábu i basɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Just as shepherds watch over their sheep, you must watch over everyone God has placed in your care. Do it willingly in order to please God, and not simply because you think you must. Let it be something you want to do, instead of something you do merely to make money.
translation_verse: Mleze beʋesigbanɔ aki Aya yɛ iʋesi lɛ gi ilɛ ní mlɔ kaʋadi ya ese e. Mleze baʋadi ani gi bɛtrɔ ɛki mlɔ ɔ, pɔ́ gi mlɛdimɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ ɛ, gi Aya apɛ si mlabitɛ ɛ, ani ki kibɔpɛpɛ ni kimbi kyikyi loso, boŋu ni kupɛpɛ si mleesumu u.

english_verse: Don't be bossy to those people who are in your care, but set an example for them.
translation_verse: Mlakíkeni edi si mlɛɛŋa kamla ní banama gi bɛkɔ ɛkpɛ ní mlɔ awla ɛ aʋa, pɔ̀ mleze liŋwitsɛ aki iʋesi le e.

english_verse: Then when Christ the Chief Shepherd returns, you will be given a crown that will never lose its glory.
translation_verse: Atɔ xe bagagbanɔ ba ɔkaɛ aba ɛ, mlazɛ kusudraa likusikuto le gi litrálila lɛ kuklekleo liwewe e.

english_verse: All of you young people should obey your elders. In fact, everyone should be humble toward everyone else. The Scriptures say, “God opposes proud people, but he helps everyone who is humble.”
translation_verse: Niteme kee mlɔ sɔhɛ ba ɛ, mlepleni isu aki banama gi betsi sani mlɔ ɛ. Mlɔ petee mlakpɛ kusububɔ ŋwisi ewu kinɛ ɛtsinɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba su; lɛ ese linu si liboe le lipani si, “Aya izɛyɔ kedu ní basudɔ ba su, pɔ́ izɛpɛ lipo me ɛki banama gi bɛbubɔ isu i.”

english_verse: Be humble in the presence of God's mighty power, and he will honor you when the time comes.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mlabubɔ isu akpɛ ní Aya yɛ ɔwla gagla lɔ ese, atɔ aamuni mlo ní yɛ lipoe gbã nɛ aʋa.

english_verse: Be on your guard and stay awake. Your enemy, the devil, is like a roaring lion, sneaking around to find someone to attack.
translation_verse: Mlevu isu ya, tɔ mleze ni aŋu! Mlɔ ahwafiɔnɛɛ, ozimizi ye, ɛwa mlɔ ŋwisi gyata kinɛ, gi ɛpɛ ɔnutɔ si yivu ita a.

english_verse: But you must resist the devil and stay strong in your faith. You know that all over the world the Lord's followers are suffering just as you are.
translation_verse: Mlalɛɛ gaglaa ní mlɔ kuziŋaa aʋa, tɔ mletsi kudeonu aki yɛ, lɛ ese linu si mlete si mlɔ benemi baʋaziŋa ba ní kelea mɛ ɛ, bɛɛga kini tilee liɛ ke me.

english_verse: But God shows undeserved kindness to everyone. That's why he appointed Christ Jesus to choose you to share in his eternal glory. You will suffer for a while, but God will make you complete, steady, strong, and firm.
translation_verse: Pɔ xe mlɛmɔ kini ye taʋɛ ɛ, Aya gi yɛ linɛ linu lipomepɛpɛ nɛ petee e, xe yɛ axwa mlɔ amani yɛ kusudraa gi kuʋídu ní Kristo me e, yɛ ɔtutɔ aadzi ni mlo kudu, lɛ aaki si mlaze gagla, lɛ mlaali, lɛ mlatrahwa a.

english_verse: God will be in control forever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Yɛ kinɛ kinu kigaglaɛ kɔtsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ. Atɔ liba lɛ mɛ. Kunɔpanɔ gɔgɔɔ

english_verse: Silvanus helped me write this short letter, and I consider him a faithful follower of the Lord. I wanted to encourage you and tell you how kind God really is, so you will keep on having faith in him.
translation_verse: Sila gi makɔ ŋwisi onemi anukwarɛ onete e, yɛ apɔni mɛ xe maŋwlimi keplekpa kpekpemia lia ya. Mapɛ si mikpɛ mlɔ sise lɛ mɛɛŋa katsalia si, lɛ ya linu Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ ɔtutɔ lɔ. Mlalɛɛ ní lɛ aʋa gaglaa.

english_verse: Greetings from the Lord's followers in Babylon. They are God's chosen ones. Mark, who is like a son to me, sends his greetings too.
translation_verse: Ɔsɔli ha lɔ gi ɔlɛ ní Babilonia a, gi ɔlɛ ŋwisi onemidzɛ ki mlɔ ɛ, gi Aya akya apɔni mlɔ ɔ, fɛ ɛpani mlɔ, niteme kee mɛ obi ye Marko fɛ apani mlɔ.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. I pray that God will give peace to everyone who belongs to Christ.
translation_verse: Mlakpɛ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba wolaa ni kulɔlɔ ní Kristo me. Atɔ kusuyɔ kuze ni mlo banama petee gi mlalɛ ní Kristo me e.

english_verse: From Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ. To everyone who shares with us in the privilege of believing that our God and Savior Jesus Christ will do what is just and fair.
translation_verse: Keplekpaa lia ya kɛdɔ ní Simon Petro gi onu Yesu Kristo yɛ ɔnɔsumu ni ɔnɔ kpɛkpɛ kɔ. Ɛki banama gi gani blɔ Aya a ni ɔnɔbu ye Yesu Kristo ba kude gyɔgyɔ aʋa a, bɛzɛ kuziŋaa gi kwizɛ kedzi ŋwisi blɔ kuni yɔ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to you and will let you live in perfect peace! May you keep learning more and more about God and our Lord Jesus. Living as the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Atɔ lipomepɛpɛ ni kusuyɔ kuze ni mlɔ ní kisrɛsrɛ mɛ gani Aya ni blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu ba kutete me e. Mlaka ní mlɔ Kuxwaxwaa aʋa.

english_verse: We have everything we need to live a life that pleases God. It was all given to us by God's own power, when we learned he had invited us to share in his wonderful goodness.
translation_verse: Aya yɛ kigaglaɛ kiki blɔ kidɔ kakaa gi kwizia ɛki ligbã ni kutununu ki Aya gani blɔ eboa la gi kwite ní yɛ su i mɛ ɛ, yɛ ɔniliɛ gi yɛ axwa blɔ gani yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kusudra ni yɛ kupɛ́pɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God made great and marvelous promises, so his nature would become part of us. Then we could escape our evil desires and the corrupt influences of this world.
translation_verse: Gani la ya mɛ ɛ, aki blɔ yɛ kakaplɛ zikedzia, tɔ gani bɛ mɛ ɛ, kwiakɔ litɔ ní yɛ kizezee me atɔ kwiamɔ ɔwla dɔni kelea lia mɛ ligbã́zeze nyani nyani lɛ gi blɔ bapɛ́pɛ zimizi ba bizɛɛmanɔ ɛ, mɛ.

english_verse: If you keep growing in this way, it will show that what you know about our Lord Jesus Christ has made your lives useful and meaningful.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si xegi kizeze me gbã kɛ ya kilɛ ní mlɔ awla ní kisrɛsrɛ mɛ ɛ, biaki si mlaze banɔ gi mlɔ eboe aawa lixwɛ ɛ, lɛ mlɔ kuboeteo ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo su i, kwiaki si mlaabu libi sanɔ ɔ.

english_verse: But if you don't grow, you are like someone who is nearsighted or blind, and you have forgotten that your past sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔniliɛ awla gi bidɔ bɛ ya bíma ɛ, onu ɔnɔ gi yɛ ketu ya ko izɛɛmɔ lɛ onu kaŋupo, lɛ ese linu si edze si beplo yɛ eboe zimizi koko la ɛzanɔ ní yɛ su.

english_verse: My friends, you must do all you can to show God has really chosen and selected you. If you keep on doing this, you won't stumble and fall.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, mɛ benemi ba, mlekeni edi gaglaa tɔ mlatrɔ likla ni lɛ aʋa si mlɔ kuxwaxwaa ni mlɔ kukyakya ɛ; bilɛ ní bɛ ozeklɔ. Lɛ xegi mlɛbitɛ lɛ nite e, mlatrágleʋe liwewe.

english_verse: Then our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ will give you a glorious welcome into his kingdom that will last forever.
translation_verse: Lɛ biakpɛ mlɔ wolaa xegi mleti iku u, ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ ni ɔnɔbu ye Yesu Kristo yɛ kaʋaŋaa gi katráblo liwewe e me. Kuboedoplɛ ní Aya yɛ Liboe le su

english_verse: You are holding firmly to the truth you were given. But I am still going to remind you of these things.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, maaplɛ aŋu ní eboa la ya aʋa ki mlɔ lipoe kakaa, agi mlete la kooko kyɛ ɛ, xe mlakpasi ní la anukwarɛɛ liɛ ɛ, gi ɔlɛ ní mlɔ awla abla mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: In fact, I think I should keep on reminding you until I leave this body.
translation_verse: Megyo le edi si lipɛ si mizɛɛplɛ aŋu ní eboa la ya aʋa aki mlɔ gi malɛ ligbã nɛ ɛ.

english_verse: And our Lord Jesus Christ has already told me that I will soon leave it behind.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si mete si mátrakyi kede, kiliɛ gi blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo adra lɛ mɛ aki mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: This is why I am doing my best to make sure that each of you remembers all of this after I am gone. The Message about the Glory of Christ
translation_verse: Maadi le aʋa si mlɛplɛ aŋu ní eboa la ya aʋa lipoe kakaa xegi mekyi kedea ɛ.

english_verse: When we told you about the power and the return of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not telling clever stories someone had made up. But with our own eyes we saw his true greatness.
translation_verse: Aní kudzídzi gi kwipɔ mɛ ɛ kwiga xe kwiki si mlete Yesu Kristo yɛ kigaglaɛ ni yɛ kubabaa a. Pɔ̀ ɛ, blɔ kwimɔ yɛ kukemekemeo ni blɔ bimbi ʋe.

english_verse: God, our great and wonderful Father, truly honored him by saying, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si azɛ kubùbù ni kuklekle dɔni Ɔka Aya klɔ, gi ole lo eyi dɔni Okusi ʋidi ye yɛ kuklekleo me ɛba yɛ klɔ gi ɛɛpani si i, “Ɔniliɛ ya onu Mobi ye gi malɔ ɛ, yɛ eku mɛ aŋu u.”

english_verse: We were there with Jesus on the holy mountain and heard this voice speak from heaven.
translation_verse: Blɔ ɔtutɔ kwinu ole lo gi ɛdɔ lifunu ne e, gi kwize pɔni yɛ ni lito dradra lɛ aʋa ɛ.

english_verse: All of this makes us even more certain that what the prophets said is true. So you should pay close attention to their message, as you would to a lamp shining in some dark place. You must keep on paying attention until daylight comes and the morning star rises in your hearts.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, kwika ní kuboedoplɛ uliɔ gi kulɛ ní blɔ awla aʋa ɛ sanɔ. Lɛ mlaabitɛ lɛ mumɔ xegi mlevu aŋu ní lɛ su u. Lɛ ese linu si ba eboe la alɛ ŋwisi kani gi ekle ní litumu ne me e zɛkɔna ni lipoe lɛ gi kelea kiati i, xe livlɛ lɛ ɔdzidziobi ye aakle ní mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But you need to realize that no one alone can understand any of the prophecies in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: Lɛ sanɔ ɛ, lilɛ si mlenu lɛ ese si kuboedoplɛ ɔtɔtɔ kúma ní Aya yɛ liboe le me gi kwiba ɛ, gani beboedoplɛ ba ɔtutɔ ba kuboesenu nu me e.

english_verse: The prophets did not think these things up on their own, but they were guided by the Spirit of God.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si kuboedoplɛ tɔtɔ kúdɔ ní ɔnɔ gbagbe yɛ kupɛ́pɛ mɛ, boŋu i, Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ ɛhwani banima xe bɛpani eboa la gi ɛdɔ ní Aya klɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ asia na beboedoplɛ ba kyɛ beze ní banima kusi ŋwisi kiliɛ gi asia na badɔbasɛ ba bɛtráze ní mlɔ kusi kinɛ ɛ. Bɛtrábasɛ bidɔ gi binu asia ní Aya su ní kikpokpo me gi biamani kulɛlɛ ɛ, gi kwiazizi bidɔ ní mlɔ kusi i, lɛ bianada Ɔkaɛ gi yɛ edzi aba a, xe ebú ba ɛ, gani lɛ ya mɛ ɛ, biamani kuzizizizi ni ba isu ya aʋa kyikya.

english_verse: Many people will follow their evil ways and cause others to tell lies about the true way.
translation_verse: Banɔ glegle biazeni ba eyekuboe la kude lɛ kɔkpɛ ba kiboebitɛɛ loso e, banima biakpɛ anukwarɛɛ kudeo kakpaa.

english_verse: They will be greedy and cheat you with smooth talk. But long ago God decided to punish them, and God doesn't sleep.
translation_verse: Kɔkpɛ ba kuŋazi yo loso e, asia na badɔbasɛ ba ya, gani ba kudzidziɔ mɛ ɛ, biamɔ libi dɔni mlɔ iwla mɛ. Pɔ̀ ba lipɔbubu le lifini ní ba su, lɛ ɔniliɛ gi atrázizi ba ɛ, ɔlɛ ni aŋu.

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Aya ɔ́kɔ yɛ baxwɛdzɛa ba gi bɛta kese e, ba eboe zimizi na ɛkyɛ ba a, pɔ̀ aŋwia ba akpɛ ní kifumoni ye me e, niklɔ gi bɛbla ba ní litumu ne me e, kɔna ni liwe lɛ gi biaxwa litsi ni ba ɛ.

english_verse: And during Noah's time, God did not have pity on the ungodly people of the world. He destroyed them with a flood, though he did save eight people, including Noah, who preached the truth.
translation_verse: Aya ódi kele kokoa asigaga a, pɔ̀ aki si kuni yo kwiyi xe kwikyrɔ banɔ zimizi ba a; pɔ̀ ebu Noa ɔnɔ gi yɛ asɔli kude gyɔgyɔɔ kɔpɔni banɔ tiegloele atɔ.

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: Aya ebu Sodom ni Gomora ima nɛ lipɔ lɛ akani lɛ ni kifu yɛ gi kusuʋɔtɔ ko kwigɔ ɔ, gi linu liŋwitsɛ ki kidiliɛ gi kitrába banama gi baʋíse Aya aʋa ɛ.

english_verse: Lot lived right and was greatly troubled by the terrible way those wicked people were living. He was a good man, and day after day he suffered because of the evil things he saw and heard. So the Lord rescued him.
translation_verse: Lot eze onyime gi yɛ bede ʋa bɛgyɔ ɔ, xe eze ní ba kusi i, lɛ liwe kakaa ɛ, yɛ esobo la eezenu kuyeʋiyeʋi glegle gi azaamɔ ɔ, xe azeenu ba eboe la ni ba ɔsã nɔ aʋa kumɔbitɛmɔbitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Lɛ xegi nite lilɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ Aya ete kiliɛ gi aabu banɔ gbã ba ní ba baxixa ʋa mɛ ɛ, lɛ ete kiliɛ gi aavu banɔ zimizi ba zɛkɔna ni litsixwawe le e, gi balɛ ní kutuhehe ese kyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: Liboe lɛ ya lilɛ ní lɛ mɛ ɛki banama gi balɛ ni batutɔ ba kisugyaɛ mɛ bapɛ́pɛ ʋa kude e, xe bébu Aya yɛ gigagla ɛ. Asia na badɔbasɛ ba ya ɛ, ɔna ɔlɛ ní ba lipo gi bizefeke isu kyɛ ɛ, lɛ bése lifu si biasɛ asia gi biazizi banama gi balɛ ní lifunu ne su u.

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba gi kigagla kilɛ ní ba su u, xe ozekɔ ɔlɛ ní ba awla kyɛ ɛ, baʋítsã banɔ ba ya elu onu ni kukpini ní Ɔkaɛ yɛ aŋu mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ banɔ ba ya ʋa ɛ, bizɛɛpani ebusioboe ní eboa la ese gi bénu me e. Asia na badɔbasɛ ba ya bizɛbitɛ eboe la ko ŋwisi liŋwafu mɛ baga gi baʋíbù eboe la su u, xe bizɛɛbitɛ la a, gi bɛpɔ ɔ, xe bɛtrávu iiki kuyeye kinɛ ɛ. Lɛ ŋwisi liŋwafu mɛ baga kinɛ ɛ, ba kyɛ bɛtrákyrɔ.

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: Bɛtrátsa liʋɛ ɛki ba ní ekyibi ala la gi bɛki ɛba banima aʋa ɛ loso. Ba isami nɛ inu si beze ní ɔha kusi tɔ bazɛŋa kuŋazi yo, tɔ bazɛɛhali kuda aŋwɛ, ani tɔ bazɛkpɛ ozi lo kemize gbagbã. Benu kuye ni kakpakpɛkpɛ ní mlɔ kusi, xegi mlɛki si bɛɛŋa bidɔ ni mlɔ ɛ, kɔkpɛ gi lipoe kakaa ɛ, bɛɛmɔ isami ni ba kunɔmeno kɔ edeke la ɛ!

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: Kihasiwawaɛ kiŋa ba aʋa niteme si bátramɔni eboe zimizi na kubitɛ ɛ. Bizɛɛkpɛ banama gi baʋívu isu ya ní enyimeboe la mɛ ɛ, ní kuxixa mɛ. Benu banɔ gi bɛganɔ ní kuŋazi me e, lɛ balɛ ní Aya yɛ ifixoxo le ese e!

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Bɛyurɔ kude gyɔgyɔɔ lɛ bekuni Baalam gi onu Beo yebinyime kude e, gi yɛ adimɛ ni kibɔɛ liɛ klɔ gi aamɔ gani eboe zimizi na mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But a donkey corrected him for this evil deed. It spoke to him with a human voice and made him stop his foolishness.
translation_verse: Tedzi ye gi onu ɔga gi óʋigu kunugu i, yɛ atɛni oboedoplɛɛ ni ɔnɔ gbagbe yɛ ole lo, xe edzini yɛ ewleboe la amɔni i.

english_verse: These people are like dried up water holes and clouds blown by a windstorm. The darkest part of hell is waiting for them.
translation_verse: Benyime ba ya ba balɛ ko ŋwisi enitɔ gi kuni kúma ní la mɛ ɛ, ŋwisi aplɛ gi liwɔ ʋidi ne lifu i. Aya abla ozekɔ aki ba ní litumu tritri le me.

english_verse: They brag out loud about their stupid nonsense. And by being vulgar and crude, they trap people who have barely escaped from living the wrong kind of life.
translation_verse: Bizɛɛpani asudɔboe ni eboe gi aʋíbu libi i, lɛ bizɛkɔ ɔnɔ gbagbe yɛ kisugyaɛ mɛ kusuŋwasi zimizio ɛpɔnɔ tɔ bɛɛkɔ ɛpunu banama gi able ko beedo ní banama gi balɛ ligba zimizi ne kusi i.

english_verse: They promise freedom to everyone. But they are merely slaves of filthy living, because people are slaves of whatever controls them.
translation_verse: Bizɛɛka ɔwlamɔmɔ ɛplɛ ki ba ní lipoe lɛ gi ba tutɔ pɔ̀ benu banɔdzidzi ki ligbãzeze zimizi i, gi liazizi ba ɛ. Lɛ ese linu si ɔnɔ onu ɔnɔdzidzi ki kidɔ kakaa gi kiŋa yɛ aʋa ɛ.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Lɛ xe banima bese ní kelea eboe zimizi na onu gani blɔ Ɔkaɛ ni ɔnɔbu ye Yesu Kristo kutete me e, xe bedzini ba kunya ɛkpɛ ní eboe zimizi na mɛ dzɛ ɛ, xe ɛɛŋa ba aʋa ɛ, banɔ ba klɔ ba ba kizezee me kizɛnyani sani kiliɛ gi kiize tsã ɛ, xe ableke bedzi baʋaziŋa ɛ.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: Liapɛ ki ba sanɔ xegi béte kude gyɔgyɔɔ sani si betè ko o, pɔ̀ tɔ bekyi kede akpɛ kutrɔtrɔ dradra liɔ klɔ gi bɛki ba ɛ.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ gi kɛ kiba ba aʋa ɛ, kibasɛ si abee ʋa gi bizebu si “Kadroʋia kize edzini zemini ka sihlàhlà sɛ,” ni “ɔha gi bewlo no e, izedzi zewlo lɔ livɔ lɛ ɛ,” bali ní lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: Mapɛ si mlaplɛ aŋu ní eboa la gi beboedoplɛ dradra ba bɛpani plɛ koko aʋa a, ni ɔsãa nɔ gi blɔ Ɔkaɛ ni Ɔnɔbu ye akɔ ɔ, gi banɔkpɛkpɛ ba bɛki mlɔ ɛ aʋa.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Ní ɔtɔpu kɔ ɛ, lilɛ si mlaplɛ aŋu si, ní ewe gɔgɔ la mɛ ɛ, banama gi bizɛmwɛ banima ɛ, biaba. Banama gi biazɛkpɛ anukwarɛɛ kakpaa, lɛ biazeni ba tutɔ ba bapɛ́pɛ zimizi ba kude e.

english_verse: and say, “Didn't your Lord promise to come back? Yet the first leaders have already died, and the world hasn't changed a bit.”
translation_verse: Biaʋi si, “Aka aplɛ si yɛ aaba, nifɔ yɛ kakaplɛ alia ya kalɛ ɛ? Dɔni lipoe lɛ ke gi blɔ baka ba betse e, kɔkpɛni abla ɛ, kidɔ kakaa kiitrɛ ní kɛ aʋa ŋwisi kiliɛ gi lize dɔni kelea likpese le kinɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔŋwadzuu bedze si gani Aya yɛ liboe le onu lifunu ne lize e, xe akɔ kuni yo abitɛ kesea a, xe aki si kesea kedo edɔ ni kuni yo me e.

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: Lɛ kuni yiyio ke akɔ akyrɔ kesea lipoe lɛ klɔ mɛ.

english_verse: But God has commanded the present heavens and earth to remain until the day of judgment. Then they will be set on fire, and ungodly people will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Lɛ gani Aya yɛ liboe le me ke lifunu ne ni kesea lia gi kalɛ abla ɛ, bɛbla bɛ ɛki kifu yɛ, gi bɛbla bɛ ɛki litsixwaxwa ni kukyrɔkyrɔ ki banama gi bése Aya ɛ.

english_verse: The Lord isn't slow about keeping his promises, as some people think he is. In fact, God is patient, because he wants everyone to turn from sin and no one to be lost.
translation_verse: Aní si Ɔkaɛ ɔ́ʋikɔsi ní yɛ kakaplɛa su u, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi banɔatɔ beegyo le edi kinɛ ɛ. Boŋu i, akɔ litɔ plɛplɛ kese aki mlɔ lɛ ese linu si ɔ́pɛ si ɔnɔnɔ ɔkyurɔ, pɔ̀ apɛ́ si ɔnɔ kakaa okyi ní yɛ eboe zimizi na mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ Ɔkaɛ yɛ Liwe le litrába ní lipoe lɛ mɛ gi mlatráze ní aŋu plɛplɛ mɛ ɛ. Ní liwe lɛ klɔ aʋa ɛ, lifunu ne lialila ni ozi gagla, lɛ liwɔ lɛ mɛ bidɔbitɛbitɛ ʋɛ petee biazizi lɛ biakani, lɛ kesea ni kidɔ kakaa ní ka aʋa ɛ, biakani. Lɛ banima biamɔ kidɔ kakaa kiliɛ gi kilɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Everything will be destroyed. So you should serve and honor God by the way you live.
translation_verse: Agi kidɔ kakaa kitrázizi gani kudeo liɔ ya aʋa ɛ, banɔ wolilu lilɛ si mlezee? Lilɛ si mleze ligbã́ gi lidra tɔ mlakɔ isu aki Aya a,

english_verse: You should look forward to the day when God judges everyone, and you should try to make it come soon. On that day the heavens will be destroyed by fire, and everything else will melt in the heat.
translation_verse: gi mleepe Aya yɛ Liwe le e, tɔ mlekeni edi tɔ liba kpekpee. Liwe lɛ klɔ litramani bidɔ zizizizi gi lifunu ne liakani i, xe liwɔ lɛ mɛ kudɔkpaa kwiawlɔ ní kifu yɛ kɛ kuhuhu yo loso o.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ní yɛ kakaplɛa onu i, kwidi kudeonu iiki lifunu vuvu ni kese vuvu, niklɔ gi aaze kepe ki kude gyɔgyɔ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, while you are waiting, you should make certain the Lord finds you pure, spotless, and living at peace.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mɛ baʋia ba, agi mleedi kudeonu iiki lɛ ya ɛ, mlekeni edi tɔ mladra, tɔ kunutsatsaa tɔtɔ kukíze ní mlɔ su u, ní Aya aŋu mɛ tɔ mleze ní kusuyɔ mɛ ni yɛ.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Mlaplɛ aŋu si blɔ Ɔkaɛ yɛ litɔplɛplɛkese kese e, kunu kudeonu gi aki mlɔ tɔ mlamɔ kubúbú ŋwisi kiliɛ gi blɔ onemi dimɛnɔɛ Paulo aŋwlimi aki mlɔ ɛ, gani kuboete uliɔ gi Aya aki yɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya su apani ní yɛ kuplekpaa petee gi aŋwlimi aki mlɔ mɛ ɛ. Eboe atɔ alɛ ní yɛ kuplekpaa mɛ gi la ese kununu yo kuli gagla, lɛ banama gi béte e, ni banama gi ba begyodi ʋa bamá ní ɔkɔ tole e, ba eboa la klɔ ʋa ese kububu i, binu asia, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi bizɛbitɛ nì Aya yɛ liboe gɔgɔ lɛ kyɛ ɛ. Gani lɛ ya mɛ ɛ, bizɛmani kuzizizizi ni ba isu ya aʋa a.

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso mɛ baʋia ba, agi mlete lɛ ya kooko e, mleze ni aŋu, tɔ banama gi bizɛɛta isã nɛ ese e, bakígbani mlɔ akpɛ ní kesetata mɛ tɔ mlakílila mlɔ ozekɔ lɔ gi mlalɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Boŋu i, mlatrɛ lɛ aʋa tɔ mletsi ní lipomepɛpɛ ni kuboete ní blɔ Ɔkaɛ ani blɔ Ɔnɔbu ye Yesu Kristo me. Kusudraa kuze yɛ kunɛ dɔni abla kɔtsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ! Atɔ liba lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: Kwipani kimlɔ ní Liboe lɛ gi lizɛɛki ligbã a, gi lize dɔni okpese klɔ ke su u. Kwinu le, lɛ kwimɔ lɛ ni blɔ bimbi ʋe e, kwimɔ lɛ, lɛ kwigbɔni lɛ ni blɔ awla la a.

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: Gi ligbã nɛ liŋwi i, kwimɔ lɛ, lɛ́ kwipani si mlɔ ní ligbãmoblo le su gi lize ní Kaka Aya klɔ ɛ, xe ebu le abasɛ blɔ ɛ.

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ gi kwimɔ xe kwinu i, kɛ kwiipani si mlɔ fɛ, tɔ mlakpɛ likpɔ ni blɔ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ lɛ gi lilɛ ní blɔ nì Kakaa Aya ani Yebi ye Yesu Kristo iwla mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: Lɛ kwiiŋwlimi eboa la ya tɔ blɔ isami nɛ iflɔ ɔ. Kugaga ní Kuklekleo onu

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: Abla ɛ, ole ɔlɔ klɔ gi kwinu dɔni Yebi ye klɔ ɔ, xe kwiipani i si mlɔ onu si, Aya onu kuklekle, lɛ litumu itɔtɔ lima ní yɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Xegi kwipani si likpɔkpɛkpɛ lilɛ blɔ ni yɛ kusi i, pɔ̀ xe lipoe lɛ klɔ mɛ ke e, kukpasi ní litumu me, kwiisɛ asia lɛ anukwarɛɛ ɔ́ma ni blɔ mɛ.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe kwiga ní kuklekle me ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Yɛ ɔlɛ ní kuklekle me kinɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ kulɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni blɔ ahanuglɔ ba lɛ Yebi ye Yesu ika lɛ iaplo eboe zimizi kakaa ní blɔ su u.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Xe kwipani si kesetata atɔtɔ káma ní blɔ su i, kwimeni isu lɛ anukwarɛɛ ɔ́ma ní blɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But if we confess our sins to God, he can always be trusted to forgive us and take our sins away.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe kwidra blɔ ina nɛ mɛ ɛki Aya ɛ, onu anukwarɛ onete, aalɛ ní yɛ kakaplɛa aʋa, aabitɛ liboe gbã, aakɔ blɔ eboe zimizi na kyɛ blɔ, lɛ aaplo eboe zimizi kakaa gi kwibitɛ ní blɔ su u.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Xe kwisi si eboe zimizi áma blɔ su i, kwibitɛ si Aya odzi ɔsia nɛ, lɛ yɛ liboe le líma ní blɔ ligbã́ nɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
translation_verse: Mɛɛŋwlimi eboa la ya ɛki mlɔ mɛ bebi ba, tɔ mlakíbitɛ eboe zimizi i, pɔ̀ xe ɔnutɔ abitɛ liboe zimizi i, ɔnɔ ɔlɛ ní blɔ awla gi izɛɛpani ní blɔ onu ki blɔ Ɔka Aya a, gi onu Yesu Kristo e, ɔnɔ gi kesetata káma yɛ su i.

english_verse: Christ is the sacrifice that takes away our sins and the sins of all the world's people.
translation_verse: Lɛ Kristo ɔtutɔ akɔ̀ isu akɔ lɛ gani yɛ aʋa ɛ, Aya akɔ blɔ eboe zimizi kakaa akyɛ ɛ, lɛ aní blɔ tètè pɔ̀ kelea petee ka eboe zimizi na fɛ.

english_verse: When we obey God, we are sure we know him.
translation_verse: Xe kwibitɛ ní Aya yɛ ɔsã nɔ aʋa ɛ, kɔ kwika lɛ aʋa si kwite ye e.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Banama gi bizɛɛpani si bete ye e, pɔ̀ xe baʋíbitɛ ní yɛ ɔsã nɔ aʋa ɛ, benu basia nɛ lɛ anukwarɛ ɔtɔtɔ ɔ́ma ní bamɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ xe kwibitɛ yɛ eboe la aʋa ɛ, kɔ blɔ kunu banama mɛ gi Aya kulɔlɔ kwiflɔ tututu i. Lɛ mɛ kwiaka ní lɛ aʋa si kulɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Aya.

english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: Banama gi bizɛɛpani si balɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Aya ɛ, lilɛ si beze ligbã́ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Yesu Kristo eze kinɛ ɛ. Mleze Ligbã́ ni Kuklekle me

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: Mɛ benemi lɔlɔ nɛ ba, aní ɔsã vuvu mɛɛŋwlimi iiki mlɔ, pɔ̀ ɔsã koko onu u, gi bɛki mlɔ ɛdɔni okpese kɔ ɔ. Ɔsã koko lo onu liboe lɛ gi mlenu koko o.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ fɛ mɛɛŋwlimi ɔsã vuvu iiki mlɔ, gi lɔ mɛ anukwarɛɛ ɛɛŋwi ní Kristo me anì mlɔ mɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si litumu ne liiza, lɛ kuklekleo ɔtutɔ lɔ kwikle koko o.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Banama gi bɛɛpani si balɛ ní kuklekleo me e, pɔ̀ bevu ba benemi ba ɛkpɛ lipo me e, balɛ litumu ne me kɔkpɛ ni abla.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Banama gi bɛdimɛ ni ba benemi ba ɛ, bá balɛ ní kuklekleo me, lɛ kididɔ kíma ní ba mɛ gi kiaki si biabitɛ eboe zimizi i.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ banama gi bevu ba benemi ba ɛkpɛ ni lipo me e, balɛ ní litumu ne me, bɛɛga lɛ mɛ lɛ béte niklɔ gi bɛɛtrɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si litumu ne lini ba bimbi ʋe.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: Mɛ bebi ba, mɛɛŋwlimi iiki mlɔ, lɛ ese linu si Aya akɔ mlɔ eboe zimizi na akyɛ mlɔ kɔkpɛ Kristo loso o.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Baka ba, mɛɛŋwlimi iiki mlɔ, lɛ ese linu si mlete ye gi ɔlɛ dɔni okpese klɔ ɛ. Ogbógboha lɔ, mɛɛŋwlimi iiki mlɔ, lɛ ese linu si mlɛŋa Ozimizi ye aʋa.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Mɛ bebi ba, mɛɛŋwlimi iiki mlɔ, lɛ ese linu si mlete blɔ Ɔka Aya. Baka ba, mɛɛŋwlimi ki mlɔ, lɛ ese linu si mlete ɔniliɛ klɔ gi ɔlɛ dɔni okpese klɔ ɛ. Ogbógboha lɔ, mɛɛŋwlimi iiki mlɔ, lɛ ese linu si mlalɛ gagla, lɛ Aya yɛ Liboe le likpasi ní mlɔ mɛ, lɛ mlɛŋa ozimizi ye aʋa a. Mlakídimɛ ni Kelea mɛ

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Mlakídimɛ ni kelea mɛ loo kidɔ kakaa gi kilɛ ní kelea mɛ ɛ. Xe mlɛdimɛ ni kelea mɛ ɛ, kɔlɔ mládimɛ ni blɔ Ɔka Aya.

english_verse: Our foolish pride comes from this world, and so do our selfish desires and our desire to have everything we see. None of this comes from the Father.
translation_verse: Kidɔ kakaa ní kelea mɛ ŋwisi kulekuku nyani nyani, kidiliɛ gi banima bɛmɔ xe bɛɛpɛ ɛ, ani kidɔ kakaa ní kelea mɛ gi kɛ aʋa banima bizɛɛdɔ̀ isu ya ɛ, la litɔtɔ lídɔ Aya kɔ ɔ; la petee ɛdɔ ní kelea mɛ.

english_verse: The world and the desires it causes are disappearing. But if we obey God, we will live forever. The Enemy of Christ
translation_verse: Kelea mɛ ni ka kidɔ kakaa gi banima bizɛpɛ ɛ, biiza; pɔ̀ banama gi bizɛbitɛ ní Aya yɛ kupɛ́pɛɔ aʋa ɛ, biaze tsini kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ. Kugbagba Ni Kristo Yɛ Ahwafianɛ ma Su

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: Mɛ bebi ba, kelea ligù nɛ lina pɔ́! Bɛ si mlɔ si Kristo yɛ ahwafiɔnɛɛ aaba, lɛ abla ɛ, Kristo yɛ ahwafianɛ glegle bɛba kooko, lɛ loso kwite si kelea ligù nɛ lina pɔ́.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: Banɔ ba ya ɛ, béze ní blɔ likpɔkpɛkpɛ lɛ mɛ, lɛ loso bɛyurɔ blɔ, atɛɛsi balɛ ní blɔ likpɔkpɛkpɛ lɛ mɛ ɛ, nya beze ni blo, pɔ̀ bɛsɛ tɔ libasɛ si ba mɛ ɔtɔtɔ ɔ́nyanu blɔ ɔnɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Pɔ mlɛzɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ gi Kristo aki mlɔ ɛ, lɛ mlɔ petee mlete anukwarɛɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: Mɛɛŋwlimi iiki mlɔ, aní sì mléte anukwarɛɛ, boŋu i, mlete ye, lɛ mlete fɛ si asia atɔtɔ aʋídɔ ní anukwarɛɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: And a liar is anyone who says Jesus isn't truly Christ. Anyone who says this is an enemy of Christ and rejects both the Father and the Son.
translation_verse: Kɔ nyaŋwɛ onu ɔsia nɛ ɛ? Yɛ onu ɔniliɛ gi ɛɛpani si aní Yesu onu Kristo ye e. Ɔniliɛ klɔ elu i yɛ onu Kristo yɛ ahwafiɔnɛɛ. Yɛ anada Blɔ Ɔkaɛ Aya ni Yebi ye.

english_verse: If we reject the Son, we reject the Father. But if we say we accept the Son, we have the Father.
translation_verse: Lɛ banama gi bɛnada Obi ye e, ba ké bɛnada blɔ Ɔka Aya, banama gi bɛzi Obi ye e, ba ké bɛzi blɔ Ɔka Aya fɛ.

english_verse: Keep thinking about the message you first heard, and you will always be one in your heart with the Son and with the Father.
translation_verse: Mledi lɛ aʋa, tɔ mlabla liboe lɛ gi mlenu idɔni okpese klɔ ní mlɔ ina nɛ mɛ ɛ. Xe mlɛbla liboe lɛ klɔ ɛ, kɔlɔ mlaze ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Obi ye ani blɔ Ɔka Aya.

english_verse: I am writing to warn you about those people who are misleading you.
translation_verse: Mɛɛŋwlimi la ya ɛki mlɔ ní banama gi bɛɛpɛ si beemeni mlo su u.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlɔ kɔ ɛ, Kristo enye yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ abali ní mlɔ aʋa kooko. Kɔkpɛ gi yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔkpasi mlɔ mɛ ɛ, mlázia ɔnɔnɔ si ɔbasɛ mlɔ bidɔ ɔ. Lɛ ese linu si yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ izɛbasɛ mlɔ kidɔ kakaa, lɛ kidiliɛ gi izɛbasɛ ɛ, kinu anukwarɛ aní asia a. Lɛ loso mlabitɛ ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ aʋa, tɔ mleze ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Kristo.

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: Lɛ abla ɛ, mɛ bebi ba, mleze ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni yɛ, tɔ xe aaŋwi i, ɔna aaze ní blɔ lipo tɔ likízia si kukpo ní kuye me ní yɛ su ní yɛ liba we le aʋa a.

english_verse: You know Christ always does right and everyone who does right is a child of God.
translation_verse: Xe mlete si kesetata káma ní Kristo su i, lilɛ si mlete si ɔnɔ kakaa gi izɛɛbitɛ bidɔ gbã ɛ, onu Aya Yebi.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Mledi kiliɛ gbɛgbɛ gi Aya alɔ blɔ ɛ! Yɛ kulɔlɔ kwisrɛ si baxwa blɔ si Aya yɛ bebi ba, lɛ ní anukwarɛ mɛ ɛ, yɛ bebi kunu, lɛ ya loso kelea mɛ kéte blo, lɛ ese linu si kéte Aya a.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: Baʋia lɔlɔ ba, abla ɛ, kunu Aya yɛ bebi, pɔ̀ lɛ mɛ lídra mumɔ kidiliɛ gi kwiadzi i. Pɔ̀ kwite si xe Kristo aaŋwi i, kwiaze ŋwisi yɛ kiniɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si kwiamɔ yɛ kiliɛ ɖii gi ɔlɛ ɛ.

english_verse: This hope makes us keep ourselves holy, just as Christ is holy.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa awla gi kudeonudidi uliɔ ya kulɛ ní Kristo me e, izɛɛbitɛ isu ɔnɔ dradra ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Kristo adra kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa gi abitɛ eboe zimizi i, yɛ eboe zimizi na ɛta ɔsã nɔ ese, lɛ ese linu si eboe zimizi kubitɛ kunu ɔsã ese kutata.

english_verse: You know Christ came to take away our sins. He isn't sinful,
translation_verse: Mlete si Kristo aŋwi tɔ yibu eboe zimizi na ɛzanɔ, lɛ liboe zimizii tɔtɔ líma ní yɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso ɔnɔ kakaa gi ɔlɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Kristo e, ɔʋíze eboe zimizi aʋa a; pɔ̀ ɔniliɛ gi ɔlɛ ní eboe zimizi aʋa ɛ, ɔ́mɔ yɛ odi i, loo óte ye e.

english_verse: Children, don't be fooled. Anyone who does right is good, just like Christ himself.
translation_verse: Mɛ bebi ba! Mlakíki tɔ ɔnɔnɔ omeni mlo o. Ɔniliɛ klɔ gi izɛbitɛ eboe gbã ɛ, ɔnɔ dradra onu, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi Kristo onu ɔnɔ dradra kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi ɔtini eboe zimizi aʋa ɛ, onu Ozimizi ye ɔnɛ, lɛ ese linu si Ozimizi ye abitɛ eboe zimizi dɔni okpese klɔ ke. Aya Yebi ye aba ní liboe lɛ ya ɖii loso, tɔ yizizi kidiliɛ gi Ozimizi ye abitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Aya yɛ bebi ba mɛ ɔtɔtɔ ɔ́trazɛɛbitɛ eboe zimizi tsinɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si Aya yɛ kilu ye kilɛ ní ba mɛ, lɛ agi Aya onu ba Ɔka onu i, bátratani eboe zimizi aʋa kutrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Lɛ libu lidzegaga nɛ ɛbasɛ ní Aya yɛ bebi ba ni Ozimizi ye yɛ bebi ba kusi, banama petee gi baʋíbitɛ eboe gbã loo baʋídimɛ ni ba ahanuglɔ ba ɛ, bénu Aya yɛ bebi i. Mlalɔ mlɔ ahanuglɔ ba

english_verse: From the beginning you were told we must love each other.
translation_verse: Liboe lɛ gi mlenu idɔni okpese klɔ ɛ, lɛ linu si; lilɛ si kulɔ blɔ ahanuglɔ ba.

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: Líma si kuze ŋwisi Kain gi, eze Ozimizi ye ɔnɛ kinɛ, xe eye yɛ ɔtutɔ yenemi ye Abel. Ege lɛ loso Kain eye ye e? Lɛ ese linu si yɛ ɔtutɔ yɛ kiboebitɛɛ kípɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ yenemi ye Abel yɛ kiboebitɛɛ kipɛ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: Loso e, mɛ benemi ba, likítu mlo kugyɔ ɔ, xe kelea mɛ banima bevu mlo ekpɛ lipo me e.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: Kwite si kwisɛ ní kutse su lɛ kwiba ligbã́ nɛ mɛ ɛ, kwite le nite lɛ ese linu si kwidimɛ ni blɔ benemi ba. Ɔniliɛ gi ɔ́dimɛ ni banɔ ɛ, yɛ ɔkpasi ní kutseo kigaglaɛ ese kokooko.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Banama pɔ́ gi bevu banima ɛkpɛ lipo me e, ba benu banɔye ba, lɛ mlete si banɔye ba ɛ ligbã́moblo le limá ní ba mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Nite kwite kiliɛ gi kunɔlɔɔ kulɛ ɛ: si Yesu Kristo akɔ yɛ ligbã́ nɛ akyɛ kí blɔ. Blɔ fɛ, lilɛ si kukɔ blɔ agbã́ na akyɛ aki blɔ benemi ba.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Xe bexonete bɛmɔ benemi gi balɛ ní kuziãziã mɛ ɛ, xe bákɔ litɔtɔ ní lɛ mɛ aki ba ɛ, batrátani kupani si bɛlɔ Aya a.

english_verse: Children, you show love for others by truly helping them, and not merely by talking about it.
