translation_verse: Mɛ bebi dimɛnɔ ba, líma si blɔ kunɔlɔɔ kuze kupani ko o, lilɛ si kuze anukwarɛ kunɔlɔ gi kwibasɛ isu ní axwɛwawa mɛ ɛ. Ɔna ɔlɛ ní Blɔ Lipo ní Aya Aŋu mɛ

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
translation_verse: Nite kwiate si kulɛ ní anukwarɛɛ mɛ, lɛ nite kwiatrɔ likla lɛ aʋa ki isu ya ní Aya aŋu mɛ.

english_verse: But even if we don't feel at ease, God is greater than our feelings, and he knows everything.
translation_verse: Xe blɔ ina nɛ ibu blɔ lipɔ ɛ, kwite si Aya ekeme asani blɔ ina nɛ, lɛ ete liboe kakaa a.

english_verse: Dear friends, if we feel at ease in the presence of God, we will have the courage to come near him.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, mɛ baʋia dimɛnɔ ba, xe blɔ ina nɛ íbu blo lipɔ ɛ, kɔlɔ ɔna ɔlɛ ní blɔ lipo ní Aya aŋu mɛ.

english_verse: He will give us whatever we ask, because we obey him and do what pleases him.
translation_verse: Kuzɛɛzɛ kidɔ kakaa gi kwiʋi dɔni yɛ iwla mɛ ɛ, lɛ ese linu si kuzɛɛbitɛ ní yɛ isã nɛ aʋa, lɛ kuzɛɛbitɛ kidiliɛ gi kiku yɛ liŋu i.

english_verse: God wants us to have faith in his Son Jesus Christ and to love each other. This is also what Jesus taught us to do.
translation_verse: Yɛ ɔsã nɔ onu si kuzɛ Yebi ye Yesu Kristo aʋa ŋa, tɔ kudimɛ ni blɔ ahanuglɔ ba, kiliɛ gi Yesu akpɛ ɔsã nɔ aki blɔ ɛ.

english_verse: If we obey God's commandments, we will stay one in our hearts with him, and he will stay one with us. The Spirit he has given us is proof that we are one with him.
translation_verse: Banama gi bizɛga ní Aya ɔsã nɔ aʋa ɛ, balɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Aya. Lɛ Aya fɛ ɛ, ɔlɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni ba. Lɛ kɔkpɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ gi Aya aki blɔ onu i, kwite si Aya ɔlɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni blɔ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't believe everyone who claims to have the Spirit of God. Test them all to find out if they really do come from God. Many false prophets have already gone out into the world,
translation_verse: Mɛ baʋia dimɛnɔ ba, mlakízɛ banama petee gi bɛɛpani si Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔlɛ ní ba awla ɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa, pɔ̀ mlapami lɛ mɛ tɔ mledi xe Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛdɔ ní Aya kɔ ɔ. Lɛ ese linu si asia na beboedoplɛ glegle bɛlɛ eku kelea mɛ ɔkɔ kakaa.

english_verse: and you can know which ones come from God. His Spirit says that Jesus Christ had a truly human body.
translation_verse: Gani kudeo liɔ ya onu i, mlate xe onu Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ: ɔnɔ kakaa gi azɛ lɛ ɛ, xe ebu le edo si Yesu Kristo aba ŋwisi ɔnɔ gbagbe kinɛ ɛ, yɛ mɛ Aya Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔkpasi.

english_verse: But when someone doesn't say this about Jesus, you know this person has a spirit that doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Christ. You knew this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔnɔ kakaa gi anada liboe lɛ ya ní Yesu su i, yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔdɔ Aya kɔ ɔ. Ɔfuɛfuɛ ɔnɔ gi ɔlɛ ní yɛ mɛ ɛ, ɛdɔ ní Kristo yɛ ahwafiɔnɛɛ kɔ; mlenu si aaba, lɛ abla ɛ ɔlɛ ní kelea mɛ kooko.

english_verse: Children, you belong to God, and you have defeated these enemies. God's Spirit is in you and is more powerful than the one who is in the world.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlɔ mɛ bebi dimɛnɔ ba, mlenu Aya banɛ, lɛ mlɛŋa asia na beboedoplɛ ba aʋa, lɛ ese linu si Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ gi ɔkpasi ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ, ɔlɛ gagla sani Ɔfuɛfuɛ ɔnɔ gi ɔkpasi ní kelea mɛ banima mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: These enemies belong to this world, and the world listens to them, because they speak its language.
translation_verse: Asia na beboedoplɛ ba klɔ ba ɛ, bizɛɛpani ní kelea mɛ eboe la su, lɛ kelea mɛ kizɛta ba kutu, lɛ ese linu si bɛdɔ kelea mɛ.

english_verse: We belong to God, and everyone who knows God will listen to us. But the people who don't know God won't listen to us. This is how we can tell the Spirit that speaks the truth from the one that tells lies.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ blɔ kunu Aya banɛ. Ɔniliɛ klɔ gi ete Aya ɛ, izɛɛta blɔ kutu, ɔniliɛ klɔ gi ónu Aya ɔnɛ ɛ, ɔʋíta blɔ kutu u. Gani lɛ mɛ ɛ, kwiate lidzegaga ni anukwarɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ni asia na Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ kusi. Aya onu Kulɔlɔ

english_verse: My dear friends, we must love each other. Love comes from God, and when we love each other, it shows we have been given new life. We are now God's children, and we know him.
translation_verse: Mɛ baʋia dimɛnɔ ba, mlaki tɔ kulɔ blɔ ahanuglɔ ba, lɛ ese linu si kulɔlɔ kwidɔ ní Aya klɔ. Ɔnɔ kakaa gi izɛɛlɔ banɔ ɛ, onu Aya Yebi, lɛ etè Aya.

english_verse: God is love, and anyone who doesn't love others has never known him.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi ɔ́lɔ banɔ ɛ, óte Aya a, lɛ ese linu si Aya onu kulɔlɔ.

english_verse: God showed his love for us when he sent his only Son into the world to give us life.
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya ebu yɛ kulɔlɔɔ abasɛ blɔ, gani kude uliɔ ya onu gi atsisi Yebi tolee ní kelea mɛ, tɔ kwiamɔ ligbã́ gani yɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: Real love isn't our love for God, but his love for us. God sent his Son to be the sacrifice by which our sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Lɛ ya linu kulɔlɔ. Aní si kwilɔ Aya, pɔ̀ yɛ alɔ blɔ, gi akɔ̀ Yebi ye akɔ ní blɔ eboe zimizi na litukpo tɔ gani yɛ aʋa ɛ, biakɔ blɔ eboe zimizi na kɔkyɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, since God loved us this much, we must love each other.
translation_verse: Mɛ baʋia dimɛnɔ ba, xe nite Aya alɔ blɔ ɛ, kɔlɔ lilɛ si kulɔ blɔ ahanuglɔ ba.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. But if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is truly in our hearts.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́mɔ Aya oʋídi i, pɔ̀ xe kwilɔ blɔ ahanuglɔ ba ɛ, Aya ɔlɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ nì blɔ, lɛ yɛ kulɔlɔɔ kwiflɔ ní blɔ mɛ.

english_verse: God has given us his Spirit. This is how we know we are one with him, just as he is one with us.
translation_verse: Kwitrɔ likla lɛ aʋa si kulɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ nì Aya, lɛ ɔlɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni blɔ, lɛ ese linu si aki blɔ yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ.

english_verse: God sent his Son to be the Savior of the world. We saw his Son and are now telling others about him.
translation_verse: Lɛ kwimɔ ɔ, lɛ kwisi banɔ gɔgɔ ba si, Aya atsisi Yebi ye si ɔga aabu kelea mɛ.

english_verse: God stays one with everyone who openly says Jesus is the Son of God. This is how we stay one with God
translation_verse: Xe ɔnutɔ ebu le edo si Yesu yɛ onu Aya Yebi ye e, ɔlɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Aya, lɛ Aya ɔlɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: and are sure God loves us. God is love. If we keep on loving others, we will stay one in our hearts with God, and he will stay one with us.
translation_verse: Lɛ blɔ ɔtutɔ kwite e, lɛ kwizi Aya yɛ kulɔlɔ aki blɔ aʋa ɛɛŋa a. Aya onu kulɔlɔ, lɛ banama gi balɛ ní kulɔlɔ mɛ ni ba ahanuglɔ ba ɛ, balɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Aya, lɛ Aya ɔlɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni ba a.

english_verse: A real love for others will chase those worries away. The thought of being punished is what makes us afraid. It shows we have not really learned to love.
translation_verse: Lifu kusese líma ní kulɔlɔ mɛ ɛ, kulɔlɔ gi kwiflɔ ɛ, kuzɛɛkpikpini lifu kusese kakaa. Loso e, kulɔlɔɔ kúflɔ ní ɔnɔ gi onu ofufluse me e, lɛ ese linu si kutuhehe kuzɛ mani lifu.

english_verse: We love because God loved us first.
translation_verse: Kuzɛɛlɔ lɛ ese linu si Aya yɛ etu blo kulɔ.

english_verse: But if we say we love God and don't love each other, we are liars. We cannot see God. So how can we love God, if we don't love the people we can see?
translation_verse: Xe ɔnutɔ apani si malɔ Aya a, pɔ̀ evu yenemi nɛ akpɛ lipo me e, onu ɔsia nɛ. Lɛ ese linu si ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani Aya gi baʋímɔ ɛ kulɔ, xe ɔ́lɔ yenemi ye gi ɛɛmɔ ɔ.

english_verse: The commandment that God has given us is: “Love God and love each other!”
translation_verse: Ɔsã lɔ klɔ gi Yesu aki blɔ onu si, banama petee gi bɛlɔ Aya ɛ, lilɛ si balɔ ba benemi ba fɛ.

english_verse: If we believe Jesus is truly Christ, we are God's children. Everyone who loves the Father will also love his children.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi onu Aya Yebi i, yɛ azɛ lɛ aʋa aŋa si, Yesu yɛ onu Kristo ye, ɔniliɛ gi Aya atsisi i, lɛ ɔniliɛ klɔ gi alɔ Aya ɛ, alɔ Yebi ye fɛ.

english_verse: If we love and obey God, we know we will love his children.
translation_verse: Nite kuzeete si kwilɔ Aya yɛ bebi ba, gani Aya kulɔlɔ mɛ nì yɛ ɔsã nɔ aʋa kubitɛ mɛ.

english_verse: We show our love for God by obeying his commandments, and they are not hard to follow.
translation_verse: Lɛ blɔ kulɔlɔ ki Aya ɛ, kɔ ese kunu si kuzɛɛbitɛ ní yɛ isã nɛ aʋa. Lɛ yɛ isã nɛ ɛ, ísã ɛgagla ɛki blɔ ɔ,

english_verse: Every child of God can defeat the world, and our faith is what gives us this victory.
translation_verse: lɛ ese linu si Aya Yebi kakaa aatani kelea aʋa kuŋa. Lɛ gani blɔ kuziŋaa mɛ ɛ, kuzɛɛŋa kelea aʋa.

english_verse: No one can defeat the world without having faith in Jesus as the Son of God. Who Jesus Is
translation_verse: Nyaŋwɛ aatani kelea aʋa kuŋa a? Ɔniliɛ klɔ ko gi azɛ lɛ aʋa aŋa si Yesu yɛ onu Aya Yebi ye e. Kidiliɛ gi kinu Katsalia ní Yesu su i

english_verse: Water and blood came out from the side of Jesus Christ. It wasn't just water, but water and blood. The Spirit tells about this, because the Spirit is truthful.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo yɛ onu ɔniliɛ gi aba a, gani kunikpɛkpɛ ni kutse gani ika kubali mɛ ɛ. Ɔ́ba gani kuni tete me e, pɔ̀ aba gani kuni ni ika mɛ ɛ. Lɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔtutɔ ɛɛpani si linu anukwarɛ, lɛ ese linu si Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ onu anukwarɛɛ.

english_verse: They are the Spirit, the water, and the blood, and they all agree.
translation_verse: Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ, kuni yo, ani ika lɛ, lɛ bɛ tuta pɔ́ biipani liboe de tile e.

english_verse: We believe what people tell us. But we can trust what God says even more, and God is the one who has spoken about his Son.
translation_verse: Kuzɛɛzɛ banima eboe la aʋa ɛɛŋa, pɔ̀ Aya yɛ eboe la emu isanɔ ɔ, lɛ ese linu si yɛ apani eboa la ya ní Yebi ye su.

english_verse: If we have faith in God's Son, we have believed what God has said. But if we don't believe what God has said about his Son, it is the same as calling God a liar.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso banama gi bɛzɛ Aya Yebi ye aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ, likla trɔtrɔ ɛlɛ ya lilɛ ní ba ina nɛ mɛ, pɔ̀ banama gi bázɛ Aya aʋa aŋa ɛ, ba bɛbitɛ yɛ ɔsia nɛ, lɛ ese linu si bázɛ Aya yɛ Liboe lɛ gi apani ní Yebi ye su aʋa ɛɛŋa a.

english_verse: God has also said he gave us eternal life and this life comes to us from his Son.
translation_verse: Likla trɔtrɔ lɛ lɛya: Aya aki blɔ ligbã moblo le, lɛ ligbã́ lɛya lilɛ ní Yebi ye me e.

english_verse: And so, if we have God's Son, we have this life. But if we don't have the Son, we don't have this life. Knowing about Eternal Life
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ awla gi Aya Yebi ye ɔlɛ ɛ, ligbã lilɛ ní yɛ awla, ɔniliɛ awla gi Aya Yebi ye ɔ́ma ɛ, ligbã́ limá ní yɛ awla a. Ligbã́ Moblo le lilɛ ní Baʋaziŋa ba Awla

english_verse: All of you have faith in the Son of God, and I have written to let you know you have eternal life.
translation_verse: Mɛɛŋwlimi eboa la ya ɛki mlɔ banama gi mlɛzɛ Aya Yebi ye linyi ne aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ, tɔ mlete si ligbã́ moblo le lilɛ ní mlɔ awla.

english_verse: We are certain God will hear our prayers when we ask for what pleases him.
translation_verse: Ɔna ɔlɛ ní blɔ lipo ní Aya aŋu mɛ, lɛ ese linu si kwitrɔ likla lɛ aʋa si, izeenu xe kwiʋi ye kidɔ kakaa ní yɛ kupɛ́pɛɔ onu i.

english_verse: And if we know God listens when we pray, we are sure our prayers have already been answered.
translation_verse: Lɛ xe kwite si, izɛɛnu kidɔ kakaa gi kwiʋi ye e, kɔlɔ kwite si, kuzɛɛzɛ blɔ beʋiʋi ʋa ɛdɔni yɛ klɔ.

english_verse: Suppose you see one of our people commit a sin that isn't a deadly sin. You can pray, and this person will be given eternal life. But the sin must not be one that is deadly.
translation_verse: Xe wɔmɔ wonemi gi ɛɛbitɛ liboe zimizi gi lítragbani yɛ ɛkpɛ kutse me e, xwa Aya ní yɛ litukpo tɔ ɔki yɛ ligbã́. Lɛ ya litrɛ ɛki banama gi ba eboe zimizi na atrámani kutse e. Pɔ̀ eboe zimizi atɔ alɛ gi izɛɛmani kutse e; maʋísi si xwa Aya ní la litukpo o.

english_verse: Everything that is wrong is sin, but not all sins are deadly.
translation_verse: Eboe nyani nyani kakaa enu kuzimizi, pɔ̀ kuzimizi utɔ kulɛ, gi kútramani kutse e.

english_verse: We are sure God's children do not keep on sinning. God's own Son protects them, and the devil cannot harm them.
translation_verse: Kwite si, Aya yɛ bebiatɔtɔ baʋíze kuzimizi aʋa kɔ tsinɔ ɔ. Lɛ ese linu si Aya Yebi ye izɛɛkpɛ kuka ɛklani ba lɛ Ozimizi ye ɔ́tratani ba kidɔ nyani nyani tɔtɔ kubitɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We are certain we come from God and the rest of the world is under the power of the devil.
translation_verse: Kwite si, kunu Aya yɛ banɛ, gi kelea petee kalɛ ní Ozimizi ye kaʋaŋaa ese fɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We know that Jesus Christ the Son of God has come and has shown us the true God. And because of Jesus, we now belong to the true God who gives eternal life.
translation_verse: Lɛ kwite si, Aya Yebi ye aba a, lɛ aki blɔ kuboesenu, tɔ kwiate Aya gi yɛ onu anukwarɛɛ ɔtutɔ lɔ ɛ. Kulɛ ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Aya ɔtutɔ ni likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ ni Yebi ye Yesu Kristo. Yɛ onu Aya ɔtutɔ lɛ Yɛ onu ligbã moblo le.

english_verse: Children, you must stay away from idols.
translation_verse: Mɛ bebi ba, mledi isu aʋa mumɔ ní kubúbitɛ su!

english_verse: From the church leader. To a very special woman and her children. I truly love all of you, and so does everyone else who knows the truth.
translation_verse: Ɔhalɔ mɛ ɔnɔtsitsi ye yɛ ɛɛŋwlimi iiki wɔ ɔdisami nɔ gi Aya akya a, ni wɔ bebi ba gi malɔ ní anukwarɛ mɛ ɛ. Lɛ aní mɛ tole e, pɔ̀ banama petee gi bete anukwarɛɛ ɛ, bɛlɔ mlɔ,

english_verse: We love you because the truth is now in our hearts, and it will be there forever.
translation_verse: lɛ ese linu si anukwarɛɛ ɔkpasi ní blɔ mɛ, lɛ aaze nì blo kɔtsini kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and Jesus Christ his Son will be kind and merciful to us! May they give us peace and truth and love. Truth and Love
translation_verse: Atɔ Kakaa Aya yɛ ni Yesu Kristo Kakaa Yebi ye baki blɔ lipomepɛpɛ, asigagadidi ni kusuyɔ, tɔ bize blɔ binɛ ní anukwarɛ ni kulɔlɔ mɛ ɛ. Mleze ní Kulɔlɔ Pɔ̀ Mleze ni Aŋu ní Banɔmeno Ba Su

english_verse: I was very glad to learn that some of your children are obeying the truth, as the Father told us to do.
translation_verse: Isami iiku me gi mamɔ si wɔ bebi batɔ balɛ ní anukwarɛ aʋa a, kiliɛ ɖii gi Aya akpɛ ɔsã akí blɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Dear friend, I am not writing to tell you and your children to do something you have not done before. I am writing to tell you to love each other, which is the first thing you were told to do.
translation_verse: Lɛ abla ɛ, meeʋi wɔ ɔdisami dimɛnɔɛ si, mlaki tɔ blɔ petee kudimɛ ni blɔ ahanuglɔ ba. Aní ɔsã vuvu onu gi mɛɛŋwlimi iiki mlɔ ɔ; onu ɔsã gi eze blɔ awla dɔni okpese kɔ ɔ.

english_verse: Many liars have gone out into the world. These deceitful liars are saying Jesus Christ did not have a truly human body. But they are liars and the enemies of Christ.
translation_verse: Banɔmeno glegle bɛlɛ eku kelea petee me, banɔ gi bázɛ lɛ si Yesu Kristo aba ŋwisi ɔnɔ gbagbe kinɛ ɛ. Ɔniliɛ klɔ elu onu ɔnɔmeno ani Kristo yɛ ahwafiɔnɛ.

english_verse: So be sure not to lose what we have worked for. If you do, you won't be given your full reward.
translation_verse: Mleze ní aŋu plɛplɛ mɛ tɔ mlakílila kidiliɛ gi kwiwa axwɛ na ɛkɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ tɔ kwiamɔ blɔ ɔŋakɔ ní kisrɛsrɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't keep changing what you were taught about Christ, or else God will no longer be with you. But if you hold firmly to what you were taught, both the Father and the Son will be with you.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ klɔ gi ɔ́traze Kristo bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ mɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ xe aadɔ ʋɛ kuza ɛ, ónu Aya ɔnɛ ɛ. Ɔniliɛ klɔ gi aaze bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ mɛ ɛ, yɛ ɔlɛ likpɔ ni Aya ani Obi ye.

english_verse: If people won't agree to this teaching, don't welcome them into your home or even greet them.
translation_verse: Kɔlɔ xe ɔnutɔ aba mlɔ klɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ yɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ biga lidze ní bɛ ya su i, mlakízɛ yɛ akpɛ mlɔ kupeo me e; mlakípani yɛ fɛ.

english_verse: Greeting them is the same as taking part in their evil deeds. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Lɛ ɔnɔ kakaa gi aazɛ ba ɛ, aadzi ɔʋatrɔ ki ba ní ba eboe zimizi ana gi bɛɛbitɛ mɛ ɛ. Eboe gɔgɔ la

english_verse: I have much more to tell you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink. I want to come and talk to you in person, because this will make us really happy.
translation_verse: Eboe alɛ mɛ awla kpaŋu gi nya maaŋwlimi ki mlɔ ɛ, pɔ̀ mátraŋwlimi la a, boŋu i, mɛɛpɛ kudeonu si miba mlɔ klɔ, tɔ kwiapani aŋu mɛ ni aŋu mɛ atɔ kwiamɔ isami mɔmɔmɔ.

english_verse: Greetings from the children of your very special sister.
translation_verse: Wɔ onemidzɛ gi Aya akya ɛ, yɛ bebi ba bɛpani mlɔ.

english_verse: From the church leader. To my dear friend Gaius. I love you because we follow the truth,
translation_verse: Ɔhalɔ mɛ ɔnɔtsitsi yɛ ɛɛŋwlimi iiki Gayo gi malɔ ní anukwarɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: dear friend, and I pray all goes well for you. I hope you are as strong in body, as I know you are in spirit.
translation_verse: Mɛ ɔʋia dimɛnɔ ɛ, mɛɛxwa Aya si kidɔ kakaa kidɔ kɛ aʋa ki wɔ, tɔ zení isu mɛ pɛ̀pɛ̀ mɛ, agi mete si wɔlɛ mumɔ ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: It makes me very happy when the Lord's followers come by and speak openly of how you obey the truth.
translation_verse: Isami iiku me koŋu gi benemi batɔ bɛba a, xe bɛsi mɛ kiliɛ gi wovu anukwarɛɛ ɛ, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi wɔlɛ ní anukwarɛɛ mɛ lipoe kakaa kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Nothing brings me greater happiness than to hear that my children are obeying the truth. Working Together
translation_verse: Kididɔ kíku me isami isanɔ, si tɔ minu si mɛ bebi ba balɛ ligbã ní anukwarɛɛ mɛ ɛ. Bɛkpɔ̀ Gayo

english_verse: Dear friend, you have always been faithful in helping other followers of the Lord, even the ones you didn't know before.
translation_verse: Mɛ ɔʋia dimɛnɔ ɛ, wonu anukwarɛ onete ní axwɛ ana gi wɔɛwa mɛ ɛki benemi ba, ki banama gi benu bababa ki wɔ kyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: They have told the church about your love. They say you were good enough to welcome them and to send them on their mission in a way God's servants deserve.
translation_verse: Bɛpani lɛ su isi ɔsɔli ha lɔ ní ya ní wɔ kulɔlɔ su. Mɛɛki wɔ litukpo si pɔni ba tɔ batrɛ ni ba kudegaga aʋa gani kizeze liɛ mɛ gi kiaku Aya liŋu i.

english_verse: When they left to tell others about the Lord, they decided not to accept help from anyone who wasn't a follower.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si bekpese ba kudegaga ní axwɛwawa ki Kristo me, gi bázɛ kupɔnɔ kutɔtɔ ɛdɔni babubitɛ ba kɔ ɔ.

english_verse: We must support people like them, so we can take part in what they are doing to spread the truth.
translation_verse: Lilɛ si blɔ basɔlisɔli ba, kupɔni banɔ ba ya tɔ kwiamɔ ɔŋakɔ ní ba axwɛwawa la ki anukwarɛɛ mɛ. Diotrefo ani Demetrie ba Kiboebitɛɛ

english_verse: I wrote to the church. But Diotrephes likes to be the number-one leader, and he won't pay any attention to us.
translation_verse: Maŋwlimi keplekpa kpekpemi atɔ aki ɔsɔli ha lɔ, pɔ̀ Diotrefo gi izɛɛpɛ si yɛ yize ba onu i, ɔ́kɔ lɛmɛ ɔki mɛ liboe le e.

english_verse: So if I come, I will remind him of how he has been attacking us with gossip. Not only has he been doing this, but he refuses to welcome any of the Lord's followers who come by. And when other church members want to welcome them, he puts them out of the church.
translation_verse: Xe maba ɛ, maaki si mlate kidɔ kakaa gi abitɛ ɛ, eboe nyani nyani ana gi ɛɛpani ní blɔ su i, ni asia ana gi ɛɛsɛ ɛ! Pɔ̀ éke ye e; ɔ́ʋizɛ blɔ benemi ba a, xe bɛba ɛ, kɔpɔnɔ ɛ, izeetsi kudeonu iiki banama gi bɛpɛ si bɛɛzɛ ba ɛ, lɛ izeekeni idi si yikpikpini ba ebu ní ɔsɔli ha lɔ mɛ ɛ!

english_verse: Dear friend, don't imitate the evil deeds of others, but follow the example of people who do kind deeds. They are God's children, but those who are always doing evil have never seen God.
translation_verse: Mɛ ɔʋia dimɛnɔ ɛ, wukígla kidɔ nyani nyani, pɔ̀ gla kidɔ gbã. Ɔniliɛ klɔ gi izɛɛbitɛ kidɔ gbã onu Aya yɛ ɔnɛ ɛ, ɔniliɛ gi izɛɛbitɛ kidɔ nyani nyani i yɛ ɔ́ʋimɔ Aya.

english_verse: Everyone speaks well of Demetrius, and so does the true message that he teaches. I also speak well of him, and you know what I say is true. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ɔnɔ kakaa ɛɛpani eboe gbã ní Demetrio su, anukwarɛɛ ɔtutɔ fɛ ɛɛpani eboe gbã ní yɛ su. Lɛ kwitrɔ likla lɛ aʋa, lɛ mlete si liboe lɛ gi kwipani i, linu anukwarɛ. Kunɔpanɔ gɔgɔ ɔ

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink.
translation_verse: Eboe alɛ mɛ awla kpaŋu gi maasi mlɔ ɛ, pɔ̀ mápɛ si migani la ní keplekpa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I hope to see you soon, and then we can talk in person.
translation_verse: Meedi kudeonu si maamɔ mlɔ kpekpemii, tɔ kwiapani aŋu mɛ ni aŋu mɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God will bless you with peace! Your friends send their greetings. Please give a personal greeting to each of our friends.
translation_verse: Kusuyɔ kuze ni mlo. Mlɔ baʋia ba pɔ́ bɛpani mlɔ. Mlapani blɔ baʋia ba tole tole aki blɔ.

english_verse: From Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ and the brother of James. To all who are chosen and loved by God the Father and are kept safe by Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Keplekpaa lia kɛdɔ ní Yuda gi onu Yesu Kristo yɛ ɔnɔsumu ye ni Yakobo yenemi yɛ klɔ ɔ, ɛki banama gi Ɔka Aya axwa a, gi alɔ ɔ, xe balɛ ní Yesu Kristo yɛ kukakpɛkpɛɔ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God will greatly bless you with mercy, peace, and love! False Teachers
translation_verse: Atɔ Aya ɔki mlɔ yɛ asigagadidi, kusuyɔ ni kulɔlɔ ní kisrɛsrɛ mɛ. Eboa la gi ɛtra gbani Asia na badɔbasɛ ba ɛkpɛ ɛ

english_verse: My dear friends, I really wanted to write you about God's saving power at work in our lives. But instead, I must write and ask you to defend the faith that God has once for all given to his people.
translation_verse: Mɛ baʋia veve ba, gi mazekeni edi si miŋwlimi i iki mlɔ ní kubúbú liɔ gi kulɛ ní blɔ awla ní likpɔkpɛkpɛ mɛ kyɛ ɛ, mamɔ si, liziã si miŋwlimi tɔ mikpɛ mlɔ kigagla atɔ mlaŋwlɛ mlɔ kuziŋaa gi Aya aki banama a, gi bɛzɛ yɛ aʋa ɛɛŋa ɛ, litukpo.

english_verse: Some godless people have sneaked in among us and are saying, “God treats us much better than we deserve, and so it is all right to be immoral.” They even deny we must obey Jesus Christ as our only Master and Lord. But long ago the Scriptures warned that these godless people were doomed.
translation_verse: Lɛ banɔatɔ gi ba kuzizi yo su bɛŋwlimi plɛ koko e, bɛza eku ní mlɔ kusi ní kikpokpo me gi mléte e. Benu banɔ gi béte Aya a, ba bɛtsrɛ blɔ Aya yɛ lipomepɛpɛ nɛ liboe le tɔ biamɔ kude tɔ biawa ba kihasi ye, lɛ bɛnada Yesu Kristo blɔ Ɔʋadi ye ni Ɔkaɛ.

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to those people the Lord rescued from Egypt. Some of them did not have faith, and he later destroyed them.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi mlete la ya petee fɛ ɛ, mapɛ si miplɛ aŋu iiki mlɔ si Ɔkaɛ ebu yɛ banima adɔni Egipte, pɔ̀ lɛ kede e, ezizi banama gi bázɛ yɛ aʋa aŋa ɛ.

english_verse: You also know about the angels who didn't do their work and left their proper places. God chained them with everlasting chains and is now keeping them in dark pits until the great day of judgment.
translation_verse: Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛa ba gi béze ní kigaglaɛ liɛ gi Aya aki ba ese e, pɔ̀ xe bɛsɛ ní ba izeklɔ ɛ, bɛkpɛ ba litumu ne me gi bɛkpɛ ba bibɔ kɔtsinɔ kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ mɛ ki litsixwaxwa ní Liwe ʋidi le aʋa a.

english_verse: We should also be warned by what happened to the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah and the nearby towns. Their people became immoral and committed all sorts of sexual sins. Then God made an example of them and punished them with eternal fire.
translation_verse: Nite me ke Sodom ni Gomora kɔpɔni ima sisami i nɛ gi iklani ba kyɛ ɛ, bɛyurɔ isu ya ɛki adzɛboe ni enyimeboe ni anyaniboe kakaa elu. Benu liŋwitsɛ aki banama gi betrámɔ kutuhehe ni kifu mobloe me e.

english_verse: The people I am talking about are behaving just like those dreamers who destroyed their own bodies. They reject all authority and insult angels.
translation_verse: Nite ke banɔ ba ya gi bizɛɛza balila ʋa a, bizɛbitɛ eboe zimizi ni ba tutɔ ba bisugya ʋɛ, lɛ begbe kutununu ikí Aya xe bizezizi Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba ní lifunu ne su i.

english_verse: Even Michael, the chief angel, didn't dare to insult the devil, when the two of them were arguing about the body of Moses. All Michael said was, “The Lord will punish you!”
translation_verse: Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba ɔka Mixael kura kyɛ ɔ́mani onugu ní ozimizi ye su, lipoe lɛ gi yɛ ni ozimizi ye behe eboe ní ɔniliɛ gi yɛ linu si ɔzɛ Mose yɛ okpo ye e su. Mixael ókeni ódi si yibu ozimizi ye lipɔ nì kukpini, kipani ko apani si “Ɔkaɛ ɔká aŋu mɛ ɔki wɔ.”

english_verse: But these people insult powers they don't know anything about. They are like senseless animals that end up getting destroyed, because they live only by their feelings.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ banɔ ba ya kɔ ɛ, bizekɔ kukpini iiki kidɔ kakaa gi kɛ ese gi bénu i, lɛ ŋwisi liŋwafu mɛ baga gi baʋíbu litukpo me kinɛ ɛ, bizɛbitɛ kidɔ kakaa gi kiba ba begyodi ʋa mɛ ɛ, gi kɛ ese benu i, lɛ bidɔ bɛ klɔ ʋa ke bizɛki si bizɛkyrɔ.

english_verse: Now they are in for real trouble. They have followed Cain's example and have made the same mistake that Balaam did by caring only for money. They have also rebelled against God, just as Korah did. Because of all this, they will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Baba ki ba! Bɛga Kain yɛ kugakli yɔ mɛ. Kɔkpɛ kibɔɛ loso e, bɛta kese ŋwisi Baalam kiniɛ, lɛ bɛyɔ kedu ya ní Aya su, lɛ bɛkyrɔ ŋwisi Kora kiniɛ.

english_verse: These people are filthy minded, and by their shameful and selfish actions they spoil the meals you eat together. They are like clouds blown along by the wind, but never bringing any rain. They are like leafless trees, uprooted and dead, and unable to produce fruit.
translation_verse: Banɔ ba ya benu kinyani ní mlɔ kunɔlɔɔ kɔ likpɔkpɛkpɛ lɛ bidɔ mɛ ɔŋa klɔ gi bɛŋa bidɔ mɛ kuyemose e. Benu beʋesigbanɔ gi ba tutɔ isu ya ko bɛganɔ ɔ. Balɛ ko ŋwisi aplɛ gi liwɔ lɛ lifu i klanɔ ɔ, pɔ̀ aʋídɔ dzeni i. Balɛ ko ŋwisi ise gi iʋiyo esebi liwewe ní la liyopoe le aʋa a. Ise gi bɛkpaʋi ni lɛ igu ne e, xe itse petee e.

english_verse: Enoch was the seventh person after Adam, and he was talking about these people when he said: Look! The Lord is coming with thousands and thousands of holy angels
translation_verse: Henox gi onu Adam yɛ osobi gloele e, edo liboe aplɛ ní banɔ ba ya su si, “Dike Ɔkaɛ atrába nì yɛ baxwɛdzɛ dradra akpe akpe ʋa,

english_verse: to judge everyone. He will punish all those ungodly people for all the evil things they have done. The Lord will surely punish those ungodly sinners for every evil thing they have ever said about him.
translation_verse: gi biaxwa litsi ni banima petee e, lɛ biabu banama petee gi bése Aya ɛ lipɔ, kɔkpɛ ba eboe zimizi ana gi bɛbitɛ ní kude uliɔ ɔ, gi kúma ni Aya yɛ kudeo onu u loso. Lɛ biabu enugumeboe ala gi banama klɔ ɔ, gi bizɛbitɛ eboe zimizi na ɛ, bɛpani manɔ ní yɛ su.”

english_verse: These people grumble and complain and live by their own selfish desires. They brag about themselves and flatter others to get what they want. More Warnings
translation_verse: Banɔ ba ya ɛ, benu banɔ gi bizɛɛtɛ̃ ɛ, xe bizebu banɔdzedze ba lipɔ ɔ; bizeezeni ba tutɔ ba bapɛ́pɛ zimizi ba kude; bizɛɛdɔ̀ isu ya, lɛ bizɛkpɔ̀ banima kiliɛ gi biamɔ kudeonu ki ba ɔtutɔ lɔ isu ya loso o. Bagbágba ʋa ni batrɔtrɔ ʋa

english_verse: My dear friends, remember the warning you were given by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Mɛ baʋia dimɛnɔ ba, mlaplɛ aŋu ní liboe lɛ gi blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ banɔkpɛkpɛ ba bɛpani aʋa a.

english_verse: They told you that near the end of time, selfish and godless people would start making fun of God.
translation_verse: Bɛsi mlɔ si, “Ní ewe gɔgɔ la mɛ ɛ, banima biaba gi biakpɛ mlɔ kakpaa a, lɛ biazeni ba ɔtutɔ ba bapɛ́pɛ gi bamá ni Aya yɛ kupɛpɛ onu i kude.”

english_verse: And now these people are already making you turn against each other. They think only about this life, and they don't have God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Banɔ ba ya ɛ, bizɛmani kulɛlɛ, gi balɛ ni batutɔ ba isu mɛ bapɛ́pɛ ʋa kude e, ɔkpɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɔma ní ba mɛ loso o.

english_verse: Dear friends, keep building on the foundation of your most holy faith, as the Holy Spirit helps you to pray.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mlɔ, mɛ baʋia dimɛnɔ ba ɛ, mlatre ní lɛ aʋa tɔ mlaʋɔ̀ mlɔ isu ya pɔnɔ ní mlɔ kuziŋa dradraa mɛ, tɔ mlaxwa Aya ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ mɛ.

english_verse: And keep in step with God's love, as you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to show how kind he is by giving you eternal life.
translation_verse: Mleze ní Aya yɛ kunɔlɔɔ mɛ, gi mleepe blɔ Ɔkaɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ asigagadidi la a, gi la aamani mlɔ ligbã́ moblo le e.

english_verse: Be helpful to all who may have doubts.
translation_verse: Mledi baʋaziŋaa ba gi bápɛ si bɛɛzɛ liboe le e, asigaga,

english_verse: Rescue any who need to be saved, as you would rescue someone from a fire. Then with fear in your own hearts, have mercy on everyone who needs it. But hate even the clothes of those who have been made dirty by their filthy deeds. Final Prayer
translation_verse: mlaʋa banɔ dzedze ba tɔ mlebu ba ní kifu yɛ mɛ, lɛ kí batɔ fɛ ɛ, mledi ba asigaga pɔ̀ mlabitɛ lɛ ni litɔplɛplɛkese kese ni lifu, tɔ mlakíki si ba ligbã́ zimizi ne e, lità eku ní mlɔ mɛ ɛ. Aya Kuxwaxwa ni yɛ Kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀

english_verse: Offer praise to God our Savior because of our Lord Jesus Christ! Only God can keep you from falling and make you pure and joyful in his glorious presence. Before time began and now and forever, God is worthy of glory, honor, power, and authority. Amen.
translation_verse: kí Aya tolee gi onu blɔ Obúbú ye e, gani Yesu Kristo, blɔ Ɔkaɛ aʋa ɛ, yɛ ko kwiakɔ kubùbù kɔ. Yɛ onu kigaglaɛ petee onete, lɛ yɛ ɛɛŋa kukusi yo ní kidɔ kakaa aʋa dɔni kanɔa mɛ kɔtsini kanɔmɛ! Atɔ liba lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: This is what God showed to Jesus Christ, so that he could tell his servants what must happen soon. Christ then sent his angel with the message to his servant John.
translation_verse: Eboe ala gi Aya ebu ɛbasɛ gani Yesu Kristo aʋa a, tɔ ɔbasɛ yɛ banɔsumu ba, eboe ala gi lilɛ si aba la mɛ ní lipoe kpekpemi itɔ mɛ ɛ. Aki si bete la gani yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ gi akpɛ ní Yohanes yɛ ɔnɔ sumu ye klɔ ɔ.

english_verse: And John told everything he had seen about God's message and about what Jesus Christ had said and done.
translation_verse: Lɛ Yohanes aŋa katsalia, lɛ apani ní kidɔ kakaa gi amɔ ɛ su, si lɛ ya linu Aya yɛ liboe le ni liboe lɛ gi lido edɔ ní Yesu Kristo onu u.

english_verse: From John to the seven churches in Asia. I pray that you will be blessed with kindness and peace from God, who is and was and is coming. May you receive kindness and peace from the seven spirits before the throne of God.
translation_verse: Keplekpaa lia kɛdɔ ní mɛ Yohanes klɔ ɛki Isɔli ha tigloele le ní Asia yɛ keweku ya: Lipomɛpɛpɛ ni kusuyɔ ki mlɔ dɔni yɛ ɔniliɛ gi ɔlɛ ɛ, gi eze e, xe atrába ɛ klɔ, ni dɔni ifuɛfuɛ tigloele le gi ilɛ ní yɛ likusigbo le ɔtɔ nɔ ɛ klɔ,

english_verse: May kindness and peace be yours from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness. Jesus was the first to conquer death, and he is the ruler of all earthly kings. Christ loves us, and by his blood he set us free from our sins.
translation_verse: ani dɔni Yesu Kristo, gi onu anukwarɛɛ yɛ katsalia klɔ ɔ, yɛ gi onu obi tɔpu u, yɛ gi ayɔ adɔ ni bekpo ʋa mɛ ɛ, kɔpɔni kesea ʋa bekusi ba ba ɔʋaŋaɛ klɔ! Yɛ ɔniliɛ gi alɔ blɔ ɔ, xe akɔ yɛ ìka lɛ eplo blɔ eboe zimizi na ní blɔ su i,

english_verse: He lets us rule as kings and serve God his Father as priests. To him be glory and power forever and ever! Amen.
translation_verse: Yɛ abitɛ blɔ si kuze yɛ kaʋaŋaa ni yɛ kusumu yo baka gi kwiazesumu Yɛka Aya a, yɛ linɛ linu kusudra ani kigagla dɔni kanɔmɛ tsinɔ kanɔmɛ! Atɔ liba lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: Look! He is coming with the clouds. Everyone will see him, even the ones who stuck a sword through him. All people on earth will weep because of him. Yes, it will happen! Amen.
translation_verse: Dike, atrába ní aplɛ la mɛ, lɛ ɔnɔ kakaa ámɔ yɛ, banama gi bɛsɔ́ yɛ bidɔ mɛ kyɛ ɛ, lɛ banima petee ní kesea aʋa biabemi ɔkpɛ yɛ! Ee, atɔ liba lɛ mɛ.

english_verse: The Lord God says, “I am Alpha and Omega, the one who is and was and is coming. I am God All-Powerful!” A Vision of the Risen Lord
translation_verse: “Mɛ menu Alfa ni Omega.” Nite Ɔka Aya apani, “yɛ gi ɔlɛ ɛ, xe eze e, xe atrába ɛ, kigaglaɛ petee onetee.” Bebu Kristo ebasɛ Yohanes

english_verse: I am John, a follower together with all of you. We suffer because Jesus is our king, but he gives us the strength to endure. I was sent to Patmos Island, because I had preached God's message and had told about Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɛ menu Yohanes, mlɔ onemi lɛ ŋwisi ɔnɔ gi ɔlɛ ni Yesu kude e, menu mlɔ ɔgaglɔnɛ ní litɔplɛplɛkese ni ikù kpɛkpɛ ní ɔziã mɔmɔ nɔ gi izɛɛba banama gi benu yɛ kaʋaŋaa mɛ banɛ ba aʋa ɛ. Meze ní Patmos kunisi yo kese katɔ aʋa kɔkpɛ Aya yɛ liboe le ani katsalia kuŋaŋa ki Yesu loso o.

english_verse: On the Lord's day the Spirit took control of me, and behind me I heard a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
translation_verse: Meze ní Ɔfuɛfuɛ Dradra lɔ mɛ ní Ɔkaɛ yɛ liwe le aʋa, lɛ menu ole gagla ɔtɔ ní mɛ kedea, ŋwisi kakuklui keeyi kinɛ, lɛ ɛpani si:

english_verse: The voice said, “Write in a book what you see. Then send it to the seven churches in Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea.”
translation_verse: “Kidiliɛ gi wɔmɔ ɛ, ŋwlimi kɛ kpɛ ní keplekpa mɛ, tɔ kɔ ka tsisi isɔli ha tigloele le gi ilɛ ní Efeso ni Smirna ni Pergamo kɔpɔni Tiatira ni Sardis ani Filadelfia kɔpɔni Laodikea.”

english_verse: When I turned to see who was speaking to me, I saw seven gold lampstands.
translation_verse: Mekyi, si mídi ɔniliɛ gi eegu kunugu yo ni me e. Agi mekyi i, mamɔ sika kani ise tigloele,

english_verse: There with the lampstands was someone who seemed to be the Son of Man. He was wearing a robe that reached down to his feet, and a gold cloth was wrapped around his chest.
translation_verse: lɛ ní kani yɛ ise le kusi i, mamɔ ɔnutɔ gi ɔlɛ ŋwisi “Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye” kinɛ ɛ, gi akpɛ liwu gblamadzaɛtɔ ɔ, gi liplee na yɛ kuklikpɔɔ ɔ, lɛ akɔ sika yɛ lisaba ɛtɔ akɔ anya yɛ kakɔa mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: His head and his hair were white as wool or snow, and his eyes looked like flames of fire.
translation_verse: Yɛ litukpo le ni yɛ siya sɛ sixwa pititi ŋwisi ɖeti pititi yɛ kinɛ ɛ, ŋwisi amukla kinɛ ɛ, lɛ yɛ bimbi ʋe bilɛ ŋwisi kifu binemi kinɛ ɛ,

english_verse: His feet were glowing like bronze being heated in a furnace, and his voice sounded like the roar of a waterfall.
translation_verse: lɛ yɛ ikli lɛ izeŋle ŋwisi ɔla gi bebu ní kifu ligble le me kinɛ ɛ, lɛ yɛ ole lo eeyì ŋwisi inipe glegle gi iidɔ limu ne lɛ ozi lo kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: He held seven stars in his right hand, and a sharp double-edged sword was coming from his mouth. His face was shining as bright as the sun at noon.
translation_verse: Lɛ evu badzidziebi tiegloele ní yɛ kaŋawla mɛ ɛ, lɛ ihɛ nunu gblamadza inugu tiʋa edo edɔni yɛ onugu lo me. Yɛ aŋu na mɛ eekle ŋwisi kemizea liwo le kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead person. But he put his right hand on me and said: Don't be afraid! I am the first, the last,
translation_verse: Gi mamɔ yɛ ɛ, madɔ ní yɛ ikli lɛ onu ŋwisi ɔnɔ gi etse kinɛ ɛ. Lɛ akɔ yɛ ɔŋawla lɔ atrɔ ní mɛ aʋa lɛ apani si, “Wukíse lifu u, mɛ menu Ɔtɔpu yɛ ni Ɔgɔgɔɛ.

english_verse: and the living one. I died, but now I am alive forever, and I have the keys to death and the world of the dead.
translation_verse: Mɛ malɛ ligbã́, metse, pɔ̀ di ke, malɛ ligbã́ nɛ kɔtsinɔ ní kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ, lɛ safi ʋa gi bɛki mɛ kigagla ní kutseo ni bekpo ʋa mɛ aʋa ɛ, balɛ ní mɛ awla.

english_verse: Write what you have seen and what is and what will happen after these things.
translation_verse: “Lɛ loso ŋwlimi plɛ kidiliɛ gi wɔmɔ ɔ, gi kilɛ abla a ni kidiliɛ gi kitraba kɛ mɛ lɛ kede e.

english_verse: I will explain the mystery of the seven stars you saw at my right side and the seven gold lampstands. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the lampstands are the seven churches.
translation_verse: Badzidziebi tiegloele ba gi wɔmɔ ní mɛ kaŋawla mɛ ɛ, ani sika yɛ kani yɛ ise tigloele le e, lɛ eboe kpokpo la ese enu si: Badzidziebi tiegloele ba benu Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ kí isɔli ha tigloele le, lɛ kani ise tigloele le inu isɔli ha tigloele e.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Ephesus: I am the one who holds the seven stars in my right hand, and I walk among the seven gold lampstands. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Ŋwlimi kí Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Efeso ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa si i: Ɔniliɛ gi evu badzidziebi tiegloele ʋa ní yɛ kaŋawla mɛ ɛ, xe ɛɛga ní sika kani yɛ ise tigloele le kusi yo e, yɛ apani eboe ala ya si:

english_verse: I know everything you have done, including your hard work and how you have endured. I know you won't put up with anyone who is evil. When some people pretended to be apostles, you tested them and found out they were liars.
translation_verse: Mete mlɔ kiboebitɛɛ ni mlɔ axwɛwawa gagla la, ani mlɔ igyi dodo le. Lɛ mete si mlaʋítani banɔ zimizi ba eboe la kudimɛ nɔ ɔ, lɛ mlefeke banama gi bizɛɛpani si i, ba benu banɔkpɛkpɛ ba, pɔ̀ bénu idi, lɛ mlɛmɔ ba si basia nɛ benu u.

english_verse: You have endured and gone through hard times because of me, yet you have not given up.
translation_verse: pɔ̀ mlɛkpɛ iku nɛ, lɛ mlɛga kuyeʋiyeʋi me kɔkpɛ mɛ linyi ne loso, pɔ̀ fɛ mlépe e.

english_verse: But I do have something against you! And it is this: You don't have as much love as you used to.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mamɔ kiditɔ gi kípɛ ní mlɔ su u, mlɛyurɔ kulɔlɔ tɔpu liɔ gi kwize ní mlɔ awla ɛki mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Think about where you have fallen from, and then turn back and do as you did at first. If you don't turn back, I will come and take away your lampstand.
translation_verse: Mlaplɛ aŋu ní niklɔ gi mlɛwɔli dɔnɔ ɛ, mlekyi ɔna mɛ tɔ mlabitɛ kidiliɛ gi mlɛzɛɛbitɛ tsa ɛ, pɔ̀ xegi mlékyi ɔna mɛ ɛ, maaba mlɔklɔ lɛ maaba efeke mlɔ kani yɛ ose lo ní lɔ ozeklɔ.

english_verse: But there is one thing you are doing right. You hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, and so do I.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ liboe lɛ ya litrɔ ní mlɔ aʋa si, mlɛtrɔ Nikolaitianɛ ma ba kiboebitɛɛ ahwafi, gi mɛkyɛ matrɔ ahwafi la ɛ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. I will let everyone who wins the victory eat from the life-giving tree in God's wonderful garden. The Letter to Smyrna
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ awla gi kutu kulɛ ɛ, onu liboe lɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛɛpani ki isɔliha lɛ ɛ si: Ɔniliɛ gi aŋa aʋa ɛ, maaki yɛ kude si ɔŋa ligbã́ nɛ ose lo lɔ ebi yoyo la, gi ɔlɛ ní Aya yɛ Paradiso ye me e. Liboe lɛ gi aŋwlimi i aki Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Smirna ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa ɛ

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Smyrna: I am the first and the last. I died, but now I am alive! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Ŋwlimi ki Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Smirna ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa si i: Ɔniliɛ gi yɛ onu ɔtɔpu yɛ ni ɔgɔgɔɛ ɛ, ɔniliɛ gi etse e, pɔ̀ xe ayɔ edzì ligbã́ nɛ ɛ, yɛ eboe la la ya si:

english_verse: I know how much you suffer and how poor you are, but you are rich. I also know the cruel things being said about you by people who claim to be God's people. But they are not really God's people. They are a group that belongs to Satan.
translation_verse: Mete wɔ ɔzia nɔ ani wɔ lipi le pɔ̀ oxonete wonu! Mete banama gi bizɛxwa isu ya si Yudanɛ bénu u, gi ba bizɛɛpani enugumeboe mani wɔ su tɔ beezizi wɔ su u, pɔ̀ bénu Yudanɛ ɛ, gi ba ɔtsaklɔ onu Satana yɛ ɔnɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't worry about what you will suffer. The devil will throw some of you into jail, and you will be tested and made to suffer for ten days. But if you are faithful until you die, I will reward you with a glorious life.
translation_verse: Wukíse ɔziã nɔ klɔ gi wɔtramɔ ɔ. Dike, Ozimizi ye atrákpɛ mlɔ mɛ banɔ batɔ ligba, atɔ yikeni mlo edi, lɛ mlamɔ kutuhehe ewe liɔfɔ. Pɔ̀ mleze ní anukwarɛɛ aʋa zɛkɔna ni kutse me ke e, tɔ maakí mlɔ ligbã́ nɛ likusikuto le.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. Whoever wins the victory will not be hurt by the second death. The Letter to Pergamum
translation_verse: “Ɔniliɛ gi kutu kulɛ kí yɛ ɛ, onu liboe lɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛɛpani iiki Isɔliha lɛ ɛ. Ɔniliɛ gi aŋa aʋa ɛ, ɔ́tramɔ kutse ʋlaa kɔ ɔziã a. Liboe lɛ gi aŋwlimi i aki Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Pergamo ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa ɛ

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Pergamum: I am the one who has the sharp double-edged sword! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Ŋwlimi tsisi Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Pergamo ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa si i: Ɔniliɛ awla gi ihɛ nunu gblamadzaɛ inugu tiʋa lɛ ɔlɛ ɛ, yɛ eboe la la ya si:

english_verse: I know you live where Satan has his throne. But you have kept true to my name. Right there where Satan lives, my faithful witness Antipas was taken from you and put to death. Even then you did not give up your faith in me.
translation_verse: Mete ɔma nɔ klɔ mɛ gi wɔlɛ́ ɛ, niklɔ gi Ozimizi ye edu yɛ likusigbo le e. Pɔ̀ wovu mɛ linyi ne ní awla gagla a, lɛ wɔ́nada wɔ kuziŋa ní mɛ mɛ̀, ní ewe a la mɛ gi beye Antipa fɛ ɛ, gi yɛ aŋa anukwarɛɛ katsalia aki mɛ ɛ, ní mlɔ ɔma ʋidi lo me gi níklɔ Ozimizi ye ɔlɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I do have a few things against you. Some of you are following the teaching of Balaam. Long ago he told Balak to teach the people of Israel to eat food that had been offered to idols and to be immoral.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ eboe atɔ alɛ ní wɔsu u; lɛ ese linu si banama gi bevu Baalam kudɔbasɛ yɔ ní awla ɛ, balɛ ní wɔ su, gi yɛ abasɛ Balak si, omeni Israel bebi ba onu tɔ babitɛ eboe zimizi gani bidɔ ŋaŋa gi bɛki babu ʋa mɛ ɛ, ani tɔ bawa kihasi ye.

english_verse: Now some of you are following the teaching of the Nicolaitans.
translation_verse: Niteme ke banama gi bevu Nikolaitia nɛ ma bidɔbasɛbasɛ mɛ ní awla ɛ, kyɛ bákpasi ní mlɔ kusi.

english_verse: Turn back! If you don't, I will come quickly and fight against these people. And my words will cut like a sword.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso kyi ní wɔ ɔna mɛ; xe aníte e, maaba wɔ klɔ kpekpe, lɛ maakɔ ihɛ liɛ gi ɔlɛ ní mɛ onugu lo me e, maakɔ yɛ ɔta kigũ nì ba.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. To everyone who wins the victory, I will give some of the hidden food. I will also give each one a white stone with a new name written on it. No one will know that name except the one who is given the stone. The Letter to Thyatira
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi kutu kulɛ yɛ ɛ, onu liboe lɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛɛpani iiki Isɔliha lɛ ɛ. Ɔniliɛ gi aŋa aʋa ɛ, maaki yɛ mana liɛ gi bekpo e yɛ ɔtɔ, lɛ maaki yɛ likla pititi, gi bɛŋwlimi linyi vuvu itrɔ lɛ aʋa a, linyi gi ɔnɔ dzedze ɔtɔtɔ ɔ́trate e, sani ɔniliɛ gi yɛ azɛ lɛ ɛ. Liboe lɛ gi aŋwlimi i aki Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Tiatira ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa ɛ

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Thyatira: I am the Son of God! My eyes are like flames of fire, and my feet are like bronze. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Lɛ ŋwlimi ki aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Tiatira ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa si i: Aya Yebi ye, ɔniliɛ gi yɛ bimbi ʋe bilɛ ŋwisi kifu u, gi kiisɔ kinɛ ɛ, xe yɛ ikli lɛ ilɛ ŋwisi ɔlaakyikyi gi bɛkpɛ kifu mɛ kinɛ ɛ, yɛ apani eboa la si:

english_verse: I know everything about you, including your love, your faith, your service, and how you have endured. I know you are doing more now than you have ever done before.
translation_verse: Mete wɔ axwɛwawa la, wɔ kunɔlɔɔ, ni wɔ kuziŋaa ani wɔ kunɔsumu yo kɔpɔni wɔ kukenidi yo, lɛ wɔɛkpɛ ikù nɛ abla ɛsani kiliɛ gi lize kutɔpu yɔ ɔ.

english_verse: But I still have something against you because of that woman Jezebel. She calls herself a prophet, and you let her teach and mislead my servants to do immoral things and to eat food offered to idols.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ mamɔ liboe lɛ ya ní wɔ su si, wɔki ɔdzɛ liɛ klɔ Isabel gi ɛɛxwa isu ya si ye nu oboedoplɛ ɛ, kudeonu. Gani yɛ bidɔbasɛbasɛ ʋɛ mɛ ɛ, eemeni mɛ banɔsumu ba ɛkpɛ ní kihasi ye me, ani tɔ baŋa bidɔ bɛ ya gi bɛki babu ʋa ɛ.

english_verse: I gave her a chance to turn from her sins, but she did not want to stop doing these immoral things.
translation_verse: Maki yɛ lipoe, si okyi yɛ ɔna mɛ dɔni yɛ kihasiwawaɛ mɛ; pɔ̀ ɔ́dimɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am going to strike down Jezebel. Everyone who does these immoral things with her will also be punished, if they don't stop.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso, matrasa yɛ plɛ ɔnyanya ɔtɔsi aʋa, lɛ banama gi bɛwa kihasi ye ni yɛ ɛ, xegi békyi adɔ ni ba kiboebitɛ liɛ ya mɛ ɛ, maakɔ kupepe ʋidi ukpɛ ní ba mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I will even kill her followers. Then all the churches will see that I know everyone's thoughts and feelings. I will treat each of you as you deserve.
translation_verse: Maaye yɛ bebi ba. Lɛ Isɔliha lɛ petee iate si, mɛ menu ɔniliɛ gi izɛɛpami ina nɛ ni begyodi ʋa mɛ, lɛ maatsa lɛ ɔki mlɔ mɛ ɔkakaa ní yɛ kiboebitɛɛ onu u.

english_verse: Some of you in Thyatira don't follow Jezebel's teaching. You don't know anything about what her followers call the “deep secrets of Satan.” So I won't burden you down with any other commands.
translation_verse: Abla mɛɛsi mlɔ banɔ gɔgɔ ba ní Tiatira, mlɔ banama gi mlévu bidɔ basɛbasɛɛ bɛ ya ní awla a, xe bákpasi Ozimizi ye yɛ eboe kpokpo la a, gi áma ní la mɛ ɛ. Mátratrɔ lidɔtu dzedze tɔtɔ ní mlɔ aʋa tɔ ɔ.

english_verse: But until I come, you must hold firmly to the teaching you have.
translation_verse: Kidiliɛ gi kilɛ ní mlɔ awla ɛ, mlevu kɛ mɛ gagla a, kɔzɛna ni lipoe lɛ gi maaba ɛ.

english_verse: I will give power over the nations to everyone who wins the victory and keeps on obeying me until the end.
translation_verse: Lɛ ɔniliɛ gi aŋa aʋa a, xe izɛɛbitɛ ní mɛ kupɛpɛɔ aʋa a, zɛkɔna ni ɔgù kɔ ɛ, maaki yɛ kigagla ní amade na aʋa.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi kutu kulɛ yɛ ɛ, onu liboe lɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛɛpani iiki Isɔliha lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Sardis: I have the seven spirits of God and the seven stars. Listen to what I say. I know what you are doing. Everyone may think you are alive, but you are dead.
translation_verse: “Ŋwlimi ki Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Sardis ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa si i: Ɔniliɛ awla gi Aya yɛ ifuɛfuɛ tigloele le ni badzidziebi tigloele ba balɛ ɛ, yɛ ɛɛpani eboe ala ya si: Mete wɔ axwɛwawa la, linyi lilɛ wɔ awla si, wɔlɛ ligbã́ pɔ̀ wotse e.

english_verse: Wake up! You have only a little strength left, and it is almost gone. So try to become stronger. I have found that you are not completely obeying God.
translation_verse: Nyime tɔ kpɛ bidɔ ɛmɛ gi bigɔ ɔ, xe biatse e, kigagla, lɛ ese linu si mámɔ si wɔ axwɛwawa la ɛna ní mɛ Aya aŋu mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Remember the teaching you were given and heard. Hold firmly to it and turn from your sins. If you don't wake up, I will come when you least expect it, just as a thief does.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso e, plɛ aŋu ní kidiliɛ gi wɔzɛ ɛ, xe wonu i aʋa, atɔ bitɛ lɛ aʋa, tɔ kyi ɔna mɛ. Xegi wɔ́ma ní aŋu plɛplɛ mɛ ɛ, maaba do ní wɔ aʋa ŋwisi oze kinɛ ɛ, lɛ wɔtrate ɔnyɔsasa nɔ mɛ gi maado ní wɔ aʋa a.

english_verse: A few of you in Sardis have not dirtied your clothes with sin. You will walk with me in white clothes, because you are worthy.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ banɔ klakla atɔ balɛ ní Sardis, gi bélulu ba ewu la a. Ba biakpɛ ewu pititi lɛ biaga ni mɛ: lɛ ese linu si ba begyeno o.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will wear white clothes. Their names will not be erased from the book of life, and I will tell my Father and his angels that they are my followers.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi aŋa aʋa ɛ, biakpɛ liwu pititi kí yɛ ŋwisi ba kiniɛ ɛ, lɛ mátratsoli yɛ linyi ne ni ligbã́ nɛ keplekpaa mɛ liwewe, pɔ̀ madra yɛ linyi ne su ní Mɔka ni yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba aŋu mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. The Letter to Philadelphia
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi kutu kuli yɛ ɛ, onu liboe lɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛɛpani iiki Isɔliha lɛ ɛ. Liboe lɛ gi aŋwlimi i aki Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Filadelfia ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa ɛ

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Philadelphia: I am the one who is holy and true, and I have the keys that belonged to David. When I open a door, no one can close it. And when I close a door, no one can open it. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Ŋwlimi ki Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ liɛ gi eedi Filadelfia ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa si i: Ɔniliɛ gi onu ɔdradra yɛ ni anukwarɛɛ onete ye, ɔniliɛ gi yɛ awla Dawid yɛ safi ye ɔlɛ ɛ, ɔniliɛ gi izɛdra xe ɔnɔnɔ ɔʋítani kudà a, xe izɛda a, xe ɔnɔnɔ ɔʋítani kudra ɛ, yɛ eboe la la ya si:

english_verse: I know everything you have done. And I have placed before you an open door no one can close. You were not very strong, but you obeyed my message and did not deny you are my followers.
translation_verse: Mete wɔ axwɛwawa la! Dike, madra opupo gi ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tratani kudà aki wɔ ɔ: lɛ ese linu si mete si kigagla sisami itɔ ko kilɛ ní wɔ awla a, pɔ̀ wɔbitɛ ní mɛ liboe le aʋa a, lɛ wɔ́nada si wote mɛ linyi ne e.

english_verse: Now you will see what I will do with those people who belong to Satan's group. They claim to be God's people, but they are liars. I will make them come and kneel down at your feet. Then they will know that I love you.
translation_verse: Dike, matraki si banama gi benu Satana yɛ ɔtsaklɔ banima ɛ, banama gi bizɛxwa isu ya si benu Yudanɛ ɛ, pɔ̀ xe bénu u, boŋu i benu basia nɛ, dike maaki si biabakpɛ litukpo kese aki wɔ, lɛ biazɛ lɛ si malɔ wɔ.

english_verse: You obeyed my message and endured. So I will protect you from the time of testing everyone in all the world must go through.
translation_verse: Kiliɛ gi wovu mɛ isã nɛ ní awla a, xe wɔkpɛ ikù nɛ ni litɔplɛplɛkese loso e, mɛfɛ maawe wo ní litsixwaxwa lɛ lipoe lɛ gi litrába kelea petee aʋa mɛ ɛ, gi lɛ biafeke banama a, gi balɛ ní kesea aʋa odi i me.

english_verse: I am coming soon. So hold firmly to what you have, and no one will take away the crown you will be given as your reward.
translation_verse: Matraba kpekpemii. Vu kidiliɛ gi kilɛ ní wɔ awla mɛ gagla a, tɔ ɔnɔnɔ ɔkizɛ wɔ likusikuto le ní wɔ awla a.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will be made into a pillar in the temple of my God, and they will stay there forever. I will write on each of them the name of my God and the name of his city. It is the new Jerusalem my God will send down from heaven. I will also write on them my own new name.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi aŋa aʋa ɛ, maabitɛ yɛ tɔ aaze ɔgbase ní mɛ Aya yɛ lisɔligba lɛ mɛ. Lɛ ɔ́trasɛ ní niklɔ liwewe tɔ ɔ. Maaŋwlimi mɛ Aya yɛ linyi ne trɔ ní yɛ aʋa. Lɛ maaŋwlimi mɛ Aya yɛ ɔma ʋidi no lɔ linyi ne, gi onu Yerusalem vuvu yɛ gi eeple dɔ ní mɛ Aya gi ɔlɛ ní lifunu ne klɔ trɔ ní yɛ aʋa a. Lɛ maaŋwlimi mɛ linyi vuvu nɛ trɔ ni yɛ aʋa a.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. The Letter to Laodicea
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi kutu kulɛ yɛ ɛ, onu liboe lɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛɛpani iiki isɔliha lɛ ɛ. Liboe lɛ gi aŋwlimi aki Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Laodikea ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa ɛ

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Laodicea: I am the one called Amen! I am the faithful and true witness and the source of God's creation. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Ŋwlimi ki Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ gi eedi Laodikea ɔsɔli ha lɔ aʋa si i: Ɔniliɛ gi bizɛxwa si Amen i, gi yɛ onu anukwarɛɛ ni katsalia ɔtutɔ lɔ ɛ, ɔniliɛ gi gani yɛ aʋa Aya abitɛ kidɔ kakaa ɛ, yɛ eboe la la ya si:

english_verse: I know everything you have done, and you are not cold or hot. I wish you were either one or the other.
translation_verse: Mete wɔ axwɛwawa la si, wɔ́yɔ fɛ, lɛ wɔ́zɛ kifu fɛ. Nya mapɛ si tɔ wɔayɔ loo wɔazɛ kifu.

english_verse: But since you are lukewarm and neither cold nor hot, I will spit you out of my mouth.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ gi wɔgblɔ̀ ɛ, wɔ́zɛ kifu, xe wɔ́yɔ fɛ loso e, matrapi wɔ ebu ní mɛ onugu lo me.

english_verse: You claim to be rich and successful and to have everything you need. But you don't know how bad off you really are. You are pitiful, poor, blind, and naked.
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si, wuzɛɛpani si, “Menu oxonete, lɛ bidɔ bilɛ ní mɛ awla a, lɛ kididɔ kiziã mɛ ɛ.” pɔ̀ wóte si, ɔzianete ni ɔsigaganete, opiplinete, kaŋupo ani ɔnɔ gi awɔ liyà yɛ wònu u.

english_verse: Buy your gold from me. It has been refined in a fire, and it will make you rich. Buy white clothes from me. Wear them and you can cover up your shameful nakedness. Buy medicine for your eyes, so you will be able to see.
translation_verse: Migba wɔ tɔ dzi sika, gi bɛwlɔ ní kifu mɛ ɛ, xe yɛ su adra a, ní mɔklɔ, tɔ wɔadzi oxonete, ni kusa pititi gi wɔanyime e, atɔ wɔakɔ okpo wɔ liyà lɛ mɛ, ani kimbi ye kuwa, tɔ wɔala ní wɔ bimbi ʋe aʋa tɔ wɔamɔ bidɔ.

english_verse: I correct and punish everyone I love. So make up your minds to turn away from your sins.
translation_verse: Mizɛɛtɛni banama gi malɔ ɛ, lɛ mizeehe kutu iiki ba; lɛ loso e, kpɛ ikù nɛ tɔ kyí ɔna mɛ.

english_verse: Listen! I am standing and knocking at your door. If you hear my voice and open the door, I will come in and we will eat together.
translation_verse: Dike, malɛɛ ní opupo lo onu gi mɛɛsa opupo lo e; xe ɔnutɔ enu mɛ ole lo o, xe adra opupo lo e, maati iku yɛ aʋa, lɛ maaŋa bidɔ nì yɛ ɛ, lɛ yɛ fɛ aaŋa bidɔ nì mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will sit with me on my throne, just as I won the victory and sat with my Father on his throne.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi aŋa aʋa ɛ, maaki yɛ kudeonu gi aaze pɔni mɛ ní mɛ likusigbo le aʋa a, ŋwisi kiliɛ gi mɛ fɛ maŋa aʋa a, xe medi ni Mɔka ní yɛ likusigbo le aʋa kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Ɔniliɛ gi kutu kuli yɛ ɛ, onu liboe lɛ gi Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ ɛɛpani ki Isɔliha lɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: After this, I looked and saw a door that opened into heaven. Then the voice that had spoken to me at first and that sounded like a trumpet said, “Come up here! I will show you what must happen next.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ya kede e, gi meedi i, dike mamɔ opupo ɔtɔ gi ɛdra edu ní lifunu ne e. Lɛ ole tɔpu ɔnɔ gi menu i, egu kunugu yo ni me ŋwisi kakuklui kinɛ si: Ga ba lifunu ne ní ya, tɔ mibasɛ wɔ eboe ala gi ɛtraba la mɛ ní la ya kede e.

english_verse: Right then the Spirit took control of me, and there in heaven I saw a throne and someone sitting on it.
translation_verse: Kyɔŋ klɔ ko e Aya yɛ Ɔfuɛfuɛ nɔ eeku ní mɛ mɛ̀, lɛ mamɔ likusigbo gi bedu ní lifunu ne, lɛ ɔnutɔ odi ní lɛ aʋa ɛ.

english_verse: Twenty-four other thrones were in a circle around that throne. And on each of these thrones there was an elder dressed in white clothes and wearing a gold crown.
translation_verse: Lɛ ekusigbo avitaʋa ni tene dzedze ɛklani likusigbo le, lɛ banɔtsitsi avitaʋa ni tiene bedi ní ekusigbo ala klɔ aʋa ɛ. Bɛkpɛ bidɔ pititi, lɛ bekume sika ekusikuto ní ba etukpo la a.

english_verse: Flashes of lightning and roars of thunder came out from the throne in the center of the circle. Seven torches, which are the seven spirits of God, were burning in front of the throne.
translation_verse: Lɛ dzeni ye azeebu kifu yɛ xe azaalaʋi i, xe azeegu adɔni likusigbo le me e. Lɛ ní likusigbo le ɔtɔ nɔ ɛ, kani tiegloele bɛɛsɔ. Ba benu Aya yɛ ifuɛfuɛ tigloele le.

english_verse: Also in front of the throne was something that looked like a glass sea, clear as crystal. Around the throne in the center were four living creatures covered front and back with eyes.
translation_verse: Ní likusigbo le ɔtɔ nɔ ɛ, kiditɔ gi kilɛ ŋwisi axu la a, afini gi la mɛ ɛzrɔ ɔ, xe eekle nianiania ŋwisi azinzi kinɛ ɛ. Lɛ bidɔ gbagbe tune, gi biyi bimbi ʋe, ɔtɔ ni kede, bize ní kusio ani klani likusigbo le.

english_verse: The first creature was like a lion, the second one was like a bull, the third one had the face of a human, and the fourth was like a flying eagle.
translation_verse: Lɛ kidɔgbagbe tɔpu yɛ kilɛ lɛ ko ŋwisi gyata yɛ kinɛ ɛ, lɛ kidɔ gbagbe ʋla ɛ kilɛ ŋwisi ligumenyime kinɛ ɛ, lɛ kidɔ gbagbɛ tanɛ ɛ kɛ aŋu na mɛ alɛ ŋwisi ɔnɔ aŋu mɛ kinɛ ɛ, lɛ kidɔ gbagbe nene ke e, kilɛ ŋwisi kadzi gi keepruru kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Each of the four living creatures had six wings, and their bodies were covered with eyes. Day and night they never stopped singing, “Holy, holy, holy is the Lord, the all-powerful God, who was and is and is coming!”
translation_verse: Bidɔ gbagbe tune ʋe bikákaa siwlasasa tuglo silɛ ki bɛ, lɛ bimbi ʋe bilɛ klani bɛsu ní bɛ siwlasasa sɛ ese fɛ. Lɛ biʋízemɔni elesi ni kemize, bizɛɛkpɔ̀ Aya si: “Kusudra, kusudra, kusudra kunu Ɔkaɛ, Aya kigaglaɛ petee Ɔkaɛ kunɛ, Yɛ gi eze e, xe ɔlɛ ɛ, xe atrába ɛ!”

english_verse: The living creatures kept praising, honoring, and thanking the one who sits on the throne and who lives forever and ever.
translation_verse: Lɛ xe bidɔ gbagbe ʋe biki ɔniliɛ gi odi ní likusigbo le aʋa kusudra kubùbù yo ni ɖasedodo e, xe ɔlɛ ligbã́ nɛ dɔni kanɔmɛ tsini kanɔmɛ ɛ,

english_verse: “Our Lord and God, you are worthy to receive glory, honor, and power. You created all things, and by your decision they are and were created.”
translation_verse: “Blɔ Ɔkaɛ nì Aya, wɔ wogyeno si, wɔazɛ kusudra ni kubùbù yo ani kigaglaɛ. Lɛ ese linu si wɔ wɔbitɛ kidɔ kakaa, lɛ bilɛ lɛ ese linu si wɔbitɛ bɛ ní wɔ kupɛ́pɛɔ onu.”

english_verse: In the right hand of the one sitting on the throne I saw a scroll that had writing on the inside and on the outside. And it was sealed in seven places.
translation_verse: Lɛ mamɔ keplekpaa, gi bɛŋwlimi bidɔ ní ka kupɛɔ tuʋa petee e, xe bɛtsala ka onu ní ikɔ tigloele ní ɔniliɛ klɔ ɔ, gi odi ní likusigbo le aʋa ɛ, yɛ kaŋawla mɛ.

english_verse: I saw a mighty angel ask with a loud voice, “Who is worthy to open the scroll and break its seals?”
translation_verse: Lɛ mamɔ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ gagla ɔtɔ gi ɛɛkla ni ole gagla ɔtɔ si: “Nyaŋwɛ egyeno gi aable bidɔ bɛ ya a, gi bɛkɔ ɛtsala keplekpaa a, xe aadra keplekpaa lia ya ɛ?”

english_verse: No one in heaven or on earth or under the earth was able to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ ɔnɔnɔ óze ní lifunu ne loo kesea aʋa loo ní kesea ese e, gi aatani keplekpa kudra loo aatani ka mɛ kudi i.

english_verse: I cried hard because no one was found worthy to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Lɛ mebemi mɔmɔmɔ, lɛ ese linu si bámɔ ɔnɔnɔ gi ana a, xe aadra keplekpaa loo aadi ka mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Then one of the elders said to me, “Stop crying and look! The one who is called both the ‘Lion from the Tribe of Judah’ and ‘King David's Great Descendant’ has won the victory. He will open the scroll and its seven seals.”
translation_verse: Pɔ̀ lɛ banɔtsitsi ba mɛ tole asi mɛ si; “Wukíbemi; dike, ɔniliɛ gi bizɛxwa si gyata yɛ ɛ, gi ádɔ Yuda okú no me e, gi agyɔ ádɔ ní Dawid igù ne me e, aŋa aʋa. Yɛ aatani keplekpaa ni bidɔ tugloelee ʋɛ gi bɛkɔ ɛ tsala keplekpaa onu i, kudra.”

english_verse: Then I looked and saw a Lamb standing in the center of the throne surrounded by the four living creatures and the elders. The Lamb looked as if it had once been killed. It had seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven spirits of God, sent out to all the earth.
translation_verse: Lɛ mamɔ Keʋesibi gi kɛɛŋwi ŋwisi kiye beye ka na a, gi kalɛɛ ní likusigbo le kusio, lɛ bidɔ bitɛbitɛ gbagbe tune ʋe ni banɔtsitsi ba bɛklani ka ɛ. Eyi asia tegloele ni bimbi tugloele, gi binu Aya yɛ ifuɛfuɛ tigloele le, gi bɛkpɛ tsisi ní kesea petee aʋa a.

english_verse: The Lamb went over and took the scroll from the right hand of the one who sat on the throne.
translation_verse: Lɛ aba, xe azɛ keplekpaa ní ɔniliɛ ɛ, gi odi ní likusigbo le aʋa ɛ, yɛ kaŋawla mɛ.

english_verse: Then they sang a new song, “You are worthy to receive the scroll and open its seals, because you were killed. And with your own blood you bought for God people from every tribe, language, nation, and race.
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛza ɔdzi vuvu gi lɔ eboe la enu si: “Wɔ wogyeno si wɔazɛ keplekpaa, xe wɔable bidɔ bɛ klɔ gi bɛkɔ ɛtsala ka a, lɛ ese linu si beye wo, lɛ wɔ ika lɛ ɛ, wɔkɔ lɛ odzi banɔ aki Aya dɔni limade kakaa, ni siya kakaa, ni banɔ kakaa, ní kese kakaa aʋa.

english_verse: You let them become kings and serve God as priests, and they will rule on earth.”
translation_verse: Wɔbitɛ ba si beze kukusi ni kusumu yo baka gi biazesumu blɔ Aya a, lɛ biaŋa aʋa ní kesea aʋa.”

english_verse: As I looked, I heard the voices of a large number of angels around the throne and the voices of the living creatures and of the elders. There were millions and millions of them,
translation_verse: Lɛ medi xe menu Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ kpaŋukpaŋu atɔ ɔ, gi ba kiklakla mɛ kisani akpe ni akpe liɔfɔ ede akpe liɔfɔ ba ole lo o. Bɛklani likusigbo le ni bidɔ bitɛbitɛ gbagbe ʋe ani banɔtsitsi ba.

english_verse: and they were saying in a loud voice, “The Lamb who was killed is worthy to receive power, riches, wisdom, strength, honor, glory, and praise.”
translation_verse: Bɛɛza ɔdzi ni ole gagla si: “Keʋesibi ya lia gi beye e, ka kegyeno si kazɛ kaʋaŋaa, ni exo, ni kuboete, ni kigagla, ni kubùbù, ni kusudra ani kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀!”

english_verse: Then I heard all beings in heaven and on the earth and under the earth and in the sea offer praise. Together, all of them were saying, “Praise, honor, glory, and strength forever and ever to the one who sits on the throne and to the Lamb!”
translation_verse: Lɛ menu gi kidɔ bitɛbitɛ kakaa gi kilɛ ní lifunu ne e, ni kesea aʋa, ni kesea ese, ni axu la mɛ, ani kudɔkpaa liɔ klɔ gi kukpasi ní kɔ mɛ ɛ, kwiza ɔdzi si: “Ki Ɔniliɛ gi odi ní likusigbo le aʋa a, ni Keʋesibi ya, ba binɛ binu kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ɔ ni kubùbù yo ani kusudra ni kaʋaŋaa, dɔni kanɔmɛ tsini kanɔmɛ anɔmɛ!”

english_verse: The four living creatures said “Amen,” while the elders knelt down and worshiped.
translation_verse: Lɛ bidɔ bitɛbitɛ gbagbee tune ʋe e, bipani si, “Liba lɛ mɛ!” Lɛ banɔtsitsi avitaʋa ni tiene ba bɛdɔ kesea lɛ bɛkpɔ̀ Aya ɛ.

english_verse: At the same time I saw the Lamb open the first of the seven seals, I heard one of the four living creatures shout with a voice like thunder. It said, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Lɛ gi meedi i, Keʋesibi ya keble bidɔ tugloele ʋe gi bɛkɔ ɛtsala keplekpa ɛ, bɛ bitɔpu ʋɛ. Lɛ menu gi bidɔ bitɛbitɛ gbagbe tune ʋe bɛ mɛ tule biipani ni ole ŋwisi dzeni eegu kinɛ si, “Ba!”

english_verse: Then I saw a white horse. Its rider carried a bow and was given a crown. He had already won some victories, and he went out to win more.
translation_verse: Lɛ mamɔ isɔ pititi ɔtɔ ɔ, ɔniliɛ gi ɛɛkpɛ yɛ ɛ, evu kunyaa ní awla, lɛ bɛki yɛ likusikuto, lɛ edo atrɛ ŋwisi ɔguta kinɛ ɛ, tɔ yɛ amɔ kaʋaŋaŋa.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the second seal, I heard the second living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Lɛ gi Keʋesibi ya keeble bidɔ ʋla ʋɛ gi bɛ bɛkɔ ɛtsala keplekpa ɛ, menu bidɔ bitɛbitɛ gbagbe ʋla bɛ gi bipani si, “Ba!”

english_verse: Then another horse came out. It was fiery red. And its rider was given the power to take away all peace from the earth, so people would slaughter one another. He was also given a big sword.
translation_verse: Lɛ isɔ dzedze, gi azã kyikyi edo e, lɛ ɔniliɛ gi ɛɛkpɛ yɛ ɛ, bɛki yɛ kigaglaɛ, si tɔ aabu kusuyɔɔ zanɔ ní kesea aʋa, tɔ banima biaye ba ahanuglɔ ba. Lɛ bɛki yɛ ihɛ inugu tiʋa ʋidi ɔtɔ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the third seal, I heard the third living creature say, “Come out!” Then I saw a black horse, and its rider had a balance scale in one hand.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi Keʋesibi ya keble bidɔ tanɛ ʋɛ ɛ, gi bɛkɔ ɛtsala keplekpaa ɛ, menu gi bidɔ bitɛbitɛ gbagbe tanɛ ʋɛ bipani si “Ba!” Lɛ gi mefeke aŋu na ɛ, mamɔ isɔ kpikpi, lɛ ɔniliɛ gi ɛɛkpɛ yɛ ɛ, evu bidɔ gi bizɛɛkɔ ɛta bidɔ tɔ bedi bɛ kinyipu ye ní awla a.

english_verse: I heard what sounded like a voice from somewhere among the four living creatures. It said, “A liter of wheat will cost you a whole day's wages! Three liters of barley will cost you a day's wages too. But don't ruin the olive oil or the wine.”
translation_verse: Lɛ menu kiditɔ ŋwisi ole dɔni bidɔ bitɛbitɛ gbagbe tune ʋe kusi si; “amu kekpo tiele ki liwe tile axwɛwawa, ani adeʋi kukpo tuta ki liwe tile axwɛwawa, pɔ̀ wukímuni kumu yɔ ni wain yɛ kudzi yo kɔ ɔ.”

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Lɛ gi keʋesibi ya keble bidɔ nene ʋe e, menu bidɔ gbagbe nene ʋe ole lo gi ɛɛpani si i, “Ba!”

english_verse: Then I saw a pale green horse. Its rider was named Death, and Death's Kingdom followed close behind. They were given power over one fourth of the earth, and they could kill its people with swords, famines, diseases, and wild animals.
translation_verse: Lɛ mamɔ isɔ gi yɛ kusupeo kwixwa fuu ŋwisi ɔnɔ gi eetse kinɛ ɛ, lɛ ɔniliɛ gi ɛɛkpɛ yɛ ɛ, yɛ linyi ne linu Kutse, lɛ Bekpo ʋa mɛ ɔlɛ ni yɛ kude e. Lɛ bɛki ba kigagla a ní kesea kapɛ nenea aʋa, tɔ bakɔ ihɛ inugu tiʋa, ni kuʋɛ ani bànya kɔpɔni baŋuga ʋa tɔ bakɔ eye banima.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fifth seal, I saw under the altar the souls of everyone who had been killed for speaking God's message and telling about their faith.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi keble bidɔ tsunɛ ʋɛ ɛ, mamɔ banama gi beye kɔkpɛ Aya yɛ liboe le ni katsalia gi bɛŋa lifumose e loso, ba esobo la ní adɔpɔʋisuʋɔ lɔ ese.

english_verse: They shouted, “Master, you are holy and faithful! How long will it be before you judge and punish the people of this earth who killed us?”
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛkpɛ ozi ni ole gagla si: “Ɔkaɛ gi ɛɛŋa aʋa a, Ɔdradra yɛ ni anukwarɛ onete, gakɔna nì lipoe woli koŋ wɔtraxwa litsi ni kelea banima a, xe wɔaʋi kuwle ní blɔ litukpo na a?”

english_verse: Then each of those who had been killed was given a white robe and told to rest for a little while. They had to wait until the complete number of the Lord's other servants and followers would be killed.
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛki ba mɛ ɔkakaa liwu pititi gblamadza, lɛ bɛsi ba si, baplɛ litɔ kese lipoe kpekpemi itɔ, zɛkɔna ni lipoe lɛ klɔ gi ba ahanuglɔ banɔsumu ba ani ba benemi ba ya, gi bɛtráye e ŋwisi kiliɛ gi beye ba kinɛ ɛ, ba kiklaklaɛ mɛ kiana.

english_verse: When I saw the Lamb open the sixth seal, I looked and saw a great earthquake. The sun turned as dark as sackcloth, and the moon became red as blood.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi meedi i, eble bidɔ glonɛ ʋɛ, lɛ kesea kɛhwa nyani nyani. Liwo le lidɔ litumu ŋwisi kusa kpìkpì kinɛ ɛ, lɛ ɔdzidziɛ fɛ ekyi ŋwisi ika kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The stars in the sky fell to earth, just like figs shaken loose by a windstorm.
translation_verse: Lɛ lifunu ne badzidziebi ʋa bɛwɔli dɔ kesea ŋwisi kiliɛ gi esebi yoyo ala gi ázã ɛ, izɛwɔli xe liwɔ ʋidi itɔ liifu kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Then the sky was rolled up like a scroll, and all mountains and islands were moved from their places.
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛklɔʋi lifunu ne eza nɔ ŋwisi kagaplekpa gi bɛklɔʋi kinɛ ɛ, lɛ bebu lito kakaa ni kunisi yo kese kakaa ɛzanɔ ní bɛ izeklɔ.

english_verse: The kings of the earth, its famous people, and its military leaders hid in caves or behind rocks on the mountains. They hid there together with the rich and the powerful and with all the slaves and free people.
translation_verse: Lɛ kesea aʋa bekusi ba ni bekusiebi ba ani baguta ba baka ba, bexonete ba ni bamanete ba, ni ɔnɔsumu kakaa kɔpɔni banama gi balɛ ní isuwla mɛ ba petee bezekpo ní ipɛgla nɛ ni aklakpɔ la kusi ní eto la mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Then they shouted to the mountains and the rocks, “Fall on us! Hide us from the one who sits on the throne and from the anger of the Lamb.
translation_verse: Lɛ bɛsi eto la ni aklakpɔ la si, “Mlakpa adɔ blɔ aʋa, atɔ mlekpo blo ní ɔniliɛ klɔ gi odi ní likusigbo le aʋa ɛ, yɛ aŋu mɛ, dɔni Keʋesibi ya ka kusuyeʋio onu!

english_verse: That terrible day has come! God and the Lamb will show their anger, and who can face it?”
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si ba kusuyeʋio liwe ʋidi ne lina, lɛ nyaŋwɛ aatani kulɛ ɛ ní ba onu na a?”

english_verse: from Benjamin. People from Every Nation
translation_verse: gi bɛkya ní Israɛl i

english_verse: After this I saw four angels. Each one was standing on one of the earth's four corners. The angels held back the four winds, so that no wind would blow on the earth or on the sea or on any tree. These angels had also been given the power to harm the earth and the sea. Then I saw another angel come up from where the sun rises in the east, and he was ready to put the mark of the living God on people. He shouted to the four angels,
translation_verse: Lɛ mamɔ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ dzedze gi eedo e dɔni kewetu ya, gi Aya a, gi ɔlɛ ligbã nɛ ɛ, yɛ lixaŋu nɛ bikpɛdɔ mɛ bilɛ ni yɛ awla. Lɛ akpɛ ozi ni ole gagla tsisi Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ tiene ba gi bɛki kigagla si bezizi bidɔ ní kesea ni axu la su i, si:

english_verse: “Don't harm the earth or the sea or any tree! Wait until I have marked the foreheads of the servants of our God.”
translation_verse: “Mlakízizi kididɔ ní kesea loo axu la loo ise le su kɔzɛna ni lipoe lɛ klɔ gi kwiakpɛ Aya yɛ banɔsumu ba lixaŋu ní ba kutu yo xe e.”

english_verse: and said, “Amen! Praise, glory, wisdom, thanks, honor, power, and strength belong to our God forever and ever! Amen!”
translation_verse: bɛpani si, “liba lɛ mɛ! Kukpɔ̀kpɔ̀ɔ ni kusudra ni kuboete ni ɖase ani kubùbù yo ni kaʋaŋaa ani kigagla ki blɔ Aya, dɔni kanɔmɛ tsini kanɔmɛ. Atɔ liba lɛ mɛ!”

english_verse: After this, I saw a large crowd with more people than could be counted. They were from every race, tribe, nation, and language, and they stood before the throne and before the Lamb. They wore white robes and held palm branches in their hands,
translation_verse: Lɛ ya kede e, medi lɛ mamɔ linɔkpi ʋidi itɔ gi ɔnɔnɔ ɔ́tani kukla ɛ, gi bɛdɔ ní kese kakaa, limade kakaa, ɔma kakaa ni siya kakaa mɛ ɛ, gi balɛɛ ní likusigbo le aŋu mɛ ní Keʋesibi ya ɔtɔ nɔ. Bɛkpɛ ewu pititi gblamadza lɛ bevu siwlawla sɛ ní awla la a,

english_verse: as they shouted, “Our God, who sits upon the throne, has the power to save his people, and so does the Lamb.”
translation_verse: lɛ bɛkpɛ ozi ni ole gagla si, “Kubúbú yo kunu blɔ Aya gi odi ní likusigbo le aʋa ɛ ni keʋesibi ya kunɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: The angels who stood around the throne knelt in front of it with their faces to the ground. The elders and the four living creatures knelt there with them. Then they all worshiped God
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ ba petee balɛɛ klani likusigbo le, ni banɔtsitsi ba ani bidɔgbagbe tune ʋe, lɛ bɛfɛ ɛ, lɛ bewe ba aŋu na mɛ kesea a, ní likusigbo le ɔtɔ nɔ, lɛ besumu Aya a gi

english_verse: One of the elders asked me, “Do you know who these people are that are dressed in white robes? Do you know where they come from?”
translation_verse: Lɛ banɔtsitsi ba mɛ tole eʋi me si “Nyaŋwɛ ba ba ya gi bɛkpɛ ewu pititi gblamadza la a, lɛ nifɔ bɛdɔ ɔ?”

english_verse: “Sir,” I answered, “you must know.” Then he told me: “These are the ones who have gone through the great suffering. They have washed their robes in the blood of the Lamb and have made them white.
translation_verse: Lɛ mebu lɛ onu si, “Ɔka, wɔ wote!” Lɛ asi mɛ si, “Banɔ ba ya ɛ, ba benu banama gi bedo edɔ ní kuxixa ʋidi yo me e, lɛ beplo ba ewu la a, xe bɛbitɛ la pitititi ní keʋesibi ya ka ika lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: And so they stand before the throne of God and worship him in his temple day and night. The one who sits on the throne will spread his tent over them.
translation_verse: Lɛ loso, “balɛ ní Aya yɛ likusigbo le ɔtɔ nɔ, lɛ bizeesumu ye elesi ni kemize ní yɛ lisɔligba lɛ mɛ, lɛ ɔniliɛ gi odi ní likusigbo le aʋa ɛ, aaze ní ba kusi lɛ aakpɛ kuka klani ba.

english_verse: They will never hunger or thirst again, and they won't be troubled by the sun or any scorching heat.
translation_verse: Kuʋɛ kutráku ba liwewe tɔɔ, lɛ olile fɛ ɔ́traku ba liwewe tɔɔ ɔ. Lɛ kuwe kutráta ba tɔɔ loo liwo le lɛ kuhuhu yo kutrákpɛ ba kunugu u.

english_verse: “The Lamb in the center of the throne will be their shepherd. He will lead them to streams of life-giving water, and God will wipe all tears from their eyes.”
translation_verse: Lɛ ese linu si Keʋesibi ya gi kalɛ ní likusigbo le kusi yo e, kiagbani ba, ŋwisi ba oʋesigbanɔ yɛ kinɛ ɛ. yɛ aagbani ba tsinɔ ni inide gi izɛki kuni i, gi kuzɛɛkɔ ligbã́ nɛ su u. Lɛ Aya aatsoli kubeo petee ní ba bimbi ʋe aʋa a.”

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi keble bidɔ gloele ʋe e, lifunu ne ligɔ tsriɖiɖi kɔki ŋwisi ɔnyɔsasa kapɛ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I noticed that the seven angels who stood before God were each given a trumpet.
translation_verse: Lɛ mamɔ Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ tiegloele aba gi bizɛlɛ ní Aya aŋu mɛ ɛ, lɛ bɛki ba kukúklui tugloele.

english_verse: Another angel, who had a gold container for incense, came and stood at the altar. This one was given a lot of incense to offer with the prayers of God's people on the gold altar in front of the throne.
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ dzedze ɔbalɛɛ ní ɔdɔpɔʋisuʋɔ lɔ su, lɛ evu sika kezi gi ka mɛ bizɛɛkpɛ lifi ye kifu yɛ ɛ. Bɛki yɛ lifi ye kpaŋu si tɔ aakɔ ɔpɔni banɔ dradra ba petee ba Aya kuxwaxwaa ní sika yɛ ɔdɔpɔʋisuʋɔɔ lɔ gi ɔlɛ ní likusigbo le ɔtɔ nɔ ɛ aʋa.

english_verse: Then the smoke of the incense, together with the prayers of God's people, went up to God from the hand of the angel.
translation_verse: Lɛ lifi ye kunyɔɔ ni banɔ dradra ba ba Aya kuxwaxwa ɛ, biyɔ ɛdɔni Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛɛ iwla lɛ mɛ trɛ ní Aya yɛ aŋu mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The seven angels now got ready to blow their trumpets.
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ tiegloele ba gi bevu kukúklui tugloele ko e, bɛbla si beme ko.

english_verse: When the first angel blew his trumpet, hail and fire mixed with blood were thrown down on the earth. A third of the earth, a third of the trees, and a third of all green plants were burned.
translation_verse: Gi Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ tɔpu yɛ eme yɛ kakuklui ya ɛ, amukla ni kifu gi kipisa ni ika ɛ, bɛŋwia bɛ ɛkpɛ kesea aʋa a. Lɛ kesea kapɛ tanɛa kɛkani i, ise le kapɛ tanɛa kɛkani, lɛ siwa wɔwɔ sɛ petee kyɛ sikani i.

english_verse: When the second angel blew his trumpet, something like a great fiery mountain was thrown into the sea. A third of the sea turned to blood,
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ ʋla yɛ eme yɛ kakuklui ya a, lɛ kiditɔ, gi kilɛ ŋwisi lito ʋidi itɔ ɔ, gi liisɔ kinɛ ɛ, bɛŋwia bɛ ɛkpɛ ní axu la mɛ, lɛ axu la kapɛ tanɛa kekyi dzi ika ɛ,

english_verse: a third of the living creatures in the sea died, and a third of the ships were destroyed.
translation_verse: lɛ bidɔgbagbee ʋe e, gi bilɛ ní axu la mɛ ɛ, bɛ kapɛ tanɛa ketse, lɛ initsahu le lɛ kapɛ tanɛa fɛ kɛyaʋi i.

english_verse: When the third angel blew his trumpet, a great star fell from heaven. It was burning like a torch, and it fell on a third of the rivers and on a third of the springs of water.
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ tanɛɛ eme yɛ kakuklui ya ɛ, lɛ ɔdzidziobi ʋidi ɔtɔ, gi azaasɔ ŋwisi ɔbia kinɛ ɛ, awɔli adɔ ní lifune lɛ awɔli adɔ ní inipe le kapɛ tanɛa ani inide ne aʋa ɛ.

english_verse: The name of the star was Bitter, and a third of the water turned bitter. Many people died because the water was so bitter.
translation_verse: Ɔdzidziobi ye yɛ linyi ne linu si Kutitii lɛ inipe le ni inide ne kapɛ tanɛa kedzi kuni tiitii, lɛ banɔ glegle betse kɔkpɛ kuni yo gi kwidzi tiitii loso o.

english_verse: When the fourth angel blew his trumpet, a third of the sun, a third of the moon, and a third of the stars were struck. They each lost a third of their light. So during a third of the day there was no light, and a third of the night was also without light.
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ néne ye eme yɛ kakuklui ya ɛ, lɛ asa liwo le kapɛ tanɛa ni ɔdzidzi yɛ yɛ kapɛ tanɛa ani badzidziebi ʋa ba kapɛ tanɛa bidɔ, niteme si ba kapɛ tanɛa kedzi litumu, lɛ liwe le lɛ kapɛ tanɛa kedzi litumu, lɛ elesi la kapɛ tanɛa fɛ ɛ kedzi litumu.

english_verse: Then I looked and saw a lone eagle flying across the sky. It was shouting, “Trouble, trouble, trouble to everyone who lives on earth! The other three angels are now going to blow their trumpets.”
translation_verse: Lɛ gi meedi i, menu kadzi katɔ, gi keepruru ní liwɔ lɛ mɛ ɛ, kɛɛpani ni ole gagla ɔtɔ si, “Babaa, babaa, babaa ki banama gi balɛ ní kesea aʋa ɛ, kɔkpɛ kukuklui uliɔ gi Aya yɛ baxwɛdzɛ tiata ʋa gi bɛgɔ ɛ bɛtráme loso.”

english_verse: When the fifth angel blew his trumpet, I saw a star fall from the sky to earth. It was given the key to the tunnel that leads down to the deep pit.
translation_verse: Lɛ Aya yɛ ɔxwɛdzɛ tsunɛ ɛ eme yɛ kakuklui ya ɛ, lɛ mamɔ ɔdzidziobi ɔtɔ, gi awɔli adɔ ní lifunu ne, xe ádɔ kesea aʋa ɛ, lɛ bɛkɔ safi ye gi izɛɛdra lizokpo gluglu le ɛki yɛ ɛ.

english_verse: As it opened the tunnel, smoke poured out like the smoke of a great furnace. The sun and the air turned dark because of the smoke.
translation_verse: Lɛ gi adra lizokpo gluglu le e, kunyɔɔ kwido edɔni niklɔ ŋwisi ligble ʋidi itɔ kunyɔ kinɛ ɛ, lɛ liwo le ni liwɔ lɛ mɛ bidɔ litumu kɔkpɛ kunyɔɔ gi kwido edɔ ni lizokpo gluglu le me loso o.

english_verse: Locusts came out of the smoke and covered the earth. They were given the same power that scorpions have.
translation_verse: Lɛ akikli la edo ɛdɔ ní kunyɔɔ mɛ ba kesea aʋa a, lɛ bɛki la kigagla ŋwisi kiliɛ gi kigaglaɛ kilɛ ní kesea aʋa kutapiadzɔ awla kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: The locusts were told not to harm the grass on the earth or any plant or any tree. They were to punish only those people who did not have God's mark on their foreheads.
translation_verse: Bɛsi ba si, bakízizi siwa, awlakpa wɔwɔ loo ise itɔtɔ ní kesea aʋa, boŋu i, banama kùtu yo gi Aya yɛ lixaŋu nɛ limá ɛ.

english_verse: The locusts were allowed to make them suffer for five months, but not to kill them. The suffering they caused was like the sting of a scorpion.
translation_verse: Lɛ báki ʋa kigagla si tɔ, beye ba a, pɔ̀ tɔ bawa ba nyɔnyɔɛ badzidzi tietsu nyɔŋ. Lɛ kuyeʋiyeʋi uliɔ gi benu i, kulɛ ŋwisi kiliɛ gi katapiadzɔ kizɛɛta ɔnɔ ɔ, xe bizeeyeʋi i kinɛ.

english_verse: In those days people will want to die, but they will not be able to. They will hope for death, but it will escape from them.
translation_verse: Lɛ ní ewe ala klɔ mɛ ɛ, banima biapɛ́ kutse, pɔ̀ batrámɔ kɔ ɔ, lɛ biapɛ́ vevee si betse pɔ̀ kutseo kwiase ní ba su u.

english_verse: These locusts looked like horses ready for battle. On their heads they wore something like gold crowns, and they had human faces.
translation_verse: Lɛ akikli la la kilɛlɛɛ mɛ ɛ, kilɛ ŋwisi isɔ gi bɛbla ɛki kigũ kutata kinɛ ɛ, lɛ bekume bidɔɛtɔ ŋwisi sika ekusikuto kinɛ ɛ, lɛ ba aŋu na mɛ alɛ ŋwisi banɔ aŋu mɛ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Their hair was like a woman's long hair, and their teeth were like those of a lion.
translation_verse: Ba siya sɛ silɛ ŋwisi badzɛ siya kinɛ ɛ, lɛ ba ene na alɛ ŋwisi gyata ʋa ene kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: On their chests they wore armor made of iron. Their wings roared like an army of horse-drawn chariots rushing into battle.
translation_verse: Ba ete na mɛ alɛ ŋwisi ɔlaa kakɔ mɛ ewu bɛkpɛ kinɛ ɛ, lɛ ba siwlasasa sɛ siiyì ŋwisi kikee nì isɔ glegle gi bɛɛtrɛ kigũ kinɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Their tails were like a scorpion's tail with a stinger that had the power to hurt someone for five months.
